The resulting models are capable of processing sequences up to 8,192 tokens, and can be used to compute meaningful embeddings of legal passages, or could quickly rerank hundreds of legal passages for a given search query. We release all model checkpoints publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了现代BERT模型在法律领域的领域自适应，通过在全部美国法院意见上进一步预训练ModernBERT，在相关数据集上取得了显著性能提升，并公开了所有模型检查点。
AI.motivation: 尽管ModernBERT已在大量数据上训练，但作者认为其在专业法律领域仍存在适配需求，需通过领域自适应提升在法律文本任务上的表现。
AI.method: 在全部美国法院意见数据上，采用掩码语言建模（MLM）目标对ModernBERT进行进一步预训练，并对比从头预训练与继续预训练的效果。
AI.result: 进一步预训练的ModernBERT在所有与美国法院意见相关的数据集上均显著优于原始ModernBERT；从头预训练无法达到继续预训练的性能；最终模型支持最长8192词元序列，可用于法律段落嵌入或快速重排序。
AI.conclusion: 对已有的大规模语言模型进行领域特定的继续预训练，比从头预训练更有效；该策略显著提升了ModernBERT在法律领域的实用性，并具备实际部署价值。

title: SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball Action Spotting: Per-Player Attention with Agreement-Based Ensembling
comment: 2 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. SoccerNet 2026 challenge technical report
summary: We present our submission to the SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball Action Spotting challenge, which uses a two-stage pipeline: a Track-Aware Action Detector (TAAD) produces per-player action logits from broadcast video, and a Denoising Sequence Transduction (DST) transformer converts game-state features and TAAD logits into structured event sequences. We improve the TAAD with a temporal transformer that adds cross-frame context, alongside several training fixes. For the DST stage, we introduce a two-stage per-player attention mechanism operating on game-state features, and show that a spatial-first attention ordering (cross-player attention before temporal attention) improves validation Macro-F1 by 1.87%. To exploit architectural diversity, we train four model variants and combine them with a Weighted Event Fusion ensemble that applies agreement filtering to suppress single-model false positives while preserving recall, plus a dedicated exception for the rare tackle class. Our final system improves the challenge Macro-F1 from a baseline of 48.6 to 58.94.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于SoccerNet 2026球员中心球动作定位挑战的两阶段方法：第一阶段Track-Aware Action Detector（TAAD）结合时序Transformer提升动作检测；第二阶段Denoising Sequence Transduction（DST）Transformer引入空间优先的双阶段注意力机制；最后通过加权事件融合集成四模型，显著提升Macro-F1至58.94。
AI.motivation: 提升SoccerNet 2026球员中心球动作定位任务的精度，尤其是对稀有动作（如tackle）的识别和整体事件序列结构建模能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构：1）改进的TAAD模块，加入时序Transformer并优化训练策略；2）DST Transformer模块，设计空间优先的双阶段每球员注意力机制；3）四模型加权事件融合集成，含一致性过滤与tackle类特殊处理。
AI.result: 最终系统将挑战Macro-F1从基线48.6提升至58.94，其中DST中空间优先注意力使验证集Macro-F1提升1.87%。
AI.conclusion: 所提两阶段框架与集成策略在球员中心动作定位任务中显著有效，尤其通过注意力顺序设计和针对性融合策略提升了稀有事件识别与整体结构建模性能。

title: Search for Truth from Reasoning: A Dynamic Representation Editing Framework for Steering LLM Trajectories
summary: Current approaches to enhance Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, such as Chain-of-Thought and "Wait" prompts, primarily encourage models to think more, yet often fail to guide them toward Truth. While Representation Editing (RepE) offers a intrinsic control, its application to dynamic reasoning trajectories remains underexplored. In this work, we bridge this gap by investigating the geometry of truth within unfolding reasoning chains. We uncover three critical insights: (1) Truth is encoded at the sentence level and is entangled with latent reasoning patterns; (2) Effective intervention follows an Uncertainty Principle and a Decay Effect, requiring localization to early, high-entropy forks; (3) Naive steering vectors suffer from noise, risking collateral damage to correct trajectories. Based on these findings, we propose DynaSteer, a dynamic RepE framework. DynaSteer employs pattern clustering to disentangle reasoning manifolds and utilizes Fisher-LDA to project purified truth. By dynamically monitoring lookahead entropy, it selectively steers and rolls back trajectories only when necessary. Comprehensive experimental results on several MATH benchmark verify the effectiveness of DynaSteer, and experiments on out-of-domain coding tasks further confirm its generalization ability. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tianlwang/DynaSteer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynaSteer，一种动态表示编辑框架，通过分析推理链中‘真’的几何结构，在早期高熵分支处精准干预，提升大语言模型推理的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有推理增强方法（如思维链、'Wait'提示）侧重增加思考量，但缺乏对‘真’的引导；Representation Editing（RepE）虽具内在可控性，却未被有效用于动态推理过程。
AI.method: 基于对推理链中‘真’的几何结构分析，提出三个关键发现，并据此设计DynaSteer：利用模式聚类解耦推理流形，Fisher-LDA投影提纯‘真’表征，并通过动态监控前瞻熵选择性干预与回滚。
AI.result: 在多个MATH基准上验证了DynaSteer的有效性；在域外编程任务上也展现出良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DynaSteer实现了对LLM推理过程的细粒度、动态、低干扰控制，为可信AI推理提供了新范式。

title: S-GAI: Spectral Geometry-Aware Initialization for Sigmoidal MLPs -- From Dataset Geometry to Network Weights
summary: Classical universal approximation theorems establish the expressive power of sigmoidal multilayer perceptrons, but they do not prescribe how initial weights should encode the geometry of a data distribution. We propose S-GAI, a spectral geometry-aware initialization framework for one-hidden-layer sigmoidal MLPs. Starting from the constructive idea that sigmoid units can act as smooth half-space gates, we move from hand-specified planar geometry to class-wise spectral geometry estimated from image data. For each class, SVD provides a mean, principal directions, and spectral scales. An energy threshold selects the retained directions, and each retained direction is represented by two sigmoid gates. These class-specific gates form a shared hidden layer initialized directly from the training set. We also formulate a SVD-based subspace classifier as a non-neural geometric reference, which tests whether the estimated spectral class geometry is already discriminative before being embedded into the MLP. Experiments on MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and a more challenging CIFAR-10 test show that the S-GAI-initialized MLP starts from a substantially more informative hidden state than Xavier initialization and reaches comparable final accuracy under full training. When the hidden layer is frozen, training only the output layer still gives stronger performance than frozen random gates, providing evidence that S-GAI effectively embeds class-wise spectral geometry into the MLP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为S-GAI的谱几何感知初始化框架，用于单隐藏层Sigmoid MLP，通过SVD从图像数据中提取类别特定的谱几何特征（均值、主方向、尺度），并用Sigmoid门控表示，从而在初始化阶段即嵌入判别性几何结构。
AI.motivation: 经典通用逼近定理虽证明了Sigmoid MLP的表达能力，但未指导如何根据数据分布几何特性设计初始权重；本文旨在使初始化过程显式编码类别的内在几何结构。
AI.method: 基于Sigmoid单元可作为平滑半空间门的构造性思想，对每类数据进行SVD分解，提取均值、主方向和谱尺度；通过能量阈值筛选主方向，每个保留方向由两个Sigmoid门表示；所有类别的此类门构成共享隐藏层并直接由训练集初始化；同时构建基于SVD的子空间分类器作为非神经几何基线。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10上实验表明：S-GAI初始化使MLP起始隐状态比Xavier初始化更具信息量；全参数训练下达到相当的最终精度；冻结隐藏层仅训输出层时，性能仍优于随机初始化门控，验证其成功嵌入了类别谱几何。
AI.conclusion: S-GAI是一种数据驱动、几何感知的初始化方法，能有效将类别谱结构嵌入单层Sigmoid MLP的初始权重中，提升收敛起点与表征质量，尤其在低训练预算或冻结特征层场景下优势明显。

title: GPC: Large-Scale Generative Pretraining for Transferable Motor Control
summary: Developing controllers capable of completing a wide range of tasks in a natural and life-like manner is a key challenge in enabling practical applications of physics-based character animation. In this work, we introduce Generative Pretrained Controllers (GPC), which leverage tokenization and next-token modeling to create general-purpose, reusable generative controllers from large-scale motion datasets. Our framework utilizes end-to-end reinforcement learning to jointly optimize a "motion vocabulary", modeled via Finite Scalar Quantization (FSQ), along with a corresponding control policy that can map the discrete codes to physics-based controls. After the "codebook" has been learned, the underlying structure of this large vocabulary is modeled by training a GPT-style autoregressive transformer, leading to a powerful generative controller that generates controls for a physically simulated character by performing next-token prediction. Once the generative controller has been trained, we propose a suite of adaptation techniques for finetuning the controller for new downstream tasks. Our proposed framework greatly simplifies the training process compared to previous tokenized methods, and achieves a 99.98% success rate in reproducing a vast corpus of motion clips. The generative controller exhibits a variety of natural emergent behaviors, such as responsive behaviors to perturbations and recovery behaviors after falling. This results in highly robust general purpose controllers for a variety of downstream applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成式预训练控制器（GPC），通过分词和下一个标记建模，从大规模运动数据集中构建通用、可复用的生成式控制器；采用端到端强化学习联合优化运动词典（基于FSQ）与控制策略，并用GPT式自回归Transformer建模词典结构，实现物理仿真角色的控制生成；还提出适配技术用于下游任务微调，显著简化训练流程，在运动复现任务中达99.98%成功率，并展现出抗扰动、跌倒恢复等自然涌现行为。
AI.motivation: 开发能在物理仿真中以自然、类人方式完成多样化任务的通用控制器是物理驱动角色动画实用化的关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出Generative Pretrained Controllers（GPC）：1）用Finite Scalar Quantization（FSQ）构建运动词典（codebook）；2）端到端强化学习联合优化该词典与映射离散码为物理控制的策略；3）用GPT式自回归Transformer对词典结构建模，实现next-token预测式控制生成；4）设计多种微调适配技术用于下游任务。
AI.result: 在大规模运动复现任务中达到99.98%成功率；控制器展现出响应扰动、跌倒后自主恢复等自然涌现行为；相比以往分词方法大幅简化训练流程。
AI.conclusion: GPC框架实现了高鲁棒性、通用性强、可迁移的物理角色控制器，为下游多样化应用提供了统一、高效的基础模型范式。

title: Minority Sentinel: When to Overturn Majority Voting in Multi-Agent LLM Debates
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures. Accepted at the AgentSearch Workshop @ SIGIR 2026, Melbourne, Australia
summary: Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) with Majority Voting is a dominant paradigm for improving LLM reasoning, yet its effectiveness rests on the Condorcet Jury Theorem's assumption of independent errors. Because contemporary LLMs share similar pretraining corpora, their errors are strongly correlated, causing the majority to systematically suppress correct minority opinions, a phenomenon we term Minority Truth. Through debates among three heterogeneous LLM agents on six benchmarks, we find that roughly one in four divergent cases has the minority holding the correct answer, yielding a 10-percentage-point theoretical recovery margin. We propose Minority Sentinel, a lightweight meta-classifier that extracts a multi-dimensional debate fingerprint from debate logs and trains a LightGBM model to decide when to overturn majority voting. Minority Sentinel achieves a stable Flip Precision of 81.2% with positive Net Gain across all six datasets and all 20 random seed trials, demonstrating that debate logs contain sufficient behavioral signals for a non-LLM classifier to reliably recover suppressed minorities without degrading system accuracy. The LLM-as-Judge baseline yields negative Net Gain despite higher recall, confirming that flip safety, not recovery volume, determines intervention value.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Minority Sentinel方法，通过分析多智能体辩论日志，识别并恢复被多数投票压制的正确少数意见，显著提升LLM推理准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多数投票的多智能体辩论（MAD）方法依赖独立错误假设，但实际中大语言模型因共享预训练数据导致错误高度相关，常使正确少数意见被系统性压制（即‘少数真理’问题）。
AI.method: 设计轻量级元分类器Minority Sentinel：从辩论日志中提取多维‘辩论指纹’，用LightGBM模型判断是否应推翻多数投票结果；在三个异构LLM代理间开展辩论，并在六个基准上验证。
AI.result: Minority Sentinel在所有六个数据集及20次随机种子实验中均实现稳定81.2%翻转精度和正净增益；而LLM-as-Judge基线虽召回率更高，却带来负净增益，证明翻转安全性比恢复数量更重要。
AI.conclusion: 辩论日志蕴含足够行为信号，使非LLM分类器能安全、可靠地恢复被压制的少数正确答案，无需牺牲整体系统准确性。

title: HyBIRD: Hyperbolic Bridge Retrieval and Diagnosis for Methodology Inspiration Retrieval
summary: Methodology Inspiration Retrieval (MIR) asks a system to retrieve prior papers whose methods can inspire a new research proposal. Unlike general scientific retrieval, the central challenge is not topical similarity but whether a candidate paper provides concrete mechanisms that can instantiate an abstract methodological need. Existing MIR dense retrievers provide strong paper-level rankings, but the returned lists do not expose how proposal needs are bridged by retrieved methods, where evidence is weak, or which complementary snippets may help. We propose HyBIRD, a frozen-anchor framework that treats MIR as hyperbolic bridge retrieval and post-hoc method diagnosis. HyBIRD keeps a strong MIR dense retriever fixed, learns lightweight point, cone, and factorized hyperbolic bridge variants, and uses LLM-assisted method blocks for post-hoc explanation and evidence selection. On the MIR benchmark, the factorized bridge reaches 59.034 mAP while preserving the dense anchor's strong retrieval behavior. More importantly, HyBIRD converts ranked papers into inspectable query need profiles, factor coverage, maturity views, and complementary evidence bundles. The results suggest that hyperbolic geometry is most useful as calibrated structure over a dense anchor, rather than as a standalone replacement for dense retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyBIRD框架，通过超球面桥接检索与LLM辅助方法诊断，提升方法学灵感检索（MIR）的可解释性与实用性，兼顾检索性能与需求-方法映射透明度。
AI.motivation: 现有MIR系统虽能有效排序论文，但无法揭示检索结果如何具体满足提案的方法学需求，缺乏对证据强度、缺口及互补片段的分析。
AI.method: 提出HyBIRD：冻结强密集检索器作为锚点，学习轻量化的点/锥/因子化超球面桥接变体，并结合LLM生成方法块进行事后解释与证据选择。
AI.result: 在MIR基准上，因子化桥接变体达59.034 mAP；同时生成可检查的需求画像、因子覆盖度、成熟度视图与互补证据包。
AI.conclusion: 超球面几何更适合作为密集检索锚点上的校准结构，而非其替代方案；HyBIRD显著增强了MIR的可解释性与实用价值。

title: Improvement of Robot's Simultaneous Localization and Mapping Using an Effective Transformation to Achieve Linear Model
summary: Nowadays mobile robots have wide engineering applications. Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is an important task of these robots. The major and common algorithms used for this task are based on extended Kalman filter (EKF). One of the main problems in EKF-based SLAM is its divergence. The nonlinearity of motion and observation models and linearization error are the main reasons for the divergence. There have been some efforts to address this problem with limited success. In this paper, by applying a simple compass and using an effective transformation, we transform the non-linear state space model into a linear model. Then, by applying the original KF to this model, we reach a new method, which is called LMKF SLAM. We show that the LMKF SLAM is significantly superior to the state-of-the-art methods, especially EKF-based SLAMs, both in accuracy, convergence, and computational complexity. The proposed method is also more stable with respect to the uncertainty of sensors values and changes in system parameters. Experimental results verify these points.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性化模型和卡尔曼滤波（LMKF SLAM）的新SLAM方法，通过引入简单罗盘并采用有效变换将非线性状态空间模型线性化，从而克服EKF-SLAM的发散问题，在精度、收敛性、计算复杂度及鲁棒性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 解决EKF-SLAM因运动与观测模型非线性及线性化误差导致的发散问题。
AI.method: 引入简单罗盘，结合有效坐标变换将非线性SLAM模型转化为线性模型，并应用标准卡尔曼滤波（KF）进行状态估计。
AI.result: LMKF SLAM在定位建图精度、收敛性、计算效率及对传感器噪声和参数变化的鲁棒性上均显著优于EKF-SLAM等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 线性化建模与KF结合可有效提升SLAM系统性能与稳定性，为移动机器人提供更可靠的定位与建图方案。

title: Turn-Averaged SAEs for Feature Discovery and Long-Context Attribution
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become a useful tool for extracting interpretable features in language models. However, standard SAE architectures operate on individual token activations, meaning that the number of active features scales linearly with context length, and studying long model transcripts becomes difficult. We introduce turn-averaged SAEs, which represent a single Human or Assistant turn with a fixed number of features by learning to reconstruct the average model activation across the turn. We find that turn-averaged features describe a single turn's high-level characteristics more completely than per-token features when judged by an LLM. We also demonstrate that turn-averaged SAEs greatly simplify common downstream uses of SAEs like attribution graphs. Broadly, turn-averaged SAEs make interpretability techniques practical at long context lengths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的稀疏自编码器（SAE）变体——turn-averaged SAE，它通过对人类或助手单轮对话中所有token激活值取平均来学习固定数量的特征表示，从而克服了传统SAE在长上下文下特征数量线性增长的问题，并提升了可解释性分析的实用性。
AI.motivation: 标准稀疏自编码器（SAEs）基于单个token的激活进行操作，导致活跃特征数随上下文长度线性增长，难以用于长文本分析。
AI.method: 提出turn-averaged SAE：对每一轮（Human/Assistant turn）内所有token的模型激活取平均，再以此平均激活为重建目标训练稀疏自编码器，从而获得固定维度的、代表整轮语义的特征。
AI.result: turn-averaged SAE提取的特征比逐token特征更能完整刻画单轮对话的高层语义（经LLM评估）；显著简化归因图等下游可解释性任务。
AI.conclusion: turn-averaged SAE使可解释性技术在长上下文场景中变得切实可行，为大语言模型的高层行为分析提供了更高效、更紧凑的工具。

title: Automated Quality Assessment of Geospatial Vector Data: A GeoAI Approach using Spatial Representation Learning
summary: Geospatial vector data quality is a foundational research topic in GIS, yet classic rule-based quality assessment algorithms often struggle with diverse urban morphologies and massive data volumes. Recently, Geospatial Artificial Intelligence (GeoAI) shows promising potential for automating geospatial analysis, while its application to native vector data remains largely underexplored. To fill this research gap, we proposed Topo4Vec, an automated GeoAI framework, designed for scalable vector data quality assessment via advanced Spatial Representation Learning (SRL). Specifically, Topo4Vec relax the labor-intensive manual annotation process via topological error simulation, such as overlapping polygons and street network connectivity errors e.g., overshoots and undershoots. Then, it leverages state-of-the-art SRL approaches to encode complex, native vector geometries (e.g., polylines and polygons) into a latent space where topological errors are isolated from valid ones. A systematic performance evaluation across three study areas (Los Angeles, Munich, and Singapore) demonstrates the effectiveness and robustness of Topo4Vec, achieving a peak accuracy of 0.99 for detecting overlapping building footprints and 0.60 for overshoots and undershoots in street networks. Moreover, lessons learned from Topo4Vec shed a promising light into a scalable and autonomous GeoAI approach for large-scale vector data consistency and quality monitoring within the fast-growing geospatial data ecosystems. The code and data used in the paper are made openly available in https://figshare.com/s/612148eeb4bccadbd715.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Topo4Vec框架，利用空间表征学习（SRL）实现大规模地理矢量数据质量的自动化评估，通过拓扑错误模拟减少人工标注依赖，在多个城市数据上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 经典基于规则的质量评估方法难以应对多样化的城市形态和海量数据；GeoAI在栅格数据中已有进展，但在原生矢量数据质量评估中的应用尚属空白。
AI.method: 提出Topo4Vec框架：1）通过模拟重叠多边形、道路网络连接错误（如过冲/欠冲）生成训练样本；2）采用先进空间表征学习方法将原生矢量几何（如折线、多边形）编码至潜在空间，分离错误与正常结构。
AI.result: 在洛杉矶、慕尼黑、新加坡三地测试中，建筑轮廓重叠检测准确率达0.99，道路过冲/欠冲检测达0.60；代码与数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: Topo4Vec为大规模矢量数据一致性与质量监控提供了可扩展、自主化的GeoAI新范式，推动地理空间数据生态的智能化演进。

title: Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often face ethical tradeoffs in which several responses may be defensible but express different priorities, such as fairness, honesty, courage, or restraint. We introduce VirtueMap, a framework for describing these patterns through an Aristotelian virtue-ethics lens. Instead of asking for a single correct answer, VirtueMap asks humans or LLMs to rank all five responses to each of seven general, non-lethal, non-political, and non-religious ethical dilemmas. To define the reference orderings used for scoring, we first proposed, for each dilemma and virtue, an ordering of the five responses from most to least expressive of that virtue. We then collected more than 100 respondent evaluations per ordering and retained it as operational ground truth only when at least 95% confirmed it. Rankings are scored against these retained orderings using normalized Borda alignment, yielding profiles over Practical Wisdom, Justice, Truthfulness, Courage, and Temperance. We apply VirtueMap to nine LLM families in a repeated-run evaluation and find high mean rank consistency (90.3%), with the largest differences appearing on Courage, Temperance, and Justice. We also release an interactive website that computes profiles locally in the browser and compares respondents with measured LLM profiles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VirtueMap框架，基于亚里士多德德性伦理学视角，通过人类对五种回应的排序评估大语言模型在实践智慧、正义、诚实、勇气与节制五种德性上的表现，并验证其在九大家族LLM上的稳定性和差异性。
AI.motivation: 解决大语言模型在面对伦理权衡时缺乏系统性德性评估方法的问题，超越单一正确答案范式，关注不同伦理优先级（如公平、诚实、勇气、克制）的表达差异。
AI.method: 构建包含七个通用非敏感伦理困境的测试集；为每种困境和五种德性分别定义响应排序（最至最不体现该德性），经≥95%人类被试验证后作为操作性真值基准；采用标准化Borda一致性得分，生成LLM在五种德性上的量化画像；对九大家族LLM进行重复评测，并开发交互式网页工具。
AI.result: 九大家族LLM平均排名一致性达90.3%；在勇气、节制和正义维度上差异最大；发布可本地运行的交互式德性画像分析网站。
AI.conclusion: VirtueMap为LLM伦理能力提供了可解释、可比较、多维的德性评估新范式，揭示了当前模型在不同德性维度上的系统性偏差与稳定性。

title: scKDGM: KAN-guided Dynamic Graph Masked Learning for Single-Cell RNA-seq Clustering
summary: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) clustering is essential for identifying cell types, but high dimensionality, sparsity, dropout, and technical noise hinder robust expression representation and cell graph construction. Existing masked autoencoders mainly use expression recovery for feature reconstruction, while graph clustering methods usually depend on fixed KNN graphs and do not feed recovered expression back into graph optimization. We propose scKDGM, a KAN-guided dynamic graph masked learning framework for scRNA-seq clustering. scKDGM uses graph-aware distribution preserving gene masking (GDP-Mask) to perturb cell identity, a KAN-based TAKGCN encoder to learn masked-view representations, mask-guided expression recovery to construct a dynamic graph, and cross-view contrastive learning to transfer recovery signals into topology updates. A ZINB loss models overdispersion and zero inflation. Experiments on 12 real scRNA-seq datasets show that scKDGM outperforms 10 baselines in average NMI and ARI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出scKDGM框架，通过图感知分布保持的基因掩码、KAN引导的动态图学习和跨视图对比学习，显著提升单细胞RNA测序数据的聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理scRNA-seq数据时面临高维性、稀疏性、dropout及技术噪声等问题，导致表达表征与细胞图构建不鲁棒；且当前掩码自编码器与图聚类方法存在表达恢复与图优化脱节的问题。
AI.method: 提出scKDGM：采用图感知分布保持的基因掩码（GDP-Mask）扰动细胞身份，基于KAN的TAKGCN编码器学习掩码视图表示，掩码引导的表达恢复构建动态图，并引入跨视图对比学习将恢复信号融入拓扑更新；同时使用ZINB损失建模零膨胀与过离散性。
AI.result: 在12个真实scRNA-seq数据集上实验表明，scKDGM在平均NMI和ARI指标上优于10种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: scKDGM通过联合优化表达恢复与动态图构建，有效提升了单细胞聚类的准确性和鲁棒性，为scRNA-seq分析提供了新范式。

title: L2D2-GS: Learning to Densify for Feedforward Dynamic Gaussian Scene Reconstruction
summary: High-fidelity reconstruction of dynamic urban environments is a cornerstone of autonomous driving simulation and large-scale world modeling. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has established a new standard for real-time rendering, its reliance on expensive per-scene optimization limits scalability. Conversely, recent feedforward methods that infer Gaussian parameters offer faster speed but face fundamental bottlenecks: they are memory-prohibitive at high resolutions and struggle to fuse dense multi-view observations consistently. This paper presents L2D2-GS, a unified framework that reformulates generalizable reconstruction not as a one-shot regression, but as a robust iterative process of optimization and densification. To resolve the ambiguity of supervision in primitive generation, we propose a self-supervised densification policy that derives explicit reward signals from global reconstruction gains to guide local densification. Furthermore, we mitigate irreversible early-stage artifacts through a geometric regularization mechanism, utilizing reparameterization to constrain the optimization manifold and prevent convergence to poor local optima. Extensive experiments on the PandaSet and Waymo datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction fidelity and strong zero-shot generalization, while using fewer primitives than competing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出L2D2-GS框架，通过自监督稠密化策略与几何正则化机制，实现高效、高保真、可泛化的动态城市环境三维重建，优于现有3D高斯溅射及前馈方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射方法依赖逐场景优化、扩展性差；而前馈方法在高分辨率下内存消耗大、难以一致融合多视角观测，亟需兼顾速度、精度与泛化能力的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出L2D2-GS：将可泛化重建建模为优化与稠密化交替的迭代过程；设计自监督稠密化策略，利用全局重建增益生成局部稠密化奖励信号；引入基于重参数化的几何正则化，防止早期不可逆伪影和陷入劣质局部最优。
AI.result: 在PandaSet和Waymo数据集上达到SOTA重建保真度与强零样本泛化能力，且所需高斯原语数量少于各基线方法。
AI.conclusion: L2D2-GS通过解耦优化与稠密化、引入自监督与几何约束，有效平衡了重建质量、效率与泛化性，为大规模动态场景建模提供了新范式。

title: ECHO: Learning Epistemically Adaptive Language Agents with Turn-Level Credit
summary: What does it mean for a language agent to be adaptive? Effective multi-turn agents must decide what information to seek, how to use new evidence, and when they are certain enough to act. We introduce Epistemic Decision Processes (EDPs), a belief-state formulation of multi-turn information seeking in which actions produce external observations that update the agent's posterior over a latent task variable. EDPs make epistemic adaptivity explicit: good policies choose actions that are useful under the current belief, not merely those that correlate with eventual success. We prove that belief-agnostic policies can suffer errors that compound exponentially over the horizon, and that aggregate trajectory returns can fail to identify the per-turn Bayesian advantage needed for epistemic credit. We then introduce ECHO (Epistemic Credit for History-Conditioned Optimization), a practical clipped policy-gradient objective that assigns turn-level credit using posterior-sensitive rewards. In the Clue Selector Game, a novel controlled evidence-seeking benchmark, we show that ECHO substantially improves resolution, information gain, and efficiency over trajectory-level GRPO, and matches or exceeds frontier baselines on epistemic metrics such as grounding, recovery, and calibration while producing almost no visible reasoning text.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Epistemic Decision Processes（EDPs）框架，显式建模语言智能体在多轮信息获取中的信念更新与适应性决策，并设计ECHO算法实现基于后验敏感奖励的每轮信用分配，在Clue Selector Game等任务上显著提升信息获取效率与认知指标。
AI.motivation: 现有语言智能体缺乏对‘认知适应性’的显式建模，即如何根据当前信念动态选择信息、更新判断并决定行动；轨迹级奖励无法准确反映每步的认知价值，导致策略学习偏差。
AI.method: 提出Epistemic Decision Processes（EDPs）形式化框架，定义基于后验信念的动作选择机制；理论分析信念无关策略的误差累积问题；设计ECHO目标函数——一种带裁剪的策略梯度方法，利用后验敏感奖励进行历史条件下的逐轮信用分配。
AI.result: 在新构建的Clue Selector Game基准上，ECHO显著优于轨迹级GRPO，在解决率、信息增益和效率上提升明显；在接地性（grounding）、恢复力（recovery）和校准度（calibration）等认知指标上达到或超越前沿基线，且推理文本极少。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模认知适应性（epistemic adaptivity）对多轮语言代理至关重要；ECHO通过后验敏感的逐轮信用分配，有效提升智能体的信息寻求能力与决策可靠性，为可解释、高效的语言代理设计提供新范式。

title: A Systems-Level Analysis of Sensitivity, Robustness, and Stability in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are often evaluated using final answer accuracy, even though their failures can originate from preprocessing, retrieval, context packing, or generation. This paper presents a controlled empirical study of RAG sensitivity, robustness, and stability across 56 experimental runs. We evaluate how chunk size, retrieval depth (top k), embedding-based reranking, probabilistic retrieval noise, and repeated seeded runs affect retrieval, context packing, and generation behavior. Using a fixed 500-question QA subset mapped to 20,958 unique corpus contexts, we analyze both final answer metrics and intermediate failure modes. Across these experiments, retrieval-oriented metrics improved under broader retrieval settings, while downstream exact-match and F1 scores often behaved non-monotonically. We also observe preprocessing-induced answer loss under smaller chunk sizes, progressive degradation under retrieval corruption, and higher observed variance in broader retrieval regimes. These findings suggest that RAG evaluation should include sensitivity, robustness, stability, and multi-stage failure analysis rather than relying only on final answer accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文对RAG系统进行了56组受控实验，系统评估其在不同设置（如块大小、检索深度、重排序、噪声等）下的敏感性、鲁棒性和稳定性，发现最终答案准确率无法反映中间阶段失败，主张多阶段、多维度评估。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG评估过度依赖最终答案准确率，忽视预处理、检索、上下文打包和生成各阶段的潜在失败模式。
AI.method: 在固定500题QA子集和20958个唯一语境上，开展56组受控实验，系统调节chunk size、top-k、嵌入重排序、概率检索噪声及重复随机种子，分析检索、上下文打包与生成各阶段指标。
AI.result: 检索指标随检索范围扩大而提升，但下游EM/F1呈非单调变化；小chunk导致预处理答案丢失；检索污染引发渐进式性能下降；宽检索范围下观测方差更高。
AI.conclusion: RAG评估应纳入敏感性、鲁棒性、稳定性及多阶段失效分析，不能仅依赖最终答案准确率。

title: FADA: Few-Shot Domain Adaptation via Dynamics Alignment for Humanoid Control
summary: High-precision humanoid control is limited by target-domain dynamics mismatch, where the same control objective can induce different realized motions under changes in terrain, payload, or actuator response. Existing methods either pursue zero-shot transfer through domain randomization or in-context adaptation without target-domain specialization, or require heavy adaptation pipelines that leverage target-domain data, such as model calibration, residual learning, or policy retraining. In this paper, we present FADA (Few-Shot Domain Adaptation via Dynamics Alignment), a three-stage Planner-Inverse Dynamics Model (Planner-IDM) framework for few-shot adaptation in humanoid control. FADA first trains an oracle policy with privileged information and then distills the oracle behavior into a deployable Planner-IDM student through DAgger. At deployment, FADA freezes the planner and finetunes only the IDM using approximately 2 minutes of target-domain rollouts with standard supervised learning. Rather than requiring optimal demonstrations or rewards, FADA uses the paired actions and observations that are observed during these rollouts as supervision, aligning the IDM's action generation with target-domain dynamics. Experiments show that FADA outperforms both in-context and end-to-end adaptation baselines, improving task performance under dynamics shifts and enabling real humanoid robots to execute diverse high-precision whole-body tasks. Implementation details and qualitative hardware rollout videos are available at https://lecar-lab.github.io/FADA-humanoid/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FADA框架，通过三阶段Planner-IDM结构实现人形机器人在新动力学环境下的少样本自适应控制，仅需约2分钟目标域数据微调逆动力学模型，无需奖励信号或最优演示，显著提升跨域任务性能。
AI.motivation: 高精度人形控制受限于目标域动力学不匹配问题，现有方法要么缺乏目标域特化能力，要么依赖繁重的适配流程。
AI.method: 提出FADA（Few-Shot Domain Adaptation via Dynamics Alignment），包含三阶段Planner-IDM框架：先用特权信息训练oracle策略，再通过DAgger蒸馏为可部署的Planner-IDM学生模型；部署时冻结Planner，仅用约2分钟目标域动作-观测对微调IDM。
AI.result: FADA在动力学偏移下优于上下文内适应与端到端适应基线，提升任务性能，并在真实人形机器人上成功执行多种高精度全身任务。
AI.conclusion: FADA提供了一种轻量、高效、无需奖励信号的少样本动力学对齐方法，为人形机器人快速适应新环境提供了实用可行的解决方案。

title: Depth-Staggered Fibonacci Spacing for Sparse Attention: Static Schedules Beat Learned Dilation and Extrapolate Where Dense Attention Fails
summary: We study sparse self-attention in which each query attends to a dense local window plus a set of Fibonacci-spaced offsets, with a per-layer scalar alpha that compresses or expands the spacing. Across 21 language models trained under one matched recipe (60M parameters, 512 hidden, 16 layers, 426M tokens), we compare four ways of setting alpha across depth: fixed, per-layer learned, a static linear stagger, and a coprime (anti-gridding) reassignment of that stagger, together with a reach-matched power-of-2 control. Three results stand out. First, a static per-layer stagger improves perplexity over both fixed and learned alpha, and the gain is base-agnostic: applying the same stagger to a power-of-2 base lifts it above fixed Fibonacci and to parity with learned Fibonacci attention. Second, learning per layer is inert: it does not beat the static schedule and costs roughly five times the inference latency. Third, and most consequential, all sparse variants extrapolate to four times their training length with little or no degradation, whereas a recipe-matched dense baseline collapses (perplexity rises by 201% at 4x length); we attribute this to fixed-offset attention only ever querying relative positions seen during training. We also report two honest negatives: at training length the best sparse model has about 26% higher perplexity than the dense baseline, and the staggering gain is uniform across context positions rather than concentrated at long range.

AI.tldr: 本文研究稀疏自注意力机制，提出基于斐波那契间隔与可调缩放参数alpha的注意力模式，并系统比较不同alpha设置策略（固定、逐层学习、静态线性错位、互质重分配），发现静态错位策略在困惑度和外推能力上最优，且所有稀疏变体在4倍训练长度下保持稳定，而稠密基线严重退化。
AI.motivation: 提升Transformer模型的长程建模能力与推理效率，同时解决稀疏注意力在长度外推中的泛化问题。
AI.method: 设计一种稀疏自注意力机制：每个查询关注一个密集局部窗口加一组斐波那契间隔的远距离位置；引入每层标量alpha控制间隔密度；在统一训练配置下（60M参数、16层等）对比四种alpha调度策略，并与幂次为2的基准及稠密基线对比。
AI.result: 1）静态逐层错位alpha显著优于固定/学习型alpha，且迁移至幂次为2基底后性能达学习型斐波那契水平；2）逐层学习alpha无增益但增加5倍推理延迟；3）所有稀疏变体在4倍训练长度下困惑度基本不变，而稠密基线困惑度上升201%；另发现稀疏模型在训练长度上困惑度比稠密高约26%，且性能增益均匀分布于各上下文位置。
AI.conclusion: 静态错位的斐波那契稀疏注意力是一种高效、强外推的替代方案，其成功源于固定相对位置查询机制，为长上下文建模提供了新思路，但需权衡训练长度下的精度损失。

title: Few-class Fidelity: Evaluating Explanations of Real-conditions CNN classifiers with Optimized Perturbations
summary: The wide use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) in numerous domains and real-world classification applications is justified by their high precision and automation speed, helping users concentrate on higher-expertise tasks. To better understand the models and avoid bias during deployment, eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques can be used after training. But as the list of XAI solutions expand, comparisons between them diverge, and consensus over their evaluation cannot be reached. This paper proposes a variation of Fidelity-based XAI metrics, with a focus on real-conditions applications, where the number of classes is often low. The approach generates in-distribution, uncertainty-provoking perturbations, to ensure proper measurement of the XAI methods faithfulness. As demonstration of the evaluation framework usefulness, it is compared with human-centric object localization and segmentation metrics. Once applied to both medical and natural imaging applications, it highlights the intricate correlation between domain, data curation, and XAI solution choices in order to validate training of a new CNN model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向实际应用场景（尤其是低类别数任务）的保真度导向XAI评估新方法，通过生成分布内且引发不确定性的扰动来更准确衡量解释方法的忠实性，并在医学与自然图像任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法缺乏统一、可靠的评估标准，尤其在真实场景（如低类别分类）下难以衡量解释的忠实性；需建立更贴近实际应用的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出一种改进的基于保真度（Fidelity-based）的XAI评估指标，核心是生成能引发模型不确定性但仍在数据分布内的扰动，以更鲁棒地检验解释方法对模型决策的忠实反映。
AI.result: 该评估框架在医学和自然图像任务中展现出有效性，揭示了领域特性、数据质量与XAI方法选择之间的复杂关联，为CNN模型训练后的可信验证提供了新依据。
AI.conclusion: 保真度评估必须适配真实部署条件（如低类别数），所提扰动生成策略提升了XAI评估的实用性与可靠性；XAI方法的选择应与具体领域和数据特性协同考量。

title: An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe
summary: Treatment reasoning underpins every therapeutic decision, integrating disease context, comorbidities, medications, contraindications, and evolving biomedical knowledge to select an appropriate therapy. It is inherently iterative: candidates are weighed against many constraints, revised as evidence emerges, and grounded in verifiable sources. Here we introduce ATHENA-R1, an AI agent for treatment reasoning across all FDA approved drugs since 1939, trained by reinforcement learning over a universe of 212 biomedical tools. At each step it identifies missing information, selects and runs relevant tools, and incorporates the evidence. To train it without human-annotated traces, we build a two-level self-learning framework: multi-agent systems construct the tools, tasks, and reasoning trajectories for supervised fine-tuning, then reinforcement learning with scientific feedback rewards reasoning quality (evidence gathering, grounded tool use, logical non-redundancy). Across five benchmarks of 3,168 drug reasoning tasks and 456 patient treatment cases, ATHENA-R1 outperforms language models and tool-use systems, reaching 94.7% accuracy on open-ended drug reasoning and 82.9% on treatment reasoning, 17.8 and 10.7 points above GPT-5. In blinded evaluations by experts from 28 rare disease organizations, it is preferred over reference models on all criteria, and physicians rated it favorably on complex hospitalized cardiovascular and infectious-disease cases. Adverse-event hypotheses it generated, tested in electronic health records from 5.4 million patients, reached adjusted odds ratios of 1.48-1.84, with no elevation among negative controls. Because it requires knowing what evidence to seek before concluding, treatment reasoning has long been hard for AI; we show it can be reframed as a learnable process of iterative evidence gathering that reinforcement learning can train AI to perform.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATHENA-R1，一个基于强化学习、能进行治疗推理的AI代理，通过212个生物医学工具迭代收集证据，在药物与治疗推理任务上显著超越现有模型，并经专家和真实电子病历验证其有效性与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 治疗推理具有高度复杂性和迭代性，需整合疾病背景、共病、用药、禁忌等多维约束，并依赖可验证证据，传统AI难以胜任。
AI.method: 构建双层自学习框架：多智能体系统生成工具、任务与推理轨迹用于监督微调；再以科学反馈为奖励信号，通过强化学习优化证据收集、工具使用合理性与逻辑非冗余性。
AI.result: 在3168个药物推理任务和456例患者治疗案例中，ATHENA-R1分别达到94.7%和82.9%准确率，较GPT-5提升17.8和10.7个百分点；获28个罕见病组织专家盲评首选；其生成的不良事件假设在540万患者EHR中验证OR=1.48–1.84。
AI.conclusion: 治疗推理可被重构为可学习的迭代证据搜集过程，强化学习能有效训练AI完成该过程，突破AI在临床决策中的关键瓶颈。

title: Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation for Regression
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 25 pages, 8 figures. Project page: https://crda-project.github.io
summary: Data-driven modeling in real-world regression tasks often suffers from limited training samples, high collection costs, and noisy observations. Inspired by the impact of data augmentation in vision and language, we propose a novel Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation (CRDA) technique for tabular regression. Our key insight is that once a regressor has modeled the systematic component of the data, the remaining noise can be viewed as an invariant residual that remains stable under small perturbations of carefully selected features. We exploit this residual invariance to generate new, yet realistic, training samples, effectively expanding the dataset without requiring additional real data. Our method is model-agnostic and readily applicable to various types of regressors. In experiments across datasets from a variety of benchmark repositories, on average, CRDA reduces an MLP Regressor's MSE by 22.9% and an XGBoost Regressor's MSE by 6.4%. When compared to existing state-of-the-art data generators and augmentation techniques, CRDA consistently outperforms in MSE reduction. By adding principled counterfactual variations to the training data, our method offers a simple and efficient remedy for noise-prone, small-sample regression settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向表格回归任务的新型反事实残差数据增强方法（CRDA），利用回归模型残差的不变性生成真实可信的新样本，在多个基准数据集上显著降低MSE，且方法模型无关、简单高效。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的回归任务常面临训练样本少、采集成本高和观测噪声大等问题，而现有数据增强技术在表格数据上效果有限。
AI.method: 提出反事实残差数据增强（CRDA）方法：先用回归器建模数据系统性成分，再利用其残差在特定特征微小扰动下的不变性，生成新的合理训练样本；该方法不依赖具体模型。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CRDA使MLP回归器MSE平均降低22.9%，XGBoost回归器MSE平均降低6.4%，且整体优于现有SOTA数据生成与增强方法。
AI.conclusion: CRDA为噪声大、样本少的表格回归任务提供了一种原理清晰、简单高效的增强方案，具有良好的通用性和实用性。

title: DR-GS: Physically-Based Deformable and Relightable 2D Gaussians
summary: Gaussian splatting (GS) has garnered significant attention in VR/AR and digital content creation due to its explicit parameterization and efficient rendering capabilities. However, existing GS-based methods for deformable objects face two key limitations: (i) illumination is erroneously baked into textures, causing physically inconsistent responses under dynamic deformations and lighting changes; (ii) snapshot-based reconstruction restricts post-reconstruction material editing. To address these challenges, we propose Deformable and Relightable GS (DR-GS), a unified Gaussian framework that integrates physically-based inverse rendering, relighting, and deformation-aware manipulation. Through explicitly disentangling geometry, illumination, and material representations, DR-GS overcomes the limitations of static snapshots, resolving unrealistic appearance under varying conditions while enabling post-reconstruction parameter editing. Extensive experiments show that DR-GS achieves leading visual quality across static reconstruction, dynamic deformation, and relighting, reliably preserving reflections and specular highlights on glossy surfaces. It further establishes a fully decoupled geometry-illumination-material pipeline, enabling high-quality 3D asset creation and comprehensive post-editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deformable and Relightable GS (DR-GS)，一种统一的高斯溅射框架，通过解耦几何、光照与材质表示，解决现有GS方法在可变形物体中光照烘焙错误和无法后编辑材质的问题，实现高质量重建、动态形变与重光照，并支持反射与高光细节保留及全面后期编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯溅射（GS）的可变形物体建模方法存在两个关键问题：一是光照被错误地烘焙进纹理，导致在动态形变和光照变化下物理不一致；二是快照式重建限制了重建后的材质编辑能力。
AI.method: 提出DR-GS框架，融合基于物理的逆向渲染、重光照与形变感知操作，显式解耦几何、光照和材质表示，构建完全解耦的geometry-illumination-material流水线。
AI.result: 在静态重建、动态形变和重光照任务上均达到领先视觉质量，能可靠保持光泽表面的反射与高光细节，并支持高质量3D资产生成与全面后期参数编辑。
AI.conclusion: DR-GS克服了传统GS方法在物理一致性和可编辑性上的局限，为VR/AR与数字内容创作提供了更真实、灵活且可控的显式三维表征新范式。

title: Sparse Sensor Placement in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Control of Rayleigh-Bénard Convection
summary: This paper studies sparse sensor placement for control of Rayleigh-Bénard convection with multi-agent reinforcement learning. We train dense expert policies with windowed observations and distill sparse apprentice policies by supervised learning with grouped regularization on encoder input weights. The framework combines ordered non-convex grouped regularization and iterative reweighted grouped regularization, and uses a grouping construction that enforces consistent pruning across overlapping observation windows. Experiments with fixed and varying initial conditions show that Multi-Agent Transformer policies train more stably than proximal policy optimization baselines, while sparse apprentices retain control behavior comparable to dense experts. Sparsity results are strong for the proposed grouped methods across settings, including maximal sparsity in all fixed-initial-condition setting variants and maximal or near-maximal sparsity in varying-initial-condition setting variants. As an additional proof of concept, training from learned minimal sensor sets reduces per-agent observation size from 360 to 12 and preserves the overall training trend in simulation while reducing data throughput. The results provide both an interpretable basis for identifying control-relevant spatial regions and state components, and a practical pathway toward sensor-efficient control under realistic hardware constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多智能体强化学习与分组正则化的稀疏传感器布置方法，用于Rayleigh-Bénard对流控制，实现了高稀疏性下仍保持良好控制性能，并提升了训练稳定性与硬件实用性。
AI.motivation: 在实际硬件约束下实现传感器高效、可解释的控制，需在保证控制性能的同时大幅减少传感器数量。
AI.method: 采用多智能体Transformer训练稠密专家策略，再通过带有序非凸分组正则化和迭代重加权分组正则化的监督学习蒸馏出稀疏学徒策略；分组设计确保重叠观测窗口间输入权重一致剪枝。
AI.result: 在固定和变化初值条件下均达到最大或近最大稀疏性（如初值固定时达100%稀疏）；稀疏学徒策略控制性能接近稠密专家；最小传感器集将单智能体观测维度从360降至12，显著降低数据吞吐量且不破坏训练趋势。
AI.conclusion: 所提分组正则化框架不仅提供了可解释的控制关键区域识别依据，也为面向真实硬件部署的稀疏传感控制提供了实用路径。

title: Memory Shot for Long-Term Dialogue
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in general conversation, instruction following, and complex reasoning. However, in long-term dialogue settings, they often struggle to locate and utilize historical information most relevant to the current query. Existing approaches address this issue by constructing structured text-centered memory units through compressing and reorganizing user interaction history. However, these systems often rely on brute-force extraction of crucial evidence to associate episodes across dialogue sessions, causing substantial computational overhead and weakening structural cues such as speaker transitions, turn boundaries, and local contextual relationships. To avoid fragile text-based memory representations, we propose MemShot, which leverages dialogue structuring for long-term dialogue modeling and relies on the model's internal visual reasoning capabilities to associate key episodes. Specifically, MemShot renders local contiguous dialogue spans into structured visual memory units, preserving meta-information and chronological dialogue turns while avoiding heavy-weight textual memory construction. Experimental results show that MemShot achieves stable and competitive performance on both LoCoMo and LongMemEval, while substantially shortening the memory construction pipeline and delivering 70$\times$ speedup. Further analysis reveals that MemShot enhances the localization and utilization of historical evidence by directing memory processing toward structured local dialogue cues rather than surface-level lexical matching in a flat text stream. All codes are released on https://github.com/NEUIR/MemShot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemShot，一种利用对话结构化和模型内部视觉推理能力来建模长时对话记忆的新方法，通过将局部连续对话渲染为结构化视觉记忆单元，避免了传统文本记忆构建的计算开销，显著提升历史信息定位与利用效率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在长时对话中难以有效定位和利用相关历史信息；传统基于文本压缩与重组的记忆方法计算开销大，且削弱了说话人转换、话轮边界等结构线索。
AI.method: MemShot将局部连续对话片段渲染为结构化视觉记忆单元，保留元信息与时间顺序，利用模型内部视觉推理能力关联关键对话片段，避免显式文本记忆构建。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和LongMemEval上达到稳定且具竞争力的性能，内存构建流程大幅缩短，速度提升70倍；分析表明其通过聚焦结构化局部对话线索而非表层词汇匹配，提升了历史证据的定位与利用能力。
AI.conclusion: MemShot提供了一种更鲁棒、高效、结构感知的长时对话记忆建模范式，为克服LLM在持续对话中的记忆瓶颈提供了新思路。

title: The Speedup Paradox: Rethinking Inference Speed-Quality Trade-off in Embodied Tasks
summary: Embodied foundation models have recently been widely used to improve robot generalization and task success rates. Previous works apply lossy efficient-inference techniques such as quantization, pruning, and asynchronous inference, accepting small action quality degradation in exchange for lower per-step computation cost and inter-action latency. However, unlike traditional static ML tasks, embodied tasks involve repeated interaction with the environment, and task-level performance is determined not only by per-step cost, but also by closed-loop effects unique to embodied execution, which remain insufficiently characterized in current efficient-inference studies. In this work, we propose TISED (\underline{T}ask-level \underline{I}nference \underline{S}peedup \underline{E}ffect \underline{D}ecomposition), an analytical framework that unifies diverse lossy inference optimization techniques and decomposes their effects on static and dynamic tasks, and uncovers some paradoxical effects on task-level performance: (1) on \textit{static tasks}, optimization sometimes can lengthen end-to-end per-task completion time even as per-step latency drops; (2) on \textit{dynamic tasks}, moderate lossy optimization can raise task success rate even above the baseline; and (3) the monotonicity and sweet-spot location of both effects can shift with hardware configuration. Together, our findings provide a new perspective on adapting inference optimization techniques to embodied tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TISED框架，用于分析损失性推理优化技术对具身任务（静态与动态）的端到端性能影响，揭示了其反直觉效应：如静态任务中单步延迟下降却导致总完成时间增加，动态任务中适度优化反而提升成功率，且效果受硬件配置影响。
AI.motivation: 现有高效推理技术在具身任务中忽视了闭环交互带来的任务级性能变化，缺乏对静态与动态任务中损失性优化效果的系统性刻画。
AI.method: 提出TISED分析框架，统一建模多种损失性推理优化技术，并分解其在静态任务和动态任务中的影响，结合理论分析与实证验证。
AI.result: 发现三类反直觉现象：(1)静态任务中单步加速可能导致整体完成时间变长；(2)动态任务中适度损失性优化可提升任务成功率；(3)上述效应的单调性与最优拐点随硬件配置变化。
AI.conclusion: 损失性推理优化对具身任务的影响不能仅以单步延迟衡量，需从任务级闭环视角重新评估，TISED为面向具身AI的推理优化提供了新范式。

title: SEAD: Competence-Aware On-Policy Distillation via Entropy-Guided Supervision
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has a property absent in offline distillation and RL: teacher supervision quality depends on student competence. Incoherent rollouts yield noisy gradients; already-mastered tokens yield redundant ones. This creates waste at three scales (tokens, training phases, and prompts) yet existing methods supervise uniformly. We introduce SEAD, which uses entropy as a unified probe of this competence-dependent degradation at three scales: (1) joint teacher-student entropy partitions tokens into zones receiving tailored divergences or zero gradient (approx. 50% skipped); (2) a cosine schedule anneals from forward to reverse KL as competence grows; (3) a competence-gated curriculum introduces prompts easy-to-hard. These components are symbiotically necessary: token selection requires coherent rollouts (curriculum), annealing requires monotonic improvement (also curriculum). On OLMo-3 (7B to 32B), SEAD achieves +4.8 avg accuracy over vanilla OPD across six math benchmarks, with ablations confirming super-additive interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEAD方法，通过熵作为统一探针，在token、训练阶段和prompt三个尺度上动态调整教师监督，显著提升在线蒸馏在数学基准上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有在线蒸馏方法在监督过程中未考虑学生能力对教师监督质量的影响，导致在token、训练阶段和prompt三个尺度上存在冗余和噪声梯度，造成资源浪费。
AI.method: SEAD方法利用联合师生熵来划分token区域并定制化散度或跳过梯度；采用余弦调度策略随学生能力增长从前向KL逐步过渡到逆向KL；设计基于能力门控的课程学习，按难易程度引入prompt。
AI.result: 在OLMo-3（7B至32B）模型上，SEAD在六个数学基准上平均准确率比基础在线蒸馏提升+4.8，消融实验验证各组件具有超加性交互作用。
AI.conclusion: SEAD通过多尺度自适应监督机制有效缓解了在线蒸馏中因学生能力变化带来的监督质量下降问题，为高效知识蒸馏提供了新范式。

title: RADIANT-PET: Reasoning-Augmented PET/CT Lesion Segmentation with Large Language Models and Reinforcement Learning
summary: Accurate lesion segmentation in PET/CT is critical for oncology, yet remains challenging because physiologic tracer uptake and artifacts can mimic malignant signal. We present RADIANT-PET, a reasoning-augmented framework that couples a high-sensitivity voxel-level segmentation model with lesion-level large language model (LLM) adjudication. Candidate uptake regions are generated with a deliberately permissive segmentation stage, then converted into structured textual descriptions that summarize uptake intensity, morphology, and regional and global anatomical context. An LLM classifies each candidate as true lesion vs. false positive, optionally leveraging the radiology report as additional clinical context. To strengthen lesion-level reasoning, we further optimize a local LLM via reinforcement learning using Group Relative Policy Optimization, rewarding correct lesion classification and anatomically concordant site assignment. Across AutoPET and an OSU test cohort, RADIANT-PET consistently outperforms strong image-only baselines, with the largest improvements observed when radiology reports are provided. Overall, these results demonstrate that LLM-based lesion-level reasoning adds a novel reasoning layer beyond conventional segmentation, suppressing physiologic false positives and aligning voxel-level predictions with clinical interpretation. The project repository is available at: https://github.com/jwang-580/RADIANT-PET.

AI.tldr: RADIANT-PET 是一种结合体素级分割模型与病灶级大语言模型（LLM）推理的PET/CT病灶分割新框架，通过结构化文本描述和强化学习优化的LLM实现对假阳性的有效抑制，并提升临床一致性。
AI.motivation: PET/CT中病灶分割易受生理性摄取和伪影干扰，导致假阳性高，影响临床诊断准确性。
AI.method: 提出RADIANT-PET框架：先用宽松策略生成候选摄取区，再将其转化为含强度、形态及解剖上下文的结构化文本描述；利用LLM进行病灶/非病灶二分类，并可融合放射科报告；进一步通过组相对策略优化（GRPO）强化学习微调本地LLM，奖励正确分类与解剖位置一致性。
AI.result: 在AutoPET和OSU测试队列上显著优于纯图像基线模型，尤其在引入放射科报告时提升最大；有效抑制生理性假阳性，使体素预测更符合临床解读。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的病灶级推理为传统分割提供了新范式，增强了模型的可解释性与临床实用性。

title: COMPASS: Grounding Composition-Intent Guidance in Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Composition is a high-level visual intent that governs where subjects are placed and how a scene is organized, yet current unified multimodal models remain unreliable at fine-grained composition recognition and struggle to turn such intent into controllable generation. We present COMPASS, the first unified multimodal framework that grounds composition-intent control in a single system spanning both composition perception and composition-guided generation, with a shared expert token $τ_c$ as the central intent anchor. On the perception side, COMPASS injects composition expertise into an MoE backbone in a minimally invasive manner and distills the inferred intent into $τ_c$. On the generation side, COMPASS reuses $τ_c$ as a global conditioning signal that steers the denoising trajectory, effectively converting passive composition analysis into explicit layout control. To support systematic instruction-following composition learning and evaluation at scale, we construct Comp-11, a large-scale dataset with an 11-class taxonomy and reasoning-augmented annotations. Extensive experiments show that COMPASS substantially improves category-level composition understanding and delivers more composition-consistent, prompt-faithful generation than strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMPASS框架，首次统一了构图感知与构图引导生成，通过共享专家token τ_c 实现构图意图的端到端建模与控制，并构建了Comp-11数据集支持系统性评估。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在细粒度构图识别与可控生成方面仍不可靠，缺乏对高阶视觉意图（如主体位置与场景组织）的精准建模与利用能力。
AI.method: 提出COMPASS框架：在感知侧，将构图专业知识以最小侵入方式注入MoE骨干网络，并蒸馏为共享专家token τ_c；在生成侧，复用τ_c作为全局条件信号引导去噪过程；同时构建包含11类构图类别及推理增强标注的大规模数据集Comp-11。
AI.result: COMPASS显著提升了类别级构图理解能力，在构图一致性与提示忠实性上均优于强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: COMPASS验证了以共享意图锚点τ_c统一构图感知与生成的有效性，为高阶视觉意图建模与可控内容生成提供了新范式。

title: Singular Learning and Occam's Razor in Deep Monomial Networks
summary: In the optimization of neural networks, gradient dynamics are influenced by critical points that arise from the model's architecture. These critical points occur where the Jacobian of the model's parametrization is rank-deficient, and are the most pronounced singularities studied in Singular Learning Theory. We investigate such points in deep fully-connected networks with monomial activations via tools from polynomial algebra such as Mason's Theorem. We show that, for sufficiently large activation degree, criticality occurs precisely at subnetworks, i.e., at parameter configurations where some neurons are inactive or redundant. This offers a mathematical perspective on the implicit bias in deep neural networks, explaining the tendency of these models to converge toward simpler functions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多项式代数工具（如Mason定理）研究具有单项式激活函数的深度全连接网络中的临界点，发现高阶激活下临界点精确对应子网络（即部分神经元失活或冗余），从而从数学上解释深度网络倾向于收敛到更简单函数的隐式偏置。
AI.motivation: 理解深度神经网络优化中梯度动力学受模型架构诱导的临界点影响，特别是Singular Learning Theory中最重要的奇点——雅可比矩阵秩亏的点。
AI.method: 运用多项式代数工具（特别是Mason定理），分析深度全连接网络在单项式激活下的临界点结构。
AI.result: 证明当激活函数次数足够大时，临界点恰好出现在子网络结构上，即某些神经元完全失活或冗余。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为深度神经网络的隐式偏置提供了严格的数学解释：优化过程天然偏好结构更简单的子网络，从而导致模型收敛于更简单的函数。

title: Learning to Adaptively Allocate Gaussians for Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution
summary: In computer graphics, visual content is continuously warped, zoomed and resampled. This occurs when engines upscale frames, users zoom into 3D scenes, or foveated VR applies varying scaling. Handling these transformations requires Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution (ASR). Traditional models, designed for fixed scales, typically predict at a lower integer scale (e.g., x4) and rely on sub-optimal interpolation for continuous resolutions, compromising quality. Furthermore, most methods process pixels uniformly. Since fine details are sparse, this creates overhead; efficiency dictates concentrating resources only where structural complexity demands it. While implicit models and Gaussian Splatting (GS) enable continuous representation, GS is advantageous due to adaptive densification. However, transitioning GS into a feed-forward model for ASR is non-trivial. Standard GS optimization needs high-resolution gradients to drive primitive growth, which are unavailable during inference. Thus, the network must autonomously predict GS densification from low-resolution inputs. To solve this, we propose QuADA-GS. After encoding inputs into a latent space, a Neural Routing Architecture evaluates local complexity to distribute a global budget, assigning specific upsampling factors to features to avoid redundant processing. Features are dynamically densified based on these factors, forming an irregular topology decoded into 2D Gaussian primitives. To coordinate features before decoding, we introduce Hierarchical Pointer Convolution. This non-grid operator achieves O(1) neighbor lookup complexity, facilitating efficient spatial communication and bypassing dense bottlenecks. Experiments show QuADA-GS achieves state-of-the-art ASR performance, maintaining low latency and a lean memory footprint.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuADA-GS，一种面向任意尺度超分辨率（ASR）的高效前馈高斯溅射模型，通过神经路由架构动态分配上采样因子，并引入分层指针卷积实现非网格邻域通信，兼顾精度、速度与内存效率。
AI.motivation: 传统超分辨率模型难以处理连续尺度变换（如缩放、VR注视点渲染），且均匀处理像素导致计算冗余；高斯溅射虽具自适应密度优势，但其优化依赖高分辨率梯度，在推理阶段不可用，亟需前馈式建模方法。
AI.method: 提出QuADA-GS：1）神经路由架构根据局部复杂度动态分配全局计算预算，为特征指定异构上采样因子；2）基于该因子动态稠密化特征，构建非规则拓扑；3）引入分层指针卷积（非网格算子），实现O(1)邻域查找与高效空间通信；4）解码为2D高斯基元输出。
AI.result: 在任意尺度超分辨率任务上达到SOTA性能，同时保持低延迟与小内存占用，验证了方法在精度、效率与可扩展性上的综合优势。
AI.conclusion: QuADA-GS成功将高斯溅射转化为前馈ASR模型，通过动态稠密化与非网格通信机制，解决了连续尺度重建中的质量-效率权衡问题，为实时图形应用提供了新范式。

title: TACO: Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization for Agentic Tool Use
summary: Agentic multimodal models perform diverse operations on an image via code and reason over the returned view, an effective paradigm for fine-grained visual question answering. However, code operations can be useful, redundant, or misleading. Outcome-only rewards cannot precisely distinguish these cases, and existing process rewards either fail to attribute final correctness to individual tool calls, or require an external judge model. To address this, we introduce Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization (TACO), a GRPO variant for code-tool agents built on two coupled advantage channels. The first, Differential Answer-Probe Reward (DAPR), is a self-supervised, judge-free tool-contribution advantage that credits each tool call by its own effect on answering correctly. Probe tokens inserted into the model's reasoning elicit its predictions with and without the tool, and the difference in outcome reward is taken as the call's value: positive for a useful call, negative for a misleading one, and zero for one that changes nothing. This reuses the existing answer checker with no auxiliary judge, and, being a difference rather than an absolute probe score, is naturally robust to probe-hacking. The second is the outcome advantage from the final answer, distributed by Outcome-Gated Advantage Routing (OGAR): a parameter-free rule that, conditioned on the call's outcome, delivers this credit only to the responsible segments, suppressing wasted tool calls without any cost term. We train TACO through a two-stage SFT+RL pipeline. Extensive experiments across perception, reasoning, and general multimodal benchmarks show that it yields consistent accuracy gains and learns to invoke its tools only when they help.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TACO的新型强化学习方法，用于提升多模态智能体中代码工具调用的有效性，通过两个耦合优势通道（DAPR和OGAR）实现对每个工具调用的精细化信用分配，无需额外判别模型，显著提升准确率并减少冗余调用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以区分代码操作是有用、冗余还是误导性的；仅基于最终结果的奖励无法精准归因，而现有过程奖励要么无法将正确性归因到单个工具调用，要么依赖外部判别模型。
AI.method: 提出Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization (TACO)，一种基于GRPO的变体，包含两个优势通道：1）Differential Answer-Probe Reward (DAPR)，通过插入探针token对比有无该工具调用时的答案差异，自监督地评估单次调用贡献；2）Outcome-Gated Advantage Routing (OGAR)，根据调用结果条件式地分配最终答案优势，抑制无效调用。训练采用两阶段SFT+RL流程。
AI.result: 在感知、推理及通用多模态基准上实验表明，TACO带来一致的准确率提升，并学会仅在工具真正有益时才调用。
AI.conclusion: TACO实现了无需外部判别器、鲁棒且可归因的工具调用信用分配，是提升多模态智能体代码操作效率与可靠性的有效新范式。

title: Rethinking Fairness in LLM-Based Recommender Systems: A Survey
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are reshaping recommender systems by enabling more semantic, generative, and interactive recommendation pipelines. However, this shift also introduces new fairness challenges, as biases may arise from pretrained knowledge, prompts, generated explanations, decoding strategies, and feedback loops. This survey provides a systematic review of fairness in LLM-based recommender systems (LLM4Rec), organizing existing studies through a two-dimensional view of bias mechanisms and fairness targets, together with a structured overview of the evaluation landscape and mitigation strategies. We further connect fairness with broader trustworthy concerns, including explainability, privacy, robustness, and controllability. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first survey specifically focused on fairness in LLM4Rec, aiming to provide a structured foundation for future research on comprehensive and reliable fairness evaluation in LLM4Rec.

AI.tldr: This paper surveys fairness issues in Large Language Model-based Recommender Systems (LLM4Rec), categorizing bias sources and fairness targets, reviewing evaluation methods and mitigation strategies, and linking fairness to broader trustworthy AI concerns.
AI.motivation: The integration of LLMs into recommender systems introduces new fairness challenges stemming from pretrained knowledge, prompts, generated explanations, decoding strategies, and feedback loops—yet no dedicated survey on fairness in LLM4Rec existed before.
AI.method: The authors conduct a systematic literature review, organizing studies along two dimensions: bias mechanisms and fairness targets; they also synthesize evaluation practices and mitigation strategies, and relate fairness to explainability, privacy, robustness, and controllability.
AI.result: A comprehensive, structured taxonomy of fairness issues in LLM4Rec is established; the first dedicated survey on this topic is delivered, highlighting gaps and providing a foundation for future work.
AI.conclusion: Fairness in LLM4Rec is multifaceted and intertwined with broader trustworthy AI goals; rigorous, standardized evaluation and targeted mitigation are urgently needed, and this survey serves as a foundational reference for advancing responsible LLM4Rec research.

title: Robotic Arm-Based Spectral Sensing for Strawberry Positioning and Non-Destructive Sweetness Measurement
summary:
Accurate assessment of sweetness is essential for quality control in agriculture, yet conventional methods rely on destructive sampling and are difficult to scale. This thesis presents a robotic arm-based spectral sensing system for strawberry detection, localization, approach, and non-destructive sweetness estimation.
  The system integrates perception, calibration, and robotic control in a closed-loop pipeline. A YOLOv11s detector is adopted for real-time strawberry detection, while RGB-ToF calibration and mask-to-depth alignment are used to obtain geometrically consistent target localization. A custom eye-in-hand hand-eye calibration workflow is developed to estimate the rigid transform between gripper_link and cam_front, enabling reliable transformation of fruit targets into the robot base frame. Based on these estimates, the robot executes a waypoint-based search and an incremental closed-loop approach strategy to position the sensor at optimal working distance for sweetness sensing.
  Experimental results show strong end-to-end performance (88.10% success over 42 trials), with robust detection (95.24%) and successful approach execution once a target is detected (100% conditional success). Hand-eye calibration comparisons indicate that although Andreff yields the smallest translation norm in single-run results, the Park method provides better cross-sample consistency and therefore more stable downstream robot behavior. The residual failures are concentrated in the sensing stage, especially valid-region extraction for sweetness estimation under difficult depth/reflectance conditions.
  Overall, this work demonstrates the feasibility of integrating RGB-ToF perception, robotic manipulation, and non-destructive sensing for practical strawberry quality assessment, and provides a scalable baseline for future integration of learning-based policies such as Vision-Language-Action models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机械臂的光谱传感系统，用于草莓的检测、定位、接近及无损甜度估计，实现了88.10%的端到端成功率，验证了RGB-ToF感知、机器人操作与无损传感融合在农业质量评估中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统甜度评估方法依赖破坏性采样且难以规模化，亟需一种非破坏性、可扩展的自动化方案。
AI.method: 构建闭环系统：采用YOLOv11s实现实时草莓检测；结合RGB-ToF标定与掩码-深度对齐实现几何一致的目标定位；设计自定义眼在手手眼标定流程（对比Andreff与Park方法）以准确转换目标坐标；基于定位结果执行航点搜索与增量式闭环接近策略，使传感器到达最佳工作距离进行甜度传感。
AI.result: 端到端成功率达88.10%（42次试验），检测准确率95.24%，目标检测后接近成功率100%；Park标定法在跨样本一致性上优于Andreff；失败主要集中在传感阶段，尤其是复杂深度/反射条件下的有效区域提取。
AI.conclusion: 该系统证明了RGB-ToF感知、机器人操控与无损光谱传感集成用于草莓品质评估的可行性，为未来引入视觉-语言-动作等学习型策略提供了可扩展的基线框架。

title: Correct codes for the wrong reasons? validating LLMs as measurement instruments for theoretical constructs
summary: When a large language model (LLM) codes a construct in text as a human annotator would, that agreement makes the LLM a reliable coder. Yet reliability leaves construct validity untouched. The instrument may be theory-naive, reaching the code through a correlate that meets none of the demands the construct's theory makes, and no current method tells that apart from genuine measurement. We propose grain calibration as a method that closes the gap. It decomposes a construct into clause-level components, tests each against the text with extractive evidence, and combines the results through an explicit, theory-derived rule. Because the rule is stated rather than lodged in one opaque pass, its structure is evidence about the process rather than the output. It shows which components settled a code, and, when the code is wrong, whether a component was missed or an adjacent construct mistaken for it. Validation shifts from scoring an instrument's outputs against an annotator to showing that the instrument runs on the construct its theory specifies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'粒度校准（grain calibration）'的新方法，旨在提升大型语言模型在文本编码中对理论驱动构念的测量效度，而不仅是信度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法只能评估LLM编码结果与人工标注者的一致性（即信度），但无法验证其是否真正依据理论定义的构念进行测量（即构念效度）。LLM可能通过理论无关的替代线索错误地达成高一致性，当前方法无法识别这种效度缺陷。
AI.method: 粒度校准法将构念分解为子句级成分，对每个成分在文本中进行基于抽取证据的独立检验，并依据显式、理论导出的组合规则整合结果；该规则结构本身成为可检验的推理过程证据。
AI.result: 该方法使验证焦点从‘输出是否匹配人工标注’转向‘编码过程是否真正运行于理论所规定的构念之上’，支持诊断错误根源（如遗漏成分或混淆邻近构念）。
AI.conclusion: 粒度校准为LLM作为理论驱动测量工具提供了可解释、可验证的效度保障路径，弥合了信度与构念效度之间的关键缺口。

title: Transition-Aware best-of-N sampling for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Reports
summary: In longitudinal clinical practice, every chest X-ray is read in the context of the patients prior exam, and much of what the radiologist communicates is the change from one visit to the next. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first training-free best-of-N sampling scheme for pre-trained chest X-ray report generators that is explicitly aware of this longitudinal prior to current transition. We call it transition-aware best-of-N sampling, each report is split into sentences and embedded into an unordered set in Rd; each (prior, current) pair is reduced to a fixed-dim directional vector via a set-to-set distance designed to encode the change between the two sets; and candidates are scored by cosine distance from their candidate transition vector to a cached bank of ground-truth training transition vectors, aggregated as min or kNN. We instantiate the framework with four directional set distances (mean-shift, novelty residual, directed-Hausdorff anchor, and cost-weighted optimal transport) and evaluate on a multi-visit AP-PA cohort, running inference under three prompts on three vision-language generators. Transition-aware best-of-N outperforms random selection across the board, with the largest relative gains on the Impression section.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的transition-aware best-of-N采样方法，用于胸部X光报告生成，通过建模先验与当前检查之间的变化来提升报告质量，尤其在Impression部分效果显著。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中，放射科医生基于患者先前检查结果解读当前胸片，强调变化信息；而现有报告生成模型缺乏对这种纵向变化的显式建模。
AI.method: 将报告句子嵌入为无序集合，定义四种集合间方向性距离（如均值偏移、新颖性残差等）来量化先验到当前的过渡向量，并通过余弦距离匹配缓存的真实过渡向量库（取最小值或k近邻）进行候选评分。
AI.result: 在多访视AP-PA数据集上，该方法在三种视觉语言生成器和三种提示下均优于随机选择，Impression部分相对提升最大。
AI.conclusion: transition-aware best-of-N是一种有效、即插即用的改进策略，首次实现了对胸部X光报告生成中纵向变化建模的免训练优化。

title: BV-Blend: Uncertainty-Weighted Historical Baselines for Stable Critic-Free RL with Verifiable Rewards
summary: Critic-free reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), exemplified by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), avoids training a value function (critic) and reduces memory and compute overhead relative to critic-based PPO pipelines for aligning large language models. However, GRPO-style advantage estimation depends on prompt-local (within-prompt-group) reward statistics and can be unstable. In particular, when all rollouts in a prompt group receive identical rewards, the within-group reward variance becomes zero, and group normalization yields zero advantages for that group, impeding learning in cold-start regimes with binary verifiers. We introduce BV-Blend, a critic-free framework that stabilizes advantage estimation by combining prompt-local on-policy statistics with semantic-cluster-conditioned historical moments. BV-Blend maintains EMA-tracked reward moments for each cluster, derives a confidence weight from a standard error of the mean (SEM) proxy, and uses this weight to blend historical and prompt-local baseline and variance statistics into a standardized advantage for PPO-style clipped updates. Experiments on verifiable reasoning benchmarks show that BV-Blend improves training stability and performance, and remains robust in regimes where group-normalized methods may stall.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BV-Blend，一种无需 critic 的强化学习框架，通过融合 prompt-local 统计与语义聚类的历史奖励统计来稳定优势估计，提升训练稳定性与性能，尤其在 group-normalized 方法易失效的冷启动场景下表现稳健。
AI.motivation: GRPO等critic-free方法虽节省资源，但其基于组内奖励统计的优势估计在所有rollout奖励相同时会失效（方差为零），导致冷启动阶段（如二值验证器）学习停滞。
AI.method: BV-Blend引入语义聚类，对每类维护EMA更新的历史奖励均值与方差；用标准误（SEM）代理计算置信权重，加权融合历史与当前prompt组的基线和方差，生成标准化优势用于PPO裁剪更新。
AI.result: 在可验证推理基准上实验表明，BV-Blend显著提升训练稳定性与最终性能，并在group-normalized方法易 stall 的场景下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 融合语义聚类历史统计与在线局部统计的加权优势估计，是提升critic-free RL（如GRPO）在低方差奖励场景下鲁棒性的有效途径。

title: An Agentic AI Pipeline for Appliance-Level Energy Anomaly Detection and LLM-Driven Recommendations
comment: 07 pages, 01 figure, accepted for presentation at the IEEE International Conference on Communication, Computing, Networking, and Control in Cyber-Physical Systems (CCNCPS 2026)
summary: Appliance-level energy monitoring in office buildings produces noisy alerts that non-expert facility managers struggle to use. This paper proposes an end-to-end agentic pipeline that combines deep time-series forecasting, variational anomaly detection, and LLM-based reasoning to generate prioritized, actionable maintenance recommendations. The system tracks seven office appliances using a hybrid Singular Spectrum Analysis (SSA) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) forecasting model, and applies a per-appliance LSTM Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with attention to flag abnormal daily consumption episodes. A three-stage LangChain pipeline begins with a Context Agent that always retrieves three core RAG sources (model reliability, hourly baseline, and expert knowledge) and conditionally adds up to three more (forecast context, anomaly history, global baseline) based on event characteristics, capped at eight reasoning steps. A Diagnosis Agent converts the evidence into a structured JSON diagnosis, and a Report Agent renders a human-readable narrative. A reflective memory layer incorporates operator feedback. The dashboard shows real-time 30-minute forecasts, intraday consumption, the previous day anomaly report, and a feedback form. We evaluate the forecasting model, anomaly detector with appliance-specific thresholds, and LLM reasoning on a 16-scenario benchmark including sustained and transient spikes, unexpected shutdowns, and systemic events, comparing five LLM backends under static vs. dynamic retrieval. Dynamic retrieval matches full static retrieval across all backends while cutting average context from six to three-six sources per event. The best backend scores 90.4/100 with a 100% pass rate at a 70-point threshold, and a fully local 7B-parameter model passes all 16 scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的智能代理管道，融合深度时间序列预测、变分异常检测与大语言模型（LLM）推理，为办公建筑中非专业设施管理人员生成可操作、优先级明确的维护建议。系统结合SSA-LSTM预测、LSTM-VAE注意力异常检测，并通过三阶段LangChain RAG流程（含动态检索与反射记忆）实现自动化诊断与报告生成，在16场景基准测试中验证了高效性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 办公建筑中设备级能耗监控产生大量噪声告警，非专业设施管理人员难以有效利用，亟需可解释、可操作的智能诊断支持。
AI.method: 构建端到端agentic pipeline：1）SSA-LSTM混合模型进行七类办公设备30分钟粒度能耗预测；2）每设备独立LSTM-VAE+Attention进行日级异常检测；3）三阶段LangChain流程（Context/Diagnosis/Report Agent），支持动态RAG检索（最多8步，核心3源+条件扩展≤3源）；4）反射式记忆层集成人工反馈；5）配套实时可视化仪表盘。
AI.result: 在16场景基准测试中，动态RAG检索效果媲美全静态检索，平均上下文源从6个降至3–6个；最优LLM后端得分为90.4/100，70分阈值下通过率100%；本地部署的7B参数模型成功通过全部16个场景。
AI.conclusion: 该agentic架构显著提升了能耗异常诊断的准确性、可解释性与实用性，验证了轻量级本地LLM在专业运维场景中的可行性，为边缘侧智能能源管理提供了新范式。

title: Resonant Brane Splatting for Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution
summary: Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution (ASR) reconstructs images at continuous magnification factors. Recent methods accelerate inference by replacing computationally heavy implicit neural decoders with explicit 2D Gaussian Splatting (GS). However, since standard Gaussians are smooth low-pass primitives, modeling edges and fine textures requires multiple overlapping, well-aligned splats, which creates severe bottlenecks during rasterization. To address this, we introduce Resonant Brane Splatting (RBS), a feed-forward ASR framework. RBS replaces flat Gaussians with Branes: expressive primitives that emit spatially varying colors to natively model local contrast and complex textures within a single footprint. We achieve this by augmenting the standard Gaussian envelope with internal Gaussian-Hermite modes, assigning a distinct color coefficient to each. The zero-order mode recovers standard GS, while higher-order modes capture high frequencies. We predict Brane parameters directly from low-resolution features. Because Branes provide a mathematically richer formulation than simple Gaussians, far fewer primitives need to overlap to reconstruct a given target pixel. To exploit this, we introduce an efficient fully differentiable rasterizer with a precise culling strategy based on the classical quantum turning point. This allows us to safely skip negligible regions, drastically reducing the rendering overhead. Experiments on standard ASR benchmarks show that RBS improves reconstruction quality over implicit and GS baselines, while achieving superior speed-quality trade-off than prior GS methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Resonant Brane Splatting（RBS），一种用于任意尺度超分辨率（ASR）的新型显式渲染方法，通过引入具有内部高斯-厄米特模态的‘Brane’基元替代传统高斯溅射，提升边缘与纹理建模能力，并结合基于量子转向点的高效可微光栅化器，在保持高质量重建的同时显著加速推理。
AI.motivation: 标准高斯溅射作为平滑低通基元，在建模边缘和精细纹理时需大量重叠且对齐良好的溅射，导致光栅化严重瓶颈，限制了显式ASR方法的速度与质量。
AI.method: 提出Resonant Brane Splatting（RBS）：用‘Brane’替代传统高斯，其在高斯包络内嵌入高斯-厄米特模式，每阶模式对应独立颜色系数，零阶退化为标准GS，高阶捕获高频；Brane参数由低分辨率特征直接预测；设计基于经典量子转向点的精确剔除策略的全可微光栅化器，大幅减少无效计算。
AI.result: 在标准ASR基准上，RBS在重建质量上优于隐式方法和高斯溅射基线，同时相比现有GS方法实现了更优的速度-质量权衡。
AI.conclusion: RBS通过增强基元表达能力与优化光栅化效率，为显式ASR提供了更高效、更高质量的新范式。

title: Always-OnAgents:A Survey of Persistent Memory, State, and Governance in LLMAgents
summary: Always-on agents are systems whose future behavior depends on durable state accumulated across earlier interactions. We treat them as persistent-state systems: the operative system includes retrievable memories, but also task ledgers, permissions, credentials, commitments, provenance and audit records, shared state, trigger conditions, and externally committed effects linked to those records. The survey reads the literature through six diagnostic axes for each state item, authority, scope, mutability, provenance, recoverability, and actionability, and through a lifecycle in which state is written, validated, organized, retrieved, acted upon, updated, forgotten, audited, and sometimes rolled back. Across a 435-work coded corpus, treated as a scoped map rather than an exhaustive census, the literature concentrates more heavily on accumulating and retrieving state than on governing, recovering, or relinquishing it. We therefore introduce the Always-On Evaluation Protocol (AOEP-v0), a pilot evaluation contract that makes these governance requirements concrete by scoring state mutation and recovery obligations rather than answer quality alone. The resulting agenda connects always-on agents to databases, distributed systems, formal methods, capability security, and machine unlearning.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了始终在线代理（always-on agents）的持久状态管理问题，提出了一种基于六个诊断维度（权威性、作用域、可变性、来源、可恢复性、可操作性）和状态生命周期的分析框架，并通过435篇文献调研指出当前研究偏重状态积累与检索，忽视治理、恢复与遗忘；为此提出了Always-On Evaluation Protocol (AOEP-v0)评估协议，将状态变更与恢复义务纳入评价体系，推动其与数据库、分布式系统、形式化方法、能力安全及机器遗忘等领域交叉融合。
AI.motivation: 现有始终在线代理研究过度关注状态的积累与检索，而忽视其治理、恢复、遗忘等关键生命周期环节，缺乏统一的评估标准与系统性框架。
AI.method: 提出六维诊断轴（authority, scope, mutability, provenance, recoverability, actionability）与状态全生命周期模型（写入、验证、组织、检索、执行、更新、遗忘、审计、回滚），对435篇文献进行编码分析，并设计Always-On Evaluation Protocol (AOEP-v0)作为评估契约。
AI.result: 发现文献分布严重偏向状态积累与检索，治理与恢复能力普遍薄弱；AOEP-v0初步实现了对状态变异与恢复义务的量化评分，为后续跨学科整合提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 始终在线代理需从‘能记住’转向‘懂治理’，其发展必须融合数据库、分布式系统、形式化验证、能力安全与机器遗忘等多领域理论与实践，构建可持续、可信、可控的持久状态管理体系。

title: The Crowded Embedding Space: A Mean-Field Mechanism for Emergent Marginalization in Retrieval-Augmented Agents
summary: Retrieval-augmented generative agents rely on retrieval for grounding, yet are typically evaluated on a query-by-query basis. This isolates interactions that are geometrically coupled in a shared embedding space. For example, we show that the high document density required to serve majority interests (e.g., generic "Crime" movies) can geometrically overcrowd the retrieval neighborhood of a semantically similar minority (e.g., "Film Noir"), effectively expelling minority content from top-$k$ results. We introduce a formal framework to analyze how such goal collisions in dense retrieval induce fundamental performance limits and emergent fairness issues inherent to spatial crowding. In our static analysis, we demonstrate that for a fixed embedding space, a phase transition occurs where minority user goals suffer a catastrophic collapse in performance as the density of majority goals increases. We then extend this to a dynamic model and derive a non-linear Fokker-Planck equation that governs the evolution of document embeddings as the agent updates them to maximize retrieval accuracy. Our analysis reveals that this local relevance objective triggers an emergent global mechanism that systematically marginalizes minority interests. We prove that such objectives drive the system to self-organize into a state that exclusively serves majority interests. These results provide a theoretical foundation for understanding a critical grounding failure mode in retrieval-augmented agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种形式化框架，分析密集检索中目标冲突引发的性能极限与公平性问题，揭示了检索增强生成智能体因空间拥挤导致的少数群体内容被系统性边缘化的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强生成智能体通常按查询独立评估，忽略了在共享嵌入空间中语义相近但用户规模悬殊的目标间几何耦合效应（如主流‘犯罪片’对小众‘黑色电影’的检索挤压），亟需理论刻画此类公平性与性能的根本限制。
AI.method: 构建静态相变分析模型揭示多数目标密度上升导致少数目标性能崩溃的临界现象；进一步建立动态模型，推导描述文档嵌入演化的非线性Fokker-Planck方程，证明局部相关性优化会自发诱导全局多数偏好结构。
AI.result: 静态分析发现固定嵌入空间下存在相变点，少数目标性能随多数目标密度增加而急剧下降；动态模型证明局部检索准确率优化会导致系统自组织为仅服务多数兴趣的稳态，形成固有偏见。
AI.conclusion: 密集检索中的空间拥挤是检索增强智能体根本性的接地失效模式，其内在机制导致系统性少数群体边缘化，为设计更公平的检索增强架构提供了理论基础。

title: Embodiment Meets Environment: Toward Context-Aware, Safe Physical Caregiving Robots
summary: Physical caregiving robots need to assist different users with different tasks in diverse environments, and they come in many embodiments. While substantial progress has been made on individual caregiving tasks, most existing systems remain tightly coupled to specific environments and robot embodiments, and often do not explicitly model or constrain interactions around people, despite humans being special agents in the environment. This motivates a focus on adapting to context that emerges from the joint interaction between the environment and the robot's embodiment. We propose $E^2$-CARE, a framework that enables context-aware adaptation by representing primitive caregiving skills as interaction templates whose execution is reshaped online. $E^2$-CARE represents the environment, the robot, and the human within a unified 3D dynamic scene graph that models these interaction contexts explicitly, and synthesizes task-specific constraints to govern how each skill is executed. By enforcing these constraints at runtime, the same skill templates can be reused zero-shot and safely across diverse environments and robot embodiments. We evaluate $E^2$-CARE across four activities of daily living in hundreds of simulated household environments, including assistive home settings, and across diverse robot embodiments, and validate it through user studies on two caregiving tasks with two robots in various real-world environments. Results demonstrate consistent and successful adaptation across these environments and embodiments. Website: https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/e2care

AI.tldr: 本文提出E²-CARE框架，通过将基础照护技能建模为可在线重塑的交互模板，并在统一的3D动态场景图中显式建模环境、机器人与人类三者关系，实现跨环境与机器人本体的零样本、安全技能复用。
AI.motivation: 现有照护机器人系统通常与特定环境和机器人本体强耦合，且缺乏对人-机-环境联合交互上下文的显式建模，难以泛化。
AI.method: 提出E²-CARE框架：1）构建统一3D动态场景图表征环境、机器人与人类；2）将照护技能表示为交互模板；3）在线合成任务特定约束以实时重塑技能执行。
AI.result: 在数百个仿真家庭环境中（含辅助居家场景）及多种机器人本体上验证了四个日常生活活动；并通过两项真实用户研究（两台机器人、多现实环境）证实其零样本适应性与安全性。
AI.conclusion: E²-CARE实现了照护技能在多样化环境与机器人本体间的零样本、安全复用，显著提升了物理照护机器人的上下文适应能力。

title: Phonological Perception of Sign Language Models
summary: Sign languages are compositional systems where meaning arises by combining sublexical phonological parameters, such as handshape, location, and movement. While deep learning models for Sign Language Recognition (SLR) have achieved increased performance on translation benchmarks, it remains unclear whether these models distinguish abstract phonological features or merely rely on low-level statistical correlations. This work evaluates the phonological perception of SLR models trained on American Sign Language (ASL) by probing phonological sensitivity using minimal pairs and evaluating representational alignment with human behavioral data. Our results reveal that SLR models exhibit emergent phonological sensitivity, but with clear architectural trade-offs: pose-based models are sensitive to handshape contrasts, while pixel-based models better capture location changes. Furthermore, pose-based models learn latent representations that correlate with human perceptual similarity judgments (r~0.49).
