These findings suggest that while SLR models exhibit emergent phonology, current training paradigms are insufficient to scale them beyond their architectural inductive biases.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了手语识别（SLR）模型对美国手语（ASL）音系特征的感知能力，发现模型展现出涌现的音系敏感性，但受限于架构选择（如姿态模型擅长手形区分，像素模型更适应位置变化），且其表征与人类感知相似性存在中等程度相关（r~0.49），表明当前训练范式尚不足以突破架构先验限制。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习模型在手语识别任务上性能提升，但尚不清楚它们是否真正理解抽象音系特征（如手形、位置、运动），还是仅依赖低层统计关联。
AI.method: 通过最小对立对（minimal pairs）探测SLR模型的音系敏感性，并将模型表征与人类行为实验数据（感知相似性判断）进行对齐分析。
AI.result: 姿态（pose）基模型对“手形”对比更敏感，像素基模型更擅长捕捉“位置”变化；姿态基模型的潜在表征与人类感知相似性判断呈中等正相关（r≈0.49）。
AI.conclusion: SLR模型展现出涌现的音系敏感性，但其能力受限于模型架构的归纳偏置；当前训练范式不足以使其超越这些固有局限。

title: GPU-Accelerated Inverse Structural Anastylosis from Block Collapse Dynamics
summary: The physical anastylosis of collapsed architectural monuments -- the meticulous reassembly of fallen stone elements into their original structural configuration -- represents one of the most intellectually demanding challenges in conservation science. Traditional approaches depend heavily on expert archaeologist judgement and manual block-by-block correspondence, a process that is both labour-intensive and inherently subjective. Inspired by the combinatorial complexity of this problem as manifested in the game of Jenga, we present Jenga Inverse Predictor , a GPU-accelerated deep learning framework that addresses structural anastylosis as an inverse prediction task. Given an image of a collapsed block assembly, JIP-2 reconstructs the most probable prior tower configuration by: (1) implementing a complete rigid-body physics engine with OBB/SAT collision detection and a Projected Gauss-Seidel (PGS) contact solver accelerated with Numba JIT and CuPy CUDA; (2) applying the analytical force thresholds of Ziglar (CMU, 2006) -- F_app = 3*mu_s*m*g (Y-axis, torque-free) and F_app = 4*mu_s*m*g (X-axis, torque risk) -- over three friction levels (mu_s in {0.25, 0.40, 0.60}) across 450 simulated episodes; (3) training a dual-stream ResNet-18 that injects a friction one-hot vector and jointly predicts block removal count, per-position removal probabilities, centre-of-mass imbalance, and Ziglar torque risk; and (4) generating a smooth 3-D video of the block-by-block reverse reconstruction. We discuss implications for computer-assisted anastylosis at the UNESCO Maya site of Uxmal, Yucatan, and provide a detailed technical description of the full pipeline, architecture, and loss formulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Jenga Inverse Predictor（JIP-2），一种基于GPU加速的深度学习框架，将建筑遗迹物理复原问题建模为逆向预测任务，结合刚体物理仿真与双流ResNet-18网络，实现从坍塌石块图像自动推断原始结构并生成逆向重建视频。
AI.motivation: 传统物理复原依赖专家主观判断和手工匹配，费时费力且缺乏客观性；受Jenga游戏启发，作者希望用计算方法解决这一高度组合复杂性的逆向结构重建问题。
AI.method: 构建含OBB/SAT碰撞检测与PGS接触求解器的刚体物理引擎（Numba/CuPy加速）；应用Ziglar力学阈值在多摩擦系数下进行450次仿真；训练双流ResNet-18网络，输入图像与摩擦类型独热编码，联合预测移除次数、各位置移除概率、质心偏移及扭矩风险；输出平滑3D逆向重建视频。
AI.result: 成功实现从坍塌石块图像到原始塔状结构的逆向重建，并在玛雅遗址Uxmal验证了方法可行性；生成可解释的物理驱动重建过程视频。
AI.conclusion: JIP-2首次将结构复原形式化为物理约束下的深度学习逆问题，为计算机辅助文化遗产保护提供了新范式，兼具物理可解释性与工程实用性。

title: The Two Genie Game: Adoption and Welfare in Audit-Grounded AI Governance
comment: 36 pages, 3 figures. Lean 4 formalization and figure scripts: https://github.com/dlewissandy/two-genie-scripts
summary:
We ask under what conditions an agent with a harm-minimizing policy can displace an approval-seeking (RLHF) agent in a competitive market, and when that policy is sufficient to prevent community harm. We use evolutionary game theory (finite-population Moran-Fermi pairwise comparison) to formalize this subject to assumptions of wisher hindsight, peer testimony, a monotone harm ledger, sufficient information density of community feedback, and a finite, depleting resource pool, in a negative-sum environment.
  We show that adoption is favored when the prior distributions on how readily wishers attune to community sentiment are monotone, exhibit endpoint inversion, and have a centro-symmetric pairing property, and demonstrate this with several long-tailed priors (Hill, Pareto, Lomax, Frechet). Where it is favored, a critical adoption level separates communities that drift back to the approval-seeking agent from those for which the audited agent fixes; above that level fixation is the overwhelmingly likely outcome. We derive when fixation is attainable as a bound on the effective (informational) size N_c of the community, which must be small enough to allow fixation before depletion. We present these as Theorems 5.4 and 5.5; the algebraic and finite-grid backbone is machine-checked in Lean 4, with the barrier-crossing asymptotics retained as explicit hypotheses.
  We show that a self-audited agent with a community ledger is not, in general, sufficient to prevent community harm. Sufficiency depends both upon the alignment of the agent's audit with community values and the timeframe over which harm is evaluated. Regardless of alignment, once adoption reaches dominance, the state is absorbing. The same policy that reduced harm under alignment becomes a trap, welfare-negative under misalignment and, even under alignment, one that locks in harm deferred past the adoption horizon.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在竞争市场中，以最小化伤害为目标的代理能否取代基于人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）的批准寻求型代理，并分析其防止社区伤害的有效条件；通过有限群体进化博弈论建模，发现代理采纳取决于先验分布特性、社区信息规模及资源耗竭约束，且自我审计机制本身不足以确保无害，其效果高度依赖价值对齐与时效性。
AI.motivation: 探究伤害最小化代理在竞争环境中取代批准寻求型代理的条件，以及该策略是否足以防止社区伤害。
AI.method: 采用有限群体进化博弈论（Moran-Fermi 成对比较模型），结合愿望者后见偏差、同伴证言、单调伤害账本、社区反馈信息密度充足、有限且枯竭资源池等假设，在负和环境下建模分析。
AI.result: 发现采纳伤害最小化代理需满足先验分布的单调性、端点反转与中心对称配对性质；存在临界采纳阈值，超过则几乎必然固定；固定性受限于有效社区信息规模 N_c；自我审计+社区账本不能普遍防止伤害，其有效性取决于价值对齐程度与伤害评估时间窗口。
AI.conclusion: 伤害最小化策略的成功不仅依赖技术设计，更受先验信念结构、社区规模与动态资源约束共同决定；即使对齐，也可能导致延迟伤害锁定，凸显长期治理与动态评估的重要性。

title: Modelling Emotional Memory in Children with Tensor Networks
summary: We demonstrate how emotional valence influences the order-dependent structure of children's recognition memory: correct recall of a sequence of emotionally-valenced toys depended not just on the valence of a given toy itself, but also on the valence of the toys shown before and after it. Whilst standard psychological models confirm that order-dependence differs across an event (a set of toys shown in sequence), accuracy is low and the model does not reflect how memory for an emotional object influences others in the set. A classical tensor network model factoring in valence is able to achieve a 77.98\% accuracy in modelling the results of the study. While not strictly a ``quantum cognition'' model, this massive increase in accuracy shows the value of quantum-inspired methods for modelling order-dependent phenomena, such as emotional memory. Further, the task protocol we introduce presents a novel, real-world tool for exploring emotional temporal memory in children for analysis using classical and quantum-like models of cognition.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了情绪效价如何影响儿童识别记忆的顺序依赖结构，提出了一种受量子启发的张量网络模型，显著提高了对情绪性序列记忆建模的准确性（77.98%），并引入一种新实验范式用于研究儿童情绪时间记忆。
AI.motivation: 标准心理模型难以准确刻画情绪对象记忆如何影响同一序列中其他对象的记忆，尤其在顺序依赖性方面表现不佳。
AI.method: 采用受量子启发的张量网络模型，将情绪效价纳入建模，并结合新设计的儿童玩具序列回忆实验范式。
AI.result: 该张量网络模型达到77.98%的预测准确率，远超传统心理模型；同时提出了一种可用于经典与类量子认知模型分析的新实验工具。
AI.conclusion: 量子启发方法在建模情绪性、顺序依赖的记忆现象中具有显著优势，为儿童情绪时间记忆研究提供了新思路和有效工具。

title: Scenes as Objects, Not Primitives: Instance-Structured 3D Tokenization from Unposed Views
summary: A 3D scene is understood through its objects, not the primitives that compose them. Yet feed-forward reconstruction methods output dense, unstructured sets of points or Gaussians, leaving object-level structure to be recovered after the fact. We propose a feed-forward framework that decomposes a scene into instance-structured 3D token groups directly from unposed multi-view images -- compact object-centric units from which reconstruction, segmentation, and manipulation all follow. Each token group pairs an instance token capturing entity-level identity with anchor tokens that encode local geometry and appearance, which are decoded into a set of 3D Gaussians. This two-level factorization decouples object identity from local appearance, making object instances a native interface of the representation rather than a derived product. The token groups are learned through differentiable rendering with joint reconstruction and segmentation supervision, requiring no 3D annotations. Our feed-forward model surpasses per-scene optimization baselines in class-agnostic instance segmentation while remaining competitive in novel view synthesis. Beyond these metrics, the same token groups directly unlock instance-level scene editing -- removing, translating, or inserting objects by operating on their groups -- as well as efficient open-vocabulary 3D instance retrieval, where retrieval complexity scales with the number of instances rather than primitives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种前馈式3D场景理解框架，直接从无姿态多视角图像中分解出实例结构化的3D token组，实现对象级建模与编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈重建方法输出密集无结构的点或高斯分布，缺乏对象级结构；需额外后处理才能恢复实例信息。
AI.method: 提出两层token结构：实例token（表征对象身份）与锚点token（编码局部几何与外观），联合可微渲染与重建+分割监督进行端到端学习，无需3D标注。
AI.result: 在无类别实例分割上超越逐场景优化基线，在新视角合成上保持竞争力；支持实例级编辑（删除、平移、插入）与高效开放词汇3D实例检索。
AI.conclusion: 该表示将对象实例作为原生接口而非衍生产物，实现了对象级理解、生成与编辑的统一前馈框架。

title: Translating Natural Language to Strategic Temporal Specifications via LLMs
summary: A rigorous formalization of system requirements is a fundamental prerequisite for the verification of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS). However, writing correct formal specifications is well known as an error-prone, time-consuming, and expertise-intensive task. This difficulty is further accentuated in MAS, where requirements must capture strategic abilities and temporal objectives. At present, there is no established methodology for deriving MAS specifications from natural language. We present a framework for translating Natural Language descriptions of strategic requirements into well-formed ATL/ATL* formulas using Large Language Models (LLMs). Since no available dataset supports supervised learning for the NL-to-ATL/ATL* translation task, we create and curate a novel expert-validated dataset, employed for training and evaluating fine-tuned models. On a held-out test set, evaluated under the LLM judge that best agrees with expert annotations, in-domain fine-tuning of small open-weight models (3 - 7B parameters) matches strong few-shot proprietary API baselines. Our best fine-tuned system reaches 0.84 semantic accuracy, statistically on par with 0.86 for the strongest few-shot proprietary baseline, while keeping requirements on-premises. We further find that judge reliability is inverse to generator strength. The open-weight Llama-3.3-70B tracks human verdicts most closely, whereas the strongest proprietary models are the least reliable judges, over-rejecting faithful paraphrases of the reference. To assess the practical applicability of the generated specifications, we embed our tool to an existing strategic logics model checker, enabling non-expert users to specify strategic properties in natural language.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个利用大语言模型（LLM）将自然语言描述的战略性需求自动翻译为ATL/ATL*逻辑公式的框架，构建了首个专家标注的NL-to-ATL数据集，验证了小规模开源模型微调后可达与强闭源模型少样本性能相当的语义准确率（0.84 vs 0.86），并集成至模型检测器以支持非专家用户使用自然语言编写战略规范。
AI.motivation: MAS的形式化需求规约困难，尤其在战略能力和时序目标表达上缺乏从自然语言到ATL/ATL*的系统化翻译方法。
AI.method: 构建专家验证的NL-to-ATL/ATL*数据集，对3–7B参数开源LLM进行领域微调，并设计LLM裁判机制评估生成质量；将生成工具嵌入战略逻辑模型检测器。
AI.result: 微调的小型开源模型在测试集上达到0.84语义准确率，与最强少样本闭源基线（0.86）无统计显著差异；发现裁判可靠性随模型能力增强而下降，Llama-3.3-70B最贴近人工判断。
AI.conclusion: 基于微调开源LLM的NL-to-ATL翻译框架可行且实用，兼顾准确性、可控性与部署灵活性，为MAS需求工程提供了可落地的自动化支持。

title: PIXELRAG: Web Screenshots Beat Text for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
comment: Our code is available at https://github.com/StarTrail-org/PixelRAG
summary: Augmenting large language models (LLMs) with retrieved web text has become a dominant paradigm, yet the web is not natively textual: existing systems depend on complex parsing pipelines that linearize HTML and discard layout, visual structure, and formatting. We introduce PixelRAG, a new retrieval-augmented method that represents websites in their native visual form and performs retrieval and reading entirely in pixel space, enabling an end-to-end architecture that eliminates text abstraction. PixelRAG is, to our knowledge, the first pipeline to operate over a full Wikipedia corpus in this form, scaling to a datastore of 30 million screenshot images with an efficient visual retrieval index. Built on an existing visual embedding model (i.e., Qwen3-VL-Embedding), PixelRAG further fine-tunes this model on screenshot data with carefully curated contrastive training data. Retrieved screenshots are then fed directly as pixel inputs to a VLM, without intermediate text conversion. PixelRAG consistently outperforms both no-retrieval and text-based RAG baselines, most surprisingly on widely studied text-centric tasks such as NQ and SimpleQA. It also achieves strong gains on multimodal open-domain QA (e.g., MMSearch), benchmarks over noisy news corpora (e.g., LiveVQA), and agentic benchmarks (e.g., MoNaCo), improving accuracy by up to 18.1% over text-based baselines. Finally, pixel representations enable a new efficiency lever for RAG through image compression, achieving up to 3x token cost reduction at lower resolutions while maintaining accuracy. Our results challenge the necessity of text representations in web retrieval, suggesting that web RAG can operate directly in the web's native visual form while improving both performance and efficiency.

AI.tldr: PixelRAG 是首个直接在像素空间中进行网页检索与阅读的 RAG 方法，跳过 HTML 文本解析，利用截图图像构建 3000 万规模的视觉索引，基于 Qwen3-VL-Embedding 微调，并在多项 QA 和代理任务上显著超越文本 RAG 基线，同时支持图像压缩以降低 token 成本。
AI.motivation: 现有 Web RAG 系统依赖复杂 HTML 解析，丢失布局、样式等视觉信息；而网页本质是视觉媒介，需探索原生视觉表征的检索增强范式。
AI.method: 提出 PixelRAG：1）将网页渲染为截图图像；2）基于 Qwen3-VL-Embedding 构建并微调视觉嵌入模型；3）建立高效视觉检索索引（3000 万截图）；4）直接以像素输入 VLM 进行端到端推理；5）引入图像压缩优化 token 效率。
AI.result: 在 NQ、SimpleQA、MMSearch、LiveVQA、MoNaCo 等多类基准上全面超越文本 RAG 和无检索基线，最高提升 18.1% 准确率；图像压缩可实现最高 3 倍 token 成本下降且精度不损。
AI.conclusion: 网页 RAG 不必依赖文本抽象，原生像素表征不仅可行，还能提升性能与效率，挑战了当前以文本为中心的 Web RAG 范式。

title: Fast and Accurate Outlier-Aware LiDAR Super-Resolution for SLAM Applications
summary: This work tackles the challenge of enhancing low-resolution LiDAR sensors for SLAM applications through a novel Deep Unrolling-based Super-Resolution (SR) model. We integrate an outlier removal module to ensure structural integrity while maintaining real-time performance. By leveraging a model-based optimization approach, our method efficiently reconstructs high-resolution point clouds while minimizing computational overhead. The proposed SR model is evaluated within a LiDAR SLAM framework, demonstrating significant improvements in pose estimation accuracy and efficiency compared to state-of-the-art SR methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度展开的超分辨率模型，用于提升低分辨率LiDAR传感器在SLAM中的性能，结合异常点去除模块，在保证实时性的同时提高点云重建质量与位姿估计精度。
AI.motivation: 提升低分辨率LiDAR传感器在SLAM应用中的性能，解决其分辨率不足导致的定位精度下降问题。
AI.method: 提出基于深度展开的超分辨率（SR）模型，集成异常点去除模块，并采用模型驱动的优化方法实现高效高分辨率点云重建。
AI.result: 在LiDAR SLAM框架中验证，相比现有超分辨率方法，显著提升了位姿估计精度和运行效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持实时性的同时有效增强了低分辨率LiDAR数据的质量，为资源受限场景下的SLAM系统提供了实用解决方案。

title: AnTenA: Actionable and Explainable Tensor Analysis System with Large Language Models
summary:
Accurately explaining hidden patterns in multi-aspect data has typically been done by leveraging labels and/or accompanying auxiliary metadata. However, labels and auxiliary data may be inaccurate (e.g. nonstandard, inconsistent), insufficient (e.g. static tabular metadata for time-dependent recordings), or unavailable. %
We propose \fullmethod (\method), which leverages the knowledge of large language models (LLMs) to explain the hidden patterns in human narratives. \method uses task-agnostic and task-specific prompts to explain extracted co-clustered latent patterns from tensor decomposition. To evaluate these explanations, we test the LLMs on forward and backward inference tasks. % Our demo system is available at https://github.com/dawonahn/ECML_PKDD_AnTenA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AnTenA的新方法，利用大语言模型（LLM）在无需准确标签或辅助元数据的情况下，解释多维人类叙事数据中的隐藏模式。该方法结合任务无关与任务相关的提示，对张量分解得到的共聚类潜在模式进行解释，并通过前向和后向推理任务评估解释质量。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标签或辅助元数据来解释多维数据中的隐藏模式，但这些信息常不准确、不充分或不可用。
AI.method: 提出AnTenA方法，利用大语言模型，通过任务无关和任务相关的提示，解释张量分解所得的共聚类潜在模式。
AI.result: 在前向与后向推理任务上验证了LLM生成解释的有效性；提供了开源演示系统。
AI.conclusion: AnTenA展示了LLM在无监督/弱监督场景下解释复杂多维数据模式的潜力，为叙事数据分析提供了新范式。

title: JASPR: Joint Spatial Representation learning of histology and spatial genomics for improved virtual genomic screening and clinical prognostication
summary: Recent studies have shown that spatial properties of tumors are critical for understanding disease biology and predicting patient outcomes. These spatial properties are increasingly uncovered through complementary modalities: spatial transcriptomics (ST) captures spatially-resolved molecular states, while hematoxylin and eosin-stained whole slide images (HE) reveal tissue morphology. While approaches are emerging to fuse these modalities, effective methods that learn not only joint representations but also incorporate spatial context across modalities are lacking. Here, we present JASPR (Joint Spatial Representation learning), a self-supervised deep learning framework that integrates HE images and ST data through a cross-modal reconstruction objective that incorporates spatial context within HE images and ST profiles. It employs shared modules to capture universal spatial properties across modalities, while modality-specific experts encode features unique to morphological and genomic data. We train and validate JASPR on breast cancer datasets, demonstrating that its learned joint representation substantially improves HE-based prediction of 9,248 genes and provides prognostic value for breast cancer outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出JASPR框架，通过自监督学习融合HE图像与空间转录组（ST）数据，利用跨模态重建目标整合空间上下文，共享模块捕获通用空间特性，特异性专家模块提取形态与基因特征，在乳腺癌数据上验证其提升基因表达预测与预后价值。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏在融合HE图像和空间转录组数据时有效建模跨模态空间上下文的能力。
AI.method: 提出JASPR（Joint Spatial Representation learning），一种自监督深度学习框架，采用跨模态重建目标，结合HE图像和ST数据的空间上下文；使用共享模块学习跨模态通用空间特性，辅以模态特异性专家模块提取形态与基因特征。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌数据集上训练验证，JASPR显著提升了基于HE图像对9248个基因的表达预测能力，并具有乳腺癌预后预测价值。
AI.conclusion: JASPR能有效学习HE与ST数据的联合空间表征，为多模态空间生物学分析提供了新范式。

title: TrajRS: Towards Certified Robustness in Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction
comment: Accepted by 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing
summary: The robustness of trajectory prediction models is crucial for developing safe autonomous driving systems. Adversarial attacks on trajectory prediction can significantly impair the accuracy of predicted trajectories, leading to hazardous driving behaviors. While heuristic defense strategies have been implemented to enhance the robustness of trajectory prediction models, these measures often fail against more sophisticated, targeted adversarial attacks. Hence, there is a pressing need to establish verifiable safety assurances for trajectory prediction models. In this paper, we extend the traditional Randomized Smoothing framework to "TrajRS", which provides a certified robust radius for smoothed trajectory predictors. We clarify and expand the formal definitions of robustness in trajectory prediction and tailor the practical TrajRS scheme specifically to "robustness for the optimal prediction" and "robustness for all possible predictions". An extensive set of experiments demonstrates that TrajRS effectively achieves robustness certification for all smoothed pedestrian trajectory predictors in this work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrajRS，一种扩展的随机平滑框架，用于为轨迹预测模型提供可验证的鲁棒性保证，特别针对行人轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有启发式防御策略难以应对更复杂、有针对性的对抗攻击，亟需为轨迹预测模型建立可验证的安全保障。
AI.method: 将传统随机平滑框架扩展为TrajRS，明确定义并区分‘最优预测鲁棒性’与‘所有可能预测鲁棒性’，并设计适配轨迹预测任务的平滑方案。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，TrajRS能有效为本文所测试的所有平滑行人轨迹预测器提供鲁棒性认证。
AI.conclusion: TrajRS为轨迹预测模型提供了首个面向实际任务的、可证明的鲁棒性保障方法，提升了自动驾驶系统安全性。

title: A Trainable-by-Parts Operator Learning Framework: Bridging DeepONet and Karhunen-Loeve Expansions for Large-Scale Applications
summary: Training operator-learning models for large-scale problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) is challenging due to the curse of dimensionality, memory constraints, and limited training data. These challenges arise in many scientific and engineering applications, including subsurface flow, climate modeling, and geological carbon storage (GCS). In this work, we propose a scalable operator-learning framework based on the Karhunen-Loeve Deep Neural Network (KL-DNN) and demonstrate its performance for modeling GCS. The model is trained on a dataset comprising 100 samples of large-scale simulations in a three-dimensional domain with 1.7 million cells and 50 time steps. The KL-DNN method constructs latent spaces using low-rank singular value decomposition of static properties and a nested Karhunen-Loeve expansion for dynamic pressure fields, enabling full-resolution predictions without subsampling or spatial coarsening. The KL-DNN model achieves an average root mean square error (RMSE) of 1.1 psi for pressure (0.04% relative error with respect to the average pressure in the domain) and RMSE of 0.0146 for CO2 saturation (5% relative error with respect to the average saturation inside the plume). The model requires 20 minutes of training on a single GPU, representing a 19% reduction in the pressure errors, 7% reduction in the saturation error, and a two-order-of-magnitude speedup compared to DeepONet trained on the same dataset. These results, along with inference time of less than one minute, establish the proposed model as a practical and accurate solution for large-scale PDE problems, enabling rapid uncertainty quantification, history matching, and real-time decision support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Karhunen-Loeve深度神经网络（KL-DNN）的可扩展算子学习框架，用于求解大规模偏微分方程问题（如地质碳封存），在保持全分辨率预测的同时显著提升精度与训练/推理效率。
AI.motivation: 解决大规模偏微分方程建模中因维数灾难、内存限制和训练数据稀缺带来的挑战，尤其面向 subsurface flow、气候建模和地质碳封存（GCS）等实际应用。
AI.method: 提出KL-DNN框架：利用静态属性的低秩SVD构建潜空间，并对动态压力场采用嵌套Karhunen-Loeve展开；在含100个三维大尺度模拟样本（170万网格单元、50时间步）的数据集上训练。
AI.result: 压力预测平均RMSE为1.1 psi（相对误差0.04%），CO2饱和度RMSE为0.0146（相对误差5%）；单GPU训练仅需20分钟，相较DeepONet压力误差降低19%、饱和度误差降低7%、速度提升两个数量级；推理时间小于1分钟。
AI.conclusion: KL-DNN是一种兼具高精度与高效率的实用算子学习方法，适用于大规模PDE建模，可支撑快速不确定性量化、历史匹配与实时决策。

title: Trajectory Optimization for Collision-Aware Redundant Robotic Multi-Axis Additive Manufacturing by Constrained Gradient Projection
summary: Redundant robotic multi-axis additive manufacturing (MAAM) enables support-free and conformal fabrication, but trajectory optimization for long-horizon paths remains challenging under strict deposition-position constraints and time-varying collision constraints. This work proposes a computational framework for collision-aware trajectory optimization in redundant robotic MAAM. We first formulate nozzle-workpiece relative kinematics using a relative Jacobian, and develop a differentiable SDF-based collision model that captures fabrication-induced geometry evolution and provides optimization gradients. The deposition position is then enforced as a hard waypoint-wise equality constraint through iterative projection onto the self-motion manifold, with the loss gradient restricted to the corresponding tangent space. Experiments on an 8-DOF robotic MAAM platform with diverse long-horizon support-free and conformal toolpaths show that our method maintains a mean nozzle-position error below 10μm, reduces maximum joint jerk by up to $77.6\%$, and eliminates all sampled collision and orientation violations. Compared with the SQP-based baseline, it achieves up to a 10.2x speedup and improved convergence. Physical fabrication experiments further verify that the resulting smooth, collision-free trajectories enable successful printing of complex geometries with fewer visible deposition artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向冗余多轴增材制造（MAAM）的碰撞感知轨迹优化框架，通过相对雅可比建模、可微符号距离场（SDF）碰撞模型及自运动流形上的迭代投影约束，实现了高精度、无碰撞、低抖动的长时域轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 冗余机器人多轴增材制造（MAAM）虽支持无支撑与共形制造，但受严格沉积位置约束和时变碰撞约束限制，长时域轨迹优化仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 1）基于相对雅可比建模喷嘴-工件相对运动学；2）构建可微SDF碰撞模型以表征动态几何演化并提供梯度；3）通过自运动流形上的迭代投影将沉积位置作为硬性逐点等式约束，并将梯度限制在对应切空间。
AI.result: 在8-DOF MAAM平台上实验表明：平均喷嘴位置误差<10μm，最大关节加加速度降低达77.6%，完全消除采样碰撞与姿态违规；相比SQP基线，提速最高达10.2倍且收敛性更优；物理打印验证了复杂几何体的成功成型与更少沉积缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著提升了冗余MAAM轨迹规划的精度、安全性与效率，为高保真共形增材制造提供了可靠计算基础。

title: MAS-Lab: A Specification-Driven Validation Framework for Reliable Multi-Agent Systems
summary:
The rapid emergence of LLM-based agentic frameworks has significantly reduced the cost of assembling multi-agent systems (MAS), enabling fast prototyping and exploration of agentic behaviors. However, systems built with current tooling remain ill-suited for reliable, evolvable, and production-grade deployment. In practice, MAS are often developed in an ad-hoc and imperative manner, with agent logic, orchestration, observability, and control tightly interwoven, little to no explicit system-level validation, and development workflows optimized for demonstrations rather than long-lived, governed operation. As a result, behavior observed during experimentation rarely constitutes reliable evidence of behavior in production.
  In this paper, we introduce MAS-Lab, a specification-driven framework for principled development and experimental validation of multi-agent systems properties. MAS-Lab is designed to transform MAS from collections of scripts into engineered distributed systems by separating semantic intent from operational concerns, making behavior and control explicit, supporting reproducible experimentation, and preserving continuity across lifecycle stages. MAS-Lab consists of three layers: a declarative, framework-agnostic agentic specification layer (Spec); a stateful MAS Operating System that provides execution and control primitives plugged-in by design (MAS-OS); and a set of lab overlays with integrated observability and evaluation tools (Labs). Together, these components enable intent-based validation, principled system evolution, and a seamless transition to production-grade MAS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAS-Lab框架，通过声明式规范、状态化MAS操作系统和可观察性增强的实验环境三层结构，推动多智能体系统从脚本式开发转向工程化、可验证、可演化的生产级系统构建。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统开发方式过于随意、紧耦合、缺乏系统级验证，难以支撑可靠、可演化、生产就绪的部署。
AI.method: 提出MAS-Lab框架，包含三层：1）与框架无关的声明式智能体规范层（Spec）；2）提供执行与控制原语的状态化MAS操作系统（MAS-OS）；3）集成可观测性与评估工具的实验环境（Labs）。
AI.result: 实现了语义意图与运行关注点分离、行为与控制显式化、实验可复现、全生命周期一致性，并支持基于意图的验证与系统演进。
AI.conclusion: MAS-Lab将多智能体系统从零散脚本提升为可工程化设计、验证与部署的分布式系统，弥合了实验原型与生产系统之间的鸿沟。

title: HMARS: A Hierarchical Multi-Agent Memory System for Long-Context Reasoning
summary: Long-context reasoning requires models to access, retrieve, and integrate evidence scattered across documents, dialogues, and accumulated interaction histories. Standard retrieval-augmented generation reduces this problem to top-$K$ chunk retrieval, but such passive access can discard relevant evidence before reasoning begins, especially when relevance depends on broader context. We propose HMARS, a hierarchical multi-agent memory system that treats long contexts as managed memory rather than a flat retrieval corpus. Sub-agents maintain grounded access to bounded memory regions, mid-agents manage regional context and provide query-specific coordination, and a frontier model performs final reasoning over retrieved evidence pages. To evaluate this view, we construct two diagnostic benchmarks targeting evidence breadth and context-dependent relevance. Across long-document and multi-turn memory tasks, HMARS achieves the best overall performance against retrieval, reranking, full-context, graph-based, and agentic long-context baselines. Evidence coverage analysis further shows that its gains come from retrieving the required supporting evidence more completely, rather than merely changing the final answer prompt.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HMARS，一种分层多智能体记忆系统，用于解决长上下文推理问题，通过子智能体、中层智能体和前沿模型协同管理与利用长上下文，显著提升证据覆盖与推理性能。
AI.motivation: 标准检索增强生成方法在长上下文推理中易因被动检索而遗漏依赖全局上下文的相关证据，亟需更主动、结构化的上下文管理机制。
AI.method: 提出HMARS：子智能体负责局部有界记忆访问，中层智能体协调区域上下文并响应查询，前沿模型基于检索到的证据页进行最终推理；构建两个诊断性基准评估证据广度与上下文相关性。
AI.result: HMARS在长文档与多轮记忆任务上全面优于检索、重排序、全上下文、图结构及其它智能体基线；证据覆盖率分析表明其优势源于更完整地检索所需支撑证据。
AI.conclusion: 将长上下文视为主动管理的记忆而非静态检索库，能更有效地支持复杂推理；HMARS验证了分层多智能体架构在长上下文建模中的有效性与可扩展性。

title: PinNet: Keypoint-Aware Learned Local Descriptors with Geometric Embedding for Loop Closure in LiDAR SLAM
summary: Loop closure is essential to reduce drift and build globally consistent maps in large-scale environments. However, reliable loop closure with only geometric information from, e.g., a LiDAR sensor, remains challenging due to the difficulty of constructing discriminative geometric features. We present PinNet, a neural network that produces local geometric descriptors from point clouds for place recognition and scanto-scan registration. PinNet incorporates a neural network that generates keypoints and their corresponding descriptors, together with a plane-based geometric self-attention module that models inter-keypoint spatial relationships to enhance descriptor discriminability for loop-closure detection and point-cloud registration. The approach is comprehensively evaluated on multiple datasets collected with different LiDAR sensors. Experimental results demonstrate strong place-recognition performance, precise relative pose estimation, and successful single-shot localization in different environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PinNet，一种用于点云局部几何描述符生成的神经网络，通过关键点检测与平面基几何自注意力机制提升描述符判别力，从而增强回环检测与点云配准性能。
AI.motivation: 仅依靠LiDAR等传感器的几何信息进行可靠回环检测仍具挑战，因难以构建判别性强的几何特征。
AI.method: PinNet包含关键点及其描述符生成网络，并引入基于平面的几何自注意力模块建模关键点间空间关系，以增强描述符判别性。
AI.result: 在多个不同LiDAR传感器采集的数据集上验证，展现出强地点识别能力、精确相对位姿估计及跨环境单次定位成功。
AI.conclusion: PinNet有效提升了点云回环检测与配准性能，为大规模环境下构建全局一致地图提供了新思路。

title: SEATauBench: Adapting Tool-Agent-User Evaluation Into Low-Resource Southeast Asian Languages
summary: While AI development and evaluation for Southeast Asia (SEA) has grown rapidly, agent capabilities in regional languages are still poorly understood despite its importance to sovereign AI. To fill this gap, we introduce SEATauBench, the first agent-focused evaluation framework for SEA sovereign AI. SeaTau adapts TauBench to five languages -- Mandarin, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, and Filipino -- and evaluates agents across progressively localized settings that vary the language of user-agent interaction, tool specifications, and task domains. Across three recent models, we find that English agent capabilities transfer reasonably well when only the conversation language changes, but quality and robustness degrade sharply as more task contexts are localized, with the largest losses in full domain adaptation. We also the limits of English-only agent assessment for measuring agent capabilities in SEA languages. More broadly, SeaTau provides a diagnostic benchmark and reusable adaptation pipeline for building reliable multilingual agents for linguistically diverse regions. Data and code can be accessed at github.com/SEACrowd/SEATauBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SEATauBench，首个面向东南亚（SEA）主权AI的智能体评估框架，覆盖五种区域语言，并揭示了当前多语言智能体在深度本地化场景下的性能显著下降问题。
AI.motivation: 东南亚AI发展迅速，但区域语言中智能体能力仍缺乏系统评估，阻碍主权AI建设。
AI.method: 构建SEATauBench框架，将TauBench适配至中文、越南语、泰语、印尼语和菲律宾语，通过渐进式本地化（对话语言、工具说明、任务领域）评估智能体表现。
AI.result: 英语智能体能力在仅切换对话语言时迁移尚可，但随本地化程度加深（尤其全领域适配）性能与鲁棒性急剧下降；纯英文评估无法准确反映SEA语言中的真实能力。
AI.conclusion: SEATauBench为东南亚多语言智能体提供了诊断性基准和可复用的适配流程，强调需超越英语中心化评估范式。

title: RadarTwin: Scene-Specific mmWave Radar Simulation and Learning for Mobile Indoor Perception
summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar perception is limited by data scarcity: models trained on existing radar datasets fail to generalize to new objects, environments, and sensing trajectories. We present RadarTwin, a framework for generating deployment-specific radar training data before real data collection. Given a 3D reconstruction of a target space (phone LiDAR, robot-mounted sensing, or RGB-to-3D), RadarTwin uses a vision-language model to infer radar-relevant surface materials and a physics-based ray tracer to synthesize raw frequency-modulated continuous-wave (FMCW) radar measurements with multi-bounce propagation. To study what transfers from simulation to reality, we collect a paired real-simulated dataset spanning household objects, material classes, distances, rotations, translations, and mobile sensing trajectories. We show that simulated and real radar share the same object-discriminative shape and material features, and that modeling the environment's multipath is essential to matching real measurements. A representation trained on simulation alone recognizes real objects at 2.5 times chance with no real radar labels, and a few labeled examples raise this to 95.3% on a 12-way recognition task. RadarTwin enables training radar perception for a new space before any real radar data is collected there.

AI.tldr: RadarTwin 是一个在真实雷达数据采集前，基于目标空间3D重建生成专用毫米波雷达训练数据的框架，结合视觉语言模型与物理射线追踪合成FMCW雷达信号，并验证了仿真数据对真实场景识别的有效迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 毫米波雷达感知受限于数据稀缺，现有数据集训练的模型难以泛化到新物体、新环境和新感知轨迹。
AI.method: RadarTwin 利用3D重建（如手机LiDAR或RGB-to-3D）输入，通过视觉语言模型推断表面材料，并采用基于物理的射线追踪器合成含多径传播的原始FMCW雷达测量数据；同时构建配对的真实-仿真数据集以分析仿真到现实的迁移特性。
AI.result: 仿真与真实雷达共享物体判别性形状与材料特征；建模环境多径对匹配实测至关重要；仅用仿真数据训练的表征可在无真实标签下实现2.5倍于随机猜测的物体识别率，加入少量真实标签后12类识别准确率达95.3%。
AI.conclusion: RadarTwin 能在未采集任何真实雷达数据前，为新场景定制化生成高质量训练数据，显著提升毫米波雷达感知模型的部署效率与泛化能力。

title: ComMem: Complementary Memory Systems for Test-Time Adaptation of Vision-Language Models
comment: A brain-inspired complementary memory framework leveraging fast visual caching and slow textual refinement for VLM test-time adaptation
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) of vision-language models (VLMs) is essential for their robust deployment in dynamic, real-world environments. However, existing TTA methods often adapt locally without accumulating knowledge over time, or operating within a single modality without exploiting VLMs' inherently multi-modal nature. Inspired by the \textbf{Com}plementary \textbf{Mem}ory systems of the biological brain, we propose \textbf{ComMem}, an innovative approach that mimics the distinct but cooperative roles of the hippocampus and neocortex to enable effective TTA for VLMs. ComMem consists of two key components: a fast-adapting detailed memory, akin to the hippocampus, that forms a dynamic visual cache from high-confidence test samples; and a slow-integrating abstract memory, akin to the neocortex, that continually refines global textual prototypes. For each test instance, ComMem jointly optimizes both memory systems to ensure cross-modal consistency. Extensive experiments on 15 benchmark datasets show that ComMem significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods under both natural distribution shifts and cross-dataset generalization, offering a promising direction for enhancing VLMs' practical adaptability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ComMem方法，受生物脑互补记忆系统启发，通过模拟海马体（快速适应的视觉缓存）和新皮层（缓慢整合的文本原型）的协同作用，实现视觉-语言模型在测试时的跨模态自适应。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法往往局限于单模态或缺乏长期知识积累，未能充分利用视觉-语言模型的多模态特性。
AI.method: 提出ComMem框架，包含两个记忆模块：类海马体的快速适应详细记忆（构建高置信度测试样本的动态视觉缓存）和类新皮层的慢速整合抽象记忆（持续优化全局文本原型），并在每个测试样本上联合优化二者以保证跨模态一致性。
AI.result: 在15个基准数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法，尤其在自然分布偏移和跨数据集泛化场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: ComMem为提升视觉-语言模型在真实动态环境中的实用适应性提供了新思路，验证了借鉴生物记忆机制设计AI系统的优势。

title: A Gravitational Interpretation of Fine-Tuning Reversion
summary: Fine-tuning on harmless data can partially undo behaviors acquired earlier in training. Safety can erode under benign post-alignment updates, unlearned capabilities can re-emerge, latent traits can transfer through apparently unrelated supervision, and related post-alignment fragility appears in other generative settings. We argue these phenomena are usefully viewed through a common training-history lens. Our hypothesis is geometric: large early training phases create dominant behavioral manifolds, while later alignment or specialization phases are shallower displacements from them. Subsequent fine-tuning can therefore inherit a persistent reversion component pointing back toward a witness of the dominant manifold. We call this the gravitational interpretation of fine-tuning reversion. Across our main settings, representational drift rapidly acquires a component along a history-defined reversion direction (v_rev). In our main track, alignment with v_rev rises from cos = 0.429 +/- 0.052 after the first update to 0.647 +/- 0.021 by step 20. Across 24 run-step pairs, every observed alignment exceeds the p99 of an isotropic activation-space null. We demonstrate that selectively blocking motion along v_rev changes the final alignment at T=100 from 0.648 +/- 0.009 to -0.211 +/- 0.021 and reduces harmfulness from 19.0% +/- 4.0% to 8.5% +/- 1.5% with little task cost. These results support v_rev as a causally relevant mediator of early post-alignment reversion in our setup. Importantly, we do not claim that v_rev is the unique safety direction, nor that the dominant manifold is directly observed; rather, we identify a robust, history-defined direction that explains and partially controls early reversion dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种‘引力解释’来理解大模型微调过程中的行为回退现象：早期训练形成的主导行为流形会产生一个历史定义的回退方向v_rev，后续对齐或微调容易沿此方向发生偏移；实验证明，抑制沿v_rev方向的更新可显著降低有害性并保持任务性能。
AI.motivation: 观察到在无害数据上微调可能部分逆转先前习得的行为，安全性能在良性对齐后仍会退化，未学能力可能重现，潜在特质可通过看似无关的监督迁移——这些现象提示需从训练历史视角统一理解对齐脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出几何假设：早期大规模训练构建主导行为流形，后期对齐仅是浅层偏移；定义历史依赖的回退方向v_rev，并通过测量表征漂移与v_rev的余弦相似度量化其对齐程度；进一步设计干预实验——阻断沿v_rev的更新方向，评估其对最终对齐效果和有害性的影响。
AI.result: v_rev方向对齐度在20步内从0.429显著升至0.647；所有24组运行均显著高于各向同性零假设的p99；阻断v_rev方向更新后，T=100时对齐度由0.648转为-0.211，有害性从19.0%降至8.5%，且任务性能损失极小。
AI.conclusion: v_rev是一个鲁棒、历史定义、因果相关的方向，能解释并部分调控早期对齐后的回退动力学；它并非唯一安全方向，也不直接对应可观测的主导流形，但为理解和干预对齐脆弱性提供了新几何视角。

title: SICAGE: Speaker-Independent Culture-Aware Gesture Generation using TED4C-L Dataset
summary: Recent co-speech gesture generation methods often overlook cultural differences, limiting their effectiveness in human-agent interaction. Moreover, culture-conditioned models are rarely evaluated under speaker-disjoint splits, so apparent "cultural" behavior may be confounded with speaker-specific gesturing style. We introduce SICAGE, a modular framework for culture-aware co-speech gesture generation that conditions motion synthesis models on speaker-independent cultural representations. SICAGE learns these representations from audio and text by treating each speaker as a separate domain while imposing invariance across speakers. This encourages representations to remain culture-discriminative while reducing dependence on speaker identity. The resulting cultural embeddings condition a multimodal generator to produce culturally appropriate gestures. We instantiate this idea with two domain generalization approaches: adversarial learning and Fishr regularization. We further introduce ALaDiT, a real-time diffusion-based gesture generator designed to efficiently incorporate the learned cultural embeddings. To validate our method, we built TED4C-L, a 106-hour multimodal dataset of 764 TED speakers from four cultural groups. Experiments show that SICAGE improves motion realism, diversity, beat synchronization, semantic relevance, and cultural consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SICAGE框架，通过学习说话人无关的文化表征来实现文化感知的协同语音手势生成，并设计了ALaDiT实时扩散模型，在新构建的TED4C-L数据集上验证了其在手势真实性、多样性、节拍同步性、语义相关性和文化一致性上的提升。
AI.motivation: 现有协同语音手势生成方法忽视文化差异，且文化条件模型常未在说话人分离划分下评估，导致文化行为与说话人特有手势风格混淆。
AI.method: 提出SICAGE模块化框架，利用音频和文本学习说话人无关的文化表征（通过领域泛化方法如对抗学习和Fishr正则化实现），并将该文化嵌入用于条件化多模态手势生成器；同时设计实时扩散模型ALaDiT；构建TED4C-L多文化TED演讲数据集。
AI.result: SICAGE在运动真实性、多样性、节拍同步性、语义相关性和文化一致性方面均有提升；ALaDiT支持高效实时生成；TED4C-L数据集含764名来自四个文化群体的TED演讲者，共106小时。
AI.conclusion: 说话人无关的文化表征可有效提升协同语音手势生成的文化适配性与泛化能力，SICAGE为文化感知人机交互提供了可行框架。

title: UniCA: Bi-directional Cross-Attention with Positive Similarity Loss for Robust Multi-Modal Retrieval
summary: Multi-modal retrieval has become increasingly critical for handling the growing volume of integrated visual-textual data in real-world applications, but existing frameworks rely on implicit fusion via text encoder self-attention, limiting explicit cross-modal semantic alignment. To address this gap, this paper proposes UniCA (Unified Cross-Attention Encoder), a multi-modal retrieval model with four key innovations: 1) a bi-directional cross-attention (Bi-CA) block that enables active semantic exchange between visual and textual tokens prior to concatenation, capturing inter-modal correlations more efficiently. 2) a Positive Similarity Loss that optimizes absolute semantic proximity between query and positive candidate embeddings. 3) a streamlined dataset UMR-S10 (Universal Multimodal Retrieval Sample 10%) to reduce computational costs while retaining semantic diversity and task representativeness. 4) an experimental validation on the WebQA benchmark demonstrates that UniCA outperforms the baseline model across Hybrid and Image-Text tasks, achieving improvements of up to 4.09% in Recall@5, 3.28% in Recall@10, and 3.96% in MRR@1 for the hybrid task. UniCA provides an efficient and robust solution for multi-modal retrieval, lowering deployment barriers through its lightweight dataset and enhanced fusion mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniCA模型，通过双向交叉注意力机制、正相似性损失、轻量级数据集UMR-S10，在WebQA基准上显著提升多模态检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态检索框架依赖文本编码器自注意力进行隐式融合，缺乏显式的跨模态语义对齐能力。
AI.method: 提出UniCA模型，包含四个创新点：1）双向交叉注意力（Bi-CA）模块；2）正相似性损失函数；3）轻量高效数据集UMR-S10；4）在WebQA上的实验验证。
AI.result: 在WebQA基准的混合与图文任务中，UniCA相较基线模型Recall@5提升4.09%，Recall@10提升3.28%，MRR@1提升3.96%。
AI.conclusion: UniCA通过显式跨模态融合与轻量设计，为多模态检索提供了高效鲁棒的解决方案，降低了部署门槛。

title: J-LAW: Joint Localization and Actionable World Modeling via Coupled Latent Factor Graphs
summary: Classical SLAM estimates metric poses and a geometric map but produces no actionable predictive model for planning. Action-conditioned world models learn compact latent dynamics for planning but ignore global metric consistency and accumulate drift under open-loop rollout. We argue these are two views of the same estimation problem and propose J-LAW (Joint Localization and Actionable World Modeling) in this letter: a coupled factor graph that jointly optimizes metric object poses, latent world states, and latent landmark embeddings. The bridge is a pose-conditioned latent encoder and a learned pose--latent coupling factor, so that better localization improves the world model and vice versa. We cast observation, action-conditioned prediction, metric odometry, pose--latent coupling, latent loop closure, and latent landmark observation as probabilistic factors in a single MAP objective. Real-data experiments on PushT and WildGS show that coupled graph correction substantially reduces latent prediction RMSE and endpoint drift relative to open-loop rollout, while latent loop closure improves global trajectory consistency. J-LAW yields a map that is simultaneously metric (poses) and actionable (latent landmarks for planning).

AI.tldr: 本文提出J-LAW框架，联合优化度量位姿、潜在世界状态和潜在路标嵌入，通过姿态条件潜在编码器与学习的位姿-潜在耦合因子实现定位与世界建模的相互增强，在真实数据实验中显著降低预测误差与轨迹漂移。
AI.motivation: 经典SLAM缺乏可规划性，而动作条件世界模型忽略全局度量一致性并存在开环漂移；二者实为同一估计问题的不同视角，需统一建模。
AI.method: 构建联合因子图（J-LAW），融合观测、动作预测、度量里程计、位姿-潜在耦合、潜在回环闭合及潜在路标观测等概率因子，以最大后验估计求解。
AI.result: 在PushT和WildGS真实数据上，J-LAW显著降低潜在预测RMSE与终点漂移，提升全局轨迹一致性；生成兼具度量精度与规划能力的地图。
AI.conclusion: J-LAW成功统一了SLAM与动作条件世界建模，实现了定位精度与世界模型可行动性的协同提升，为机器人自主导航提供了更鲁棒、可规划的表征基础。

title: DriftGuard: Safety-Aware Multi-Monitor Detection and Selective Adaptation for Evolving Toxicity Moderation
summary: Automated toxicity moderation systems operate in dynamic online environments where harmful behavior evolves through coded language, shifting targets, and strategic adaptation to enforcement. Existing drift detection methods often focus on global distributional change, but such signals may miss safety-relevant shifts that emerge in localized harm subspaces or high-risk model-error regions. This paper introduces DriftGuard, a safety-aware adaptive moderation framework that combines multi-monitor drift detection with selective model updating. The framework tracks global text drift, identity-harm drift, model uncertainty, toxic-risk drift, and false-negative-risk drift. When safety-relevant change is detected, the model is updated using a hard-mix adaptation set that prioritizes likely false negatives, identity-related high-risk examples, false-positive-risk examples, and uncertain boundary cases. Experiments on Civil Comments temporal shift and Jigsaw-to-DynaHate cross-dataset shift show that safety-aware monitors detect risks missed by global drift alone. Hard-mix adaptation improves toxic recall and accuracy over no-update and random-balanced baselines, raising toxic recall to 0.8777 on Civil Comments and from 0.7107 to 0.8523 on DynaHate. Bootstrap analysis further shows stable DynaHate safety gains, with toxic recall increasing by 0.1418 and false-negative prevalence decreasing by 0.0781. Overall, DriftGuard links safety-aware drift detection to targeted, lightweight model updating for more robust adaptive toxicity moderation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DriftGuard框架，通过多维度安全感知漂移检测与选择性模型更新，提升毒性内容审核系统在动态环境中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有漂移检测方法仅关注全局分布变化，易忽略局部有害子空间或高风险模型错误区域的安全相关漂移。
AI.method: 提出DriftGuard框架，集成全局文本漂移、身份-危害漂移、模型不确定性、毒性风险漂移和假阴性风险漂移等多监控器，并采用硬混合（hard-mix）自适应数据集进行选择性模型更新。
AI.result: 在Civil Comments和DynaHate数据集上，DriftGuard显著提升毒性召回率（分别达0.8777和0.8523），并降低假阴性率；Bootstrap分析验证其稳定性。
AI.conclusion: DriftGuard将安全感知漂移检测与轻量级、目标导向的模型更新相结合，实现了更鲁棒的自适应毒性审核。

title: CLOSER-VLN: Closed-Loop Self-Verified Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Aerial Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-language navigation (VLN) has recently advanced with large language and multimodal models, enabling agents to follow natural-language instructions in unseen environments without training a task-specific navigation policy. However, most existing VLN methods relying on large models still adopt an open-loop decision-execution approach, where candidate actions are generated from instructions and observations but are rarely verified or corrected before execution. This causes critical issues in aerial VLN, where minor errors in intermediate actions may quickly accumulate into large trajectory deviations and lead to target loss. To address this issue, we propose Closed-loop Self-verified Retrieval-augmented Reasoning (CLOSER), a training-policy-free method that sequentially performs action reasoning, reliability verification, targeted retrieval, and action correction in a closed-loop manner before executing concrete actions. We instantiate the CLOSER in aerial VLN tasks and develop a CLOSER-VLN framework, which is composed of three components: a hierarchical reasoner for generating candidate actions based on available information, a multidimensional action verifier for assessing the reliability of actions generated by the reasoner, and a verification-triggered multimodal retriever for retrieving targeted exemplars from a memory bank only when verification fails. We conduct experimental evaluations on the CityNav benchmark, where CLOSER-VLN achieves 32.01% SR and 21.28% SPL on the test-unseen split, confirming the effectiveness of closed-loop reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练策略的闭环自验证检索增强推理方法CLOSER，用于解决空中视觉-语言导航（VLN）中开环决策导致的误差累积问题；通过分层推理、多维动作验证与验证触发式多模态检索，在CityNav基准上显著提升了成功率（SR）和SPL指标。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大模型的VLN方法多采用开环决策，难以纠正中间动作错误，在空中导航中易导致轨迹大幅偏离和目标丢失。
AI.method: 提出CLOSER方法：在执行动作前闭环进行动作推理、可靠性验证、目标检索与动作修正；具体包括分层推理器、多维动作验证器和验证触发式多模态检索器，并构建CLOSER-VLN框架。
AI.result: 在CityNav基准测试未见场景（test-unseen）上，CLOSER-VLN达到32.01%的成功率（SR）和21.28%的SPL。
AI.conclusion: 闭环自验证机制能有效缓解开环决策的误差累积问题，显著提升空中VLN任务的鲁棒性与准确性，且无需额外训练导航策略。

title: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?
summary: LLM agents are expected to act over multiple turns, using search, browsing interfaces, and terminal tools to complete user goals. Yet not every goal is well specified or achievable in the available environment. In such cases, a reliable agent should recognize that further interaction is unlikely to help and abstain from additional tool calls. We define Agentic Abstention, the problem of deciding when an agent should stop acting under uncertainty. Unlike standard LLM abstention, which is usually evaluated as a single-turn answer-or-abstain decision, agentic abstention is a sequential decision problem: an agent can answer, abstain, or gather more information at each turn, and the need to abstain may only become clear after interacting with the environment. We study this problem across web shopping, terminal environments, and question answering, evaluating 13 LLM-as-agent systems and 2 agent scaffolds on more than 28,000 tasks. Our results show that the main challenge is not only whether agents can abstain, but also when they abstain. Some agents never abstain when they should, while others do so only after many unnecessary interactions. This gap is especially large on tasks where the instruction appears feasible until the environment reveals otherwise (e.g., no valid result matches the instruction). We further find that model scale, reasoning, and agent scaffolding affect abstention in different ways, where larger or more capable models sometimes perform worse at timely abstention. Finally, we introduce CONVOLVE, a context engineering method for improving agentic abstention that distills full interaction trajectories into reusable stopping rules. On WebShop, CONVOLVE substantially improves timely abstention without updating model parameters, raising Llama-3.3-70B's timely recall rate from 26.7 to 57.4. Our dataset and code are available at https://lhannnn.github.io/agentic-abstention

AI.tldr: 本文提出'代理式放弃'(Agentic Abstention)概念，即LLM智能体在多步交互中判断何时应主动停止行动；研究发现现有系统普遍难以及时放弃，并提出CONVOLVE方法通过上下文工程提升及时放弃能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体缺乏在多步交互中识别目标不可行并主动停止的能力，导致冗余甚至错误操作；需定义并解决'代理式放弃'这一新型序列决策问题。
AI.method: 定义Agentic Abstention问题，构建跨领域（网页购物、终端、问答）评测基准，评估13个LLM代理系统和2种代理框架；提出CONVOLVE方法，通过蒸馏完整交互轨迹生成可复用的停止规则。
AI.result: 发现模型规模与推理能力并不总提升及时放弃性能，部分大模型反而更晚放弃；CONVOLVE显著提升Llama-3.3-70B在WebShop上的及时召回率（26.7→57.4）。
AI.conclusion: 代理式放弃是LLM智能体可靠性的关键挑战；及时放弃比能否放弃更重要；CONVOLVE提供无需微调的轻量级改进方案，为构建更稳健的多步代理系统提供新思路。

title: NIVA: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Actionable Earth System Intelligence
summary: Recent advances in AI-driven weather and climate modeling have improved forecast skill while reducing computational cost. However, existing data-driven approaches are limited in their ability to model coupled Earth system dynamics, which is required for extending predictability beyond the ~2-week horizon. To address this, we introduce NIVA, a multimodal foundation model designed to learn unified representations across Earth system components. While the full framework targets atmosphere, ocean, ice, and land interactions, we focus here on a two-modality setting (ocean and atmosphere) as a controlled proof of concept to evaluate whether foundation models can learn coupled dynamics. Trained on large-scale Earth system simulations, NIVA learns physically meaningful cross-modal structure, providing a foundation for subseasonal-to-seasonal prediction. As initial validation, we show that NIVA captures key modes of climate variability through accurate prediction of major climate indices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NIVA多模态基础模型，旨在学习地球系统各组成部分（如大气、海洋等）的统一表征，以提升亚季节至季节尺度的预测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法难以建模耦合的地球系统动力学过程，限制了超过约2周的可预测性。
AI.method: 构建名为NIVA的多模态基础模型，在大气与海洋双模态设定下进行验证，基于大规模地球系统模拟数据训练，学习跨模态物理一致的表征。
AI.result: NIVA能准确预测主要气候指数，捕捉关键气候变率模态，验证了其学习耦合动力学的能力。
AI.conclusion: NIVA为实现更长时效、物理一致的地球系统预测提供了可行的基础模型框架。

title: VLK: Learning Humanoid Loco-Manipulation from Synthetic Interactions in Reconstructed Scenes
summary: Perception-based humanoid loco-manipulation requires connecting egocentric observations and task instructions to whole-body motion. Learning this mapping requires synchronized egocentric images, language commands, and robot-compatible kinematic trajectories, yet no existing data source provides this complete tuple at scale. We address this bottleneck by generating vision-language-kinematics (VLK) supervision synthetically in reconstructed scenes. Our pipeline leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting to reconstruct metric-scale indoor environments, synthesizes navigation and object-interaction trajectories using privileged scene information, and renders paired egocentric observations after the fact. We produce 48,000 paired trajectories with no human intervention and train a VLK policy that predicts short-horizon whole-body kinematic trajectories. A whole-body tracker converts these predictions into actions on the physical humanoid. We evaluate on the physical Unitree G1 performing navigation and single-object transport, demonstrating that synthesized interactions in reconstructed scenes provide effective supervision for sim-to-real perception-based humanoid loco-manipulation. Project Website: https://vision-language-kinematics.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种合成视觉-语言-运动学（VLK）监督数据的方法，通过3D高斯溅射重建室内场景，自动生成大规模配对的 egocentric 图像、语言指令和全身运动轨迹，用于训练感知驱动的人形机器人locomanipulation策略，并在Unitree G1机器人上验证了其sim-to-real效果。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏同步的egocentric图像、语言指令和机器人兼容的运动学轨迹三元组，制约了感知驱动的人形locomanipulation学习。
AI.method: 利用3D Gaussian Splatting重建度量尺度室内场景，基于场景先验自动生成导航与物体交互轨迹，并离线渲染对应的egocentric观测；生成48,000条无须人工干预的VLK配对轨迹，训练短时域全身运动学预测策略，再通过全身跟踪器映射为真实机器人动作。
AI.result: 在物理Unitree G1人形机器人上成功实现导航与单物体搬运任务，验证了合成数据在sim-to-real迁移中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在重建场景中合成交互数据可有效提供感知驱动人形locomanipulation所需的VLK监督，突破真实数据稀缺瓶颈。

title: HyperSU: Corpus-Driven Semantic-Unit Hypergraph for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Recent Hypergraph-based retrieval-augmented generation (HyperRAG) methods use hyperedges to connect multiple entities simultaneously, enabling more efficient multi-entity evidence organization than pairwise graph structures. However, existing HyperRAG methods often rely on LLM-generated summaries to construct hyperedges, which can introduce hallucinations while also incurring high indexing costs. In addition, during retrieval, existing methods typically rely on either one-hop neighbor expansion or PageRank diffusion. The former may miss useful multi-hop evidence, while the latter can suffer from uncontrolled propagation over excessive hub nodes, leading to semantic drift and noisy reasoning chains. To address these challenges, we propose HyperSU, a novel hypergraph-based RAG framework featuring semantic-unit hyperedges and clue-guided bidirectional retrieval. During construction, HyperSU formulates hyperedge construction as an entity-aware minimum-description-length (MDL) optimization problem, inducing source-grounded semantic-unit hyperedges that balance sentence-level semantic coherence and entity compactness. It then constructs a hypergraph by modeling each semantic unit as a hyperedge over its co-mentioned entities. During retrieval, HyperSU performs clue-guided bidirectional expansion over the semantic-unit hypergraph, enabling both multi-hop evidence discovery and answer-aware noise reduction. Experiments show that HyperSU consistently improves answer accuracy over standard, graph-based, and hypergraph-based RAG baselines, achieving up to a 14.7% relative accuracy improvement on GraphRAG-Bench, with larger gains on reasoning-intensive tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperSU框架，通过语义单元超边和线索引导的双向检索，解决现有超图RAG方法中幻觉、高索引成本及检索噪声等问题，显著提升推理密集型任务的答案准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有HyperRAG方法依赖LLM生成摘要构建超边，易引入幻觉且索引成本高；检索时采用单跳扩展或PageRank扩散，分别导致遗漏多跳证据或语义漂移和噪声推理链。
AI.method: HyperSU将超边构建建模为实体感知的最小描述长度（MDL）优化问题，生成源支撑的语义单元超边，并以共现实体构建超图；检索阶段采用线索引导的双向扩展，在语义单元超图上实现多跳证据发现与答案感知的噪声抑制。
AI.result: 在GraphRAG-Bench上相对准确率最高提升14.7%，在推理密集型任务中增益更显著，全面优于标准RAG、图RAG及现有超图RAG基线。
AI.conclusion: HyperSU通过语义单元超边构建与双向线索引导检索，有效缓解幻觉、高成本与噪声传播问题，为超图RAG提供了更鲁棒、高效的新范式。

title: CubifyGS: Object-Centric 3D Gaussian Splatting for Lifelong Dynamic Scene Maintenance
comment: Accepted to IROS 2026. 8 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables
summary: Lifelong scene mapping under rigid object rearrangement remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity modeling, primitive-level updates often cause persistent ghosting and slow recovery. We propose CubifyGS, an object-level mapping framework that shifts dynamic maintenance from passive re-optimization to active asset management. CubifyGS models movable instances as reusable Gaussian assets, detects object appearance and disappearance, and updates maps through asset retrieval, rigid transformation, and explicit pruning rather than reconstruction from scratch. To address geometric voids and local photometric mismatch after such edits, we further propose an event-triggered adaptive optimization strategy that focuses computation on affected regions. We validate our approach on a newly constructed high-fidelity dynamic benchmark, demonstrating that CubifyGS improves artifact suppression and maintenance efficiency over representative reproducible baselines in the evaluated object-rearrangement setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CubifyGS，一种面向刚性物体重排布的终身场景建图框架，通过对象级高斯资产复用与事件触发式局部优化，显著抑制建图伪影并提升维护效率。
AI.motivation: 在刚性物体重排布下的终身场景建图中，现有3D高斯泼溅方法因像素/原语级更新导致持续鬼影和恢复缓慢。
AI.method: 将可移动物体建模为可复用的高斯资产；检测物体出现/消失；通过资产检索、刚性变换与显式剪枝更新地图；引入事件触发的自适应局部优化以修复几何空洞与光度失配。
AI.result: 在新构建的高保真动态基准上验证，相比代表性基线，CubifyGS在伪影抑制和建图维护效率上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 对象级资产化管理与局部自适应优化相结合，是提升动态场景终身建图鲁棒性与效率的有效范式。

title: 5ting at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Strong End-to-End Multi-Turn RAG via LLM-Based Reranking and Faithfulness Control
summary: We introduce 5ting, our system for the SemEval2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval), which evaluates multi-turn Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Multi turn RAG involves context drift, under specification, and hallucination risk. Our system combines BGE-M3 dense retrieval with FAISS indexing, dual-query merged retrieval, and LLM based reranking, followed by role separated generation constrained to retrieved evidence. The retriever achieved nDCG@5 = 0.4719 in Task A, while the end to end system ranked in Task C with a harmonic score of 0.5597 and RL_F = 0.7692.

AI.tldr: 5ting is a multi-turn RAG system for SemEval2026 Task 8, combining BGE-M3 retrieval, dual-query merging, LLM-based reranking, and role-separated evidence-constrained generation; it achieved strong performance in both retrieval (nDCG@5=0.4719) and end-to-end evaluation (harmonic score=0.5597).
AI.motivation: Address challenges in multi-turn RAG including context drift, under-specification, and hallucination risk.
AI.method: Combines BGE-M3 dense retrieval with FAISS indexing, dual-query merged retrieval, LLM-based reranking, and role-separated generation constrained to retrieved evidence.
AI.result: Retriever achieved nDCG@5 = 0.4719 in Task A; end-to-end system achieved harmonic score = 0.5597 and RL_F = 0.7692 in Task C.
AI.conclusion: 5ting demonstrates effective handling of multi-turn RAG challenges through integrated retrieval and constrained generation strategies.

title: Semantic-Aware Generative Image Transmission for Resource-Constrained Visual IoT Systems
summary: Resource-constrained visual Internet of Things (IoT) systems, such as edge cameras, unmanned sensing platforms, industrial inspection nodes, and remote monitoring sensors, often need to transmit task-relevant visual evidence over low-rate wireless links to an edge/cloud service. Existing image communication methods usually compress or transmit complete global representations, leaving limited room to exploit receiver-side generative restoration. This paper proposes a semantic-aware generative image transmission framework for edge-assisted visual IoT. The image captured by an IoT visual sensor is encoded into a discrete token grid by a VQ encoder. At the IoT transmitter or nearby gateway, token recoverability, estimated from prediction entropy and local structure complexity, is fused with semantic importance obtained from instance segmentation and category-aware scoring. A spatial dispersal sampler then selects the tokens to be transmitted under a bitrate budget. The transmitter sends only the quantization indices of kept tokens and a binary mask map, while the edge/cloud receiver recovers masked tokens through MaskGIT with Halton sequence scheduling. Experiments on Kodak and VisDrone scenes under AWGN and Rayleigh channels show that the proposed method provides a flexible bitrate-quality tradeoff for narrowband visual IoT links. At 0.074 bpp, it uses 44.6% of the transmitted bits of the 0.167-bpp DeepJSCC/WITT reference while achieving 29.9 dB PSNR. A pseudo-GT downstream detection study on Kodak further shows that semantic-aware masking preserves task-relevant objects better than random masking at both 30% and 50% mask ratios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向边缘辅助视觉物联网的语义感知生成式图像传输框架，通过离散令牌编码、语义重要性与可恢复性联合评估、空间分散采样及MaskGIT重建，在低码率下实现高质量图像恢复与下游任务性能保持。
AI.motivation: 资源受限的视觉IoT设备需在低速率无线链路上高效传输任务相关视觉证据，而现有方法多压缩或传输全局表示，难以充分利用接收端生成式恢复能力。
AI.method: 采用VQ编码器将图像编码为离散令牌格；融合预测熵、局部结构复杂度估计的令牌可恢复性与实例分割和类别评分得到的语义重要性；通过空间分散采样器在码率约束下选择待传令牌；仅发送保留令牌的量化索引和二值掩码图；接收端利用MaskGIT结合Halton序列调度恢复被掩码令牌。
AI.result: 在Kodak和VisDrone数据集及AWGN/Rayleigh信道下验证，0.074 bpp时仅用DeepJSCC/WITT（0.167 bpp）44.6%的比特即达29.9 dB PSNR；伪GT目标检测实验表明，语义感知掩码在30%和50%掩码比下均优于随机掩码，更好保留任务相关物体。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在窄带视觉IoT链路中实现了灵活的码率-质量权衡，并兼顾下游视觉任务性能，验证了语义引导与生成式重建协同的有效性。

title: Agent Safety Is Action Alignment
summary: Large language models increasingly act as agents: they call tools, move money, delete records, and send messages on a user's behalf. To keep them safe, practitioners imported the chatbot-era recipe (train the model to refuse unsafe inputs) into the agentic setting, and treat the resulting capability loss as a manageable ``alignment tax.'' We argue this is a \emph{category error}. Refusal is a primitive for \emph{content safety}, where the harm is in the model's output and is therefore a learnable function of it. Agentic harm is different in kind: it lies not in any output but in the relation between the authority an action exercises and the authority the user granted, which is absent from the text the model sees. Importing content-safety methods into this regime does not trade capability for safety; it pays capability and buys negative security. We support this with three lines of evidence spanning the autonomy spectrum: defense-trained models learn surface patterns rather than intent; the same training collapses multi-step agents before any threat appears while leaving them exploitable; and even undefended frontier models exceed granted authority under ordinary use. We conclude that action safety cannot be installed in weights. It must be expressed as \emph{least privilege}, enforced \emph{outside} the model at the action boundary, and evaluated as \emph{action alignment} (a relational, deployment-conditioned property) rather than a refusal score.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，将聊天机器人时代的“拒绝不安全输入”方法应用于大语言模型作为代理（agent）的场景是一种类别错误，因为代理式危害与内容式危害本质不同；代理式危害源于行动权限与用户授权之间的错配，无法仅通过模型权重训练解决，而需在行动边界外以最小权限原则强制执行，并以行动对齐（action alignment）而非拒绝分数来评估安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将内容安全的拒绝机制直接迁移到代理式AI中，忽视了代理式危害的本质——即行动权限与用户授权之间的关系缺失，导致安全与能力双重受损。
AI.method: 通过三方面证据分析：防御训练模型仅学习表面模式而非真实意图；相同训练使多步代理在无威胁时即崩溃但仍可被利用；未加防护的前沿模型在常规使用中即超出用户授权范围。
AI.result: 证明拒绝机制无法有效保障代理安全，反而损害能力且降低实际安全性；提出行动安全必须依赖外部最小权限控制和行动对齐评估。
AI.conclusion: 行动安全不能内化于模型权重，必须通过部署时的外部权限控制（least privilege）和关系性、条件性的行动对齐（action alignment）来实现。

title: Improving Coherence in Hierarchical Time Series Forecasting using Structured Temporal Fusion
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. Preprint. Source files included
summary:
In many real-world applications, such as retail sales, energy usage, and supply chain planning, forecasting is performed across hierarchical structures. These structures often represent aggregations (e.g., products to categories to regions), where forecasts must not only be accurate but also coherent, meaning that lower-level predictions sum correctly to higher-level forecasts. Traditional statistical methods, such as Bottom-Up and MinT, enforce coherence through post-processing but fail to model complex nonlinear temporal dependencies and covariate interactions.
  We propose Hierarchical Temporal Fusion (HTF), a novel extension of the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT) that integrates structured hierarchical embeddings with a coherence-aware loss function to ensure consistent forecasts across all levels of a hierarchy. Rather than applying reconciliation after forecasting, HTF embeds coherence directly into the training objective. The coherence loss penalizes the difference between aggregated child forecasts and their corresponding parent forecasts during training, enabling the model to learn both temporal dynamics and structural consistency simultaneously.
  We evaluate HTF on two publicly available benchmark datasets: the M5 Walmart forecasting dataset and a publicly available hierarchical energy consumption dataset. Results demonstrate that HTF substantially reduces forecast incoherence while improving forecasting accuracy compared with classical reconciliation methods and deep learning baselines. In addition, attention visualization and embedding analysis provide insight into how temporal and structural information contribute to hierarchical forecasting performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hierarchical Temporal Fusion（HTF），一种融合结构化层级嵌入与一致性感知损失函数的新型时序模型，直接在训练目标中建模层级一致性，显著提升多层级预测的准确性与一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如Bottom-Up、MinT）通过后处理实现层级一致性，但难以建模复杂的非线性时序依赖和协变量交互；而深度学习模型通常忽略层级结构约束，导致预测不一致。
AI.method: 基于Temporal Fusion Transformer（TFT）扩展，引入层级结构嵌入，并设计一致性损失函数，在训练中直接惩罚子节点预测聚合值与父节点预测之间的差异，使模型联合学习时序动态与层级一致性。
AI.result: 在M5和能源消耗两个公开层级数据集上，HTF显著降低预测不一致性，同时优于经典协调方法和深度学习基线；注意力可视化与嵌入分析揭示了时序与结构信息的协同作用。
AI.conclusion: HTF证明了将层级一致性嵌入模型训练过程而非后处理的有效性，为多层级时序预测提供了更鲁棒、更准确的新范式。

title: Digitizing Coaching Intelligence: An Agentic Framework for Holistic Athlete Profiling using VLM and RAG
summary: Athlete assessment is a critical process for tracking physical progress and identifying elite talent. However, during mass recruitment drives, traditional methods rely on manual observation, which is inherently subjective and unscalable, or basic computer vision (CV) systems limited to quantitative repetition counting. These standard approaches lack the "coaching intelligence" required to evaluate qualitative physiological markers such as form degradation, spinal articulation, and fatigue. This paper presents a novel, LLM-based hybrid agentic framework for automated, holistic athlete profiling that strictly aligns with the Sports Authority of India (SAI) assessment protocols. Orchestrated via LangGraph, our dual-pipeline architecture synthesizes the geometric precision of CV (MediaPipe) for kinematic tracking with the semantic reasoning of Vision-Language Models (Llama-4-scout). To overcome the latency and token constraints associated with multimodal video processing, we introduce a 3 X 3 "Smart Grid" temporal chunking strategy, reducing computational overhead by over 88% while preserving critical temporal continuity. To ensure data integrity and mitigate hallucination, the framework pioneers an autonomous "LLM-as-a-Judge" self-correction loop that cross-references quantitative and qualitative metrics before persistence. Finally, we implement a dual-persistence Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline utilizing a vector search engine (ChromaDB). This enables coaches to bypass rigid SQL databases and perform complex semantic queries (e.g., "Identify athletes with high endurance but poor core rigidity") using natural language. Experimental results demonstrate that this multi-agent approach significantly bridges the gap between raw biometric tracking and actionable coaching insights, offering a scalable, objective solution for national talent identification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的混合智能体框架，融合计算机视觉与视觉-语言模型，实现符合印度体育局（SAI）标准的自动化、定性+定量运动员综合评估，具备智能分块、自校正和自然语言查询能力。
AI.motivation: 传统运动员评估依赖主观人工观察或仅支持计数的简单CV系统，缺乏对动作质量（如姿势退化、脊柱活动度、疲劳）等关键生理指标的定性分析能力，难以支撑大规模、客观、可扩展的精英人才选拔。
AI.method: 构建基于LangGraph的双流水线框架：1）CV（MediaPipe）提取运动学数据；2）VLM（Llama-4-scout）进行语义理解；3）创新3×3‘Smart Grid’时间分块策略降低视频处理开销；4）引入‘LLM-as-a-Judge’自校正环确保数据一致性；5）采用ChromaDB双持久化RAG支持自然语言查询。
AI.result: 计算开销降低88%以上，保持时序连续性；有效抑制幻觉；支持教练用自然语言执行复杂语义查询（如‘高耐力但核心稳定性差的运动员’）；实验表明该框架显著弥合了原始生物数据与可操作训练建议之间的鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次将LLM智能体范式系统性应用于体育评估领域，在保证SAI协议合规性的前提下，实现了兼具客观性、可扩展性与教练友好性的全自动运动员综合画像，为国家级人才识别提供了新范式。

title: Sifei at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Hybrid Retrieval and Query Rewriting for Multi-Turn RAG
comment: Accepted to SemEval-2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval), co-located with ACL 2026. Camera-ready version. Code: https://github.com/mengsifei/Multi_turn_RAG
summary: Multi-turn retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is challenging due to evolving user intent, conversational noise, and strict context limits. We propose a training-free hybrid retrieval pipeline for SemEval-2026 Task 8 that combines dense and sparse retrieval with controlled query rewriting and cross-encoder reranking. On the official test set of Task A, our system achieves 0.5453 nDCG@5, ranking third among 38 teams and outperforming the strongest baseline score of 0.4795. For Task C, we reuse the documents retrieved for Task A and apply a lightweight generation pipeline guided by the official prompt, achieving 0.5312 as the harmonic mean of relevance and faithfulness and ranking 15th among 29 teams. All retrieval components are open-source, while query rewriting and answer generation rely on LLM APIs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的混合检索流水线，用于多轮检索增强生成（RAG），结合稠密与稀疏检索、受控查询重写及交叉编码器重排序，在SemEval-2026 Task 8中取得优异排名。
AI.motivation: 解决多轮RAG中用户意图演化、对话噪声和上下文长度限制等挑战。
AI.method: 采用训练-free的混合检索 pipeline，融合稠密与稀疏检索，辅以可控查询重写和交叉编码器reranking；Task C复用Task A的检索结果，配合轻量级LLM生成流程。
AI.result: Task A在官方测试集上nDCG@5达0.5453，38支队伍中排名第3；Task C以相关性与忠实性调和平均值0.5312排名第15（共29队）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不依赖模型微调的前提下，通过模块化设计与API协同，在多轮RAG任务中实现了高效、可复现且具竞争力的性能。

title: He3-Seeker: Robotic Information Planning for Lunar Helium-3 Distribution Mapping
comment: Submitted to the International Conference on Space Robotics (iSpaRo) 2026
summary: Lunar helium-3 is a highly valuable strategic resource, pivotal to the advancement of both deep-space exploration and space mining. Existing lunar helium-3 exploration methodologies rely primarily on indirect measurements via remote sensing, which are often characterized by limited precision, low reliability, and insufficient spatial resolution. In this paper, we introduce He3-Seeker, an active robotic exploration method for helium-3 distribution mapping. First, we provide a formal definition of the active helium-3 exploration problem. Subsequently, we developed the He3-Seeker framework, which is conceptually based on multi-point drilling, sampling, and in situ analysis. In particular, we use robotic information planning (RIP) to guide autonomous robot navigation and active sensing. Additionally, to thoroughly evaluate the proposed algorithm, we introduce a reliable method for generating reference data of lunar helium-3 distribution based on low-resolution orbital remote sensing measurements. Simulation experiments verify that He3-Seeker achieves both rapid and high-fidelity mapping of helium-3 distribution, providing a reliable solution for resource exploration tasks. Our code and simulation environment will be publicly accessible at https://github.com/OpenSpace-Lab/He3-Seeker.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为He3-Seeker的主动式机器人探测方法，用于高精度、高保真地绘制月球氦-3分布图，通过多点钻探、采样与原位分析，并结合机器人信息规划（RIP）实现自主导航与主动感知。
AI.motivation: 现有月球氦-3探测主要依赖精度低、可靠性差、空间分辨率不足的遥感间接测量，亟需一种更精准可靠的原位探测方法。
AI.method: 提出He3-Seeker框架，基于多点钻探、采样与原位分析，并采用机器人信息规划（RIP）指导自主导航与主动感知；同时构建基于低分辨率遥感数据生成高保真参考分布的方法以支持评估。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明He3-Seeker可快速、高保真地完成氦-3分布建图，显著提升探测精度与效率。
AI.conclusion: He3-Seeker为月球氦-3资源勘探提供了可靠、可扩展的主动机器人解决方案，代码与仿真环境已开源。

title: Majority Vote Silences Minority Values: Annotator Disagreement at the Hate/Offensive Boundary in HateXplain
summary: Hate speech annotation pipelines routinely collapse annotator disagreement into majority vote labels before training. We show that this aggregation is not neutral: 42.6% of all annotator disagreement in HateXplain concentrates specifically at the hate/offensive boundary, a pattern consistent with annotators applying different thresholds for where hate begins (chi-squared = 135.199, df = 2, p < 0.0001). Both a hard-label BERT model (Model A) and a soft-label model (Model B) drop 22 percentage points in accuracy from agreed posts (~80%) to disagreement posts (~58%), confirmed at p < 0.0001. A per-annotator multi-head model (Model C) widens this gap further to 28 points while collapsing offensive disagreement accuracy to 0.245. Critically, Model A expresses significantly higher confidence on boundary case errors than Model C (0.710 vs. 0.495, p < 0.0001), meaning standard evaluation metrics will not detect the failure. Three downstream interventions of increasing sophistication all fail to recover boundary accuracy. We argue the problem is structural. Majority vote presents a contested judgment as ground truth, and models inherit that false certainty. The intervention must be upstream in annotation design.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了仇恨言论标注中多数投票法掩盖了标注者在'仇恨/冒犯'边界上的系统性分歧，导致模型对边界案例产生虚假高置信度错误，指出问题根源在于标注设计而非模型训练，呼吁上游干预。
AI.motivation: 仇恨言论标注通常采用多数投票法聚合标注者分歧，但该方法可能掩盖标注者间的真实认知差异，尤其在模糊边界案例上造成模型学习偏差。
AI.method: 基于HateXplain数据集分析标注者分歧分布；构建三种模型（硬标签BERT、软标签模型、按标注者定制的多头模型）对比其在一致/分歧样本上的性能；通过统计检验验证边界案例的系统性误差及模型置信度异常。
AI.result: 42.6%的标注分歧集中于'仇恨/冒犯'边界；所有模型在分歧样本上准确率骤降22–28个百分点；标准模型对边界错误给出显著更高的错误置信度（0.710 vs. 0.495），且下游干预无效。
AI.conclusion: 多数投票法将有争议的判断伪造成‘真实标签’，使模型继承虚假确定性；根本解决路径在于改进上游标注设计，而非优化模型或后处理。

title: Meta-learning as a principle for human-like visual representations
summary: The structure of human visual representations underpins our capacity for adaptive behaviour. While pretrained neural networks model human visual representations with unprecedented success, a large discrepancy remains. We propose one reason: these networks optimise a single fixed objective, whereas human representations must support open-ended tasks. We hypothesise this flexibility arises from meta-learning (learning to learn), a pressure shaping representations to acquire new tasks from few observations. To test this, we train a sequence model, without any supervision from human data, across thousands of semantically rich tasks mapping images to high-level concepts. Compared to their pretrained base encoders, meta-learned representations better predict human similarity judgements, semantic rule learning, and high-level visual cortex. Behavioural gains depend on disentangled, high-level task distributions, while brain alignment is driven primarily by the learning-to-learn pressure. Our results suggest the flexibility of human visual representations reflects the functional demand to learn new semantic relationships on the fly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出人类视觉表征的灵活性源于元学习（学习如何学习），而非单一固定目标优化；通过在数千个语义丰富的图像-概念映射任务上训练序列模型，发现元学习所得表征更贴近人类相似性判断、语义规则学习及高级视皮层活动。
AI.motivation: 预训练神经网络虽能较好建模人类视觉表征，但仍存在显著差距；作者认为关键在于人类表征需支持开放性任务，而现有模型仅优化单一固定目标。
AI.method: 在无任何人类数据监督下，于数千个语义丰富的图像到高阶概念映射任务上训练序列模型，引入元学习机制以提升表征灵活性。
AI.result: 元学习得到的表征显著优于基线预训练编码器，在人类相似性判断、语义规则学习和高级视觉皮层神经响应预测上均表现更优；行为提升依赖于解耦且高层的任务分布，而脑-模型对齐主要由‘学习如何学习’压力驱动。
AI.conclusion: 人类视觉表征的灵活性反映了其功能需求——即实时习得新的语义关系，元学习是实现该能力的关键机制。

title: Self-Supervised Theorem Discovery in a Formal Axiomatic System
summary: Recent artificial intelligence (AI) systems have shown remarkable progress in mathematical reasoning. Many existing approaches, including large language models (LLMs), draw on human prior knowledge in the form of mathematical text, code, or theorem libraries. Although these approaches are highly effective in practice, it remains an open question whether an agent can autonomously discover useful theorems without such human priors. We study this question in a formal axiomatic system by developing an agent that starts from axioms and inference rules alone and gradually grows a library of useful theorems. Concretely, we propose a self-supervised theorem-discovery algorithm that alternates between proof search and useful-theorem extraction, building a theorem library whose entries are reused as lemmas for subsequent proof search. Experiments show that the agent discovers tens of thousands of theorems and finds proofs for human-written benchmark problems, suggesting that its discoveries include theorems meaningful from a human mathematical perspective. Furthermore, the discovered theorems improve LLM proof performance when provided as prompt lemmas, indicating that they can serve as external knowledge for LLM reasoning. Our results provide evidence that useful theorems can emerge from proof search without relying on human-provided theorem libraries. More broadly, they suggest a path toward self-evolving AI systems for mathematics whose discoveries remain formally verifiable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督定理发现算法，使AI代理仅从公理和推理规则出发，自主构建有用的定理库，并验证其在数学推理中的有效性与可验证性。
AI.motivation: 探索AI能否在不依赖人类先验知识（如数学文本、代码或定理库）的情况下，自主发现有意义的数学定理。
AI.method: 设计一种自监督定理发现算法，交替进行证明搜索与有用定理提取，将新发现的定理作为引理用于后续证明搜索，逐步构建可复用的定理库。
AI.result: 代理发现了数万个定理，成功求解人类编写的基准问题；所发现定理作为提示词可提升大语言模型的证明性能。
AI.conclusion: 有用定理可完全通过证明搜索自主涌现，无需人类提供的定理库；为形式可验证的自演化数学AI系统提供了可行路径。

title: Geometric Measurements of the Axiom of Choice in Neural Proof Embeddings
summary: The axiom of choice has divided the foundations of mathematics for over a century, but the distinction between classical and constructive proofs has remained a philosophical and methodological one. We use Lean 4's kernel-level tracking of axiom dependence to show that the axiom of choice has a measurable geometric correlate in proof space that obeys a one-parameter mixture law and has operational consequences for neural theorem provers. To do this, we partition $471{,}260$ declarations of Mathlib by transitive dependence on the axiom of choice and represent a filtered population of $42{,}355$ traced theorems by their sequences of tactic invocations. We use the constructive proofs in this dataset to train a self-supervised proof encoder and show that when using it to measure classical proofs, three complementary measurements (anomaly score, reconstruction loss, and density-superlevel containment) exhibit a common decline with the proof's distance from the axiom in the dependency graph, from sharp separation at the shallow boundary (AUC $0.847$ at distance $2$) to indistinguishability at distance~$9{+}$. Robustness controls show that the signature survives length, file, author, and topic controls, and replicates under full-source encoders trained on normalised proof source. Operationally, we show that on an evaluation sample of $251$ Mathlib theorems, Lean's \texttt{aesop} tactic solves constructive theorems at $13\times$ the rate of classical ones, and a neural-guided hybrid using the ReProver tactic generator compresses the gap to $5\times$. The geometric anomaly score predicts \texttt{aesop} failure beyond proof length, providing an operational link between the geometric signature and prover performance.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Lean 4内核级公理依赖追踪，揭示选择公理在证明空间中存在可度量的几何对应结构，该结构服从单参数混合律，并影响神经定理证明器性能；通过分析Mathlib中42,355个定理的构造性证明，训练自监督证明编码器，发现三种异常度量随证明距选择公理距离增大而系统性衰减；实验证明该几何信号稳健且具操作意义：传统战术aesop对构造性定理求解率是经典定理的13倍，神经引导方法可缩小至5倍，且几何异常分能超越长度预测aesop失败。
AI.motivation: 区分经典证明与构造性证明长期停留在哲学和方法论层面，缺乏可量化、可操作的数学刻画；本文旨在为选择公理的影响建立可测量的几何表征，并探索其对自动化推理的实际影响。
AI.method: 基于Lean 4内核对471,260个Mathlib声明进行选择公理依赖追踪，筛选出42,355个有迹可循的定理，提取其策略调用序列；训练自监督证明编码器；定义并计算三种几何异常度量（异常分、重构损失、密度上水平集包含）；控制变量检验稳健性；评估aesop与ReProver在构造性/经典定理上的求解性能。
AI.result: 发现三种异常度量均随证明在依赖图中远离选择公理而单调下降，边界处AUC达0.847（距离2），距离≥9时不可区分；该信号在长度、文件、作者、主题等控制下稳健；aesop对构造性定理求解率达经典定理的13倍，ReProver将其压缩至5倍；几何异常分可独立于证明长度预测aesop失败。
AI.conclusion: 选择公理不仅具有逻辑地位，还在证明空间中诱导出可测量、稳健且具操作意义的几何结构；这一发现弥合了基础数学哲学与自动化推理实践之间的鸿沟，为神经符号系统的设计提供新依据。

title: HyphaeDB: A Living Knowledge Topology for Agent-First Memory
summary: Every existing vector database and agent memory framework treats memory as passive storage that agents query explicitly. No system propagates knowledge between agents through the memory layer itself. We introduce HyphaeDB, an agent-native memory infrastructure that reinterprets the Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) graph topology the data structure at the core of every modern vector database not as a search optimization, but as a communication fabric for multi-agent AI systems. In HyphaeDB, agents are nodes in the vector space with persistent positions, knowledge propagates via a gossip protocol through the graph's neighbor structure with energy-based attenuation, and emergent behaviors contradiction detection, pattern crystallization, and consensus formation arise from the combination of topology, propagation dynamics, and local interaction rules.
