We evaluate the generated motions from two perspectives: (1) an LSTM-based classifier to assess recognizability by machine observers, achieving a recognition accuracy of 22.80%, and (2) a human perception study with Japanese raters to assess alignment with human affective interpretations, yielding a recognition accuracy of 24.91%. Beyond these, we evaluate the utility of generative modeling for three practical tasks: augmenting emotion recognition models, extracting representative emotion-specific motion patterns, and synthesizing smooth transitions between emotion intensities. Our findings highlight the potential of implicit, data-driven generative modeling to enhance affective computing applications and our understanding of emotion expressions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的生成模型，直接从日本演员的动作捕捉数据中隐式学习情感身体运动表达，无需显式的情感-动作映射，验证了其在机器与人类感知评估中的有效性，并展示了其在情感识别增强、模式提取和情绪强度平滑过渡等任务中的实用价值。
AI.motivation: 情感身体运动表达是非语言交流的关键要素，但在技术中准确传达面临挑战，包括情感线索细微、个体差异和文化差异；现有生成模型虽有进展，但缺乏对文化根基数据的隐式学习能力。
AI.method: 使用49名日本演员的情感表演动捕数据集，训练一个以13种离散情感标签为条件的Transformer生成模型，不依赖显式情感-动作标注；通过LSTM分类器（机器评估）和日本被试的人类感知实验（人类评估）进行验证，并拓展至情感识别增强、代表性运动模式提取和情绪强度过渡合成三个应用任务。
AI.result: 机器识别准确率为22.80%，人类识别准确率为24.91%；模型在三类实用任务中展现出有效性，表明隐式数据驱动建模具备应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 隐式、数据驱动的生成建模能有效学习文化特定的情感身体运动，提升情感计算应用效果，并深化对情感表达机制的理解。

title: Beyond the Reranker: Do RAG Retrieval Enhancements Help Once a Strong Reranker Is Present?
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is routinely extended with methods meant to improve retrieval: query expansion, hierarchical and cross-document summarization, graph-based expansion, per-query routing, rank fusion, and corrective re-retrieval. The benefits reported for these methods come almost exclusively from homogeneous corpora, predominantly Wikipedia prose. Whether they hold on the mixed-format collections common in practice, where code, markdown, tables, scientific PDFs, and prose are interleaved within one corpus, has not been measured. To study this directly, we build \textbf{HetDocQA}, a heterogeneous benchmark with \emph{chunker-agnostic} span-overlap relevance labels and collection-disjoint splits, and pair it with MuSiQue and QASPER as homogeneous controls. We evaluate eight methods on a shared backbone, with bootstrap confidence intervals and multiple-comparison correction. A strong cross-encoder reranker accounts for most of the pipeline's quality; beyond it, only two methods yield reliable gains: query expansion and SSCC. SSCC, a per-source calibrated corrector introduced here, sets a separate acceptance threshold for each score source and helps only on heterogeneous data. The remaining reranking and pool-expansion methods in common use, among them hierarchical summarization, graph expansion, routing, and rank fusion, give no reliable gain once that reranker is present.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个异构文档问答基准HetDocQA，用于评估检索增强生成（RAG）中各类检索改进方法在混合格式数据（如代码、Markdown、表格、PDF等）上的有效性；实验发现，仅查询扩展与新提出的SSCC方法在异构数据上有稳定增益，而其他主流方法（如分层摘要、图扩展、路由、融合排序等）在引入强交叉编码器重排序器后不再带来可靠提升。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG检索增强方法的评估多基于同质语料（如Wikipedia），缺乏在真实场景中常见的混合格式异构文档集合上的系统性验证。
AI.method: 构建了chunker-agnostic、collection-disjoint的异构基准HetDocQA，并搭配MuSiQue和QASPER作为同质对照；在统一backbone下评估8种方法，采用bootstrap置信区间与多重比较校正；提出新方法SSCC（per-source calibrated corrector）。
AI.result: 强交叉编码器重排序器主导性能提升；除查询扩展外，仅SSCC在异构数据上带来可靠增益；其余主流方法（如分层摘要、图扩展、路由、rank fusion等）在配备该重排序器后无显著收益。
AI.conclusion: 多数RAG检索增强技术在异构现实数据中效果有限，需重新评估其必要性；SSCC等针对异构性的定制方法更有效，提示未来工作应聚焦数据异构性建模。

title: Multi-Contact Force Estimation for Continuum Robots via Gaussian-Parameterized Factor Graphs
summary: Continuum robots offer key advantages in navigating unstructured environments, but their safe operation requires accurate estimation of the external contact forces acting anywhere along the robot body. Estimating these forces at unknown locations is an ill-conditioned problem, particularly for multiple contacts. We propose a unified shape and force estimation framework formulated on a factor graph. By incorporating a Gaussian mixture force parameterization into a discretized probabilistic Cosserat rod model, we reduce the dimensionality of the unknown external forces and mitigate the ill-conditioning of node-wise force estimation. The framework fuses strain, tendon tension, and pose measurements to simultaneously estimate the robot's shape and external forces while accounting for modeling and sensor uncertainties. Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms existing methods in terms of force location and magnitude estimation for both single and multi-contact scenarios. We further present a progressive variant that introduces basis functions on demand to estimate contact forces sequentially during a simulated confined-navigation task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因子图的统一形状与外力估计框架，通过高斯混合力参数化与离散化概率Cosserat杆模型结合，提升连续体机器人在未知位置多接触点下的外力估计精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人在非结构化环境中导航时，需准确估计沿其本体任意位置的外部接触力；但该问题（尤其多接触时）病态严重，难以求解。
AI.method: 构建基于因子图的统一估计框架，将高斯混合力参数化嵌入离散化概率Cosserat杆模型，融合应变、腱张力和位姿测量，在考虑建模与传感器不确定性的前提下联合估计形状与外力；并提出一种按需引入基函数的渐进式变体。
AI.result: 数值仿真表明，所提方法在单/多接触场景下的力位置与幅值估计均优于现有方法；渐进式变体在模拟受限导航任务中可顺序估计接触力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效缓解了节点级外力估计的病态性，提升了连续体机器人在复杂环境中的感知与安全操作能力。

title: Fine-Tuning General-Purpose Large Language Models for Agricultural Applications:A Reproducible Framework and Evaluation Protocol Based on Qwen3-8B
summary: General-purpose large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong abilities in opendomain question answering, information extraction, and text generation. Agricultural applications, however, are domain-specific, region-dependent, time-sensitive, and safety-critical. Without data governance, expert evaluation, and evidence constraints, an agricultural assistant mayproduce unreliable advice on crop diseases, pesticide use, fertilization, or policy interpretation.To avoid presenting unverified simulated numbers as real experimental findings, this paper doesnot report any model-performance claims that have not been produced by an actual training runand expert evaluation. Instead, we propose AgriTune-R, a reproducible and auditable frameworkfor adapting general-purpose LLMs to agricultural tasks. The framework selects the publiclyverifiable Qwen3-8B model as the recommended base model and integrates agricultural datagovernance, instruction construction, LoRA/QLoRA parameter-efficient fine-tuning, retrievalaugmented generation, expert evaluation, and safety control for high-risk questions. The contributions are: (1) a structured workflow for agricultural LLM adaptation; (2) an evaluationprotocol for agricultural knowledge QA, pest and disease consultation, cultivation management,and policy explanation; (3) an expert-review rubric combining factuality, safety, evidence consistency, and uncertainty expression; and (4) a clear separation between protocol design andempirical conclusions, providing an executable baseline for future empirical studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgriTune-R框架，旨在将通用大语言模型安全、可复现地适配至农业领域，强调数据治理、专家评估与证据约束，避免不可靠建议。
AI.motivation: 农业应用具有领域特异性、地域依赖性、时间敏感性和安全性要求高，通用大语言模型若缺乏数据治理、专家评估和证据约束，可能给出不可靠的农事建议。
AI.method: 提出AgriTune-R框架，基于公开可验证的Qwen3-8B模型，整合农业数据治理、指令构建、LoRA/QLoRA高效微调、检索增强生成（RAG）、专家评估及高风险问题安全控制。
AI.result: 构建了结构化农业大模型适配流程、面向农业知识问答等任务的评估协议、融合事实性、安全性、证据一致性与不确定性表达的专家评审量表，并明确区分协议设计与实证结论。
AI.conclusion: AgriTune-R为农业大模型的可复现、可审计适配提供了可执行基线，强调方法论严谨性与实证审慎性，推动农业AI向安全、可信、可验证方向发展。

title: Flow Reasoning Models: Scaling Reasoning Through Iterative Self-Refinement
summary: Discrete flow models have recently shown promising performance on few-step text generation; however, when naively applied to structured reasoning tasks such as Sudoku and Zebra puzzles, they converge confidently to incorrect answers (solving only $\sim$36% of Sudoku puzzles). We introduce Flow Reasoning Models (FRMs), a training and test-time-scaling framework for structured reasoning with flow models. We make the observation that, despite their poor solve rate, flow models can act as their own verifiers. A correct answer is a stable fixed point of the denoising dynamics, returning to itself when re-noised and re-solved. This enables a test-time-scaling paradigm: propose many candidate solutions and keep those that are dynamically stable, which alone reaches high solve rates on Sudoku-Shah (~$100\%$) and Zebra ($95.9\%$). This even generalizes to harder out-of-distribution puzzles like Sudoku-Extreme ($96.1\%$), without ever training on that distribution. This pure search, however, wastes a great deal of computation generating incorrect candidate solutions. We therefore design a training recipe to improve the base model's efficiency. First, we train flow models with a self-conditioning channel and close it at inference, letting them refine their own past predictions. Second, we train models to avoid their own failed generations using direct preference optimization. These changes substantially improve the base model's efficiency, letting it reach $99.2\%$ on Sudoku in just $7$ forward passes, over $8\times$ fewer than the strongest matched masked-diffusion baseline we compare needs for the same accuracy. When combined with test-time scaling, this lets flow models solve hard out-of-distribution puzzles (e.g. Sudoku-Extreme) far more efficiently.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flow Reasoning Models（FRMs），通过利用离散流模型自身的动态稳定性作为验证机制，并结合自条件化训练与直接偏好优化，显著提升其在数独、斑马谜题等结构化推理任务上的求解效率与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 离散流模型在结构化推理任务（如数独、斑马谜题）上收敛于错误答案，求解率低（仅~36%），亟需提升其可靠性与效率。
AI.method: 1）提出测试时缩放范式：利用流模型解的动态稳定性（重加噪-重求解后不变）筛选候选解；2）训练改进：引入自条件化通道（推理时关闭）以迭代优化预测；3）采用直接偏好优化（DPO）使模型规避自身失败生成。
AI.result: FRM在Sudoku-Shah达~100%，Zebra达95.9%，Sudoku-Extreme达96.1%（零样本泛化）；仅7次前向传播即达99.2% Sudoku求解率，计算量比最优掩码扩散基线少8倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 流模型可兼具生成与自验证能力；通过训练与测试协同优化，能高效、鲁棒地解决结构化推理任务，并具备强分布外泛化性。

title: On design-unbiased algorithmic Machine Learning
summary: Machine Learning (ML) algorithms, such as k-Nearest Neighbours (kNN) or random forest, eschew the ideal of true data models in favour of predictive performance. However, minimising the MSE or F-score cannot lead to unbiasedness directly, which is important in many situations such as official statistics. We study the conditions of algorithmic ML, other than the existence and knowledge of true data models, which lead to unbiased prediction or classification for a given finite population, including how the training data may be sampled from the population, how a trained prediction algorithm can be tuned to achieve unbiased prediction or classification for that population, and how the performance of out-of-sample prediction or classification can be assessed unbiasedly. The inference is based on the known probability design of samples and training sets, rather than any assumed distributions or models.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在不依赖真实数据模型的情况下，如何通过算法机器学习实现对有限总体的无偏预测或分类，并基于已知的概率抽样设计进行推断。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习算法注重预测性能而非无偏性，但在官方统计等场景中无偏性至关重要。
AI.method: 基于已知样本和训练集的概率抽样设计进行推断，而非假设数据分布或模型。
AI.result: 提出了实现无偏预测或分类的条件，包括训练数据抽样方式、算法调优方法及无偏评估方法。
AI.conclusion: 在不依赖真实数据模型的前提下，可通过概率抽样设计和算法调优实现有限总体上的无偏预测与分类。

title: EvoRec: Self Evolving Agentic Recommender Systems
summary: Optimizing modern recommender systems still relies heavily on engineers iterating by hand, which is slow and bounded by individual expertise. LLM-based agents open a path toward automating this loop, yet two issues remain. First, the agent is used only as a code translator and accumulates no methodology across iterations. Second, the optimization space is confined to a predefined range and rarely introduces structurally new ideas. To address these problems, we propose EvoRec, a multi-agent framework that co-evolves the recommendation model and the optimization methodology driving it. Four collaborating agents carry out a dual-track loop: the Research Agent and Code Agent iterate the model each round, while the Skill Evolver periodically distills reusable methodology from a persistent Memory of past experiments. Experiments on two public benchmarks and one large-scale industrial dataset show that EvoRec improves offline metrics by up to 5.54% over the strongest baseline, and an online A/B test delivers a 1.85% revenue lift and a 1.02% CTR gain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoRec，一种多智能体框架，通过协同进化推荐模型和优化方法论，显著提升推荐系统性能。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统优化依赖人工迭代，效率低且受限于个人经验；LLM代理仅作为代码翻译器，无法积累方法论，且优化空间受限，难以产生结构性新思想。
AI.method: 提出EvoRec多智能体框架，包含四个协作智能体：研究智能体与代码智能体每轮迭代模型，技能演化者定期从持久化实验记忆中提炼可复用方法论，实现模型与方法论的双轨协同进化。
AI.result: 在两个公开基准和一个大规模工业数据集上，EvoRec离线指标最高提升5.54%；线上A/B测试带来1.85%收入提升和1.02%点击率提升。
AI.conclusion: EvoRec成功实现了推荐模型与优化方法论的协同进化，突破了传统人工迭代与静态LLM代理的局限，验证了自动化、自进化的推荐系统优化范式的有效性与实用性。

title: TacGen: Touch Is a Necessary Dimension of Physical-World Representation -- Addressing Tactile Data Scarcity with Scalable Vision-to-Touch Alignment and Generation
summary: Touch resolves the physical-property ambiguity left by vision: exploratory contact recovers shape, texture, compliance, and material, and visuo-haptic object representations converge in ventral visual cortex. We ask whether representation learning can reproduce this grounding. TacGen mitigates the tactile-data scarcity bottleneck by combining pre-specified V+T contrastive alignment with a latent-space residual-MLP V->T generator that synthesizes tactile latents from RGB for tactile-data scaling. With matched DINOv2 backbones, splits, and probes, V+T improves matched V-only on mass (Delta R^2=+0.570), density (Delta acc=+0.067), hardness (+0.117), and uncertainty-banded force labels (Delta R^2=+0.281); all CIs exclude zero. The same representation lifts matched-capacity TACTO manipulation 0.246->0.979 while V-only capacity scaling accounts for only 4.5% of the gap, preserving 95.5%. The generator reaches cross-seed +0.589, with real tactile +0.585 inside the seed interval; the architecture comparison shows a 13pp downstream gap between reconstruction quality and representation utility. Across five-seed SSVTP/TVL reproductions, YCB-Sight transfer, three-backbone checks, permutation/random-feature controls, hash-verified manifests, and measured-force validation checks, the evidence supports the claim that touch supplies a necessary physical evidence channel for representations of contact-dependent properties.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TacGen方法，通过视觉-触觉对比对齐与视觉到触觉的生成模型，缓解触觉数据稀缺问题，并验证触觉信息对学习物体物理属性（如质量、密度、硬度等）表征的必要性。
AI.motivation: 视觉存在物理属性歧义，而触觉能提供关键接触相关物理信息；当前触觉数据稀缺限制了多模态表征学习，亟需一种能有效利用视觉信息生成高质量触觉表征的方法。
AI.method: TacGen结合预定义的视觉-触觉（V+T）对比对齐与基于残差MLP的视觉到触觉（V->T）潜空间生成器，用RGB图像合成触觉潜表示；采用DINOv2骨干网络，在多个控制实验（如SSVTP/TVL复现、YCB-Sight迁移、消融与随机特征对照）下系统评估。
AI.result: V+T联合表征显著优于纯视觉（V-only）：在质量（ΔR²=+0.570）、密度（Δacc=+0.067）、硬度（+0.117）及力预测（ΔR²=+0.281）上提升显著；生成器跨种子相关性达+0.589，接近真实触觉（+0.585）；触觉表征使操纵任务性能从0.246跃升至0.979，且该增益95.5%不可由纯视觉容量扩展解释。
AI.conclusion: 触觉提供了接触依赖型物理属性表征所必需的物理证据通道；TacGen验证了触觉信息不可被视觉单独替代，强调多模态（尤其触觉）在具身智能表征学习中的基础作用。

title: BERTomelo: Your Portuguese Encoder Best Friend
summary: Encoders have become the state of the art for multiple NLP tasks, especially those requiring deep contextual understanding. While multilingual models offer broad coverage, dedicated monolingual encoders are essential for capturing the unique lexical and syntactic nuances of specific languages. For Portuguese, however, existing monolingual options like BERTimbau and Albertina have not kept pace with recent architectural breakthroughs, often lagging behind English benchmarks in scalability and efficiency. This work introduces BERTomelo, a next-generation monolingual encoder pre-trained from scratch and specifically optimized for the Portuguese language. By leveraging the ModernBERT architecture, BERTomelo overcomes the limitations of previous models, offering Base and Large versions with a 1,024-token context window and hardware-level optimizations like FlashAttention and alternating attention mechanisms. The model was trained on ClassiCC-PT, a massive, high-quality Portuguese corpus of 106 million documents, ensuring superior alignment with the language's contemporary usage. The results demonstrate that BERTomelo not only outperforms previous Portuguese encoders but also provides a more robust and efficient alternative to massive multilingual models in downstream tasks such as STS and NER.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BERTomelo，一种为葡萄牙语专门设计的下一代单语编码器，基于ModernBERT架构，具有1024词元上下文窗口和硬件级优化，在STS和NER等下游任务中优于现有葡萄牙语编码器和大型多语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有葡萄牙语单语编码器（如BERTimbau和Albertina）未能跟上最新架构进展，在可扩展性和效率上落后于英语基准，需要更优的专用模型。
AI.method: 从零开始预训练BERTomelo，采用ModernBERT架构，支持Base和Large版本，集成FlashAttention和交替注意力机制，并在包含1.06亿文档的高质量葡萄牙语语料ClassiCC-PT上训练。
AI.result: BERTomelo在STS和NER等下游任务中显著优于此前葡萄牙语编码器，并比大型多语言模型更鲁棒、高效。
AI.conclusion: BERTomelo是当前最先进的葡萄牙语单语编码器，兼顾性能、效率与语言适配性，填补了该语言在前沿架构上的空白。

title: Pooled Leaderboards Hide System-Specific Winners: A Reporting-Protocol Audit of Offline Root-Cause Analysis Benchmarks
summary: Offline root-cause-analysis (RCA) benchmarks commonly rank methods by a single pooled top-1 accuracy across multiple subsystems, and engineers often read the pooled winner as a recommendation for their own subsystem. We audit that reading on three public RCA benchmark families -- OpenRCA, RCAEval, and PetShop -- covering 11 subsystems and 778 matched scoring units. To keep pairwise comparisons on identical cases, the main analysis retains four methods or comparators with complete coverage: BARO, a CD-1min adapter, max-$|Z|$, and per-service alert-count. All six pairwise comparisons show subsystem-level effects of both signs, every random-effects 95\% prediction interval crosses zero, and case-level interaction tests reject exchangeability in 5 of 6 pairs. Leave-one-system-out selection picks the lower-scoring method on up to 5 of 11 held-out subsystems, with regret reaching 24.8 pp on RCAEval / Sock-Shop. We release a 320-line audit module; given a matched RCA benchmark score table, it recomputes the same per-subsystem stability checks alongside pooled scores.

AI.tldr: 本文对离线根因分析（RCA）基准测试中常用的 pooled top-1 准确率评估方式提出质疑，通过在三个公开RCA基准（OpenRCA、RCAEval、PetShop）上的系统性审计发现：方法性能存在显著的子系统依赖性，pooled 排名无法可靠指导实际部署选择；作者开源了320行审计模块以支持更稳健的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有RCA基准常以跨子系统的汇总top-1准确率排名方法，工程师据此选择工具，但该做法缺乏对子系统间性能差异稳定性的验证，可能导致错误选型。
AI.method: 在三个公开RCA基准（共11个子系统、778个匹配评分单元）上，对四个覆盖完整的方法（BARO、CD-1min适配器、max|Z|、按服务告警数）进行子系统级审计：包括两两比较的效应符号分析、随机效应预测区间估计、案例级交互检验，以及留一子系统交叉验证的 regret 分析。
AI.result: 所有六组两两比较均显示正负相反的子系统效应；95%随机效应预测区间均跨零；5/6组交互检验拒绝可交换性；留一子系统选择时，最高达5/11情况下选中更低分方法，最大regret达24.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: pooled top-1准确率不能作为子系统级方法推荐依据；RCA评估需强制报告子系统稳定性指标；作者提供轻量审计模块促进可复现、稳健的基准实践。

title: HARD-KV: Head-Adaptive Regularization for Decoding-time KV Compression
summary: Long-context LLM inference faces a fundamental conflict: head-adaptive compression algorithms (e.g., Top-$p$ nucleus sampling) offer superior accuracy by dynamically fluctuating memory budgets, yet modern inference engines (e.g., vLLM) demand rigid, static memory patterns to leverage CUDA Graphs and PagedAttention. We resolve this ``Static-Dynamic'' mismatch with HARD-KV, a unified framework that that bridges dynamic selection with rigid system constraints. HARD-KV introduces a Cascade Cache hierarchy, managing the token lifecycle across dense, sparse, and condensed tiers. Crucially, we propose a Logits Calibration mechanism that normalizes diverse importance metrics into a unified probability space, enabling consistent Top-$p$ budgeting across heterogeneous heads. To bridge the efficiency gap, we offer a system-level solution, which rewrites fragmented, dynamic indices into contiguous physical layouts compatible with high-performance inference engine. Extensive experiments on math-reasoning benchmarks (AIME, U-Math) verify that HARD-KV achieves up to 2$\times$ throughput improvement over static baselines while maintaining high-fidelity generation in 10k+ token scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/SuDIS-ZJU/HARDInfer.

AI.tldr: HARD-KV 提出一种级联缓存与logits校准机制，解决长上下文LLM推理中动态采样与静态系统约束间的矛盾，在保持生成质量的同时提升2倍吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 长上下文大语言模型推理中，头部自适应压缩算法（如Top-p采样）虽能提升精度，但其动态内存需求与现代推理引擎（如vLLM）依赖的静态内存模式（CUDA Graphs、PagedAttention）存在根本冲突。
AI.method: 提出HARD-KV统一框架：1）Cascade Cache层级结构，管理token在稠密、稀疏和压缩三级缓存中的生命周期；2）Logits Calibration机制，将异构重要性指标统一映射到概率空间以支持跨头一致的Top-p预算；3）系统级索引重写技术，将动态碎片化访问转换为连续物理布局以适配高性能推理引擎。
AI.result: 在AIME、U-Math等数学推理基准上，HARD-KV在10k+ token场景下相比静态基线实现最高2倍吞吐提升，同时保持高保真生成质量。
AI.conclusion: HARD-KV成功弥合了动态采样策略与静态系统优化之间的鸿沟，为长上下文高效高质量推理提供了可部署的系统-算法协同新范式。

title: Multimodal and Multiscale Spatial-Temporal Semantic Search and Recommendation with AI Foundation Models
comment: 17 pages, accepted for publication in the ACM Transactions on Spatial Algorithms and Systems
summary: Semantic search and recommendation of similar documents, such as news and reports about unusual environmental events (e.g., a dead whale washed ashore in Alaska) that contain spatial and temporal information, is a critical task in Geographic Information Retrieval (GIR). This work presents a novel framework that leverages AI foundation models, including Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), to enable effective similarity search and ranking for such event documents. To support this goal, we introduce two new strategies: (1) CAMERA (Context-Aware Multimodal Event Retrieval Algorithm), which fuses textual and visual information to generate richer embeddings than those derived from text alone; and (2) ASTRA (Adaptive Spatial and Temporal Re-ranking Algorithm), which improves similarity ranking by incorporating scale-dependent spatiotemporal relevance alongside semantic similarity. Experimental results, using a dataset from the Local Environmental Observer Network, demonstrate that our VLM-enhanced methods outperform unimodal, LLM-based approaches in similarity ranking effectiveness. By automatically linking relevant event reports, the proposed framework helps both data curators and the general public gain deeper insights into environmental change and its localized impacts. These findings highlight the potential of AI foundation models to advance GIR through multifaceted, intelligent analysis that integrates key geographic concepts: space, time, scale, and semantics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型（LLM）和视觉-语言模型（VLM）的新框架，用于地理信息检索（GIR）中的环境事件文档语义搜索与相似性排序，包含上下文感知的多模态检索算法（CAMERA）和自适应时空重排序算法（ASTRA），在真实环境数据集上验证了其优于纯文本方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 提升含时空信息的异常环境事件文档（如搁浅鲸鱼报道）的语义搜索与相似推荐效果，解决传统单模态方法在地理信息检索中对空间、时间、尺度和语义融合不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出两个新策略：（1）CAMERA——融合文本与图像生成更丰富的多模态嵌入；（2）ASTRA——结合尺度依赖的时空相关性与语义相似性进行自适应重排序。整体框架基于AI基础模型（LLM/VLM）构建。
AI.result: 在Local Environmental Observer Network数据集上的实验表明，VLM增强的方法在相似性排序效果上显著优于仅使用LLM的单模态方法。
AI.conclusion: AI基础模型（尤其是多模态VLM）能有效推动地理信息检索发展，通过融合空间、时间、尺度与语义四维要素实现更智能、更深入的环境事件分析与关联。

title: Empowering a Single-Frequency GNSS Receiver to Achieve High-Precision Positioning with Relative Observations
summary: Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) navigation is widely used to provide absolute, outdoor positioning in field robotics. Advances in Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) technology can achieve centimeter-level accuracy, facilitating autonomous navigation tasks. However, the cost and extra infrastructure used for RTK still hinder the application and more cost-effective solutions are desired. In this letter, we present a novel tightly-coupled state estimation framework that achieves high-precision localization by using low-cost, mass-market single-frequency GNSS receivers with any relative motion sensors (e.g., wheel encoder, camera, LiDAR). We propose a sliding-window factor graph that integrates generic relative motion with global epoch-to-anchor constraints derived from continuous carrier phase tracking. To eliminate the reliance on physical base stations, we introduce a virtual anchor mechanism: upon the initial observation of a satellite, its state is locked as a virtual reference to establish global epoch-to-anchor constraints. By substituting multi-frequency hardware redundancy with single-frequency multi-modal kinematic priors and a robust cycle-slip recovery technique, our approach ensures carrier-phase integrity on cheap receivers. Extensive real-world experiments on heterogeneous low-cost sensor suites validate that our method improves the accuracy of a single-frequency receiver from several meters to decimeter-level precision across diverse environments, providing an accurate, cost-effective and reliable alternative for autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型紧耦合状态估计框架，利用低成本单频GNSS接收机与任意相对运动传感器（如轮式编码器、相机、LiDAR），结合滑动窗口因子图和虚拟锚点机制，实现分米级定位精度，无需物理基站，显著降低成本并提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: RTK技术虽能实现厘米级精度，但其高成本和额外基础设施限制了广泛应用，亟需更低成本、易部署的高精度GNSS定位方案。
AI.method: 提出紧耦合状态估计框架，构建融合相对运动传感器数据与连续载波相位跟踪所得全局历元到锚点约束的滑动窗口因子图；引入虚拟锚点机制，以首次观测卫星状态为参考建立全局约束；用单频多模运动先验与鲁棒周跳恢复技术替代多频硬件冗余，保障廉价接收机的载波相位完整性。
AI.result: 在多种异构低成本传感器组合上实测表明，该方法将单频GNSS接收机定位精度从数米级提升至分米级，且在多样环境中有良好鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为自主导航提供了高精度、低成本、高可靠性的GNSS定位新范式，摆脱对物理基站和多频硬件的依赖。

title: Conversational Domain Adaptation of IndicTrans2 across 21 Indic Languages via Experience Replay and Model Soups
summary: IndicTrans2 is the strongest open English to Indic translation system, but like most systems it is trained on general text and tends to sound stiff on casual, conversational input. We adapt IndicTrans2-1B to conversational register across all 21 Indic languages using only public data (OpenSubtitles, BPCC-H-Daily, Tatoeba). Plain fine-tuning improves conversational chrF but forgets the general domain (it drops 3.9 chrF on FLORES for Hindi). Mixing general data back into training (experience replay) and then averaging the fine-tuned weights with the base (model souping) removes that trade-off: the resulting model beats IndicTrans2-1B on conversational chrF in every one of the 21 languages (mean +6.2) while matching it on FLORES (mean change -0.17, all within 0.7 chrF). Paired bootstrap tests confirm the conversational gains are significant (p <= 0.004) and that FLORES is not significantly degraded. We are deliberate about scope: these are chrF gains, and a blind human plus multi-model LLM check does not confirm them as a perceived quality improvement, so we treat the conversational gain as largely a register match to the references rather than proof of better translation. The techniques are not new; the contribution is the honest, end-to-end study in the Indic conversational setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在不牺牲通用领域性能的前提下，提升IndicTrans2-1B模型在21种印度语言口语翻译性能的方法：结合经验回放与模型汤（model souping），在公开口语数据上进行微调，显著提升口语chrF得分，同时保持通用领域性能。
AI.motivation: IndicTrans2虽为最强开源英-印翻译系统，但在口语对话场景下表现生硬；需在不损害通用翻译能力前提下提升其口语适应性。
AI.method: 使用OpenSubtitles、BPCC-H-Daily和Tatoeba等公开口语数据，对IndicTrans2-1B进行微调；引入经验回放（混合通用数据）和模型汤（权重平均）以缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 新模型在全部21种印度语言的口语chrF上平均提升+6.2，FLORES通用测试集上性能基本持平（均值变化-0.17，波动≤0.7 chrF）；配对自助法检验确认口语提升显著（p≤0.004），通用性能无显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 经验回放加模型汤可有效平衡口语与通用翻译性能；chrF提升主要反映对参考译文语域的匹配度提升，而非绝对质量提升；本工作核心贡献在于对印度语言口语翻译的严谨端到端实证研究。

title: SatSplat: Geometrically-Accurate Gaussian Splatting for Satellite Imagery
summary: High-resolution satellite imagery demands 3D reconstruction methods that deliver both speed and geometric accuracy. Recent adaptations of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to satellite imagery demonstrate strong efficiency, but reconstruction quality often degrades under diverse illumination across multi-date, high-altitude acquisitions (with small intersection angles), limiting applicability to remote sensing and vision tasks. We present SatSplat, the first framework to adapt 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) to satellite photogrammetry, with online camera adjustment. We approximate satellite cameras with an affine model and learn a minimal delta parameterization for in-splat camera refinement from dense observations. The formulation is implemented with a 2DGS scene representation. To handle time-varying shadows and illumination changes, we integrate geometric shadow mapping and per-camera color correction during training. Across the evaluated DFC2019 and IARPA2016 benchmark sites, SatSplat achieves strong geometric accuracy while significantly outperforming prior 3DGS-based baselines. On our processed DFC2019 benchmark, SatSplat reduces mean absolute error by 11.93% and peak video memory by 31% relative to the previous state of the art. Our approach enables large-scale digital surface modeling with practical computational efficiency. The project page is available at https://gdaosu.github.io/satsplat/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SatSplat，首个将2D高斯泼溅（2DGS）适配于卫星摄影测量的框架，通过在线相机调整、几何阴影映射与逐相机色彩校正，显著提升多时相卫星影像三维重建的几何精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的方法在多时相、高海拔、小交会角的卫星影像重建中因光照变化导致质量下降，难以满足遥感任务对几何精度与速度的双重要求。
AI.method: 采用仿射相机模型近似卫星相机，并学习最小化的delta参数实现溅射内在线相机优化；使用2DGS场景表示；引入几何阴影映射和逐相机色彩校正以应对时变光照与阴影。
AI.result: 在DFC2019和IARPA2016基准上显著优于3DGS基线：DFC2019上平均绝对误差降低11.93%，峰值显存减少31%。
AI.conclusion: SatSplat实现了高精度、高效率的大规模数字地表建模，为卫星影像三维重建提供了新范式。

title: Direct Causation in International Humanitarian Law and the Challenge of AI-Mediated Civilian Cyber Operations
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, Workshop on Technical AI Governance Research ICML 2026
summary: International humanitarian law protects civilians from direct attack unless and for such time as they take direct part in hostilities, with the ICRC's 2009 Interpretive Guidance operationalising this rule through a three-criterion cumulative test. This paper argues that AI-mediated civilian cyber operations challenge the direct causation element of this test in a structurally specific way: when a civilian deploys an autonomous multi-agent cyber system of the kind recently demonstrated in offensive AI research, the "one causal step" standard fails because harm is produced by system-generated decisions made after human disengagement, and the integral-part requirement does not extend because it presupposes downstream human contributors whose conduct can be independently classified. The framework therefore defaults to treating such deployments as indirect participation, in tension with its purpose of capturing civilians who personally take part in hostilities. Beyond the doctrinal analysis, this paper identifies goal-specification granularity as the property on which the integral-part test's concreteness component implicitly turns, classifies AI-mediated operations along a five-level spectrum, and argues that existing technical AI governance instruments do not log or report this property.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能中介的平民网络行动如何挑战国际人道法中关于平民直接参与敌对行动的因果关系标准，指出当前规则在应对自主多智能体网络系统时存在结构性缺陷，并提出目标规范粒度是判断‘不可或缺部分’标准的关键隐含属性。
AI.motivation: AI-mediated civilian cyber operations对国际人道法中‘直接参与敌对行动’的因果关系标准构成结构性挑战，现有ICRC 2009年解释性指南难以适用。
AI.method: 通过分析ICRC 2009年解释性指南的三要素累积检验标准（特别是直接因果关系与不可或缺部分要求），结合近期进攻性AI研究中的自主多智能体网络系统案例，开展教义学分析；进而提出目标规范粒度作为关键变量，构建五级分类谱系，并评估现有AI治理工具对此属性的覆盖情况。
AI.result: 发现‘一步因果’标准在人类脱离后由系统自生成决策时失效；‘不可或缺部分’要求因缺乏可独立归类的下游人类行为者而无法适用；现行框架将此类行为错误归类为间接参与；目标规范粒度被识别为‘不可或缺部分’测试中‘具体性’成分的隐含决定因素；现有AI治理工具未记录或报告该属性。
AI.conclusion: 当前国际人道法规则在AI中介平民网络行动场景下存在适用缺口，需在法律解释或技术治理层面引入对目标规范粒度的关注，以弥合目的（捕捉实际参战平民）与效果（宽泛豁免）之间的张力。

title: Active Quantum Kernel Acquisition for Gaussian Process Regression
summary: Quantum kernel estimation on near-term hardware is shot-budgeted: every entry of the kernel Gram matrix is a Bernoulli expectation that must be sampled with a finite number of circuit executions. Recent work on quantum kernel classification has shown that allocating shots non-uniformly across kernel entries, weighted by their downstream task sensitivity, can reduce the shot budget required to reach a target accuracy. We extend this idea to Gaussian process (GP) regression, a setting whose downstream quantities (full-spectrum posterior variance, log-determinant, marginal likelihood) couple to kernel error more tightly than the sign-only outputs of classification. We derive three closed-form pair-level sensitivities predictive coupling $|α_iα_j|$, leave-one-out residual, and marginal-likelihood gradient and plug them into a Neyman-style minimum-variance allocation rule. To prevent catastrophic over-concentration when the warm-up sensitivity estimate is itself noisy, we add a high uniform coverage floor justified by a Frobenius lower bound on the missing-entry perturbation. On four UCI benchmarks and two synthetic RBF + Bernoulli controlled studies, the resulting allocator delivers $10$--$21\%$ test-RMSE improvement over uniform allocation across the moderate-budget regime. The gain transfers (i) to genuine ZZ and Pauli-Z quantum kernels on quantum-natural data ($-13$--$15\%$ at low budget, $p<0.05$ paired) and (ii) to four downstream tasks (Bayesian quadrature, heteroscedastic regression, hyperparameter learning, multi-output Cokriging). On UCI features embedded into a ZZ kernel the gain disappears, consistent with the exponential-concentration regime where shot allocation has nothing to exploit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对量子高斯过程回归的非均匀量子电路采样（shot）分配策略，通过引入下游任务敏感度驱动的最小方差分配规则，并加入均匀覆盖下限以抑制噪声影响，在多个基准上显著提升了测试RMSE性能。
AI.motivation: 量子核估计受限于有限的电路执行次数（shots），而现有非均匀shot分配方法主要面向分类任务，其输出（如符号）对核误差较不敏感；高斯过程回归的下游量（如后验方差、边缘似然）与核误差耦合更紧密，亟需适配的shot分配策略。
AI.method: 推导了三种成对敏感度指标（|α_iα_j|、留一残差、边缘似然梯度），嵌入Neyman型最小方差分配规则，并添加由Frobenius下界支撑的均匀覆盖底限以稳定噪声下的初始估计。
AI.result: 在四个UCI数据集和两个合成RBF+Bernoulli实验中，该分配器在中等预算下带来10%–21%的测试RMSE提升；该增益可迁移到真实ZZ/Pauli-Z量子核、低预算量子自然数据（-13%–15%，p<0.05）及四种下游任务；但在UCI特征嵌入ZZ核时增益消失，符合指数集中区域理论预期。
AI.conclusion: 非均匀shot分配在量子GP回归中有效且可迁移，但其收益依赖于核误差对下游任务的可利用性，在高度集中区域失效；所提带下限的分配框架兼顾鲁棒性与效率，为近似量子硬件上的贝叶斯学习提供了实用工具。

title: Conversational Query Engine for Mixed-Modality Heterogeneous Enterprise Data Sources
summary:
Enterprise business intelligence queries span structured warehouses and unstructured document repositories -- modalities with fundamentally different access methods, cost profiles, and correctness semantics. Existing AI-enabled interfaces force users to select the right tool: NL2SQL systems cannot reason over slide decks, and RAG pipelines lack access to live warehouse tables.
  We present COGNI, a production conversational BI system that treats natural-language analytics as a heterogeneous query processing problem, organized as four architectural layers. First, an indexing layer implements slide-adaptive chunking -- recursive chunking for plain-text slides, hierarchical chunking for structured content such as tables, charts, and key-value blocks - achieving $88.3\%$ on our internal enterprise benchmark. Second, a routing layer built on a LoRA fine-tuned Qwen-2.5-1.5B-Instruct model that produces a dual output - modality decision and complexity assessment at $93.8\%$ accuracy and approximately $7\times$ lower cost than frontier-model. Third, a retrieval layer executes complexity-adaptive pipelines: a self-correcting NL2SQL agent at $93.9\%$ G-Eval, and Recursive Language Models reaching $91.0\%$ on multi-hop synthesis queries. Finally, a caching layer validates query equivalence across multiple dimensions beyond embedding similarity, achieving zero false cache hits and $8.4\times$ latency reduction.

AI.tldr: COGNI是一个面向企业商业智能的对话式系统，通过四层架构统一处理结构化与非结构化数据上的自然语言查询，显著提升准确性、降低成本并优化延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有AI接口无法同时有效处理结构化数据（如数据仓库）和非结构化数据（如PPT文档），用户需手动选择工具，导致体验割裂且效率低下。
AI.method: 提出四层架构：索引层（自适应幻灯片分块）、路由层（LoRA微调Qwen模型进行模态选择与复杂度评估）、检索层（自纠错NL2SQL代理 + 递归语言模型处理多跳合成查询）、缓存层（多维查询等价性验证）。
AI.result: 在内部企业基准上，索引层达88.3%准确率；路由层准确率93.8%，成本降为前沿模型的1/7；NL2SQL代理G-Eval达93.9%，多跳查询达91.0%；缓存层实现零误命中，延迟降低8.4倍。
AI.conclusion: COGNI成功将自然语言分析建模为异构查询处理问题，在生产环境中实现了跨模态、高精度、低成本、低延迟的企业BI问答。

title: Behavior Uncloning: Distilling Mode Redirection into Policy Weights without Inference-Time Steering
summary: Behavior-cloned policies often learn multiple behavior modes from demonstration datasets, including modes that are unsafe or otherwise undesired at deployment. For example, a policy trained on diverse handover demonstrations may learn to pass a knife blade-first. Standard remedies such as data curation and inference-time steering either require access to the original demonstrations for full retraining or add substantial inference-time overhead. To address this gap, we propose MoRE(Mode Redirection), which redirects policy rollouts toward desired behavior modes through a short "uncloning" step. Specifically, MoRE distills the redirection signal from a temporary mode classifier into the policy weights to steer behavior. A retain loss balances this edit by preserving desired-mode competence, allowing the standalone policy to suppress unwanted modes with zero inference-time overhead. Across eight simulated and real-world tasks, MoRE improves the average deployment success rate (SR) by 44 percentage points over the original mixed-mode policy. Among all compared adaptation and steering baselines, MoRE achieves the strongest SR and approaches the filtered-data retraining reference, while preserving task competence and inference speed. MoRE also generalizes across robot policy backbones, including Diffusion Policy and the Pi0.5 VLA, diverse task categories, and real-world deployments.

AI.tldr: MoRE（Mode Redirection）是一种无需重新训练、零推理开销的行为模式重定向方法，通过短时‘去克隆’步骤和保留损失，使行为克隆策略能主动抑制不安全/不期望行为模式，在多个仿真与真实任务中显著提升部署成功率。
AI.motivation: 行为克隆策略常从演示数据中学习到多种行为模式（包括不安全或不期望的模式），而现有解决方法（如数据清洗或推理时引导）要么依赖原始数据重新训练，要么引入显著推理开销。
AI.method: MoRE构建临时模式分类器提取重定向信号，并将其蒸馏至策略权重；同时引入保留损失（retain loss）在编辑策略时维持对期望模式的能力，最终得到可独立运行、无额外推理开销的修正策略。
AI.result: 在8个仿真与真实世界任务上，MoRE将平均部署成功率提升44个百分点；性能超越所有对比的适应与引导基线，逼近使用过滤后数据重训练的参考结果；且兼容Diffusion Policy、Pi0.5 VLA等多种策略骨干和任务类型。
AI.conclusion: MoRE提供了一种高效、通用、即插即用的策略后处理方案，能在不牺牲任务能力与推理速度的前提下，可靠抑制不期望行为模式，适用于实际机器人部署。

title: How to Leverage Synthetic Speech for LLM-Based ASR Systems?
summary: In regulated domains such as banking and healthcare, where privacy constraints make real speech costly to collect and retain, synthetic speech from modern text-to-speech (TTS) is an appealing alternative for training automatic speech recognition (ASR) without exposing sensitive customer recordings. Yet a persistent distributional gap between synthetic and real data limits how far it can replace genuine recordings. Prior work largely treats this gap as a black box to be engineered around, but in our work, we instead examine its origin directly by probing a SLAM-ASR architecture. Then, we localise where its LLM backbone separates real from synthetic speech and find the discriminative signal concentrated in the early-to-middle layers, where temporal and prosodic perturbations disrupt it most. We further show that representation-level separability, help, but does not directly predict downstream ASR gains. On the other hand, convolving synthetic audio with room impulse responses (RIRs) narrows the gap not by making synthetic speech sound cleaner or more natural, but by reproducing the acoustic irregularities of real recordings. Translating these findings into the training procedure, by adding a layer-selection module combined with RIR augmentation matches a fully real-data baseline using only 25% of the real speech (13.6h) and surpasses it at all higher proportions.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在受监管领域（如银行和医疗）中，使用合成语音训练ASR系统的可行性与挑战，发现合成与真实语音间的分布差异主要源于早期至中期LLM层对时序与韵律扰动的敏感性；通过RIR增强和层选择模块，仅用25%真实语音数据即可达到甚至超越全真实数据基线性能。
AI.motivation: 在隐私敏感领域，获取和存储真实语音成本高且受限，合成语音是训练ASR的替代方案，但其与真实语音间存在分布鸿沟，限制其替代效果。
AI.method: 通过探针SLAM-ASR架构，定位LLM主干中区分真实与合成语音的关键层；分析表征可分性与下游ASR性能关系；引入RIR卷积增强合成语音，并结合层选择模块优化训练流程。
AI.result: 发现判别信号集中在LLM早期至中期层；RIR增强不提升自然度，但复现真实录音的声学不规则性，有效缩小分布差距；所提方法仅用13.6小时（25%）真实语音即匹配全真实数据基线，并在更高比例下持续超越。
AI.conclusion: 合成语音用于ASR训练的瓶颈在于模型中间层对声学动态特征的建模偏差，而非整体质量；针对性的表示对齐（如RIR增强）与架构适配（如层选择）比单纯提升合成语音保真度更有效。

title: Animation2Code: Evaluating Temporal Visual Reasoning in Video-to-Code Generation
summary: While recent vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved significant improvements on static visual-to-code tasks such as generating code for webpages, charts, or SVGs, it remains unclear whether they can recover temporal dynamics when motion is present. To this end, we introduce Animation2Code, a benchmark for evaluating temporal visual reasoning via reconstructing executable web animation code from videos. Animation2Code consists of 1,069 web animation videos with diverse visual appearances and motion patterns, paired with corresponding HTML/CSS/JavaScript implementations. We propose two human-aligned metrics, appearance similarity and temporal similarity, which allow us to disentangle visual fidelity from temporal alignment when comparing rendered animations against ground-truth samples. Benchmarking state-of-the-art VLMs on this dataset shows that current VLMs struggle to maintain temporal consistency in reconstruction, even when achieving high appearance similarity, including under finetuning and iterative refinement settings. Code and data are available at https://anya-ji.github.io/animation2code-website .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Animation2Code基准，用于评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）从视频生成可执行网页动画代码（HTML/CSS/JS）的能力，发现当前VLMs虽能较好还原外观，但在时间一致性上表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs在静态视觉转代码任务中表现良好，但其处理含运动的时序动态能力尚不明确，亟需专门基准评估其时序视觉推理能力。
AI.method: 构建包含1069个动画视频及其对应HTML/CSS/JS实现的Animation2Code基准；提出两个以人为中心的评估指标——外观相似度和时序相似度，以解耦视觉保真与时间对齐。
AI.result: 在该基准上评测主流VLMs，发现其在高外观相似度下仍严重缺乏时间一致性，且微调和迭代优化策略未能显著改善该问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs在时序视觉推理任务中存在根本性局限，尤其难以建模和重建精确的时间动态，凸显了对时序感知VLMs的迫切需求。

title: Selective Memory Retention for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026
summary: When does retention matter for memory-augmented LLM agents? We study this with TraceRetain, a lightweight framework for bounded external memory in frozen LLM agents that scores entries by interpretable features (success, age, access frequency, redundancy, specificity, similarity, downstream utility) and evicts the lowest-scoring ones at capacity. On clean ALFWorld with gpt-5-mini, external memory robustly improves over no memory across two seeds, but differences among bounded retention policies fall within Wilson 95% CIs: clean ALFWorld at T=100 to T=200 does not naturally exhibit the memory pollution retention is designed to address. Under a controlled noisy-write stress (75% synthetic distractors), unbounded memory and FIFO-K50 degrade on Precision@5 (20.2% to 12.4% and 15.8% to 3.8%) while TraceRetain-CEM is essentially unchanged (16.9% to 16.6%) and preserves 97/100 task success. The mechanism: unbounded memory has the highest mean similarity (0.87) but lowest precision, indicating failed distractors close to the query in embedding space. Held-out in-distribution evaluation shows memory-augmented policies solving 47 to 49 of 50 tasks vs. 39/50 for no memory. Bounded retention buys memory and step efficiency on saturated clean benchmarks at no task-success cost, and only differentiates from cache heuristics when streams contain noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TraceRetain框架，通过可解释特征对记忆条目评分并进行选择性保留，在噪声环境下显著提升记忆增强型LLM代理的鲁棒性与精度，而在干净环境中不同保留策略差异不显著。
AI.motivation: 探究外部记忆的保留策略何时对记忆增强型LLM代理真正重要，尤其关注记忆污染问题是否在实际任务中普遍存在。
AI.method: 提出TraceRetain轻量级框架，基于成功、年龄、访问频率、冗余度、特异性、相似性及下游效用等可解释特征对记忆条目打分，并在容量限制下淘汰低分项；在ALFWorld环境中对比无记忆、FIFO及TraceRetain等策略。
AI.result: 在干净ALFWorld中，不同保留策略性能差异在统计置信区间内；但在75%合成干扰的噪声写入下，TraceRetain-CEM保持Precision@5几乎不变（16.9%→16.6%）且任务成功率高达97/100，显著优于无界记忆和FIFO-K50。
AI.conclusion: 记忆保留策略仅在含噪声的记忆流中才显著区分性能；在干净任务中，有界保留主要提升内存与步数效率，而不影响任务成功率。

title: Fisher-Routed Mixture of Experts for Federated Class-Incremental Learning
summary: Federated Learning (FL) emerged as a promising distributed machine learning paradigm. However, extending FL to the class incremental learning scenarios introduces unique challenges: 1) Capacity conflict and catastrophic forgetting from the shared model overloading, 2) Heterogeneity from Non-Independent and Identically Distributed (Non-IID) data, and 3) Synchronized class misalignment. In this paper, we propose \textbf{F}isher-Routed \textbf{M}i\textbf{X}ture of Experts for \textbf{Fed}erated Class-Incremental Learning (\textsc{FedFMX}), a novel framework to address these challenges via adaptive expert specialization across clients. The crucial insight is to route each sample to an expert subset that jointly optimizes knowledge acquisition and retention. Specifically, we introduce a Fisher-Routed Expert Scoring (FRES) module to estimate expert importance via Fisher-based stability cost and gradient-based plasticity gain. Then, we design an Adaptive Expert Selection (AES) module by quantifying marginal contributions for adaptive expert subset determination. Finally, by the routing-aware regularization (RAR), we achieve load balance and efficient FL training. We theoretically prove the $\mathcal{O}(T^{-1})$ convergence rate. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks compared with state-of-the-art methods demonstrate the superiority of \textsc{FedFMX}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedFMX框架，通过自适应专家专业化解决联邦学习在类别增量学习中的容量冲突、数据异构性和类别对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 将联邦学习扩展到类别增量学习场景面临容量冲突、灾难性遗忘、非独立同分布数据异质性和同步类别错位等挑战。
AI.method: 提出Fisher-Routed Mixture of Experts框架，包含Fisher-Routed Expert Scoring模块（基于Fisher信息稳定性和梯度可塑性）、Adaptive Expert Selection模块（量化边际贡献）和routing-aware regularization实现负载均衡。
AI.result: 理论证明O(T^{-1})收敛率，实验表明在多个基准上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FedFMX有效缓解了联邦类别增量学习中的关键挑战，提升了模型性能与泛化能力。

title: When Does Overlap Help? OSU-Mem and a Cell-Conditional Analysis of Trajectory Memory for LLM Agents
summary: Long-horizon large language model (LLM) agents accumulate interaction trajectories that quickly exceed any practical prompt budget, and existing memory methods either truncate aggressively and lose non-local evidence or retain boilerplate that degrades decision quality. We ask a mechanism question rather than claiming a better general-purpose memory system: when does organizing trajectory memory into overlapping semantic units (OSUs) -- groups of related steps in which one step may belong to several units -- help retrieval over flat or disjoint alternatives? We instantiate this in OSU-Mem, which retrieves from an overlapping OSU pool via budgeted coarse-to-fine expansion, and show its benefit is conditional: overlapping memory helps when the evidence steps a query needs share tool calls or entities, but hurts when those steps are fully heterogeneous and share neither. On a synthetic benchmark where evidence carries such shared structure by construction, OSU-Mem improves over the strongest baseline as the theory predicts; yet on a concatenated, constructed unaugmented $τ$-bench setting its aggregate advantage over flat retrieval vanishes. Splitting queries by whether their evidence shares tools and entities shows this near-tie to be an artifact of mixing query types rather than a property of either method, and ToolBench, a controlled probe built to carry shared structure by design, corroborates the same mechanism via an overlap-vs.-disjoint construction contrast (under a coverage-guided variant), isolating the construction principle rather than validating the full default system. Because the relevant sharing is cheaply estimable from metadata, the analysis yields a metadata-based heuristic for predicting when overlap is likely to improve retrieval. We deliberately isolate the retrieval layer, assessed by retrieval quality and an LLM-mediated evidence-selection stage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OSU-Mem方法，通过将交互轨迹组织为重叠语义单元（OSUs）来改进长程LLM智能体的记忆检索；其效果取决于证据步骤是否共享工具调用或实体：共享时有益，完全异质时有害；该机制经合成与控制实验验证，并导出基于元数据的重叠效益预测启发式。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆方法在长程LLM智能体中面临两难：截断导致非局部证据丢失，全量保留则引入冗余噪声、降低决策质量；本文聚焦核心机制问题——何时将轨迹划分为重叠语义单元（OSUs）比扁平或互斥划分更利于检索。
AI.method: 提出OSU-Mem：构建重叠语义单元（OSUs）池，采用预算约束下的粗到细扩展策略进行检索；通过元数据（如工具调用、实体）判断证据步骤间共享结构，并据此调控重叠设计；在合成基准（τ-bench）、控制探针（ToolBench）等多场景下评估检索质量及LLM证据选择效果。
AI.result: OSU-Mem在证据具备共享工具/实体的合成任务中显著优于强基线；但在混合查询类型的真实构造设置（unaugmented τ-bench）中，整体优势消失；进一步按查询类型拆分发现：优势仅存在于共享结构的子集，而ToolBench控制实验证实该机制独立于系统实现；元数据可廉价估计共享性，形成实用启发式。
AI.conclusion: 重叠记忆并非普适更优，其有效性取决于证据的内在结构（是否共享工具或实体）；本文揭示了检索层的关键设计原理，强调应依据可估计的元数据动态适配记忆组织方式，而非追求统一记忆架构。

title: AnyBody: Free-Form Whole-Body Humanoid Control from Arbitrary Keypoint Guidance
summary: We present AnyBody, a unified whole-body humanoid controller driven by an arbitrary subset of body keypoints chosen at deploy time. Prior physics-based trackers either rely on expensive full-body motion capture and error-prone trajectory retargeting, which bottleneck scalable data collection and policy learning, or decompose upper- and lower-body control into separate hierarchical representations, sacrificing the coordinated whole-body motions that loco-manipulation requires. We close this gap by learning a single latent motion representation that any keypoint subset can address. To achieve this, we first train a privileged teacher tracker on a large unstructured motion corpus and distill it online into a deterministic encoder-decoder student whose latent space is a unit sphere. We then train a transformer keypoint encoder that admits any subset of body keypoints through masked self-attention, aligning it to the privileged latent. Additionally, we treat the frozen decoder as a motor prior and specialize downstream tasks with a lightweight residual corrector in the latent space. We demonstrate the effectiveness of AnyBody by tracking large-scale human motions from arbitrary keypoint subsets, free-form control, flexibly teleoperating, and learning downstream behaviors including locomotion, in-air writing, and obstacle-reach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnyBody，一种基于任意关键点子集驱动的统一全身人形控制器，通过学习单一潜在运动表示来实现灵活的全身运动控制。
AI.motivation: 现有基于物理的跟踪器要么依赖昂贵的全身动作捕捉和易出错的轨迹重定向，限制了可扩展的数据收集和策略学习；要么将上下身控制分解为独立的分层表示，牺牲了全身协调运动能力。
AI.method: 首先在大规模非结构化运动语料库上训练一个特权教师跟踪器，并在线蒸馏为确定性编码器-解码器学生模型，其潜在空间为单位球；然后训练一个支持任意关键点子集的Transformer关键点编码器（通过掩码自注意力），并将其对齐到特权潜在空间；最后将冻结的解码器作为运动先验，在潜在空间中使用轻量残差校正器进行下游任务适配。
AI.result: AnyBody成功实现了从任意关键点子集跟踪大规模人类运动、自由形式控制、灵活遥操作，以及学习包括行走、空中书写和障碍物抓取在内的下游行为。
AI.conclusion: AnyBody提供了一种更灵活、高效且可扩展的全身人形控制框架，解决了现有方法在关键点灵活性与全身协调性之间的权衡问题。

title: The strength of clinical evidence is recoverable from language model representations but not from their stated grades
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly summarize clinical evidence, where a claim's weight depends on how strongly it is supported. Yet these models convey confidence poorly, and properties they never state, such as truth, are often readable from their activations. Whether a clinical model registers evidence strength, distinct from truth, and states it when asked is untested, and any such signal could be lexical. We compiled 45,134 clinical claims from six public sources, harmonized 20,611 into a four-level evidence grade under three independent frameworks, and tested 22 local, open-weight LLMs from several developers (0.6-70 billion parameters; general, medical, and reasoning), with lexical, truth, and cross-framework controls. A linear estimator recovered the grade in every model (median AUROC 71.8), yet decodability did not rise with scale and was weakest in reasoning models. The grade the models stated fell to chance, 25-27 percentage points below the estimator. The recoverable signal was largely lexical and did not transfer across topics or frameworks, yet it was distinct from factual truth and still flagged weakly supported claims (AUROC 69.2). Clinical LLMs thus carry an ordered evidence-strength signal they do not express, so their stated grades fail to convey a claim's support even when it is recoverable from their representations and text.

AI.tldr: 临床大语言模型虽隐含证据强度信号，但无法准确表达该信号，其输出的证据等级与实际支持度严重不符。
AI.motivation: 评估临床大语言模型是否能识别并表达临床主张的证据强度（而非仅真假），以及该能力是否依赖词法特征。
AI.method: 构建包含45,134条临床主张的数据集，其中20,611条按三级独立框架标注四等级证据强度；测试22个开源本地LLM（0.6B–70B参数），使用线性估计器从模型激活中解码证据等级，并设置词法、真实性及跨框架控制实验。
AI.result: 所有模型激活中均可线性解码证据等级（中位AUROC 71.8），但解码性能不随模型规模提升，推理类模型最弱；模型直接输出的等级准确率仅达随机水平，比解码结果低25–27个百分点；该信号主要为词法驱动，跨主题/框架泛化差，但确与事实真值分离，仍可区分弱支持主张（AUROC 69.2）。
AI.conclusion: 临床大语言模型内部存在有序的证据强度表征，但无法在生成中有效表达；其声称的证据等级不可信，即使该信息已编码于模型表示中。

title: IMU-HOI: A Symbiotic Framework for Coherent Human-Object Interaction and Motion Capture via Contact-Conscious Inertial Fusion
summary: Capturing full-body human motion with object interactions is crucial for AR/VR and robotics applications, yet it remains challenging for conventional vision-based methods due to occlusions and constrained capture volumes. Inertial measurement units (IMUs) offer a compelling alternative without line-of-sight requirements, but existing IMU-based motion capture assumes an isolated human and ignores object contacts and dynamics. To bridge this gap, we present IMU-HOI, a novel framework that jointly recovers full-body human pose and 6-DoF object trajectory from sparse IMUs on the body and object, explicitly modeling human-object interaction. Our approach first infers probabilistic hand-object contacts directly from IMU streams and uses them as a high-level signal to route between kinematic and inertial reasoning. These contact cues drive a three-stage fusion pipeline that refines human pose and root translation, and fuses hand-based forward kinematics with object-IMU integration for object motion, yielding coherent, drift-resilient trajectories for both human and object. Experiments on challenging human-object interaction scenarios demonstrate substantial accuracy gains over prior inertial motion capture methods. Moreover, IMU-HOI can be plugged into existing sparse-IMU mocap backbones with minimal changes, effectively extending the scope of purely inertial motion capture from isolated humans to full human-object interaction and joint motion estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMU-HOI框架，利用稀疏穿戴式IMU联合估计人体全身姿态与物体6自由度运动轨迹，通过建模人-物交互（特别是手-物接触）实现高精度、抗漂移的协同运动捕捉。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉方法受遮挡和捕获范围限制；现有IMU方法忽略人-物交互，无法处理物体接触与动力学。
AI.method: 提出三阶段融合流程：1）从IMU流中概率推断手-物接触；2）以接触信号为路由，协调运动学与惯性推理；3）融合手部前向运动学与物体IMU积分，同步优化人体姿态与物体轨迹。
AI.result: 在复杂人-物交互场景中显著优于现有惯性动捕方法；可即插即用地扩展现有稀疏IMU动捕骨干网络。
AI.conclusion: IMU-HOI成功将纯惯性动捕从孤立人体拓展至人-物协同运动估计，为AR/VR与机器人应用提供鲁棒、无视线依赖的解决方案。

title: Measuring Graph-to-Graph Semantic Similarity in Knowledge Graphs: An Empirical Evaluation of Knowledge Graph Embeddings
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Accepted as a poster at The 2nd Frontiers in Graph Machine Learning for the Large Model Era (GMLLM'26) Workshop, co-located with KDD 2026
summary: A Knowledge Graph (KG) represents facts as structured triples and is widely used to organize relational knowledge across diverse domains. Just as textual information ranges from words and sentences to complete documents, KG information can be interpreted at multiple levels, from entities, relations, and triples to subgraphs and entire KGs. However, existing KG embedding methods mainly focus on entities, relations, and triples, leaving graph-level semantics largely unaddressed. Conventional graph-level methods, which typically compare graphs based on structural patterns, are also insufficient because structural similarity alone cannot guarantee semantic similarity between KGs. To evaluate how well different methods capture such graph-level semantic information, we study graph-to-graph semantic similarity, which determines whether a pair of KGs represents semantically corresponding underlying information. To obtain reliable ground-truth correspondences, we construct a semantic matching dataset by modifying text documents, extracting KGs from both original and modified documents, and transferring their known correspondences to KG pairs. We compare text-based, structure-based, and KG embedding-based approaches on each dataset. For the KG embedding-based approach, we introduce two scoring functions: \textit{EmbPairSim}, which uses maximal pairwise entity similarity, and \textit{AvgEmbSim}, which uses a frequency-weighted centroid. Experiments on WikiText-2 and CC-News show that \textit{EmbPairSim} achieves up to 5.3 pp higher MRR than Sentence-BERT while using substantially fewer parameters. These results suggest that KGE representations can serve as compact and effective signals for graph-to-graph semantic similarity in KGs. Our code is available at https://github.com/SeungRyeolBaek/KG-to-KG-Semantic-Similarity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种评估知识图谱（KG）间语义相似性的新任务——图到图语义相似性，并构建了基于文本修改的语义匹配数据集；提出了两种基于KG嵌入的评分函数EmbPairSim和AvgEmbSim，在WikiText-2和CC-News上显著优于Sentence-BERT。
AI.motivation: 现有KG嵌入方法主要关注实体、关系和三元组级别，缺乏对图级语义建模；而传统基于结构的图相似性方法无法保证语义一致性，因此需要一种能衡量KG之间语义对应关系的新范式。
AI.method: 构建了从文本修改出发的KG语义匹配数据集；提出两种KG嵌入层面的图级相似性评分函数：EmbPairSim（基于最大成对实体相似性）和AvgEmbSim（基于频率加权质心）；在多个数据集上对比文本、结构和KG嵌入方法。
AI.result: EmbPairSim在WikiText-2和CC-News上MRR比Sentence-BERT高出最多5.3个百分点，且参数量更少；验证了KG嵌入可作为图级语义相似性的紧凑有效信号。
AI.conclusion: KG嵌入不仅适用于低层级任务，也可有效支持图级语义相似性判断；所提方法为KG间语义匹配提供了新思路和实用工具。

title: The Contagion Tensor: A Framework for Measuring Output-Distribution Coupling in Multi-Agent LLM Systems -- and Auditing the Claims It Enables
summary: We introduce the Contagion Tensor, a measurement framework for quantifying how large language model (LLM) output distributions couple across modalities, agents, and time steps. From the tensor we derive the Coupling Amplification Factor (CAF), a family of ratio-based metrics sharing the form CAF = E[T_condition] / E[T_baseline], providing unitless, baseline-referenced measurement with bootstrap confidence intervals. We instantiate CAF in four variants and evaluate the strongest in a complete 2x2x2 block-orthogonal simulation design with modality-specific ablation. The ablation reveals that an apparent image-condition super-linear effect (CAF = 1.40) collapses to sub-linear (CAF = 0.87) when the image perturbation module is disabled, a shift of -0.53 with zero effect on text conditions. We supplement with real-API experiments across two model families: DeepSeek-Chat (R=30) and GPT-4o-mini (R=15, real vision). Under uniform personas, text-only communication produces CAF approx 1.0 in both models. Diverse personas drive convergence (CAF = 0.88). A within-model comparison on GPT-4o-mini reveals: C3 (text) CAF = 1.02 vs. C5 (real vision, R=30) CAF = 1.72 [1.700, 1.733], delta = +0.70, validating the simulation's super-linear image-condition prediction. Of 11 conditions, 5 have been tested on real APIs and 6 remain unverified. Our contribution is two-layered: (1) a measurement instrument that makes output-distribution coupling quantitatively falsifiable; and (2) a transferable ablation protocol that any modular multi-agent simulator can adopt to distinguish genuine coupling from design artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Contagion Tensor框架和耦合放大因子（CAF）指标，用于量化大语言模型在多模态、多智能体及时间步间的输出分布耦合效应，并通过仿真与真实API实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对大语言模型跨模态、跨智能体及时间步输出分布耦合效应的可量化、可证伪测量工具，亟需一种能区分真实耦合与设计伪影的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出Contagion Tensor作为测量框架，并定义基于比值的无量纲耦合放大因子（CAF）；设计2×2×2正交仿真实验并进行模态特异性消融；在DeepSeek-Chat和GPT-4o-mini上开展真实API实验，涵盖文本与真实视觉输入、不同角色设定等条件。
AI.result: 消融实验发现图像条件下的表观超线性效应（CAF=1.40）在关闭图像扰动模块后转为亚线性（CAF=0.87）；真实API实验中，GPT-4o-mini在真实视觉输入下CAF达1.72，显著高于文本输入的1.02，验证了仿真预测；11种条件中5种已实证，6种待验证。
AI.conclusion: Contagion Tensor与CAF构成首个可定量、可证伪的输出耦合测量仪器；配套的模块化消融协议具有通用性，可被任意多智能体模拟器采纳以识别真实耦合而非设计伪影。

title: LEDGER: Scaling Agentic Document Editing with Dependency-aware Graph Retrieval
summary: We introduce LEDGER to tackle the novel context engineering challenge of agentic document editing, where localized edits to long, structured documents must be applied efficiently without breaking cross-references or semantic consistency. LEDGER constructs a lightweight dependency graph that explicitly models document structure, including hierarchical organization, explicit references, implicit dependencies, and semantic relationships. For each edit, graph-guided retrieval selects only the necessary context, avoiding full-document processing while preserving consistency. We evaluate LEDGER on a curated benchmark of 1.9k test cases with various document types and lengths, spanning six state-of-the-art models: LEDGER improves consistency from 56% to 76% across all six models and test scenarios while reducing token usage. Notably, LEDGER with low reasoning effort matches baseline performance at high reasoning effort using fewer tokens, showing that explicit dependency representations can partially substitute for expensive internal reasoning in agentic document editing.

AI.tldr: LEDGER 提出了一种基于轻量级依赖图的上下文工程方法，用于高效、一致地进行长结构化文档的局部编辑，显著提升了编辑一致性并减少了 token 使用。
AI.motivation: 解决智能体文档编辑中的新挑战：在长而结构化的文档中进行局部编辑时，需高效执行且不破坏交叉引用和语义一致性。
AI.method: 构建一个轻量级依赖图，显式建模文档的层次结构、显式引用、隐式依赖和语义关系；通过图引导检索为每次编辑选取必要上下文，避免全文档处理。
AI.result: 在包含1900个测试用例的基准上评估，LEDGER 将六种主流模型的一致性从56%提升至76%，同时降低 token 消耗；低推理开销下达到高开销基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式的依赖表示可部分替代昂贵的内部推理，在保证编辑一致性的同时提升效率。

title: CORE Planner: Contextual-memory Oriented Reinforcement-learning in Unknown Environments for Robot Navigation
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics
summary: Autonomous navigation in unknown environments requires a robot to efficiently reach a predefined goal while exploring without prior maps. Although progress has been made in this area, most existing works still rely on traditional planning methods with hand-crafted rules, while learning-based methods often suffer from limited environmental memory and challenges in simulation-to-real (sim-to-real) transfer. To overcome these limitations, we propose a Contextual-memory Oriented Reinforcement-learning (CORE) planner for robot navigation in unknown environments. The proposed CORE planner effectively combines the core advantages of traditional and learning-based methods. Specifically, our method uses a sparse visibility graph for structured environment representation, reducing the computational overhead of dense grid maps, and employs a Transformer network to achieve a holistic environmental understanding, thereby significantly improving navigation efficiency. Moreover, we introduce a visibility graph-based graph sparsification method and a contextual memory mechanism, which alleviates local optima and enhances computational performance in large-scale scenes. Finally, our approach achieves zero-shot sim-to-real transfer after training solely on image-based environments, requiring no fine-tuning. Experimental results show that CORE Planner consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, including the traditional FAR Planner and all learning-based baselines, across representative environments, reducing travel distance by 13\% over traditional FAR Planner and by up to 48\% relative to learning-based baselines, with larger gains observed in more complex environments. In real-world scenarios, CORE successfully navigates without human intervention, showcasing zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. Code is available at https://github.com/BBD00/core_planner.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向上下文记忆的强化学习导航规划器（CORE），结合传统方法的结构化建模优势与学习方法的泛化能力，通过稀疏可见性图和Transformer实现高效、鲁棒的未知环境自主导航，并实现零样本仿真到真实世界迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有自主导航方法要么依赖手工规则的传统规划器，要么受限于环境记忆能力弱和仿真到真实世界迁移困难的问题。
AI.method: 提出CORE规划器：采用稀疏可见性图进行结构化环境表征，引入Transformer实现全局环境理解，并设计基于可见性图的图稀疏化方法和上下文记忆机制以缓解局部最优并提升大规模场景计算效率。
AI.result: 在多个代表性环境中显著优于FAR等传统方法及各类学习型基线，路径长度减少13%（vs FAR）至最多48%（vs 学习基线）；实验证明其具备零样本sim-to-real迁移能力，在真实场景中无需人工干预即可成功导航。
AI.conclusion: CORE planner有效融合了传统与学习方法的优势，在导航效率、鲁棒性和跨域迁移能力上取得突破，为未知环境中自主导航提供了新范式。

title: Masked Diffusion Decoding as $x$-Prediction Flow
summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) generate text by iteratively unmasking tokens, but their standard decoder reduces each step to a binary action: a position is either committed to a single token or left fully masked, with no representation of partial belief in between. This all-or-nothing regime discards rich predictive information and forces premature, irrevocable commitments, leading to poor performance under a limited decoding budget. In this paper, we reinterpret mask prediction as clean-state prediction ($x$-prediction) and show that it can be used to induce a continuous flow in input embedding space. Building on this view, we propose a continuous decoding framework for MDLMs where tokens can accumulate partial progress at each diffusion step and remain revisable. To match the uneven contextual constraints across positions in language, we replace the globally synchronous schedule in image diffusion with a confidence-based asynchronous update in which the diffusion progress is token-wise accumulated. Additionally, we introduce a lightweight policy network and formulate its training as a reinforcement learning problem. Applied to pretrained LLaDA, our continuous decoder reaches 97% of its performance on the HumanEval dataset with 25% of decoding budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）的连续解码框架，通过将掩码预测重新解释为干净状态预测（x-prediction），在嵌入空间中构建连续流，并引入基于置信度的异步更新与轻量级策略网络，显著提升有限解码预算下的生成性能。
AI.motivation: 标准MDLMs采用二元解码机制（全掩或全定），丢失部分预测信息并导致过早不可逆决策，限制其在有限解码预算下的性能。
AI.method: 1）将掩码预测重释为x-prediction以构建嵌入空间连续流；2）设计token-wise置信度驱动的异步更新机制替代全局同步调度；3）引入轻量级策略网络并以强化学习方式训练。
AI.result: 在预训练LLaDA模型上应用该连续解码器，在HumanEval数据集上仅用25%解码预算即达到原模型97%的性能。
AI.conclusion: 连续解码框架有效缓解MDLMs的过早承诺问题，提升解码效率与质量，为扩散式语言建模提供了新范式。

title: Evidence-Informed LLM Beliefs for Continual Scientific Discovery
summary: Open-ended scientific discovery with large language models (LLMs) increasingly operates as a long-horizon loop of hypothesis search and verification, where a reward signal guides which hypotheses to test next. A notable recent example is AutoDiscovery, which uses "Bayesian surprise" - the belief shift an LLM undergoes after observing evidence for a hypothesis - as both a discovery metric and a reward for search. We first observe that AutoDiscovery treats surprisal as a static quantity, while surprisal in human reasoning is non-stationary - it is defined relative to beliefs that evolve with experience, a prerequisite for continual scientific discovery. We address this mismatch with evidence-informed LLM beliefs: priors updated with evidence from previous hypotheses to compute non-stationary surprisal for new hypotheses. We compare in-context belief-updating mechanisms and find that embedding-based retrieval-augmented generation over prior discoveries best anticipates eventual posteriors, identifying 37.5% of static surprisals as spurious. We then modify search to avoid these spurious rewards and prioritize hypotheses that remain surprising under non-stationary beliefs. Concretely, we introduce two complementary changes to the original search procedure: belief-update filtering and diversity maximization. Across five discovery domains, our method increases accumulated non-stationary surprisal by 30.62% on average compared to the original search procedure, demonstrating that continual scientific discovery with LLMs requires not only better belief measurement but also search procedures that avoid redundancy and encourage diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于证据更新的LLM信念机制，以实现非平稳惊奇度计算，并改进搜索策略，从而提升大语言模型在开放科学发现中的持续探索能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如AutoDiscovery）将惊奇度视为静态量，忽略了人类推理中信念随经验动态演化的特性，难以支持持续科学发现。
AI.method: 引入证据驱动的LLM信念更新机制，采用嵌入式检索增强生成来动态更新先验信念；在此基础上设计信念更新过滤与多样性最大化两种搜索改进策略。
AI.result: 在五个科学发现领域中，新方法平均提升累积非平稳惊奇度30.62%，并识别出37.5%的静态惊奇度为虚假信号。
AI.conclusion: 持续科学发现需结合更准确的动态信念建模与避免冗余、鼓励多样性的搜索机制。

title: Analysis of Adam Algorithms for Stochastic Dynamic Systems
summary: The adaptive moment estimation algorithm, known as Adam, is widely used in modern machine learning, owing to its low per-iteration complexity and strong empirical performance. Despite its prevalent use, the theoretical foundation of Adam remains largely unexplored for time-varying and nonstationary systems. In fact, the existing theoretical analyses of Adam-type algorithms are primarily concerned with time-invariant model parameters and explicitly or implicitly rely on independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data assumptions, under which the learning taskcan be formulated as minimizing a fixed expected objective with a static minimizer. However, such assumptions are often violated in time-varying and nonstationary systems, thereby calling for a theoretical investigation beyond the conventional yet idealized i.i.d. setting. The main objective of this paper is to solve this challenging problem by establishing a general theory of Adam for time-varying and nonstationary stochastic systems. We will introduce some new techniques for analyzing the products of nonstationary and dependent random matrices induced by Adam's coupled first- and second-moment recursions, and will construct a new stochastic Lyapunov function that blends these two moment dynamics. Under a stochastic excitation condition that allows nonstationary and dependent data, we will derive both parameter tracking and output prediction error bounds explicitly, quantifying the effects of stepsize, first- and second-momentum parameters, gradient noise and parameter drift. These bounds not only provide guarantees for Adam performance, but also provide guidelines for hyperparameter selection. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world data validate our theory and design guidelines.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了Adam优化算法在时变和非平稳随机系统中的通用理论，提出新的随机Lyapunov函数和非平稳随机矩阵乘积分析技术，推导了参数跟踪与预测误差界，并给出超参数选择指导。
AI.motivation: 现有Adam理论分析主要基于静态参数和i.i.d.数据假设，难以适用于实际中广泛存在的时变与非平稳系统，亟需突破传统理想化设定的理论框架。
AI.method: 引入新型随机Lyapunov函数融合一阶与二阶矩动态，发展非平稳、相依随机矩阵乘积的分析技术，在允许非平稳与相依数据的随机激励条件下进行理论推导。
AI.result: 得到了显式的参数跟踪误差界和输出预测误差界，定量刻画了步长、动量参数、梯度噪声及参数漂移的影响，并通过合成与真实数据实验验证了理论与设计指南。
AI.conclusion: 本文为Adam在非平稳环境下的应用提供了坚实的理论基础与实用超参数调优指南，拓展了其在动态系统中的适用性与可靠性。

title: Schema-First Retrieval: Embedding Catalogs for Natural Language Analytics
summary: Enterprise text-to-SQL systems often fail before SQL is generated: the model receives the wrong schema context. Modern warehouses contain thousands of tables, abbreviated columns, informal metrics, hidden join conventions, and permission boundaries that are not captured by raw table names. We introduce Schema-First Retrieval, a retrieval layer that embeds catalog metadata rather than warehouse rows. The system indexes five typed catalog objects, tables, columns, metrics, relationships, and query history, using object-specific text templates. At query time, it combines parallel vector search, lineage expansion, cross-encoder reranking, workload memory, and deterministic access-control gates before SQL generation. On CRUSH4SQL (1,534 questions), Schema-First Retrieval reaches 96.4% table recall@20 and cross-encoder reranking adds +11.1 points at column recall@10; against an equally-templated BM25 baseline, semantic retrieval is +32.8 points at table recall@5. On SEDE (857 questions), query history raises table recall@5 from 52.1% to 92.3%. On BIRD (96 questions), schema-first context reduces SQL execution errors from 15.6% to 6.2%, a 2.5x reduction. These results show that catalog selection is a first-class retrieval problem for natural language analytics, not a prompt formatting detail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Schema-First Retrieval的检索层，通过嵌入数据目录元数据（而非原始行数据）来提升企业级Text-to-SQL系统的性能，显著提高了表/列召回率并降低了SQL执行错误率。
AI.motivation: 企业级Text-to-SQL系统常因获取错误的数据库模式上下文而失败；现代数据仓库中存在大量表、缩写列名、非正式指标、隐式连接规则及权限限制，仅靠原始表名无法充分表达语义。
AI.method: 构建基于五类目录对象（表、列、指标、关系、查询历史）的语义检索系统，使用对象特定文本模板进行嵌入；结合并行向量检索、血缘扩展、交叉编码器重排序、工作负载记忆和确定性访问控制门。
AI.result: 在CRUSH4SQL上表召回率@20达96.4%，列召回率@10提升11.1点；相比BM25基线，语义检索在表召回率@5上高出32.8点；在SEDE上查询历史使表召回率@5从52.1%升至92.3%；在BIRD上SQL执行错误率从15.6%降至6.2%。
AI.conclusion: 目录对象检索是自然语言分析中的核心问题，不应被简化为提示工程细节；Schema-First Retrieval验证了元数据驱动检索对Text-to-SQL任务的关键作用。

title: MoPe: Motion Permanence for Robust Monocular Gaussian Mapping in Dynamic Environments
summary: Robust robot autonomy depends on scene representations that remain stable enough to support localization, navigation, and downstream decision making in dynamic environments. Monocular Gaussian Splatting SLAM provides high-fidelity mapping, but current uncertainty-aware methods still treat dynamic regions largely as per-frame observations. This makes the representation effectively memoryless: when a pedestrian slows, pauses, or reappears after occlusion, the current frame may look static, allowing dynamic content to be absorbed into the map and leaving persistent ghosting artifacts. We argue that this failure reflects a representation-level mismatch. Dynamic-ness is not an instantaneous appearance property, but a temporal property defined by motion history. Building on this view, we introduce Motion Permanence: the principle that an object's dynamic identity should persist over time rather than be re-decided from each frame independently. We realize this principle in MoPe, a memory-aware uncertainty filter for monocular Gaussian mapping. MoPe propagates the historical dynamic posterior through geometry-consistent SE(3) warping and fuses it with current-frame evidence using bounded Bayesian log-odds updates. The resulting persistent posterior guides tracking, mapping, dynamic-aware Gaussian insertion, and Gaussian-level post-cleanup. On Wild-SLAM, Bonn, and TUM sequences, MoPe improves tracking robustness and reduces residual ghosting, with the strongest gains on dynamic-human scenes that most directly violate the memoryless assumption. These results show that maintaining temporal dynamic state inside the scene representation is a practical step toward more reliable representation-centric autonomy in changing real-world environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Motion Permanence（运动持久性）原理，指出动态性是时间属性而非瞬时外观属性，并据此设计MoPe方法，在单目高斯溅射SLAM中引入记忆感知的不确定性滤波，通过SE(3)几何一致形变传播历史动态后验并融合当前帧证据，显著提升动态场景下的跟踪鲁棒性与地图清洁度。
AI.motivation: 现有单目高斯溅射SLAM方法对动态区域采用逐帧独立判断，导致记忆缺失：行人减速、暂停或遮挡后重现时易被误吸收进静态地图，产生持续鬼影；根本原因在于将动态性视为瞬时外观属性，而非由运动历史定义的时间属性。
AI.method: 提出Motion Permanence原理，并实现为MoPe——一种面向单目高斯映射的记忆感知不确定性滤波器；其核心是通过几何一致的SE(3)形变传播历史动态后验，并采用有界贝叶斯对数几率更新融合当前帧观测，生成持久动态后验以指导跟踪、建图、动态感知的高斯插入及高斯级后清理。
AI.result: 在Wild-SLAM、Bonn和TUM数据集上，MoPe显著提升了跟踪鲁棒性，降低了残余鬼影，尤其在含动态行人的场景中增益最明显，验证了维持场景表征内时间动态状态的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在场景表征内部显式维护时间维度的动态状态，是迈向变化真实环境中更可靠、以表征为中心的机器人自主性的切实可行路径。

title: ThinkProbe: Beyond Accuracy -- Structural Profiling of Open-Ended LLM Reasoning Traces via Non-Generative Thought Graphs
summary: We present ThinkProbe, a framework for structural analysis of LLM reasoning traces. ThinkProbe converts each trace into a Thought Graph a directed graph with cycles, 8 node types, and 6 edge types and derives a 19-metric five-dimensional cognitive profile (5D-CP: Breadth, Depth, Structure, Metacognitive, Efficiency) through a fully non-generative pipeline combining rule-based segmentation and discriminative semantic linking. Applied to 4{,}200 traces from 7 native reasoning models across 200 open-ended questions and 10 cognitive domains, ThinkProbe reveals that reasoning structure is a stable, model-level property: between-model variance exceeds between-domain variance by up to fourfold across four of five cognitive dimensions, with Structure showing genuine sensitivity to question domain, exposing qualitatively distinct cognitive profiles invisible to accuracy-based evaluation.

AI.tldr: ThinkProbe 是一个用于分析大语言模型（LLM）推理轨迹的结构化框架，通过构建‘思维图’并提取五维认知特征（广度、深度、结构、元认知、效率），揭示推理结构是模型层面的稳定属性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于准确率的评估难以揭示模型推理过程的内在认知差异，亟需一种能刻画推理结构特性的非生成式分析框架。
AI.method: 将推理轨迹转化为包含8种节点、6种边的有向循环图（Thought Graph），结合规则分割与判别式语义链接，构建19指标的五维认知画像（5D-CP）。
AI.result: 在4200条跨7个模型、200道开放题、10个认知领域的轨迹上验证：推理结构是模型级稳定特征；四维认知指标的模型间差异达领域间差异的四倍；仅‘结构’维度对问题领域敏感。
AI.conclusion: 推理结构具有模型指纹特性，ThinkProbe 提供了超越准确率的细粒度认知评估新范式。

title: SIGNET: Motion-Level Knowledge Transfer for Cross-Language Sign Language Translation
summary: Sign language translation (SLT) remains challenging due to its high spatio-temporal complexity, long sequences, and the need to model multiple articulators without relying on gloss annotations. Existing approaches are typically tailored to individual datasets or languages and struggle to scale, while overlooking the relationships between sign languages that could inform more effective cross-lingual transfer. We present \textbf{SIGNET}, a framework that enables motion-level knowledge transfer for cross-language sign language translation. Our key insight is that, although sign languages differ in grammar and lexicon, pretrained models capture motion-level visual patterns that can be reused across datasets and languages. \textbf{SIGNET} integrates multiple pretrained sign language backbones through an attention-based, hand-prior aggregation mechanism that guides a gated fusion network in dynamically selecting the most relevant experts. Comprehensive experiments on four benchmarks (How2Sign, Phoenix14T, CSL-Daily, and MeineDGS) demonstrate state-of-the-art translation performance, and \textbf{SIGNET} also surpasses prior methods on WLASL for sign language recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIGNET框架，通过运动级知识迁移实现跨语言手语翻译，利用预训练模型捕捉跨数据集和语言的运动级视觉模式，并通过注意力机制和门控融合网络动态选择最相关的专家模型，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有手语翻译方法通常针对单个数据集或语言设计，难以扩展，且忽视了不同手语间的关联性，无法有效进行跨语言迁移。
AI.method: SIGNET框架整合多个预训练手语骨干网络，采用基于注意力的手部先验聚合机制，引导门控融合网络动态选择最相关的专家模型，实现运动级知识迁移。
AI.result: 在How2Sign、Phoenix14T、CSL-Daily和MeineDGS四个基准上取得当前最优翻译性能，并在WLASL手语识别任务上超越先前方法。
AI.conclusion: SIGNET证明了运动级视觉模式具有跨语言可迁移性，为跨语言手语翻译提供了新范式，提升了模型泛化能力和性能。

title: AI Trading's Alpha Singularity: Emergent Market Reasoning through Agent-to-Agent Self-Evolution
summary: Automated alpha mining holds the scoring function fixed and varies the search algorithm over it. A search that converges against a fixed scorer overfits whatever the scorer cannot penalize, a primary cause of the out-of-sample generalization gap. We treat the scoring function as a search artifact alongside the alpha factors and study what conditions make this joint search admissible. Sealed Joint Search (SJS) is a framework: a set of structural conditions on information flow in an autonomous-discovery system that prevent joint search from collapsing into self-confirmation while keeping the evaluator sealed. Conditions cover role decomposition, typed inter-role communication, provenance-sealed reads, versioned stores, and substrate-local promotion. Agora tests SJS empirically: five LLM agent classes communicate via three channels, evolving eight skill libraries, with alpha libraries built on AlphaGen operators. Three evaluators write reports aggregated into one brief, carrying forward disagreement instead of voting. We run Agora for 100 rounds on CSI 1000 and evaluate on a 91-day 2026 holdout sealed from all LLM inputs. Agora achieves holdout Sharpe +1.87; best baseline +1.334 at favorable seed and -0.755 cross-seed mean. Pre-loading Agora's two metrics into a frozen-library ablation recovers only +0.40 of the +2.25 Sharpe gap, and adding PPO without library evolution worsens the gap. The two metrics emerge rather than being designed. Caveats: single-seed run, short-side concentrated signal, intended for long-short.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sealed Joint Search (SJS) 的新框架，用于解决自动化alpha挖掘中因固定评分函数导致的过拟合与泛化能力差问题；通过结构化信息流约束（如角色分离、类型化通信、密封读取等），使评分函数与alpha因子联合搜索保持稳健；在Agora系统中实证验证，其在2026年91天封闭测试集上取得显著优于基线的Sharpe比率（+1.87 vs. +1.334/+ -0.755）。
AI.motivation: 传统自动化alpha挖掘将评分函数固定，仅优化搜索算法，易导致对评分函数盲区的过拟合，造成样本外泛化差距；本文动机是将评分函数视为可学习的搜索组件，研究联合搜索的合理性与可行性条件。
AI.method: 提出Sealed Joint Search (SJS) 框架，定义若干结构性信息流约束（角色分解、类型化通信、溯源密封读取、版本化存储、底层局部晋升）；构建Agora多智能体系统：5类LLM代理经3通道交互，演化8个技能库与AlphaGen驱动的alpha库；采用3个独立 evaluator生成报告并聚合（保留分歧而非投票）；在CSI 1000数据上运行100轮，并于完全隔离的2026年91天holdout集评估。
AI.result: Agora在封闭holdout测试中实现Sharpe +1.87，显著优于最佳基线（+1.334单种子、-0.755跨种子均值）；冻结预载两项指标的消融实验仅恢复+0.40的+2.25 Sharpe提升缺口；加入PPO但不演化库反而恶化性能；两项关键指标为自发涌现而非人工设计。
AI.conclusion: 联合搜索评分函数与alpha因子在满足SJS结构性约束下是可行且有效的；Agora实证表明，通过信息流隔离与多视角评估可缓解自确认偏差，提升金融信号的泛化性；该范式适用于长期-短期策略，但当前实验存在单种子、偏多头等局限。

title: An Integrated Machine Learning and Hierarchical Variance Decomposition Pipeline for Student Performance Prediction and Metacognitive Calibration on Multi-Signal Telemetry
summary: Predicting student performance and characterizing metacognitive calibration are essential for personalization in intelligent tutoring systems. Prior research treats performance prediction, calibration error calculation, and variance decomposition as separate pipelines, preventing unified interpretation. I propose the Unified Behavioral Prediction and Calibration Analysis Pipeline (UBP-CAP), an integrated framework processing student pre-execution behavioral telemetry through three linked modules: (1) a LightGBM classifier with SHAP for binary correctness prediction, (2) formal calibration metrics (ECE, MCE, and Brier score decomposition) to evaluate metacognitive alignment, and (3) a crossed Generalized Linear Mixed-Effects Model (GLMM) for decomposing calibration deviations. I introduce the Predictive-Explanatory Divergence Index (PEDI), which quantifies structural divergence between predictive and explanatory feature profiles. Evaluated on 1,195 interaction records (27 students, 45 tasks), Logistic Regression achieves AUC-ROC = 0.903, outperforming LightGBM (0.878). Student naive ECE (0.109) significantly exceeds model ECE (0.068), confirming systematic miscalibration.
