The crossed GLMM yields ICCStudent = 0.123, showing calibration is situational rather than dispositional. PEDIcos = 0.081 (p = 0.327) indicates structural alignment between prediction and explanation on shared behavioral features.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UBP-CAP统一框架，整合学生行为预测、校准评估与偏差分解，引入PEDI指标衡量预测与解释特征的一致性，并在真实数据上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将学生成绩预测、元认知校准误差计算和方差分解视为独立流程，缺乏统一解释框架。
AI.method: 构建UBP-CAP三模块框架：(1) LightGBM+SHAP进行二分类正确性预测；(2) 使用ECE、MCE和Brier分解评估校准度；(3) 采用交叉广义线性混合效应模型（GLMM）分解校准偏差；并提出PEDI指标量化预测与解释特征间的结构差异。
AI.result: Logistic回归AUC达0.903（优于LightGBM的0.878）；学生朴素ECE（0.109）显著高于模型ECE（0.068）；GLMM显示ICCStudent=0.123，表明校准具情境性；PEDIcos=0.081（p=0.327），说明预测与解释特征结构一致。
AI.conclusion: UBP-CAP实现了预测与校准分析的统一建模，揭示校准偏差主要源于情境因素而非个体特质，PEDI为可解释AI提供新度量工具。

title: SemFlowRAG: Directed Semantic Flow from Abstraction to Evidence for Complex Reasoning
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhanced by Knowledge Graphs has shown promise in complex multi-hop reasoning tasks. However, existing graph-based retrieval methods typically rely on flat, undirected topologies. During the retrieval process, the probability flow often gets trapped in high-degree abstract concept nodes which we define as ``probability black holes'', leading to semantic drift and noise accumulation. To address this, we propose SemFlowRAG, a framework that reconstructs the flat retrieval space into a corpus-adaptive semantic gradient graph. This data-driven self-organization enables a hierarchical structure to emerge naturally from the data distribution, capturing the intrinsic semantic granularity of the corpus to suppress structural noise. By quantifying the semantic abstractness of entities through the embedding variance of their associated passages, we transform static undirected edges into directed semantic constraints. Furthermore, we design an abstractness-guided directed PageRank algorithm that forces the retrieval trajectory to follow a ``high-to-low semantic abstractness'' gradient. This mechanism ensures layer-by-layer evidence convergence, smoothly guiding the retrieval process from abstract concepts to specific document evidence. Extensive experiments on complex QA datasets demonstrate that SemFlowRAG effectively mitigates the ``probability black holes'' issue, outperforming existing baselines in both retrieval and downstream reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemFlowRAG框架，通过构建语义梯度有向图并设计抽象度引导的PageRank算法，解决知识图谱检索中因高阶抽象节点导致的概率黑洞问题，提升多跳推理任务的检索与推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识图谱的检索方法依赖扁平、无向拓扑结构，在检索过程中概率流易陷入高阶抽象概念节点（即“概率黑洞”），造成语义漂移和噪声累积。
AI.method: 提出SemFlowRAG：1）构建语料自适应的语义梯度图，实现数据驱动的层次化结构；2）利用实体关联段落嵌入方差量化语义抽象度，将无向边转为有向语义约束；3）设计抽象度引导的有向PageRank算法，强制检索路径沿‘高→低抽象度’梯度进行。
AI.result: 在多个复杂问答数据集上实验表明，SemFlowRAG有效缓解‘概率黑洞’问题，在检索准确率与下游推理性能上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义梯度图与抽象度引导的定向检索机制可显著提升RAG在多跳推理任务中的鲁棒性与准确性，为知识图谱增强检索提供了新范式。

title: PL-LIT: A LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal SLAM Using Point-Line Features and Thermographic Mapping
comment: 8 pages,International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2026 (IROS)
summary: Thermal imaging is resilient to adverse conditions, such as intense illumination, low-light operation, and fog, and can therefore mitigate odometry degradation when visible-spectrum imagery becomes unreliable. Nevertheless, most thermal cameras employ automatic gain control (AGC), and thermal images often present low global contrast despite containing informative edge structures. These characteristics undermine brightness constancy and cause conventional optical flow tracking-based odometry pipelines that fundamentally rely on the brightness constancy assumption across consecutive frames. To address these issues, we propose a general LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal SLAM system that accommodates both visible-light and thermal cameras. PL-LIT combines an online photometric calibration module with a deep neural network for point-line feature extraction, enabling more stable and repeatable thermal tracking. For state estimation, we design a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal formulation within an Error-State Iterated Kalman Filter (ESIKF). We further introduce a line-feature constraint scheme ensuring the reliability of geometric constraints across varying thermal appearances. In addition, PL-LIT builds a probabilistic thermal-intensity voxel map, which supports real-time thermal anomaly detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PL-LIT exhibits generality and robustness in visible-light environments, achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-range thermal infrared datasets, and provides practical safety inspection functionality based on thermographic mapping.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal SLAM系统PL-LIT，通过在线光度标定与深度神经网络提取点线特征，结合紧耦合ESIKF状态估计与热成像几何约束机制，显著提升热红外图像下的里程计鲁棒性，并支持实时热异常检测。
AI.motivation: 热成像虽在恶劣光照和天气条件下具有优势，但其自动增益控制（AGC）导致全局对比度低，破坏亮度恒定假设，使传统基于光流的视觉里程计失效。
AI.method: 提出PL-LIT系统：集成在线光度标定模块与深度点线特征提取网络；构建紧耦合LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal ESIKF状态估计算法；引入线特征约束机制以增强热图像几何一致性；建立概率化热强度体素地图用于热异常检测。
AI.result: 在可见光环境和长距离热红外数据集上均表现优异，达到SOTA性能；具备实际热巡检能力；系统具有通用性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PL-LIT有效克服热图像低对比度与亮度非恒定问题，实现了多传感器融合的稳定热SLAM，并拓展了热成像在安全巡检中的实用价值。

title: A Comparative Study on Affective Cues in Text Embeddings Across Psychological Emotion Theories
summary: Text encoders are known for their utility in natural language processing, as they are able to efficiently compress inputs into dense vectors while preserving semantics. These models have been applied to affective computing, in particular to help with solving sentiment analysis and emotion recognition tasks. Nevertheless, it remains unclear to what extent the latent representations produced by modern text encoders capture well-defined psychological theories of affect. In this work, we investigate the affective capabilities of twelve recently released text encoders by probing their generated embeddings as input features for solving regression and classification tasks across three established emotion frameworks, using both word- and sentence-level data. Additionally, we apply a semantic data-leakage prevention technique to improve robustness in word-level evaluations. Our main findings show that the latent manifolds of the latest instruction-aware open-weight encoders enclose an equal or even a larger amount of affective information in comparison with proprietary counterparts when evaluated at word level. In contrast, embeddings of task-tuned and proprietary encoders reach the highest scores on sentence-level affective classification. Furthermore, a qualitative analysis of latent representations and their encoded affective cues is provided.

AI.tldr: 本文探究了12种现代文本编码器在情感计算中的表现，评估其嵌入是否符合心理学情感理论，并比较了开源与专有模型在词级和句级情感任务上的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有文本编码器虽被用于情感分析等任务，但其隐含表征是否真正捕捉到心理学定义的情感理论尚不明确。
AI.method: 对12种最新文本编码器的嵌入进行探针分析（probe analysis），将其作为特征输入，分别在三种经典情感框架下完成词级和句级的回归与分类任务；并在词级评估中采用语义数据泄露防护技术提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 最新开源指令感知编码器在词级情感任务中表现媲美甚至优于专有模型；而任务微调和专有编码器在句级情感分类中效果最佳；同时提供了隐空间表征及其情感线索的定性分析。
AI.conclusion: 文本编码器的情感表征能力高度依赖于模型类型与任务层级（词/句），开源指令感知模型在词级已具强竞争力，但句级仍需任务适配或专有优化。

title: Physics-Grounded Disentangled Flow Modeling for Brain Disease Progression Trajectory
summary: Forecasting longitudinal brain lesion evolution is critical for disease monitoring and treatment planning. Existing approaches typically learn a direct mapping from a baseline image to a future observation, without explicitly modeling the physical mechanisms underlying the lesion progression. Such an entangled modeling of structural deformation and image intensity variation limits physical plausibility, model generalization, and interpretability. To address this, we propose PDF, a Physics-grounded Disentangled Flow matching framework for longitudinal brain disease forecasting. We explicitly decompose the longitudinal modeling of lesion growth into two processes, each learned by a dedicated flow matching network: morphology evolution, which captures lesion growth and structural deformation; and intensity evolution, which models signal changes driven by variations in lesion concentration. To enforce physics-grounded constraints, we introduce a PDE-regularized loss based on lesion growth dynamics, that enforces a diffusion-reaction-advection formulation for morphological evolution. Experiments on three public longitudinal datasets spanning diverse brain diseases demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, validating the effectiveness of the disentangled modeling framework and physics-grounded learning design. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/jhuldr/PDF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理机制的解耦流匹配框架PDF，用于预测脑部病变的纵向演化，通过分别建模形态变化和信号强度变化，并引入PDE正则化损失，提升了模型的物理合理性、泛化性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接学习基线图像到未来图像的映射，未显式建模病变进展背后的物理机制，导致物理合理性差、泛化能力弱和可解释性低。
AI.method: 提出PDF框架，将病变演化解耦为形态演化（结构变形）和强度演化（信号变化）两个过程，各自由独立的流匹配网络建模；并设计基于扩散-反应-对流PDE的正则化损失约束形态演化。
AI.result: 在三个公开纵向脑病数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了解耦建模与物理引导学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦建模结合物理约束能显著提升脑病变预测模型的合理性、泛化性与可解释性，为医学影像纵向分析提供了新范式。

title: A Cognition-Emotion-Personality Framework for Modeling Human-Like Awareness and Behavior in Emergency Evacuations
summary: Agent-based evacuation simulations are widely used to study crowd behavior during emergencies, but many models rely on assumptions such as perfect event awareness, complete exit knowledge, and fully rational decision-making. This paper presents an extended evacuation framework that integrates cognitive, emotional, social, and personality-related mechanisms into a unified model of human behavior under uncertainty. The framework incorporates a dynamic event-awareness mechanism based on a continuous Event Certainty Level, a memory-based representation of exit knowledge subject to acquisition, forgetting, and recall, a continuous fear model in which panic emerges as a high-intensity state, and an OCEAN-based personality representation. Neuroticism is explicitly integrated into the emotional model, influencing fear generation, escalation, social contagion, and recovery. Behavioral heterogeneity is further captured through individualized decision thresholds that affect responses to perceived risk. The framework is evaluated through simulation experiments examining the effects of spatial familiarity, memory robustness, decision sensitivity, emotional dynamics, and personality variation. Results show that cognitive, emotional, and personality-driven processes substantially influence evacuation dynamics, reducing evacuation efficiency and generating realistic crowd phenomena such as delays, confusion, injuries, and socially influenced behaviors. The proposed framework provides a more realistic representation of human behavior in emergency evacuations and supports systematic investigation of the interactions between cognition, emotion, personality, and crowd dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合认知、情绪、社会与人格机制的扩展型疏散仿真框架，以更真实地模拟人在不确定性下的应急行为。
AI.motivation: 现有基于智能体的疏散模型常假设人群具备完全事件感知、出口知识和理性决策能力，缺乏对真实人类行为复杂性的刻画。
AI.method: 构建了一个统一框架，包含连续事件确定性水平的动态事件感知机制、基于记忆的出口知识建模（含获取、遗忘与回忆）、连续恐惧模型（恐慌为高强状态）、OCEAN人格模型，并将神经质维度嵌入情绪系统，影响恐惧生成、传播与恢复；同时引入个体化风险响应决策阈值。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明，认知、情绪与人格因素显著降低疏散效率，并能复现延迟、混乱、受伤及社会影响等真实群体现象。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提升了应急疏散仿真中人类行为的真实性，支持对认知-情绪-人格-群体动力学交互关系的系统性研究。

title: MALOQ: Massively Accelerated Learning of Operators for Quantum Transport
summary: Machine-learned (ML) operator models can be trained to predict density functional theory (DFT) Hamiltonian/density matrices at significantly reduced computational cost, thus extending electronic-structure calculations to previously unfeasible scales. Here, we introduce MALOQ (Massively Accelerated Learning of Operators for Quantum Transport), an application built to train on and predict electronic-structure matrices for systems made of few to 100k atoms, described by large basis sets, and covering a wide range of atomic elements. Based on a state-of-the-art, SO(2)-equivariant backbone architecture, MALOQ provides (i) custom data-processing kernels to handle high-rank Hamiltonian matrix data and (ii) a scalable edge-wise distribution of atomic graph(s). Trained on the largest molecular Hamiltonian datasets available today, it reduces time-per-epoch by over 30% compared to a molecule-wise-distributed framework, and enables inference on material graphs of arbitrary size. We demonstrate scalable training and inference for 3,000-12,000 atoms on the Alps supercomputer, up to 192 GPUs and 256 GPUs, respectively.

AI.tldr: MALOQ是一种用于量子输运的机器学习算子模型，基于SO(2)-不变架构，支持大规模电子结构矩阵预测，显著提升训练与推理效率。
AI.motivation: 降低密度泛函理论（DFT）计算的高昂成本，扩展电子结构计算至数万原子尺度。
AI.method: 提出MALOQ框架，采用SO(2)-equivariant骨干网络，集成定制化高阶哈密顿矩阵数据处理核与边级原子图分布式策略。
AI.result: 在现有最大分子哈密顿数据集上训练，单轮训练时间减少超30%，支持任意尺寸材料图的推理；在Alps超算上实现3,000–12,000原子、最多256 GPU的可扩展训练与推理。
AI.conclusion: MALOQ为大规模量子输运模拟提供了高效、可扩展的机器学习算子建模新范式。

title: CMSL: Constructive Multi-Sequence Learning for Recommendation Systems
summary: Sequence learning has emerged as the promising paradigm in recommendation systems, surpassing traditional Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRM) by capturing the temporal nuances of user behavior. However, current state-of-the-art architectures operate under a limiting analogy: they treat user history as a monolithic chronological sequence like a sentence in a Large Language Model (LLM). We observe a fundamental divergence between natural language and recommendation data: unlike the linear, logical flow of text, user history is inherently multi-faceted. A user's journey is a fragmented reflection of diverse interests, resulting in much weaker coherence between items than is found in LLM training data. This lack of structural unity leads to context pollution. In single-sequence modeling, unrelated behaviors compete for the same attention budget. This "noisy" signal dilutes the model's focus, effectively capping its ability to discern high-intent patterns from background activity. To address this, we propose Constructive Multi-Sequence Learning (CMSL), a paradigm shift from passive sequence ingestion to active "context engineering" that constructs multiple coherent sequences in latent space. CMSL leverages a learnable Sequence Construction Module to disentangle user history into "pure" thematic strands, followed by a linear attention mechanism to efficiently model these strands at scale. CMSL has been deployed across ranking and retrieval tasks and across four major surfaces at Meta.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Constructive Multi-Sequence Learning（CMSL），通过将用户历史解耦为多个主题一致的隐式序列，并采用线性注意力建模，以缓解单序列建模中的上下文污染问题，在Meta多场景推荐任务中落地验证。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单序列建模的推荐方法将用户行为类比为自然语言句子，但用户历史具有多面性、碎片化和弱连贯性，导致注意力机制受噪声干扰、高意图模式难以识别。
AI.method: 提出CMSL框架：1）可学习的序列构建模块（Sequence Construction Module）在隐空间中将原始用户序列解耦为多个主题纯度高的子序列；2）采用线性注意力机制高效建模多序列。
AI.result: CMSL已在Meta四大业务场景的排序与召回任务中部署，显著提升推荐效果。
AI.conclusion: 多序列主动构造优于单序列被动建模，CMSL通过‘上下文工程’提升了序列推荐对用户复杂兴趣的建模能力。

title: LAMP: Long-Horizon Adaptive Manipulation Planning for Multi-Robot Collaboration in Cluttered Space
summary: Multi-robot manipulation requires jointly reasoning about contact formations, robot motions under coupled dynamics, and collision avoidance. Systematically searching over this large space is difficult and becomes increasingly intractable as the number of robots grows, the task horizon lengthens, or the scene becomes more cluttered. Existing approaches therefore either learn to solve the problem end-to-end via reinforcement learning or restrict planning to a simpler surrogate problem, such as planning object motions while learning short-horizon contact primitives. However, neither paradigm scales to the problem instances we target: longhorizon multi-robot manipulation in extremely dense environments. In this paper, we propose a Long-horizon Adaptive Manipulation Planning (LAMP) framework with two planners that enable tractable search over the full coupled space by combining a learned generative manipulation model: a LAMPA* planner that systematically searches over the coupled objectrobot space, and LAMP-Lazy: a lazy planner that enables real-time replanning through deferred evaluation. Experiments in challenging simulated environments demonstrate that our approach solves complex long-horizon tasks in highly cluttered environments that prior methods cannot handle.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种长时域自适应操纵规划（LAMP）框架，通过结合学习的生成式操纵模型与两种新型规划器（LAMPA*和LAMP-Lazy），在高度密集环境中高效求解多机器人长时域协同操纵问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以扩展到长时域、多机器人、高密度环境下的协同操纵任务，因其联合搜索空间巨大且计算不可行。
AI.method: 提出LAMP框架，包含LAMPA*（系统搜索耦合的物体-机器人空间）和LAMP-Lazy（延迟评估实现实时重规划）两种规划器，并结合学习的生成式操纵模型。
AI.result: 在挑战性仿真环境中验证了该方法能解决先前方法无法处理的复杂长时域、高密度多机器人操纵任务。
AI.conclusion: LAMP框架显著提升了多机器人长时域操纵的可扩展性与实用性，为高密度场景下的协同操作提供了新范式。

title: Evolution Fine-Tuning: Learning to Discover Across 371 Optimization Tasks
summary: Would experience designing faster GPU kernels also help close in on a long-standing open mathematical conjecture? Large Language Models (LLMs) integrated into evolutionary search have recently produced state-of-the-art solutions on optimization tasks, including open mathematical conjectures, GPU kernel design, scientific law discovery, and combinatorial puzzles. To achieve this, prior work applied search scaffolds to one target task at a time, so every new problem is approached from scratch and the experience accumulated during search is discarded once the model finishes its attempt. This leaves the capability of iteratively evolving a solution (e.g., knowing which part to mutate and how, deciding when to backtrack) entirely in the scaffold rather than in the model itself. Whether the model itself could acquire this capability and reuse it across different tasks has been largely unexamined. To address this, we introduce Evolution Fine-Tuning (EFT), a mid-training paradigm that teaches LLMs to evolve solutions across tasks by converting evolutionary search trajectories into supervision. We construct Finch Collection, a 156K-trajectory dataset spanning 10 domains and 371 optimization tasks, and fine-tune open-source LLMs from 2B to 9B parameters. Empirically, EFT confers cross-task generalization: across 22 held-out tasks, our models surpass their base counterparts by 10.22% on average. Furthermore, when paired with test-time RL, our model matches state-of-the-art performance on two circle-packing tasks and outperforms its base-model counterpart on the Erdős minimum-overlap problem. EFT thus serves as a "practice phase" for general-purpose discovery agents that do not solve new problems from scratch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出进化微调（EFT）方法，使大语言模型能跨任务学习进化搜索能力，通过构建涵盖10个领域的15.6万条进化轨迹数据集Finch Collection进行训练，在多个优化任务上显著提升泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的进化搜索方法每次针对单一任务从头开始，无法复用搜索经验；模型本身未被训练出通用的进化能力，该能力完全依赖外部搜索框架。
AI.method: 提出进化微调（EFT）范式，将多任务进化搜索轨迹转化为监督信号，构建跨领域、多任务的Finch Collection数据集（156K轨迹，覆盖10个领域、371个优化任务），对2B–9B参数开源LLM进行微调。
AI.result: 在22个预留任务上平均提升10.22%；结合测试时强化学习后，在两个圆排列任务上达到SOTA，在Erdős最小重叠问题上优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: EFT使LLM具备跨任务进化能力，为其作为通用发现智能体提供了可迁移的‘练习阶段’，不再需要为每个新问题从零求解。

title: PolicyGuard: A Dialogue-Grounded Sub-Agent Verifier for Policy Adherence in LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents handle user requests on behalf of organizations through tool calls and must follow the company policies stated in their system prompts. Prior work approaches this as a safeguarding problem -- external checks that block non-compliant agent actions. We argue that policy adherence is a broader problem: real workflows unfold across many turns, require explicit user confirmation and prerequisite reads, and hinge on the content of the dialogue rather than on any single argument value. Meeting this bar requires (i) full conversation context, (ii) self-reasoning over the policy and the current dialogue, and (iii) conversation-specific remediation that guides the agent's next turn -- three capabilities that prior safeguard work has often underestimated. We introduce POLICYGUARD, a sub-agent verifier that shares the agent's view of the dialogue, reasons over the policy in context, and provides actionable feedback for the agent's next turn. On tau^2-BENCH airline across three vendors (GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Pro) with four trials per setting, POLICYGUARD improves PASS4 by +12.0 / +6.0 / +12.0 pp. Per-call analyses show POLICYGUARD achieves higher policy-violation recall while blocking roughly half as often as argument-level guards.

AI.tldr: 本文提出POLICYGUARD，一种面向多轮对话的LLM代理政策合规性验证子代理，通过结合完整对话上下文、策略自推理与对话特定修复反馈，显著提升政策遵循能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将政策遵循视为单步工具调用的外部拦截问题，忽视了真实业务流程中多轮交互、用户确认、前置阅读及对话内容依赖等复杂需求。
AI.method: 提出POLICYGUARD子代理，与主代理共享对话视图，在完整上下文中对政策进行自推理，并生成面向下一轮动作的可执行反馈（如提示补充确认或重读条款）。
AI.result: 在tau^2-BENCH航空任务基准上，POLICYGUARD使GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Pro的PASS4指标分别提升12.0 / 6.0 / 12.0个百分点；每轮分析显示其政策违规召回率更高，且拦截频率约为传统参数级守卫的一半。
AI.conclusion: 政策遵循需建模为基于全对话上下文的动态推理与引导过程，POLICYGUARD验证了该范式的有效性与实用性。

title: ML-Powered LDAP Reconnaissance Detection using Weak Supervision
comment: to appear in Proceedings of the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
summary: Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) is a protocol that allows users to query and modify Active Directory (AD) data. By default, all users have read access to all AD data through LDAP, making it a common initial tool for reconnaissance when a threat actor first compromises an identity. To capture threat actors early in the reconnaissance phase, we developed two machine learning frameworks to detect LDAP reconnaissance: an ML classifier to predict malicious LDAP queries and an ML-based data-mining method to extract malicious query signatures. By correlating LDAP queries with endpoint detections, the first framework uses weak supervision to label a massive dataset and classify LDAP queries as malicious or benign. For immediate deployment, a second technique was developed on top of this approach to employ a rigorous statistical hypothesis-testing framework for mining novel, malicious LDAP signatures. While this weakly supervised approach is limited compared with manual human labeling, it is more practical for this use case because it leverages large-scale automated corpus construction, reducing costs and time. Ultimately, both the LDAP classifier and the ML-based LDAP signature mining method achieved performance benchmarks, with the classifier achieving up to a 65\% True Positive Rate (TPR) on the holdout set while limiting false positives, and mined signatures demonstrating 81.48\% field precision with CrowdStrike's Managed Detection and Response team.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种机器学习框架，用于检测LDAP侦察行为：一是基于弱监督的LDAP查询分类器，二是基于统计假设检验的恶意LDAP签名挖掘方法。
AI.motivation: LDAP默认允许所有用户读取Active Directory数据，常被攻击者用于初始侦察，因此需在侦察阶段早期检测威胁行为。
AI.method: 第一种方法使用弱监督学习，通过关联LDAP查询与端点检测来大规模自动标注并分类LDAP查询；第二种方法在此基础上，采用严格的统计假设检验框架挖掘新型恶意LDAP签名。
AI.result: LDAP分类器在保留集上达到最高65%的真阳性率（TPR）且控制假阳性；挖掘出的签名在CrowdStrike团队实际应用中达到81.48%的现场精度。
AI.conclusion: 该弱监督方法虽不如人工标注精确，但更实用、高效，适用于大规模自动化场景，并在真实环境中验证了有效性。

title: R$^2$-Searcher: Calibrating Retrieval and Reasoning Boundaries for Agentic Search
summary: Recent search agents for multi-hop reasoning often fail by either retrieving incomplete evidence or reasoning over irrelevant portions of the retrieved content, leading to a retrieval-reasoning boundary shift. We propose R$^2$-Searcher, a novel framework that explicitly explores and calibrates the retrieval and reasoning boundaries via fine-grained, query-token-guided evidence modeling and post-retrieval reflection. Specifically, R$^2$-Searcher: (1) constructs fine-grained reasoning contexts by extracting precise facts from retrieved content based on query token semantics (e.g., subjects, actions, temporal markers, and degree modifiers), thereby guiding the attention of search agent; (2) introduces a retrieval reflection mechanism that evaluates and corrects boundary deviations after each retrieval step, guiding the generation of improved queries grounded in the extracted reasoning contexts; and (3) employs an end-to-end reasoning-reflection-guided reinforcement learning algorithm, R$^2$PO, which jointly optimizes both boundaries through a tree-based exploration of reasoning regions and reflections. Our method significantly enhances the quality of both retrieval and reasoning, establishing an iterative loop where retrieval and reasoning mutually enhance each other. Extensive experiments on seven complex multi-hop QA benchmarks demonstrate that R$^2$-Searcher significantly outperforms state-of-the-art agentic search methods in answer accuracy and retrieval-reasoning quality. Ablation studies further confirm the critical role of retrieval-reasoning boundary calibration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出R²-Searcher框架，通过细粒度查询词引导的证据建模和检索后反思机制，显式校准检索与推理边界，提升多跳问答中检索与推理的协同质量。
AI.motivation: 现有多跳推理搜索代理常因检索证据不全或在无关内容上推理，导致检索-推理边界偏移。
AI.method: R²-Searcher包含三部分：(1) 基于查询词语义（如主语、动作、时间标记等）从检索内容中提取精确事实，构建细粒度推理上下文；(2) 引入检索反思机制，在每次检索后评估并修正边界偏差，生成更优查询；(3) 设计端到端的R²PO强化学习算法，通过树状推理区域探索与反思联合优化双边界。
AI.result: 在七个复杂多跳QA基准上显著超越现有最优搜索代理方法，提升答案准确率与检索-推理质量；消融实验验证了边界校准的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: R²-Searcher建立了检索与推理相互增强的迭代闭环，有效解决检索-推理边界偏移问题，为多跳推理搜索提供了新范式。

title: SPACE: Swarm Pheromone Fields for Adaptive Collision-Aware Exploration
summary: Massive robot swarms can explore unknown environments quickly, but adding robots eventually stops helping. Doorways and dense traffic create congestion, increasing inter-robot contacts and reducing the value of each additional robot. We study this safety-efficiency tradeoff for ground swarms of tens to hundreds of robots. We present SPACE, Swarm Pheromone Fields for Adaptive Collision-Aware Exploration. Inspired by ant foraging, SPACE maintains a shared environmental field with an attractive frontier pheromone, a repellent explore pheromone, and a fast robot-density field. Coordination is decentralized and mediated through this field. We evaluate SPACE on real building floorplans, namely sixteen home layouts from the HouseExpo dataset and eight campus floors from the KTH dataset, with swarms of up to two hundred and fifty-six robots. SPACE lies on the empirical Pareto frontier. It attains the lowest inter-robot contact rate at every congested swarm size, four to seventeen times fewer than a greedy nearest-frontier planner, while keeping coverage time within about two percent of that near time-optimal planner. The results indicate that, at this scale, coordination mainly improves safety rather than coverage time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPACE算法，通过仿生信息素场实现大规模地面机器人集群的自适应避碰探索，在保证覆盖率的同时显著降低机器人间碰撞率。
AI.motivation: 大规模机器人集群在探索未知环境时存在安全与效率的权衡问题：增加机器人数量会因门道和密集交通导致拥堵，从而增加碰撞并削弱新增机器人的价值。
AI.method: 提出SPACE（Swarm Pheromone Fields for Adaptive Collision-Aware Exploration）方法，基于蚁群觅食启发，构建包含前沿吸引信息素、探索排斥信息素和快速机器人密度场的共享环境场，实现去中心化协调。
AI.result: 在HouseExpo（16个家庭布局）和KTH（8个校园楼层）真实平面图上验证，256台机器人规模下，相比贪心最近前沿规划器，机器人间接触率降低4–17倍，覆盖率时间仅增加约2%。SPACE处于实证帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: 在数十至数百台机器人的规模下，协调机制主要提升安全性而非缩短覆盖时间；SPACE在高密度场景中实现了最优的安全-效率平衡。

title: AB-RAG: Adaptive Budgeted Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Reliable Question Answering
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become the standard way to ground large language models in external knowledge, yet most systems retrieve a fixed number of passages for every question regardless of its difficulty. This wastes computation on easy questions, starves hard ones, and gives no signal for when a generated answer can be trusted. With a growing share of question answering systems built on top of commercial language model APIs, a method that can decide how much to retrieve, and how far to trust its own answers, without retraining the underlying model, is of clear practical value. This paper presents AB-RAG (Adaptive Budgeted Retrieval-Augmented Generation), a training-free and backbone-agnostic framework that generates an answer, estimates its confidence from a combination of three signals, and then decides whether to stop or to retrieve more evidence, subject to a fixed retrieval budget. The estimator combines the model's own certainty, the agreement between the answer and the evidence, and the variance of the retrieval scores. For models that expose token probabilities the certainty signal is read directly; for closed APIs it is approximated by self-consistency, so the method works without access to model internals. Across three backbones and two datasets, the central result is that the confidence estimate reliably separates correct from incorrect answers on every backbone, reaching a clean split of 57.6% against 0% Exact Match between high- and low-confidence answers on a factoid dataset. The adaptive policy improves accuracy on capable backbones, and the study reports its negative and nuanced findings honestly, including a confidence signal that proved unsuitable for short answers and a retrieval signal whose sign was found and corrected through measurement. The entire study was carried out on a single consumer laptop with only a few dollars of API spend.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AB-RAG框架，一种无需训练、适配任意大模型的自适应检索增强生成方法，通过融合模型置信度、答案-证据一致性及检索分数方差三个信号动态决定是否继续检索，在固定预算下提升问答准确率与可信度评估能力。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统对所有问题固定检索数量，导致计算浪费或证据不足，且缺乏答案可信度信号；尤其在依赖商业API的场景下，亟需不依赖模型内部参数、免训练的自适应检索策略。
AI.method: AB-RAG为训练无关、骨干模型无关的框架：先生成答案，再基于三类信号（模型自身确定性——直接读取token概率或通过自洽性近似；答案与检索证据的一致性；检索分数方差）估计置信度，并据此动态决定是否继续检索，受总检索预算约束。
AI.result: 在三个骨干模型和两个数据集上验证，置信估计能可靠区分正确与错误答案（事实类数据集中高/低置信答案的精确匹配率分别为57.6% vs 0%）；自适应策略提升了强骨干模型的准确率；发现短答案下某置信信号失效，某检索信号符号需实测校正；全部实验仅用单台消费级笔记本和数美元API费用完成。
AI.conclusion: AB-RAG提供了一种轻量、通用、即插即用的RAG优化方案，显著提升答案可信度判别能力与资源利用效率，验证了免训练自适应机制的可行性与实用价值。

title: Obliviate: Erasing Concepts from Autoregressive Image Generation Models
summary: The widespread adoption of generative AI models has intensified concerns about misuse, including the creation of unsafe or disturbing imagery. To mitigate such issues, several concept erasure approaches have been proposed to remove harmful content from multimodal generative models. Yet concept erasure for autoregressive image generation remains largely unexplored, despite the growing relevance of these models in recent trends toward unified multimodal architectures. In this work, we fill this gap by introducing Obliviate, a guidance-based concept erasure method for autoregressive image generation. Our method builds on three key design choices: KL-based supervision over visual token distributions, trajectory-level updates over full autoregressive rollouts, and aligned visual prefixes for stable target construction. We evaluate Obliviate on three state-of-the-art autoregressive text-to-image models, Liquid, Emu3-Gen, and Janus-Pro, covering the erasure of explicit content, graphic violence, and branded imagery. Obliviate consistently outperforms current alternatives, reducing nudity on the defensive RAB benchmark from 91.58 to 3.15 while preserving overall model utility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Obliviate，一种面向自回归图像生成模型的概念擦除方法，通过KL监督、轨迹级更新和对齐视觉前缀，在多个先进模型上显著降低有害内容（如裸露、暴力）生成率，同时保持模型效用。
AI.motivation: 自回归图像生成模型在统一多模态架构中日益重要，但其概念擦除研究仍属空白，亟需有效方法防止有害内容生成。
AI.method: 提出Obliviate方法，包含三方面设计：基于KL散度的视觉token分布监督、全自回归轨迹级别的参数更新、以及对齐的视觉前缀用于稳定目标构建。
AI.result: 在Liquid、Emu3-Gen和Janus-Pro三个SOTA自回归文生图模型上验证，Obliviate将RAB防御基准中的裸露率从91.58%降至3.15%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Obliviate为自回归图像生成模型提供了高效、稳定的概念擦除方案，兼顾安全性与模型实用性，填补了该领域方法论空白。

title: SurgVLA-Bench: Towards Evaluating Vision-Language-Action Models for Laparoscopic Surgical Robotics
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models represent a promising direction for embodied intelligence in surgical robotics. Despite the prevalence of VLA benchmarks for general robotics, standardized evaluation platforms specifically designed for surgical contexts remain absent. To address this limitation, we present SurgVLA-Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating VLA models in laparoscopic surgical robotics. Leveraging the SurRoL simulation platform, we construct a hierarchical task taxonomy ranging from atomic actions to complete surgical procedures, complemented by a multi-dimensional evaluation framework assessing action accuracy and semantic consistency. We then systematically evaluate two representative paradigms, including autoregressive models such as OpenVLA, and flow matching models such as $π_{0}$, $π_{0.5}$, and SmolVLA. Our experiments show that autoregressive models tend to excel in semantic understanding, while flow matching models often achieve higher task precision but may face generalization trade-offs. However, even the best-performing models remain far from satisfactory, as the constrained endoscopic field of view, restricted viewing angles, and frequent occlusions persist as fundamental physical bottlenecks. The code and data are available at https://github.com/VCL-HNU/SurgVLA

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向腹腔镜手术机器人视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的综合基准SurgVLA-Bench，基于SurRoL仿真平台构建分层任务体系与多维评估框架，并系统评测了自回归与流匹配两类主流VLA模型，揭示其在语义理解与动作精度上的权衡及受限视野等物理瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA基准多面向通用机器人，缺乏专用于外科手术场景的标准化评估平台，亟需针对腹腔镜手术特殊挑战（如狭窄视野、遮挡等）构建专用基准。
AI.method: 提出SurgVLA-Bench：基于SurRoL仿真平台构建涵盖原子动作到完整术式的分层任务分类体系；设计兼顾动作准确性与语义一致性的多维评估框架；系统评测OpenVLA（自回归）与π₀、π₀.₅、SmolVLA（流匹配）等代表性模型。
AI.result: 自回归模型语义理解更强，流匹配模型任务精度更高但泛化性受限；所有模型在受限视野、视角受限和频繁遮挡等物理约束下表现仍远未达临床要求。
AI.conclusion: SurgVLA-Bench填补了外科VLA模型评估空白，揭示当前模型的核心瓶颈在于手术环境固有物理限制，而非单纯算法缺陷，为后续研究提供基准与方向。

title: Towards Improved Anomaly Detection for Cloud Cybersecurity via Graph Neural Networks
comment: to appear in the 5'th Workshop on Rethinking Malware Analysis (WoRMA)
summary: Detecting security threats in an organization's cloud computing environment has become necessary due to the increased reliance on cloud infrastructure. Logging of all cloud computing events enables investigation into any incidents after they are detected. Automated detection of threats using the logs based on heuristics or anomaly detection could result in a high false positive rate due to its relatively static nature. In this article, we present an industrial case study of a self-supervised learning method using graph neural networks applied to AWS CloudTrail logs to surface suspicious events for analyst review. The model produces an anomaly score for each event and dynamically adapts to changes in the organization without requiring periodic retraining. Based on our experiments across five organizations, the proposed model produced substantially fewer alerts than a domain expert rule-based baseline in almost all cases, reducing alert volumes to approximately 1 per hour from thousands generated by traditional methods. We note that this evaluation covers only flagged events, and false negatives cannot be estimated from the current data; findings should therefore be interpreted as a practical deployment study offering insights into real-world constraints rather than a fully validated detection system. We discuss these limitations and the requirements for extending the approach to other cloud environments as future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络的自监督学习方法，用于分析AWS CloudTrail日志以动态检测可疑事件，显著降低误报率，实现实时、免重训练的威胁检测。
AI.motivation: 传统基于启发式或异常检测的日志分析方法因静态特性导致高误报率，难以适应云环境动态变化，亟需更灵活、低噪的自动化威胁检测方案。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习结合图神经网络（GNN）建模AWS CloudTrail日志中的事件关系图，为每个事件生成动态更新的异常分数，无需周期性重训练。
AI.result: 在五个组织的实际部署中，该模型将告警量从传统方法的每小时数千条降至约1条，显著优于专家规则基线；但仅评估了检出事件（无法估计漏报率）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法是一种面向工业场景的实用化部署方案，验证了动态自适应日志分析的可行性，但受限于漏报不可评估及云平台泛化能力，需进一步扩展与验证。

title: Reproducing FACTER: Fairness via Conformal Thresholding and Prompt Repair
comment: 29 pages. Accepted by Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2026. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=4BPFVex4EM. Code: https://github.com/oscar-omlf/facter-repr
summary: Fayyazi et al. (2025) recently proposed FACTER, a model-agnostic framework designed to jointly enforce fairness and statistical coverage in LLM-based recommendation through conformal thresholding and iterative prompt repair. In this work, we conduct a reproducibility study of the FACTER framework across diverse architectures and dataset sparsity levels, evaluating both the original open-ended generation task and a constrained re-ranking extension. Under the strict reproduction, we observe a divergence in recommendation utility, which we trace to underspecified target-set evaluation in the original study. We then use the constrained re-ranking setting to evaluate FACTER when the candidate set is fixed, and introduce a static Fair Zero-Shot baseline to isolate the contribution of the iterative prompt repair loop. Our analysis shows that FACTER consistently reduces adaptive-threshold violation counts, but that these reductions are not consistently reflected under the fixed threshold or in global fairness metrics. In the constrained ranking setting, static fairness instructions achieve comparable semantic-parity outcomes to FACTER's dynamic repair loop, suggesting that the additional online repair mechanism provides limited benefit in this formulation. All code and reproduction artifacts are available at https://github.com/oscar-omlf/facter-repr.

AI.tldr: 本文对FACTOR框架进行了可复现性研究，发现在严格复现条件下其推荐效用存在偏差，主要源于原研究中目标集评估不明确；进一步分析表明，在约束重排序场景下，静态公平性指令即可达到与FACTOR动态提示修复相近的效果，说明其迭代修复机制在此设定下增益有限。
AI.motivation: 验证FACTOR框架的可复现性，并探究其在不同模型架构和数据稀疏度下的公平性与覆盖性表现，同时厘清其核心机制（如迭代提示修复）的实际贡献。
AI.method: 在多种模型架构和数据稀疏度下复现FACTOR；引入约束重排序设定以固定候选集；设计静态Fair Zero-Shot基线以剥离迭代提示修复的影响；采用自适应阈值违规计数、固定阈值评估及全局公平性指标进行多维分析。
AI.result: FACTOR能稳定降低自适应阈值违规次数，但在固定阈值和全局公平指标下效果不一致；在约束重排序场景中，静态公平指令与FACTOR在语义公平性上表现相当。
AI.conclusion: FACTOR的核心机制——迭代提示修复——在约束重排序设定下并未带来显著额外收益，其公平性提升可能更多依赖于基础提示设计而非在线修复过程；原研究中目标集评估的模糊性影响了结果可比性。

title: Understanding LLM Intervention Explanations in Multi-Party Human-Robot Interaction
comment: Accepted for 2026 36th IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly embedded in social robots to support natural group interactions, yet their role in complex multi-party settings remains underexplored. In particular, it is unclear how LLM-driven robots decide when and why to intervene in group conversations. This paper investigates the intervention explanations generated by an LLM-based orchestrator in a multi-party interaction involving three human participants and two robots. We conducted a between-subjects study with 24 groups (66 university students), comparing a homogeneous condition (two robots with the same role, i.e., a mover) and a heterogeneous condition (two robots with different roles, i.e., a mover and an opposer). At each conversational turn, the LLM orchestrator decided whether to intervene and generated a textual explanation of its decision. We performed a thematic analysis of 610 intervention explanations, identifying five recurring themes. Results show that explanations are facilitation-oriented, emphasizing agreement, participation, and interaction flow. While patterns remain stable across conditions, role differentiation emerges: the mover supports coordination, whereas the opposer drives goal-oriented interventions. These findings contribute to explainable AI by characterizing how LLM-driven systems justify intervention decisions in real-time, multi-party human-robot interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）驱动的社交机器人在三人一组的人机交互中如何实时决定干预并生成解释，通过对比同质与异质机器人角色配置，分析610条干预解释，发现解释以促进互动为主，且不同角色机器人干预逻辑存在分化。
AI.motivation: LLM正越来越多地嵌入社交机器人以支持自然的群体交互，但其在复杂多方交互中的干预决策机制尚不明确，尤其缺乏对‘何时及为何干预’的可解释性研究。
AI.method: 设计了一项被试间实验，24组共66名大学生参与，比较两种机器人配置：同质（两个‘推动者’角色）与异质（一个‘推动者’+一个‘反对者’）；LLM作为协调器在每轮对话中决定是否干预并生成文本解释；对610条干预解释开展主题分析。
AI.result: 识别出五类反复出现的干预解释主题；所有解释均以促进协作（如促成共识、鼓励参与、维持流程）为导向；角色差异显著：推动者侧重协调支持，反对者侧重目标导向干预；干预模式跨条件稳定。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了LLM驱动系统在实时多边人机交互中干预决策的可解释逻辑，为可解释AI提供了实证基础，并强调角色设计对干预策略的影响。

title: Knowing in Advance When an Evolutionary Outer Loop Will Not Help: A Pre-Registered Cheap-Baseline Screening Rule
summary: We introduce a pre-registered screening rule that decides, before any implementation, whether an evolutionary / population / lifecycle outer loop over neural-network parameters or structure is worth building. Such outer loops cost 10^2-10^3x their gradient inner loop, yet whether they beat a cheap single-shot alternative is usually discovered only after the expense is paid. Our rule computes, at a Phase-0 gate, a single number: the recovery R = s/G, the best single-shot gradient/curvature statistic's gain s divided by the best gain G of any cheap method evaluated, and prescribes skipping the outer loop when R >= 90%. We validate the rule on a within-lab series of pre-registered outer-loop bets (two analyzed cases plus a disclosed file drawer): in both analyzed cases a static or single-shot computation captured the effect on the project's own metric, the gate fired (R approximately 1.0 in both cases; approximately 0.95 under a stricter metric on one), and the outer loop was abandoned, including one case where a companion factorial decomposition localizes the apparent win to a static substrate change with the evolutionary lifecycle contributing no detectable gain. On one project the gate cost about 50-70 GPU-hours and screened out an estimated 400+ GPU-hours (first cell only) plus weeks of implementation, a 6-8x saving. The rule is prospectively falsifiable: a task with R < 90% where the outer loop still fails to beat single-shot would refute it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预注册的筛选规则，用于在实施前判断是否值得构建神经网络参数或结构的进化/群体/生命周期外循环；该规则基于恢复率R=s/G，在R≥90%时跳过外循环，实证显示可节省大量计算资源与时间。
AI.motivation: 外循环（如进化算法）计算成本高昂（内循环的10^2-10^3倍），但其是否优于廉价单次方法往往只能事后验证，造成资源浪费。
AI.method: 提出Phase-0筛选门，计算恢复率R = s/G（最优单次梯度/曲率统计增益s除以任意廉价方法最优增益G），当R≥90%时跳过外循环；并在预注册实验中验证。
AI.result: 在两个已分析案例中，R≈1.0（一例在更严格指标下≈0.95），外循环被成功跳过；其中一例通过因子分解确认外循环无实质增益；单项目节省约400+ GPU小时及数周实现时间（6–8倍效率提升）。
AI.conclusion: 该筛选规则具备可证伪性（R<90%却仍失败即证伪），为高成本外循环提供了低成本、可预测的前置决策工具。

title: FedLAS: Feature-Modulated Bidirectional Label Smoothing for Neural Network Calibration
summary: Deep Neural Network (DNN) classifiers suffer from poor calibration when their softmax outputs (predictive confidence) deviate from the empirical likelihoods. This manifests itself as either overconfident incorrect predictions or under-confident correct predictions. Label smoothing (LS) enhances model calibration by introducing entropy regularization during training through redistributing probability mass from the ground-truth label to the remaining classes. LS, including Margin-based LS (MbLS), have restrictive assumptions: they rely on predefined, uniform smoothing rules and only tackle overconfidence. In reality, samples exhibit diverse characteristics, such as difficulty/ambiguity, that interact with the evolving nature of the model being trained. In training, samples may have various degrees of under- or overconfidence. To overcome this, a mechanism that identifies the specific confidence state of each sample and determines the appropriate degree of smoothing in each training step is needed, tailoring the adjustment to the individual sample. We propose FedLAS: Feature-Modulated Bidirectional Label Smoothing, a plug-and-play algorithm for label smoothing-based losses. In FedLAS, we introduce a Feature Norm-based Confidence Indicator (NCI) to control smoothing and a Bidirectional Calibration Gating (BCG) module to detect both over and under-confidence. Our algorithm can be integrated with LS and MbLS based losses when applied to standard DNNs, enhancing performance. Extensive experiments on standard and fine-grained high-resolution vision benchmarks show that FedLAS consistently improves calibration compared to modern baselines, reducing Expected Calibration Error (ECE) and Adaptive ECE while maintaining Top-1 accuracy. Code: github.com/nadarasarbahavan/FEDLAS

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedLAS，一种基于特征调制的双向标签平滑方法，通过引入特征范数置信度指示器（NCI）和双向校准门控（BCG）模块，动态识别样本的过/欠置信状态并自适应调整平滑强度，从而提升DNN分类器的校准性能，同时保持准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有标签平滑方法（如LS、MbLS）采用预设的均匀平滑规则，仅缓解过置信问题，无法适应样本多样性（如难易度、模糊性）及训练过程中动态变化的置信状态（可能同时存在过置信与欠置信）。
AI.method: 提出FedLAS算法：1）设计基于特征范数的置信度指示器（NCI）量化每个样本的置信状态；2）构建双向校准门控（BCG）模块，分别检测并校正过置信与欠置信；3）将二者融合进标签平滑类损失中，实现样本级自适应双向平滑。
AI.result: 在标准与细粒度高分辨率视觉基准上，FedLAS显著降低Expected Calibration Error（ECE）和Adaptive ECE，同时维持Top-1准确率，优于现有校准方法。
AI.conclusion: FedLAS是一种即插即用、样本自适应的双向标签平滑框架，有效解决了传统标签平滑方法假设僵化、单向校正的局限，提升了模型校准能力而不牺牲精度。

title: When Summaries Distort Decisions: Information Fidelity in LLM-Compressed Financial Analysis
summary: Financial decision-makers face more information than they can directly inspect, making context compression necessary. Yet when large language models (LLMs) compress financial source material, they can alter the investment judgment supported by the original source. We frame this problem as information fidelity: compression loses fidelity when it changes the decision induced by the source. In agentic systems, such losses may recur across intermediate steps and amplify throughout the decision process. Across financial filings and earnings-call transcripts, we find that LLM-based compression can produce fluent and factually plausible compressed contexts that nevertheless alter downstream decisions. We analyze two diagnostic patterns associated with fidelity loss: decontextualization, where salient evidence is retained but separated from the caveats and contextual qualifiers needed for correct interpretation, and model dependency, where different compressors expose different views of the same source. We then propose Agentic Context Compression, which generates multiple candidate compressions and audits their disagreements against the original source. Our results suggest that financial compression should be evaluated not only by efficiency or factuality, but also by its ability to preserve decision-relevant context.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLM）在压缩金融文本时导致的信息保真度损失问题，指出压缩虽流畅可信，却可能改变基于原文本的投资决策；提出‘代理式上下文压缩’方法，通过生成多个压缩候选并审计其分歧来提升决策相关上下文的保留能力。
AI.motivation: 金融决策者面临海量信息，需压缩上下文，但现有LLM压缩方法可能改变原始材料支持的投资判断，损害信息保真度，尤其在多步代理系统中会累积放大。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Context Compression方法：生成多个LLM压缩候选，并审计其彼此间及与原文间的分歧；在财报和财报电话会议文本上进行实证分析，识别保真度损失的两类诊断模式——去语境化和模型依赖性。
AI.result: 发现LLM压缩常产生看似合理但实际改变下游决策的摘要；识别出‘去语境化’和‘模型依赖’两类保真度损失模式；所提方法能有效缓解此类损失，提升决策一致性。
AI.conclusion: 金融文本压缩不应仅以效率或事实准确性为评价标准，更应关注其对决策相关上下文的保真能力；代理式上下文压缩为提升金融AI系统可靠性提供了新路径。

title: Multimodal Graph RAG for Long-range Visually Rich Document Understanding
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are widely applied to visual document understanding. However, comprehending long documents remains an issue by the limited context window. Though recent multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (MMRAG) can address this challenge by retrieving relevant pages. It still struggles with the visual question answering (VQA) requiring holistic comprehension of a document. To cope with this, knowledge graph (KG) that summarizes global knowledge of a document can provide an effective solution. However, most existing LLM-based KG construction methods handle only the language modality, leaving the automatic creation of multimodal KGs (MMKGs) for visually rich documents largely unexplored. In this paper, we introduce a multimodal graph-based RAG approach to tackle this problem. Existing LLM-based KG methods evaluate the QA performance relying on indirect evidence such as comprehensiveness, diversity, empowerment, and so on. The lack of annotated datasets for comprehensive document-level VQA poses a significant challenge to effective model evaluation. To overcome this limitation, we also introduce a new benchmark, DLVQA (document-level VQA), which provides reference summaries and corresponding supporting facts for global document-level questions. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms existing MMRAG or KG-based approaches on multi-hop QA/VQA benchmarks and DLVQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态知识图谱（MMKG）的图增强检索生成方法，用于解决长文档视觉问答（VQA）中全局理解困难的问题，并构建了首个面向文档级VQA的基准DLVQA。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs受限于上下文窗口，难以理解长文档；MMRAG虽能检索相关页面，但难以支持需全局理解的VQA；而当前LLM构建的知识图谱多为单模态，缺乏面向富视觉文档的自动多模态知识图谱（MMKG）构建方法；同时缺乏文档级VQA的标注评测基准。
AI.method: 提出一种多模态图增强RAG方法：利用多模态信息自动构建文档级MMKG，作为全局结构化知识支撑检索与推理；并设计DLVQA基准，包含文档级问题、参考摘要及支持事实，用于直接评估全局VQA能力。
AI.result: 在多跳QA/VQA和自建DLVQA基准上，该方法显著优于现有MMRAG和单模态KG方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态知识图谱可有效提升长文档VQA的全局理解能力；DLVQA为文档级视觉问答提供了首个可衡量的评估标准，推动了该方向的发展。

title: MTD-Map: Single-Stage Long-Term LiDAR Map Maintenance Framework via Mixture Transition Distribution
summary: While robust map maintenance has advanced significantly, existing studies have focused on specific tasks, especially dynamic object removal or change detection. In this paper, we take a holistic view of the map maintenance problem and propose MTD-Map, a single-stage framework that handles both dynamic object removal and change detection without separate task-specific modules. MTD-Map employs an explicit representation that compactly encodes the direction and duration of occupancy transitions through Mixture Transition Distribution (MTD) modeling. We develop a recursive MTD formulation that encodes historical occupancy patterns into an augmented state to capture high-order temporal dependencies. Furthermore, a stability-driven adaptive strategy balances noise suppression with the preservation of quasi-static structures. Extensive experiments verify that MTD-Map robustly removes dynamic objects and achieves competitive change detection performance, subsequently reducing computational costs. Our project page is available at: https://taeyoung96.github.io/mtd_map/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTD-Map，一种单阶段框架，统一处理动态物体移除与变化检测，通过混合转移分布（MTD）建模显式编码占用状态的时序变化，并引入递归MTD与稳定性驱动策略，在保持准静态结构的同时抑制噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有地图维护研究多聚焦于特定子任务（如动态物体移除或变化检测），缺乏对问题的整体性建模；本文旨在构建一个统一、高效的单阶段框架以同时解决这两类任务。
AI.method: 提出MTD-Map框架：1）采用混合转移分布（MTD）显式建模体素占用状态的转移方向与时长；2）设计递归MTD公式，将历史占用模式编码为增强状态以捕获高阶时间依赖；3）引入稳定性驱动的自适应策略，在去噪与保留准静态结构间取得平衡。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，MTD-Map能鲁棒地移除动态物体，并在变化检测任务中达到具有竞争力的性能，同时降低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: MTD-Map验证了统一建模动态物体移除与变化检测的可行性与有效性，其基于MTD的显式时序建模和稳定性自适应机制为鲁棒地图维护提供了新思路。

title: How Anthropomorphic Language Impacts Public Perceptions of AI
summary: Public discourse about artificial intelligence (AI) often uses anthropomorphic language: language that attributes human capabilities and characteristics to the system. This practice has been criticized for setting misleading expectations, inflating claims, and fueling hype around AI, which may distort public understanding of AI and impact policy priorities. We study the effects of anthropomorphic framing by comparing changes in participants' perceptions (N=815) when reading passages with and without anthropomorphic language, designed to reflect realistic public-facing AI discourse. We further examine whether these effects differ across two types of AI technologies -- large language models and recommendation systems -- and measure changes in perceptions of AI across several dimensions that are prominent in current public discourse. In a separate condition using a text that explicitly discusses the dangers of AI, we show that individuals' views of AI can shift in response to reading a text; yet in the main conditions of the experiment, where we compare anthropomorphic and non-anthropomorphic descriptions, we find that whether the text uses anthropomorphic language does not substantially affect participants' perceptions of AI. Our results indicate that any immediate effects on public opinions of AI are modest, although they leave open the possibility that anthropomorphic language could have an effect in naturalistic settings, or over gradual, continued exposure.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验探究拟人化语言对公众AI认知的影响，发现短期内拟人化表述并未显著改变参与者对AI的感知。
AI.motivation: 拟人化语言在AI公共讨论中普遍存在，但可能误导公众、夸大宣传并助长炒作，进而扭曲公众对AI的理解并影响政策制定。
AI.method: 采用对照实验设计，招募815名参与者，比较阅读含/不含拟人化语言文本后的AI感知变化；区分大语言模型与推荐系统两类技术，并在不同维度测量AI感知；另设一个明确讨论AI风险的对照条件。
AI.result: 主实验中，拟人化与非拟人化描述对参与者AI感知无显著差异；但在明确讨论AI危险性的文本条件下，参与者观点确实发生改变。
AI.conclusion: 拟人化语言在短期内对公众AI看法影响有限，但长期、自然情境下的累积效应仍需进一步研究。

title: SemDynReg: Semantics-Guided Deformation Regularization for Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as an efficient approach for rendering dynamic scenes in a wide range of 3D applications. However, existing deformation field-based approaches largely lack explicit object-level modeling, often resulting in inconsistent Gaussian deformations within individual objects and unwanted coupling between different objects. To address this limitation, we introduce a semantics-guided framework that enforces dynamic regularization at the object level, aiming to achieve spatially consistent object-wise deformation. Specifically, we first extract segmentation masks using the Segment Anything Model (SAM) and derive semantic features from input images. An object-ID map is then constructed via feature relevance matching with a predefined object dictionary. Guided by this object-ID map, we identify the pixel-wise top-k contributing Gaussians for each object and impose consistency regularization on their deformation parameters, including position, scale, and rotation. Unlike prior methods that learn deformation fields without explicit object-level constraints, our approach incorporates semantic cues to guide deformation behavior at the object level. Experimental results demonstrate that our semantics-aware regularization improves object-level deformation consistency and outperforms baseline methods in rendering quality, achieving higher PSNR and SSIM and lower LPIPS in dynamic 3DGS rendering. Our project page is available at https://dyn-reg-3dgs.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语义引导的可变形3D高斯点绘（3DGS）框架，通过引入对象级动态正则化，提升动态场景中各物体的形变一致性，显著改善渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于形变场的方法缺乏显式的物体级建模，导致单个物体内部高斯形变不一致、不同物体间形变耦合。
AI.method: 利用SAM提取分割掩码并提取语义特征；通过特征相关性匹配构建物体ID图；据此定位每物体对应的像素级top-k高斯，并对其位置、尺度和旋转参数施加一致性正则化。
AI.result: 在动态3DGS渲染中实现了更一致的物体级形变，PSNR、SSIM更高，LPIPS更低，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义引导的物体级正则化能有效提升形变一致性与渲染质量，为动态场景建模提供了新思路。

title: The Complexity Ceiling Benchmark: A Multi-Domain Evaluation of Sequential Reasoning Under Depth Scaling
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to the 1st Workshop on Combining Theory and Benchmarks (CTB), CTB@ICML 2026
summary: We introduce the Complexity Ceiling Benchmark (CCB), a controlled evaluation of how language-model reasoning decays as the number of required sequential steps grows. CCB fixes the semantic content of a task and varies only its depth N in {5,...,50} across three structurally distinct regimes: grounded spatial state-tracking, abstract symbolic pointer manipulation, and transitive relational inference. Across 6,000 trials over five frontier and open-weight LLMs we find a consistent pattern of geometric per-step decay with widely separated domain ceilings: on the first two regimes the strongest models retain pd>0.92 across N=50; on the third every model collapses by N=5, with the best model's 50%-success horizon at H0.5~4.7 steps despite pd=0.863. A trace-level metric (TFBC) shows that 14.5% of correct answers across the benchmark are reached via incorrect intermediate reasoning. Forced verbose state-tracking does not move the ceiling (McNemar p=1.000), and the mean step at which reasoning first diverges, k*, predicts within-domain accuracy better than parameter count. CCB and the geometric decay model together reduce a model's long-horizon reasoning profile to one interpretable number per task family.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了复杂性上限基准（CCB），用于评估语言模型在推理步骤增加时的性能衰减，并发现不同任务类型存在明显不同的性能上限。
AI.motivation: 为了系统地评估语言模型在长链推理任务中随步骤数增加而出现的性能衰减现象，作者设计了一个控制变量的基准测试，以分离任务深度与语义内容的影响。
AI.method: 构建了 Complexity Ceiling Benchmark（CCB），在三个结构迥异的任务类型（空间状态跟踪、符号指针操作、传递关系推理）上，固定语义内容，仅改变推理步数 N（5 到 50），并在五种前沿及开源大语言模型上进行 6000 次实验；引入 trace-level 指标 TFBC 分析推理路径，并检验强制详述状态追踪等干预措施的效果。
AI.result: 观察到跨模型和任务的几何级每步衰减规律；前两类任务中最强模型在 N=50 时仍保持 pd>0.92，而第三类任务所有模型在 N=5 时即崩溃，最佳模型的 50% 成功率对应步数 H0.5≈4.7；TFBC 显示 14.5% 正确答案源于错误中间推理；强制详述不提升上限；首次推理偏离步数 k* 比参数量更能预测领域内准确率。
AI.conclusion: CCB 揭示了语言模型长程推理能力存在本质性、任务依赖的‘复杂性上限’，且该上限可用单一可解释数值（如 H0.5 或 k*）刻画，为模型能力评估提供了新范式。

title: DLR: Zero-Inference-Cost Latent Residuals for Low-Rank Pre-Training
comment: Includes appendix, 6 figures and 11 tables. Code available at https://github.com/nanguoyu/DLR
summary: Large language models have driven recent progress in language and multimodal AI, yet pre-training them at scale is prohibitively expensive. Low-rank pre-training, which factorizes each weight matrix into a rank-r product to reduce both parameters and FLOPs, is a promising response but typically lags full-rank training in quality. We propose Duplicated Latent Residual (DLR), a training-only, parameter-free, foldable plug-in for low-rank pre-training. DLR augments the standard low-rank output Bz with a fixed structured residual alpha/sqrt(K) * Expand_K(z) that replicates each latent coordinate K = ceil(d_out/r) times across the output. With alpha fixed, DLR adds zero learnable parameters per layer; after training, it is absorbed into the up-projection in closed form, B* = B + alpha/sqrt(K) R^T, so deployment parameter count, FLOPs and memory match the underlying low-rank backbone exactly. Across LLaMA models from 60M to 7B parameters, DLR strengthens low-rank pre-training on C4 validation perplexity in most settings, with the clearest gains at 130M and above; folded checkpoints transfer cleanly to supervised fine-tuning on standard benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Duplicated Latent Residual（DLR）的训练时插件，用于提升低秩预训练大模型的质量，无需增加参数，在训练后可无缝折叠进原有结构，保持部署效率。
AI.motivation: 大规模预训练大语言模型成本高昂，低秩预训练虽能降低参数与计算量，但性能常逊于全秩训练，亟需一种高效、无额外参数开销的改进方法。
AI.method: DLR在标准低秩输出Bz上添加一个固定结构化残差项alpha/sqrt(K) * Expand_K(z)，将每个隐变量重复K次；该残差不含可学习参数，训练后可解析地吸收进上投影矩阵B* = B + alpha/sqrt(K) R^T。
AI.result: 在LLaMA系列模型（60M–7B）上的C4验证困惑度显著优于基线低秩训练，尤其在130M及以上规模效果更明显；折叠后的检查点在监督微调任务中迁移性能良好。
AI.conclusion: DLR是一种轻量、即插即用、零参数开销的低秩预训练增强方法，兼顾训练质量与部署效率，为大模型高效预训练提供了新思路。

title: Human-in-the-Loop Nugget Annotation for Accountable LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluations
summary: Evaluating AI/Agentic system outputs reliably requires human judgment, but how one incorporates the human determines whether one gets a real quality signal or expensive theater. The common approaches either accidentally anchor human experts (leading to rubber-stamping) or leave them unsupported in high-variance labeling tasks. We present a prototype annotation tool that implements a different division of labor: humans identify what information matters (nuggets), while LLMs handle high-volume matching of nuggets to system outputs. This plays to each party's strengths while maintaining genuine human oversight. We describe the three-phase workflow, key design decisions, and how exported nugget banks integrate with automated judges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型人工标注工具原型，通过将人类专家聚焦于识别关键信息（nuggets），而由大语言模型（LLM）负责大规模匹配nuggets与系统输出，从而在保证真实人工监督的同时提升评估效率与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI/智能体系统输出评估中，人工判断常因锚定效应或缺乏支持而在高方差标注任务中失效，导致评估结果失真或成本过高。
AI.method: 设计并实现一个三阶段工作流的原型标注工具：人类定义关键信息单元（nuggets），LLM执行大规模匹配，nugget库导出后用于构建自动化评估器。
AI.result: 该方法能有效发挥人类与LLM各自优势——人类把控语义核心，LLM承担重复性匹配——显著提升评估质量与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 将人类角色从逐条评分转向语义要素定义，结合LLM规模化处理能力，可实现更可靠、更高效、更具解释性的AI系统评估范式。

title: Learning Transferable Dynamics Priors from Action to World Modeling
summary: We study action-conditioned world modeling as a scalable way to learn transferable dynamics priors for robot learning. By pretraining a model to predict how actions drive visual scene evolution, the resulting world model captures reusable interaction dynamics beyond appearance-level video generation. Concretely, we pretrain a multi-view interactive base diffusion world model, A2World, on large-scale robot manipulation data with real action annotations. We validate the learned dynamics priors from two complementary perspectives. First, we adapt A2World into a task- or scene-specialized real-world simulator, A2World-sim, whose long-horizon rollouts support simulator-based policy evaluation and scalable what-if analysis by replacing real-robot rollouts with world model rollouts. Second, starting from the same pretrained weights, we adapt A2World into a video-action joint prediction model, A2World-policy, that predicts actions under visual and instruction conditioning. Experiments across simulation benchmarks and real-robot settings demonstrate that action-conditioned world model pretraining yields transferable dynamics priors that benefit both simulator-centric and policy-centric robot learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出A2World，一种基于多视角交互的扩散世界模型，通过在大规模真实机器人操作数据上预训练，学习动作驱动的视觉场景演化规律，从而获得可迁移的动力学先验。该模型支持构建专用仿真器（A2World-sim）用于策略评估与what-if分析，也可微调为视频-动作联合预测模型（A2World-policy）用于指令驱动的动作生成，在仿真和真实机器人任务中均展现出显著迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 为提升机器人学习中动力学建模的泛化性与可迁移性，需超越表观视频生成，学习动作与场景演化的因果动力学关系。
AI.method: 提出动作条件化世界模型A2World，采用多视角扩散架构，在含真实动作标注的大规模机器人操作数据上进行预训练；随后分别微调为仿真器A2World-sim（支持长程rollout与策略评估）和策略模型A2World-policy（支持视觉与指令联合的动作预测）。
AI.result: 在仿真基准和真实机器人任务中验证了A2World预训练所得动力学先验具备强迁移能力，显著提升仿真器构建效率与策略学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 动作条件化世界模型预训练是一种有效途径，可学习到可复用、可迁移的动力学先验，统一支撑仿真驱动与策略驱动两类机器人学习范式。

title: DistilledGemma: Balanced Efficiency-Accuracy for Person-Place Relation Extraction from Multilingual Historical Articles
comment: The Conference and Labs of the Evaluation Forum (CLEF) 2026 - HIPE Challenge
summary: We present DistilledGemma, an efficient and accurate system for the HIPE-2026 shared task on person-place relation extraction from multilingual historical newspaper articles in English, German, and French. Our approach adopts a three-stage knowledge distillation pipeline designed to balance classification accuracy with computational efficiency. In the first stage, we systematically explored prompt engineering strategies across eight large language models to identify the most effective reasoning architecture for this challenging task. In the second stage, we applied supervised fine-tuning (SFT) via QLoRA to a Gemma 4 26B A4B teacher model, leveraging its strong multilingual capabilities to generate silver-standard chain-of-thought traces across the training corpus. In the final stage, we performed response-level distillation to transfer these learned reasoning patterns into a compact Gemma 4 E2B student model. In the official evaluation, our team WHEREAMI ranked 3rd on the standard test set with an accuracy profile mean score of 0.688, and 2nd on the binary test set with a mean score of 0.8156. Notably, by distilling knowledge from the 26B teacher to the 2.3B student, we preserved strong reasoning capabilities while reducing the deployed model size to approximately 2.3B effective parameters; the LoRA adapters used during training were merged into the student for inference. This configuration ranked 2nd in the balanced efficiency-accuracy profile across both the standard and binary test sets. These results demonstrate that knowledge distillation provides a practical and scalable solution for historical document processing, achieving competitive performance without excessive computational cost.

AI.tldr: DistilledGemma 是一个面向 HIPE-2026 多语言历史报纸中人地关系抽取任务的高效准确系统，采用三阶段知识蒸馏流程，在保持高精度的同时显著降低模型规模。
AI.motivation: 解决多语言历史报纸中人地关系抽取任务的挑战性问题，兼顾分类精度与计算效率。
AI.method: 构建三阶段知识蒸馏流程：1）在8个大语言模型上系统探索提示工程以选定最优推理架构；2）使用QLoRA对Gemma-4-26B教师模型进行监督微调，生成银标准思维链标注；3）将推理模式蒸馏至轻量级Gemma-4-E2B学生模型，并合并LoRA适配器用于推理。
AI.result: 在HIPE-2026官方评测中，WHEREAMI团队位列标准测试集第3（均分0.688）、二元测试集第2（均分0.8156），且在平衡效率与精度的综合排名中位居第2；学生模型仅2.3B参数，显著压缩教师模型（26B）规模。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏是处理历史文档的实用且可扩展方案，能在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低计算开销。

title: BackTranslation2.0 -- A Linguistically Motivated Metric to Assess Sign Language Production
summary: Sign Languages (SLs) are the primary means of communication for millions of deaf individuals, yet existing evaluation metrics for generated SL remain simplistic and poorly aligned with human judgements. We introduce BackTranslation2.0, a linguistically grounded evaluation metric for text-to-sign translation that moves beyond naïve backtranslation. Our approach adopts an agentic framework in which a deterministic pipeline orchestrates a suite of specialised tools to assess four scoring dimensions - grammatical correctness, phonological accuracy, motion fluency, and generation fidelity - aligned with human rater assessments. Tool outputs are not treated independently: a set of large language model (LLM)-based cross-referential comparison modules evaluates consistency across tools and checks outputs against linguistic expectations, enabling structured reasoning over grammatical, phonological, and motion-level evidence. Final dimension scores are computed through deterministic weighted formulas over validated tool outputs. To validate BackTranslation2.0, we introduce and evaluate on a British Sign Language (BSL) dataset rated in a human rater study across the same quality dimensions, following a protocol developed in collaboration between linguists and deaf experts, benchmarking against six baseline metrics. Our method demonstrates strong correlation with human judgements across all dimensions, providing a more comprehensive, interpretable, and linguistically principled evaluation framework for sign language production systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BackTranslation2.0，一种面向文本到手语翻译的、语言学驱动的多维评估指标，通过工具协同与LLM交叉验证，在语法正确性、语音准确性、动作流畅性和生成保真度四方面实现与人工评分高度一致。
AI.motivation: 现有手语生成评估指标过于简单，与人类判断偏差大，缺乏语言学基础和多维细粒度评价能力。
AI.method: 构建基于确定性流水线的智能体框架，集成多个专用工具分别评估四个维度，并引入LLM驱动的跨工具一致性校验模块，结合语言学约束进行结构化推理，最终以加权公式生成各维度得分。
AI.result: 在英国手语（BSL）人工标注数据集上验证，BackTranslation2.0在所有四个质量维度上均与人类评分呈现强相关性，显著优于六种基线指标。
AI.conclusion: BackTranslation2.0提供了更全面、可解释且符合语言学原理的手语生成评估新范式，推动手语技术向真实可用方向发展。

title: Process Advantage Signal Shaping: A Paradigm-Agnostic Middleware for Process-Supervised RL in LLM Reasoners
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a default recipe for process-supervised reinforcement learning of LLM reasoners, and dense process supervision -- via learned process reward models (PRMs) or on-policy-distillation KL signals -- is a common way to densify its otherwise weak outcome reward. Layering such a step-level signal on top of GRPO's group-standardized advantage, however, exposes three structural pathologies: \emph{channel contamination} between the pooled process, outcome, and format streams at group standardization; \emph{resolution mismatch} between the granularity of the process signal and the granularity of the logical decisions being credited; and a \emph{cumulative trap} by which GRPO's return-to-go sum surfaces either length inflation or truncated exploration depending on the sign regime of the signal. We propose \textbf{PASS} (\emph{Process Advantage Signal Shaping}), a compact middleware that sits between any scalar step-level process signal and GRPO's clipped surrogate and addresses the three pathologies in turn: \emph{Advantage Fusion} standardizes the three streams independently within each group, \emph{Chunk-by-Value} derives value-homogeneous chunks from the signal itself and broadcasts credit within each chunk, and \emph{Divide-Length} converts the cumulative objective into an average-value-density score. We validate PASS across two domains and two process-signal paradigms -- a learned PRM on mathematical reasoning and an on-policy-distillation KL signal (with a generalized variant) on multi-hop question answering -- and under two group-standardization operators. In every regime PASS delivers a consistent pass@1 gain over the corresponding GRPO baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PASS方法，解决GRPO在过程监督强化学习中因密集过程信号引入的三大结构性问题：通道污染、分辨率不匹配和累积陷阱，并在多个任务和信号范式下验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: GRPO在使用密集过程监督信号（如PRM或KL信号）时存在通道污染、分辨率不匹配和累积陷阱三大结构性问题，限制其性能提升。
AI.method: 提出PASS（Process Advantage Signal Shaping）中间件，包含Advantage Fusion（独立标准化三类信号流）、Chunk-by-Value（基于信号值划分同质化信用块）、Divide-Length（将累积目标转为平均价值密度）三个模块。
AI.result: 在数学推理（PRM信号）与多跳问答（KL信号）两个领域、两种过程信号范式及两种group-standardization算子下，PASS均稳定提升pass@1指标。
AI.conclusion: PASS是一种轻量、通用且即插即用的改进方案，能系统性修复GRPO中密集过程监督带来的结构性缺陷，显著提升LLM推理能力。

title: ReGuide: From Test-Time Guidance to Self-Improving Diffusion Policies
summary: Behavior-cloned diffusion policies are expressive but remain vulnerable to covariate shift: small deviations from demonstrated states can compound into task failure. Existing methods address this either by expanding the training distribution through expert corrections or synthetic augmentation, or by steering a frozen policy at test time with guidance from a learned model. The former can be expensive or assumption-dependent, while the latter discards the corrected trajectories after execution. We introduce ReGuide, a self-improving framework that treats guided rollouts as reusable on-policy recovery data. ReGuide first uses Phase-Conditioned Guidance (PCG) to generate corrective rollouts: it constructs phase-specific latent targets, applies guidance only in the drifted-but-recoverable regime, and guides through the estimated clean action to match the dynamics model's training distribution. Successful guided rollouts are then absorbed back into the policy through ReGuide-FT, which fine-tunes the current checkpoint, or ReGuide-FS, which retrains from scratch on the augmented dataset; the two can also be composed and iterated. On Robomimic Can, Square, Transport, and Tool Hang, ReGuide improves base-policy success by $1.3$--$7.7\times$, outperforms LPB in the test-time-only setting, and matched-data ablations show that the gains come from guided recovery data rather than additional rollouts alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReGuide框架，通过复用引导式轨迹作为在线策略恢复数据，解决行为克隆扩散策略在协变量偏移下的脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 行为克隆扩散策略虽表达能力强，但易受协变量偏移影响，小的状态偏差可能导致任务失败；现有方法或需昂贵专家干预，或丢弃引导轨迹，缺乏对纠正数据的有效再利用。
AI.method: ReGuide包含Phase-Conditioned Guidance（PCG）生成可复用的纠正轨迹，并通过ReGuide-FT（微调）或ReGuide-FS（从头训练）将成功轨迹融入策略；PCG在可恢复区域施加相位条件引导，确保动作匹配动力学模型训练分布。
AI.result: 在Robomimic多个任务（Can、Square、Transport、Tool Hang）上，ReGuide将基线策略成功率提升1.3–7.7倍，优于仅测试时引导的LPB方法，消融实验证明提升源于引导恢复数据而非单纯增加轨迹数量。
AI.conclusion: ReGuide实现了扩散策略的自我改进，通过闭环式复用引导轨迹显著增强鲁棒性与泛化能力，为行为克隆提供了一种高效、可扩展的在线适应新范式。

title: Fairness Attacks on Recommender Systems
summary: The unfairness of recommender systems has become a topic of concern due to its significant social and ethical implications. Although existing works have shown the effectiveness of attacks on the performance of recommender systems (e.g., promotion and demotion attack), the study of fairness attacks on recommender systems remains largely under-explored. To this end, we propose a novel structure-aware reinforcement learning-based fairness attack method designed to exacerbate the unfairness of target recommender systems. Specifically, we first employ a graph-based structure encoder to model the structural dependencies among the generated fake user-item interactions and the original user-item interactions. Then, we model the sequential dependency of the injected fake items using a recurrent neural network. Based on the learned structure-aware and sequence-aware representations of the fake user and item, the item selection policy attentively decides the next injected fake item. Since the target recommender system may employ fairness-aware training and leverage the user's sensitive attribute information, such as gender, we further designed a gender selection policy to decide the gender of the entire fake user profile. Both the item selection and gender selection policy are learned jointly in our proposed method. Finally, experimental results on four types of target recommendation models and two real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed attack method in exacerbating the unfairness of recommender systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构感知强化学习的公平性攻击方法，通过生成具有特定性别属性的虚假用户-物品交互，加剧推荐系统的不公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注推荐系统性能攻击（如提升/降低排名），但对公平性攻击的研究仍不足；同时，目标推荐系统可能采用公平性感知训练并利用敏感属性（如性别），因此需设计能操纵敏感属性的攻击方法。
AI.method: 提出一种结构感知的强化学习框架：使用图编码器建模虚假与真实交互间的结构依赖，用RNN建模虚假物品注入序列依赖；设计联合学习的物品选择策略和性别选择策略，以生成带特定敏感属性的虚假用户档案。
AI.result: 在四种推荐模型和两个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法能显著加剧目标推荐系统的不公平性。
AI.conclusion: 所提结构感知强化学习攻击方法能有效破坏推荐系统的公平性，揭示了当前公平性增强机制的脆弱性，并为构建更鲁棒的公平推荐系统提供了警示与依据。

title: CORE: Common Outcome Regularities from Action-Free Visual Demonstrations for Robot Manipulation
summary: Robot imitation learning often relies on costly robot demonstrations, while abundant action-free visual demonstrations, such as human videos, are difficult to use because they lack robot-executable actions and suffer from embodiment gaps. We propose CORE, a policy learning framework that extracts Common Outcome Regularities from visual demonstrations. Rather than transferring explicit actions across embodiments, CORE exploits a key observation: although successful trajectories for the same task can be diverse, their terminal states often share stable object configurations, spatial relations, and contact constraints. CORE first trains a terminal outcome encoder with contrastive and auxiliary temporal objectives, then aggregates successful terminal embeddings into visual goal prototypes, and finally injects these prototypes as global goal conditions into robot policies. Compared with language instructions, visual goal prototypes provide more concrete geometric and physical constraints for task completion. Across Meta-World, RoboTwin 2.0, and real-world manipulation, CORE improves the average success rate of the corresponding policy backbones by up to +3.9, +11.1, and +17.0 percentage points, respectively, and outperforms text-conditioned variants under the evaluated settings.

AI.tldr: CORE是一种机器人模仿学习框架，通过从人类视频等视觉演示中提取终端状态的共性规律（如物体配置、空间关系、接触约束），构建视觉目标原型来指导机器人策略，从而克服动作缺失和具身差异问题，在多个基准上显著提升成功率。
AI.motivation: 机器人模仿学习依赖昂贵的机器人演示，而大量无动作的人类视频难以利用，因其缺乏可执行动作且存在具身差异。
AI.method: CORE框架首先通过对比学习和辅助时序目标训练终端结果编码器，然后聚合成功轨迹的终端嵌入形成视觉目标原型，最后将这些原型作为全局目标条件注入机器人策略中。
AI.result: 在Meta-World、RoboTwin 2.0和真实世界操作任务上，CORE分别将对应策略主干的成功率平均提升+3.9、+11.1和+17.0个百分点，并优于文本条件化变体。
AI.conclusion: CORE证明了利用视觉演示中的终端状态共性规律进行机器人策略学习的有效性，为低成本、跨具身的模仿学习提供了新范式。

title: Can OCR-VLMs Read Devanagari? A Stress-Test Benchmark and Post-Correction Study
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Benchmark and code released
summary: OCR systems, ranging from classical engines to specialised OCR vision-language models (OCR-VLMs) and frontier multimodal LLMs, report strong results on English and Chinese document benchmarks, yet their behaviour on Indic scripts is largely uncharacterised. We benchmark ten systems on Devanagari (Hindi): classical EasyOCR; open VLMs (Qwen2.5-VL-3B, Qwen3-VL-8B, olmOCR-7B); specialised OCR-VLMs (DeepSeek-OCR, Unlimited-OCR); and frontier closed models (Gemini 2.5 Flash, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5, Mistral OCR), across four synthetic degradation conditions and 300 real printed scans. We report four findings. First, on clean rendered text all ten cluster within chrF++ 91 to 98, so synthetic text does not separate them. Second, under degradation the specialised OCR-VLMs are the most fragile: DeepSeek-OCR suffers rare but catastrophic repetition failures (outputs up to 71 the reference length) that wreck its corpus mean even though its median is the best of any system, which is why we report median and catastrophic-rate instead of the mean. Third, on real scans nine of the ten systems collapse (EasyOCR falls from chrF++ 93.6 to 58.3) and the field spreads across a 76-point range, so synthetic renders badly overstate Devanagari quality. Fourth, strong English OCR does not predict Indic OCR: GPT-5.5 drops to chrF++ 58.5 (tying classical EasyOCR) and olmOCR-7B, the model behind olmOCR-Bench, falls to 40.5, while the open Qwen3-VL-8B (75.2, runnable on a single 24 GB GPU) beats GPT-5.5 and approaches Mistral; Gemini and Claude lead at 86.3 and 82.2. An error taxonomy separates surface errors (numerals, punctuation) from structural ones (conjuncts, matras, nukta), and a byte-level (ByT5) post-corrector improves a cheap engine on its own error distribution (chrF++ +1.2 to +1.5) but does not transfer across engines. We release the benchmark, code, and models.

AI.tldr: 本文对十种OCR系统在印地语（天城文）上的性能进行了全面评测，发现合成文本无法有效区分系统性能，而真实扫描图像下各系统表现差异巨大；专门设计的OCR-VLMs在退化条件下易出现灾难性重复错误；英语OCR能力强并不预示印地语表现好；作者提出了错误分类法并验证了字节级后校正器的有效性与局限性，并开源了基准、代码和模型。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR系统在英文和中文文档上表现优异，但在印度文字（如天城文）上的性能缺乏系统性评估，亟需针对Indic脚本建立可靠基准。
AI.method: 在四种合成退化条件和300张真实印刷扫描图像上，评测10种OCR系统（包括经典引擎、开源VLM、专用OCR-VLM及前沿闭源多模态LLM），采用chrF++指标，引入中位数与灾难性错误率替代均值，并构建字节级ByT5后校正器及错误分类体系。
AI.result: 1）清洁渲染文本下所有系统chrF++集中在91–98，难以区分优劣；2）退化条件下专用OCR-VLM（如DeepSeek-OCR）出现罕见但灾难性的重复输出（达参考长度71倍）；3）真实扫描中9/10系统性能大幅下降（如EasyOCR从93.6降至58.3），性能跨度达76分；4）英语强OCR不迁移至印地语（如GPT-5.5仅58.5，olmOCR-7B仅40.5），而Qwen3-VL-8B（75.2）接近Mistral，Gemini和Claude领先（86.3/82.2）；ByT5后校正器提升有限（+1.2~+1.5）且不可跨模型迁移。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据严重高估Indic OCR性能，真实场景下系统鲁棒性差异极大；专用OCR-VLM存在脆弱性风险；语言能力与OCR能力解耦；需面向Indic脚本构建更贴近实际的评测基准与鲁棒建模方法。

title: Predicting Metastatic Risk from Primary Tissue Architecture via Distance-Aware Spatial Modeling
summary: Predicting the risk of distant metastasis from primary tumor tissue histology is a critical yet challenging task in computational pathology. Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) approaches can attend to subdomains in tumor regions that harbor features of metastatic cancer progression. However MIL models treat tissue patches as unordered bags, discarding the spatial layout that defines the metastatic potential. We propose that metastatic risk is inherently dictated by the geometric arrangement of the tumor microenvironment at the interface with tumor cells. Our model is designed to explicitly capture the spatial relationships between tumor cells, tumor associated fibroblasts and infiltrating lymphocytes. For this purpose, we propose Distance aware Tissue Modeling for Multiple Instance Learning(DTMf-MIL), a novel method that reinforces visual features with explicit spatial priors. By computing signed distance functions (SDF) relative to tissue phenotypes, our model learns to recognize structural signatures of metastatic risk. This geometric awareness translates directly to superior clinical performance as DTMf-MIL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods that ignore spatial layout on metastasis prediction from tissue in the primary tumor. We further validate our approach on public benchmarks, demonstrating that spatial awareness consistently improves diagnostic accuracy across diverse clinical tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DTMf-MIL的新方法，通过引入基于组织表型的有符号距离函数（SDF）来显式建模肿瘤微环境中细胞的空间几何关系，从而提升多实例学习在远处转移风险预测中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MIL方法忽略组织切片中细胞的空间布局信息，而该布局对转移风险具有关键影响；作者旨在将空间结构先验融入MIL框架以提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 提出Distance aware Tissue Modeling for Multiple Instance Learning (DTMf-MIL)，利用有符号距离函数（SDF）刻画肿瘤细胞、癌相关成纤维细胞和浸润淋巴细胞之间的空间关系，并将其作为显式空间先验融合进视觉特征学习过程。
AI.result: DTMf-MIL在原发肿瘤组织预测远处转移任务上显著优于忽略空间布局的SOTA方法，并在多个公开基准数据集上验证了其跨临床任务的泛化性和诊断精度提升。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模肿瘤微环境的空间几何结构可有效提升计算病理学中转移风险预测的性能，空间感知是改进MIL模型的关键方向。

title: Hierarchical Experimentalist Agents
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to take actions in the real world and support human decision-making, yet most agents rely on parametric knowledge, fixed post-training data, retrieval, or search. This paradigm breaks down in novel domains and for sophisticated queries that cannot be answered from prior knowledge alone. Knowing the laws of physics, for instance, does not by itself enable LLMs to answer queries or complete long-horizon tasks in a complex physical system. To address this, we introduce Hierarchical Experimentalist Agents (HExA), an in-context self-improvement framework to learn from active experimentation. HExA iteratively designs and refines query-relevant experiments, learns a reusable library of composable skills from experience, and integrates experimental evidence to answer queries or take actions. HExA is training-free, compatible with any black-box model, and does not require external supervision, oracles, or offline data. To evaluate active experimentation, we introduce Interphyre, a tool-calling benchmark built on the PHYRE 2D procedural physics environment, where agents propose interventions and test hypotheses through simulation APIs. Experiments show that current LLM agents struggle in these settings, especially on the hardest levels of Interphyre. Claude Sonnet 4.6 achieves only 2% success, while HExA improves the same model to up to 77% success. HExA also improves open-weight models and outperforms agentic baselines such as ReAct and Reflexion. Moreover, using only skills learned from easier levels and transferred without active experimentation, HExA achieves 44% success, demonstrating the reusability and generalization of its learned skills. Overall, HExA shows that learning through active experimentation can help agents discover useful knowledge, acquire reusable skills, and make efficient progress on novel long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hierarchical Experimentalist Agents (HExA)，一种无需训练、基于上下文自我改进的框架，使大语言模型能通过主动实验学习新知识、构建可复用技能库，并在物理推理等新颖复杂任务中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理依赖静态知识或检索，在面对需主动探索与推理的全新领域（如复杂物理系统）时表现不佳；缺乏从实验中动态学习和泛化的能力。
