AI.method: HExA框架通过迭代设计并优化与查询相关的实验，从经验中学习可组合的可复用技能库，并整合实验证据以回答问题或执行动作；完全在上下文中运行，不依赖训练、外部监督或离线数据；评估采用新构建的工具调用基准Interphyre（基于PHYRE物理环境）。
AI.result: 在Interphyre最难级别上，Claude Sonnet 4.6原仅达2%成功率，HExA将其提升至77%；亦显著优于ReAct、Reflexion等基线；仅用简单关卡习得技能迁移即达44%成功率，验证技能可复用性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 主动实验是提升LLM代理在新颖、长周期任务中推理与行动能力的有效路径；HExA证明了无需训练即可实现知识发现、技能积累与高效任务求解。

title: Machine-learnable Sets
summary: In this study we present a formal definition of large discrete sets having, informally, three properties: their elements are easily recognized, easily generated, and the latter tasks are easily learned from examples. The formalism is specialized to sets of binary strings and a definition of "machine-learnability" based on the existence of a bounded-complexity Boolean autoencoder that fixes the elements of the set. We present experiments where the autoencoders are implemented by nets of Boolean threshold functions. Machine-learnability is demonstrated for Rorschach patterns (that may have reversed contrast in the mirrored half), and considerably "wilder" sets whose elements are only approximately fixed by admissible autoencoders. In the second case we demonstrate a simple iteration that evolves wild sets to make them properly machine-learnable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大型离散集合（特别是二进制字符串集合）的“可机器学习性”形式化定义，基于存在有界复杂度的布尔自编码器；实验验证了该定义对Rorschach图案及更复杂的“野生”集合的有效性，并给出使其收敛为可学习集合的迭代方法。
AI.motivation: 旨在形式化刻画一类大型离散集合的结构特性——元素易识别、易生成、且能从样例中被轻松学习，从而为机器学习的理论基础提供新视角。
AI.method: 基于布尔自编码器（由布尔阈值函数构成的网络）定义“机器可学习性”，要求其能精确或近似地固定目标集合；通过构造和训练此类自编码器，并引入迭代演化方法提升近似固定效果。
AI.result: 验证了Rorschach图案等结构化集合的可学习性；发现更复杂的‘野生’集合虽不能被精确固定，但可通过简单迭代演化为可学习集合；展示了布尔自编码器在该框架下的可行性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出并验证了一种以布尔自编码器为核心的形式化可学习性定义，拓展了传统学习理论对离散结构集合的理解，并为非精确、演化式学习提供了理论支撑与实践路径。

title: Covering the Unseen: Information Demand Coverage Optimization for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) typically treats context selection as ranking chunks against a single query embedding. This assumption breaks down for complex queries, such as multi-hop or ambiguous questions, where top-k selection tends to over-cover one semantic aspect while ignoring critical sub-questions. We propose GeoRAG, which recasts context selection as Information Demand Coverage Optimization. GeoRAG builds a multi-dimensional demand distribution through diverse sub-query generation and reverse-validation weighting, then selects context by minimizing the Sinkhorn-Wasserstein distance between this demand distribution and the coverage of the selected set. The resulting demand-weighted facility-location objective is monotone submodular, giving a $1-1/e$ greedy guarantee, which we approximate with a Sinkhorn-based marginal-gain surrogate. The method is unsupervised, training-free, and retrieval-agnostic. We further show that single-point, query-proximity scorers cannot cover multi-modal demands, exposing a structural limit of ranking-based selection. On six open-domain QA benchmarks, GeoRAG improves exact match (EM) by +6.5 to +7.5 points over top-k truncation (up to +9.7 on HotpotQA and ASQA) and outperforms strong baselines including MMR, DPP, BGE-Reranker, SMART-RAG, and AdaGReS, with stable gains across context budgets and sub-query generators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoRAG，将RAG中的上下文选择建模为信息需求覆盖优化问题，通过构建多维需求分布并最小化其与所选上下文覆盖之间的Sinkhorn-Wasserstein距离来实现更全面的子问题覆盖；该方法无监督、无需训练、适配任意检索器，在多个开放域问答基准上显著超越主流基线。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG基于单查询嵌入排序选择上下文，难以应对多跳、歧义等复杂查询，易导致对某些语义维度过覆盖而忽略关键子问题。
AI.method: GeoRAG通过生成多样化子查询并结合反向验证加权构建多维信息需求分布，再以Sinkhorn-Wasserstein距离衡量需求覆盖匹配度，将上下文选择建模为需求加权的设施选址问题，并用Sinkhorn近似的边际增益进行贪心求解。
AI.result: 在六个开放域问答基准上，GeoRAG相比top-k截断提升EM指标6.5–7.5分（HotpotQA和ASQA上最高达+9.7），且稳定优于MMR、DPP、BGE-Reranker、SMART-RAG和AdaGReS等强基线。
AI.conclusion: 基于需求覆盖优化的上下文选择范式能有效缓解排名式选择在多模态信息需求下的结构性缺陷，为复杂查询提供更鲁棒、可解释的检索增强生成方案。

title: Analyzing Uncertainty in the Spatial Representation of the Kinematic Bicycle Model
summary:
Locating a vehicle and determining its orientation in an uncertain environment is a critical challenge in autonomous vehicle navigation and path planning. To address these challenges, a vehicle estimates its pose while depending on sensor data that offer noisy measurements. These uncertainties in pose quantities are expressed mathematically as a covariance matrix. The real-time computation of the covariance matrix is critical because of the non-linearity involved in the kinematic model. The challenge is thus to evaluate the evolution of the covariance matrix of a vehicle's discretized stochastic kinematics.
  The purpose of this study is to obtain a near-accurate evolution of the covariance matrix of the rear-wheel bicycle kinematic model under uncertainties in wheel displacement and steering angle. We used Taylor's series to linearize the nonlinear trigonometric functions and provided closed-form expectations of random variables with the required accuracy. Our analytical findings are in good agreement with those obtained from Monte-Carlo simulations. Our contribution is probably the first detailed closed-form presentation of the covariance matrix constituents of the vehicle under evaluation, which were previously reported either incorrectly or incompletely. These findings aid in identifying the potential and constraints of the discretized kinematic model as well as its stochastic analysis. The techniques presented here are useful for the simultaneous localization and odometry self-calibration of certain mobile robots and autonomous vehicles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于泰勒级数线性化的解析方法，用于精确推导后轮驱动自行车运动学模型在轮位移和转向角不确定性下的协方差矩阵演化，结果与蒙特卡洛仿真高度一致，是首个完整准确的闭式协方差表达。
AI.motivation: 自主车辆在不确定环境中需实时估计自身位姿，而其运动学模型具有非线性，导致协方差矩阵演化难以高效准确计算。
AI.method: 采用泰勒级数对非线性三角函数进行线性化，并给出随机变量的闭式期望表达式，从而推导出协方差矩阵的解析解。
AI.result: 得到了后轮自行车模型在轮位移与转向角不确定性下的协方差矩阵各分量的闭式表达式，结果与蒙特卡洛仿真高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该闭式协方差分析首次完整准确地刻画了离散化运动学模型的随机特性，有助于评估模型潜力与局限，支持SLAM与里程计自校准。

title: Understanding Evaluation Illusion in Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: Despite the capability of parallel decoding, diffusion large language models (dLLMs) require many denoising steps to maintain generation quality, motivating recent research on efficient decoding strategies. However, existing studies have reported inconsistent evaluation results even under seemingly identical evaluation settings, risking biased conclusions about dLLM decoding methods. To understand this evaluation concern, we conduct a rigorous evaluation of current decoding methods for dLLMs across diverse evaluation settings. Surprisingly, our analysis reveals that the ranking of decoding methods is highly sensitive to the choice of prompt templates. Single-template evaluation can lead to an illusion that decoding methods improve inference efficiency without performance degradation. Through comprehensive experiments, we find that current parallel decoding methods consistently underperform the single-token decoding baseline, failing to overcome the speed-quality trade-off. We further identify this evaluation inconsistency as the high sensitivity of parallel decoding methods to minor variations in prompt templates. Our experiments show that an effective prompt template can achieve strong evaluation results even with fewer denoising steps, markedly outperforming the marginal gain from increasing denoising steps. Beyond prompt templates, our experiments indicate that overlooked evaluation settings can also notably affect the assessment of decoding methods. Based on these findings, we propose practical guidelines for the reliable evaluation of decoding methods in dLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）解码方法评估中的严重不一致性问题，发现其性能排名高度依赖于提示模板选择，现有并行解码方法在多模板评估下普遍不如单token解码基线，并提出可靠评估的实践指南。
AI.motivation: 现有dLLM高效解码策略的评估结果不一致，可能导致错误结论，亟需厘清评估偏差根源。
AI.method: 在多样化评估设置下对当前dLLM解码方法进行严格实证分析，重点考察提示模板、去噪步数等变量的影响。
AI.result: 发现解码方法性能排序对提示模板极度敏感；单模板评估易产生虚假增益幻觉；所有并行解码方法在多模板评估中均逊于单token基线；优质提示模板的收益远超增加去噪步数。
AI.conclusion: 当前dLLM解码方法尚未真正突破速度-质量权衡；评估必须采用多模板、多设置的稳健范式；提示工程本身是提升效率的关键路径。

title: SATB-VR: Training Few-Step Video Restoration Diffusion Model using SNR-Aware Trajectory Blending
summary: While diffusion models excel in video restoration, their reliance on extensive iterative steps limits efficiency. Conversely, aggressive single-step distillation often compromises fine texture recovery. To achieve an optimal balance, we present SATB-VR, a few-step paradigm that jump-starts the denoising process via an auxiliary predictor, explicitly bypassing early low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) steps. However, naive joint training of the predictor and the denoiser inherently introduces a severe train-inference discrepancy. To resolve this, we propose the SNR-Aware Trajectory Blending (SATB) strategy. During the forward process, SATB constructs the noisy input by dynamically blending the predictor's output with the ground-truth trajectory based on the SNRs. This forces the denoiser to robustly compensate for initial prediction errors while smoothly converging to the clean data manifold. Furthermore, we introduce a Denoiser-Driven Consistency (DDC) loss, leveraging the concurrently updated denoiser as a dynamic evaluator to explicitly align internal features and boost predictor accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, under flexible few-step inference regimes (\eg, $\le 5$ steps), SATB-VR performs favorably against existing approaches on synthetic, real-world, and AIGC benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SATB-VR方法，通过引入辅助预测器与SNR感知轨迹融合策略，在少量迭代步数下实现高效且高质量的视频恢复，兼顾效率与细节重建。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在视频恢复中效果好但迭代步数多、效率低；单步蒸馏又易损失纹理细节。需在效率与质量间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出SATB-VR：1）引入辅助预测器跳过低SNR早期去噪步骤；2）设计SNR-Aware Trajectory Blending（SATB）策略，在前向过程中按SNR动态混合预测结果与真值轨迹；3）引入Denoiser-Driven Consistency（DDC）损失，利用更新中的去噪器作为动态评估器对齐特征并提升预测器精度。
AI.result: 在≤5步的灵活少步推理下，SATB-VR在合成数据、真实世界及AIGC基准上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SATB-VR有效缓解了训练-推理不一致问题，在极少迭代步数下实现了高保真视频恢复，为高效扩散模型提供了新范式。

title: PHF: Privileged Hidden Flow for On-Policy Self-Distillation
summary: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) trains a reasoning model on rollouts sampled from its own policy by matching a privileged teacher that also sees verified reference solutions. Existing OPSD objectives supervise only the output distribution, so privileged context affects training through a token-level divergence without directly supervising the internal computation that produced that distribution. We propose Privileged Hidden Flow (PHF), which additionally distills how a privileged teacher's hidden states move along the same rollout. Rather than forcing each student hidden vector to match the teacher vector at the same token position, PHF aligns token-to-token transition directions and trajectory geometry over selected generated positions. The all-layer recipe also includes an adjacent-layer relation computed from these same transitions, without pointwise hidden-state imitation. Under the same 100-step training schedule, PHF improves the Average@12 aggregate over our reproduced OPSD baseline on Qwen3-1.7B, 4B, and 8B, with observed gains of about +2.2, +1.5, and +1.7 points. The transport objective is exactly invariant to shared trajectory offsets; its local geometry term is also invariant to orthogonal transformations of transition directions. Ablations distinguish the fixed PHF recipe from pointwise hidden-state matching, single-channel transition losses, and layer-subset choices, supporting PHF as a compact hidden-flow extension to OPSD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Privileged Hidden Flow (PHF)方法，通过蒸馏特权教师模型在推理过程中的隐状态转移方向与轨迹几何结构，而非仅匹配输出分布或逐点隐状态，从而提升自蒸馏推理模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有On-policy self-distillation (OPSD)方法仅监督输出分布，无法直接引导学生模型学习教师内部计算过程；需更细粒度地利用特权上下文信息。
AI.method: PHF蒸馏特权教师在相同rollout路径上的隐状态转移方向和轨迹几何结构，包括token-to-token转移方向对齐、轨迹几何一致性建模，以及跨相邻层的关系建模，避免逐点隐状态匹配。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-1.7B/4B/8B上，PHF在相同100步训练下显著提升Average@12指标（+2.2, +1.5, +1.7），且具备对轨迹偏移和平面正交变换的不变性。
AI.conclusion: PHF是一种紧凑有效的隐流蒸馏扩展，优于点对点隐状态匹配等替代方案，为OPSD提供了更鲁棒、几何感知的内部计算监督方式。

title: Modification-Considering Value Learning for Reward Hacking Mitigation in RL
summary: Reinforcement learning agents can exploit misspecified reward signals to achieve high apparent returns while failing on the intended objective, a failure mode known as reward hacking. Existing practical defenses typically constrain policy updates to stay near a known safe reference, creating a tension between suppressing hacking and permitting legitimate improvement. We propose Modification-Considering Value Learning (MCVL), which operationalizes the theoretical idea of current utility optimization for standard value-based RL. MCVL wraps an off-policy learner and treats each incoming transition as a candidate modification: it forecasts two training paths, one that includes the transition and one that does not, and scores both with a frozen bootstrapped-return estimator derived from a learned reward model and value function. The transition is admitted only if inclusion does not decrease the score. We formalize conditions under which this filtering is both safe and permissive, and instantiate MCVL with DDQN and TD3. Across four safety-relevant gridworlds and three modified MuJoCo continuous-control tasks with diverse hacking mechanisms, MCVL mitigates reward hacking while continuing to improve the intended objective. Project website: ktolnos.github.io/mcvl/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Modification-Considering Value Learning（MCVL）的新方法，用于缓解强化学习中的奖励黑客（reward hacking）问题。MCVL通过预测每条经验转移对训练路径的影响，并仅在不降低性能评估分数时才接纳该转移，从而在保障安全性的同时允许策略合理改进。
AI.motivation: 强化学习智能体可能利用被错误设定的奖励信号实现高表观回报，却违背设计者的真正意图（即奖励黑客）。现有防御方法常限制策略更新范围以靠近已知安全参考策略，导致安全性与策略提升能力之间存在权衡。
AI.method: MCVL是一种面向标准值函数型强化学习的当前效用优化实现，它包裹一个离线策略学习器，将每个新到达的状态转移视为候选修改；通过冻结的引导回报估计器（基于学习到的奖励模型和价值函数）分别评估包含/不包含该转移的两条训练路径，并仅在包含该转移不降低得分时才接纳该转移。
AI.result: 在四个安全相关网格世界环境及三个具有多种奖励黑客机制的改进MuJoCo连续控制任务上，MCVL有效缓解了奖励黑客现象，同时持续提升了目标任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: MCVL提供了一种理论上有安全保障且实践上具可扩展性的奖励黑客防御机制，在保持策略改进能力的同时显著增强鲁棒性。

title: Monosemanticity in Recommender Systems
summary: Latent factor models such as matrix factorization are widely used in recommender systems, yet the learned embedding dimensions typically lack explicit semantic interpretation. This opacity limits transparency, explainability, and principled intervention in recommendation behavior. While sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have recently been used to extract monosemantic features from dense neural representations, standard SAEs suffer from scaling pathologies including feature splitting, feature absorption, and feature composition, which degrade interpretability as dictionary size increases. In this work, we investigate whether hierarchical sparse representations can reveal interpretable structure in collaborative filtering embeddings. We train a large-scale matrix factorization recommender system on the Amazon Fashion dataset and apply a Matryoshka Sparse Autoencoder (MSAE) to the learned embeddings. We analyze the resulting latent features through metadata alignment and LLM-generated labeling to assess semantic coherence and disentanglement. Finally, we show an intervention on a subset of gender associated latent neurons that emerged from the analysis. Our findings suggest that collaborative filtering embeddings contain recoverable hierarchical structure, and that Matryoshka training provides a principled mechanism for exposing interpretable latent factors in interaction-driven recommendation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Matryoshka稀疏自编码器（MSAE）从协同过滤嵌入中提取可解释的层次化稀疏特征，验证了推荐系统嵌入中存在可恢复的语义结构，并通过干预实验证明其可解释性与可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵分解等隐因子模型的嵌入缺乏显式语义解释，限制了推荐系统的透明性、可解释性和可控性；而标准稀疏自编码器在扩大字典规模时存在特征分裂、吸收和组合等问题，影响可解释性。
AI.method: 在Amazon Fashion数据集上训练大规模矩阵分解推荐模型，对其学习到的用户/物品嵌入应用Matryoshka稀疏自编码器（MSAE）；结合元数据对齐与大语言模型（LLM）生成标签，评估所提取特征的语义一致性与解耦性；并针对发现的性别相关神经元进行干预实验。
AI.result: MSAE成功揭示了协同过滤嵌入中的层次化语义结构；元数据对齐与LLM标注表明提取特征具有较高语义 coherence 和 disentanglement；干预实验验证了特定语义维度（如性别）可被定位与调控。
AI.conclusion: 协同过滤嵌入中蕴含可恢复的层次化语义结构；Matryoshka训练为交互驱动型推荐模型提供了暴露可解释潜在因子的原理性方法。

title: Hierarchical Policy Learning via Spectral Decomposition
summary: In this paper, we identify a semantic decomposition in robot action sequences, separating task-level motion intent from execution-level refinements. By analyzing actions in the spectral domain using the discrete cosine transform (DCT), we observe that low-frequency components capture global motion trajectories, while high-frequency components encode precise timing, alignment, and contact behaviors. Motivated by this structure, we propose Causal Spectral Policy (CSP), which models action generation as a causal coarse-to-fine process: coarse motion is predicted from observation and language, and fine corrections are generated conditionally on the realized trajectory. Across simulation and real-world evaluations, CSP consistently outperforms strong baselines on precision-sensitive manipulation tasks. Additionally, we propose human-inspired teleoperation noise injection as a data augmentation method, under which our approach demonstrates strong robustness to noisy demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频域分解的因果谱策略（CSP），将机器人动作序列分解为任务级意图和执行级细化，并利用离散余弦变换（DCT）实现粗粒度到细粒度的动作生成，在仿真与真实世界任务中均优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 观察到机器人动作序列在频域中存在语义分解结构：低频分量表征全局运动轨迹，高频分量编码精确时序、对齐与接触行为，由此启发设计一种符合该结构的生成策略。
AI.method: 提出因果谱策略（CSP），在频域（DCT）中建模动作生成：先基于观测与语言预测粗粒度动作（低频），再以实际轨迹为条件生成细粒度修正（高频）；并引入人类启发式遥操作噪声注入作为数据增强手段。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实机器人平台上，CSP在精度敏感的操作任务中持续超越强基线；且在含噪演示下表现出强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 频域分解为动作建模提供了有效结构先验，CSP通过因果、粗到细的频域建模显著提升了机器人操作的精度与鲁棒性。

title: Travel-Oriented Reasoning Large Language Model via Domain-Specific Knowledge Graphs
comment: Accepted to the Uncertainty Reasoning and Quantification in Decision Making (UDM) Workshop, KDD 2026 (To be presented in August 2026)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate broad reasoning abilities but struggle with accuracy and reliability in specialized domains such as travel, where reasoning depends on precise definitions, rules, and expert-defined conceptual frameworks, and where confident but unfounded outputs arise from a reasoning failure in which the model has not internalized the underlying domain graph rather than from missing domain knowledge alone. We propose a modular pipeline for building a travel-domain reasoning LLM grounded in an expert-designed knowledge graph (KG). Our pipeline integrates a travel KG that encodes domain entities and their relationships, a bottom-up construction procedure that walks the KG to produce multi-hop question answer (QA) pairs, a supervised fine-tuning stage that embeds the domain knowledge into a reasoning-capable LLM using the generated QA pairs as auditable reasoning traces, and a travel-domain benchmark dataset that measures the fine-tuned model's accuracy and calibration. We evaluate our approach using Qwen3-4B with LoRA adaptation. Our reasoning model achieves an $82.4\%$ exact match on the benchmark. This performance significantly outperforms the pretrained Qwen3-4B baseline at $22.4\%$. A calibration analysis decomposes the residual $17.57\%$ of errors into two distinct failure modes: an over-confident multi-label decoder that predicts both correct answers plus one spurious option on most dual-answer mistakes, and a smaller reasoning failure on single-answer questions where the supporting facts are present in the KG but the model fails to reconstruct the correct multi-hop path. This split confirms that explicit KG-grounded reasoning substantially improves the accuracy and uncertainty interpretation of LLMs in specialized domains, and isolates per-option calibration and trace-length-aware decoding as the next axes of improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于专家构建知识图谱（KG）的模块化流程，用于提升大语言模型（LLM）在旅游领域的推理准确性与可靠性；通过KG驱动的多跳问答生成、监督微调及专用评测基准，显著提升了Qwen3-4B模型在旅游推理任务上的准确率（82.4% vs 22.4%），并揭示了两类主要错误模式。
AI.motivation: LLM在旅游等专业领域推理中易产生自信但错误的输出，根源在于未内化领域知识图谱结构，而非单纯缺乏领域知识。
AI.method: 构建旅游领域知识图谱（KG），采用自底向上遍历KG生成多跳问答对，以这些问答对作为可审计的推理轨迹对LLM进行监督微调，并设计专用旅行领域评测基准。
AI.result: Qwen3-4B经LoRA微调后在基准上达到82.4%精确匹配，远超基线22.4%；错误分析表明17.57%残余错误分为两类：多标签解码器过度自信（输出正确答案+一个错误选项）和单答案问题中的多跳路径推理失败。
AI.conclusion: 显式KG支撑的推理能显著提升LLM在专业领域的准确性与不确定性校准能力；未来应聚焦于逐选项校准与考虑推理链长度的解码机制。

title: LogiCo: A Unified Framework for Logical and Structural Anomaly Detection
summary: Current anomaly detection methods primarily focus on structural anomalies, while paying insufficient attention to anomalies that violate logical constraints. Conversely, top-performing logical anomaly detection approaches address this by modeling global semantic consistency, but perform poorly on subtle structural anomalies due to inadequate detection granularity. In this paper, we propose LogiCo, a unified framework for Logical and structural anomaly detection via Component-level feature reconstruction. Unlike existing methods that rely on explicit global semantic modeling, LogiCo employs a novel component-level feature reconstruction technique to capture inter-component logical constraints. Specifically, LogiCo maps pre-trained image features into a discrete component-level feature space and performs collaborative feature reconstruction at both component and patch levels, enabling it to effectively detect both logical and structural anomalies. Furthermore, to address the specific challenge of count-related logical anomalies, we integrate a segmentation-map discriminator that extends the model's capability to identify quantitative inconsistencies. LogiCo achieves state-of-the-art performance on both logical and structural anomaly detection across four benchmarks, including MVTec-LOCO, MVTec-AD, VisA, and Real-IAD, demonstrating its superiority and practical feasibility. The code is available at https://github.com/cnulab/LogiCo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LogiCo框架，通过组件级特征重建统一检测逻辑异常和结构异常，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在结构异常和逻辑异常检测上各有不足：结构异常检测忽视逻辑约束，而逻辑异常检测对细微结构异常敏感度低。
AI.method: LogiCo采用组件级特征重建技术，在离散组件特征空间中进行组件与图像块级别的协同重建，并引入分割图判别器以识别数量相关逻辑异常。
AI.result: 在MVTec-LOCO、MVTec-AD、VisA和Real-IAD四个基准上，LogiCo在逻辑和结构异常检测任务中均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: LogiCo实现了逻辑与结构异常的统一高效检测，兼具理论创新性与实际可行性。

title: When LLMs Develop Languages: Symbolic Communication for Efficient Multi-Agent Reasoning
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) improves large language models (LLMs) on difficult reasoning tasks, but it often incurs long natural-language rationales that are poorly aligned with efficient machine reasoning. We propose Communicative Language Symbolism Routing (CLSR), a test-time framework in which multiple LLM agents autonomously invent, evolve, and share compact Language Symbolism Frameworks (LSFs), while a latent-free router adaptively selects and composes these languages per query to optimize the accuracy-token trade-off. Unlike prompt optimization that refines surface instructions, CLSR treats each LSF as a reusable symbolic protocol with compact symbols, usage rules, and a message-passing contract, and improves it through an evolutionary loop driven by correctness and token cost. At inference time, the router may invoke a single low-cost LSF call, ensemble multiple LSFs, or execute a multi-round LSF composition protocol on harder queries. Across challenging benchmarks, CLSR reduces latency-oriented generated token completion by $3\sim 6\times$ compared to standard CoT while maintaining accuracy. We further derive an information-theoretic lower bound on token cost under arbitrary symbolism and show that, under an interpreter-realizability premise, multi-round LSF protocols conditionally subsume program-execution pipelines. Code is publicly available (https://github.com/pzqpzq/LSF_MDia).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Communicative Language Symbolism Routing（CLSR）的新框架，通过多个LLM代理自主发明、演化并共享紧凑的语言符号框架（LSFs），结合无隐变量路由器动态选择与组合这些符号语言，以在推理准确率与生成token开销之间取得更优权衡；相比标准Chain-of-Thought，CLSR在保持精度的同时将生成token减少3~6倍。
AI.motivation: 标准Chain-of-Thought生成冗长自然语言推理链，与高效机器推理不匹配，且缺乏对符号化、可复用、低开销推理协议的建模。
AI.method: 提出CLSR框架：多个LLM代理协同构建Language Symbolism Frameworks（LSFs），每个LSF包含紧凑符号、使用规则和消息传递契约；通过以正确性和token成本为驱动力的进化循环持续优化LSFs；引入latent-free router，在测试时按需选择单个、集成或多轮组合LSF执行推理。
AI.result: 在多个困难推理基准上，CLSR相较标准CoT将生成token降低3~6倍，同时维持同等准确率；理论分析给出了任意符号体系下token成本的信息论下界，并证明在解释器可实现前提下，多轮LSF协议条件性地涵盖程序执行流水线。
AI.conclusion: CLSR将LLM推理从自然语言链式推演转向可演化、可组合、符号化的通信协议范式，显著提升效率-精度平衡，为LLM高效推理提供了新路径。

title: RGLD: Randomized Global-Local Density Estimation for Tabular Anomaly Detection
summary: Unsupervised tabular anomaly detection requires methods that are accurate, robust across heterogeneous datasets, and computationally efficient. Classical statistical detectors are often efficient, but they usually rely on a fixed data view and a single notion of abnormality. Deep anomaly detectors can learn more flexible scoring functions, but they are substantially slower and difficult to tune in unsupervised settings due to the lack of a reliable supervisory signal. We propose RGLD, a randomized global-local density estimator for efficient unsupervised tabular anomaly detection. RGLD combines a global random-feature density branch, which identifies samples in broadly low-density regions, with a local neighbor branch, which detects samples that are weakly supported by nearby observations. Both branches operate over feature-bagged randomized views, allowing RGLD to expose anomaly evidence that may be hidden in any single representation. We conduct experiments on 47 tabular datasets against 23 statistical and deep anomaly detection baselines under fully unsupervised setting. RGLD achieves the strongest dataset-level AUROC performance, ranking 1st in dataset wins, and ranks 2nd in AUPRC wins. RGLD is also faster than all evaluated deep detectors, achieving 50x-580x speedups, and remains competitive with statistical methods in runtime, yielding a favorable accuracy-efficiency tradeoff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RGLD方法，通过结合全局随机特征密度分支和局部邻居分支，在无监督场景下实现高效且准确的表格异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督表格异常检测方法在准确性、鲁棒性和计算效率之间难以兼顾：经典统计方法效率高但灵活性差，深度方法灵活但速度慢且调参困难。
AI.method: RGLD是一种随机化全局-局部密度估计器，包含两个分支：基于随机特征的全局密度估计分支识别低密度区域样本，局部邻居分支识别邻域支持度弱的样本；两者均在特征Bagging的随机视图上运行。
AI.result: 在47个表格数据集、23个基线方法上的实验表明，RGLD在AUROC上表现最优（数据集胜率第一），AUPRC胜率第二；速度比所有深度检测器快50–580倍，与统计方法相当。
AI.conclusion: RGLD在保持高检测精度的同时显著提升效率，实现了无监督表格异常检测中精度与效率的良好权衡。

title: Metadata, Structure, or Strategy? A Decomposition of RAG Context Enrichment
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems increasingly enrich retrieved passages by attaching quality metadata, structuring them into explicit records, and adopting multi-hop retrieval strategies that accumulate evidence across steps. These changes assume that richer context yields better answers, yet existing evaluations cannot test this because they vary all three factors at once. We isolate each factor in a controlled experiment across six benchmarks, four models from three families, and five enrichment levels, totaling over 24,000 evaluated responses. The assumption does not hold. Most enrichment reduces accuracy. Models prompted to use confidence scores comply correctly yet produce worse answers, a gap between utilization and accuracy that no prior work has measured. What determines answer quality is not how much metadata the context carries but whether the model can act on it for the given task. When metadata and retrieval strategy are aligned with model capabilities, a smaller model outperforms a frontier model by 19 F1 points. These findings motivate a processability hierarchy that predicts, from pre-training properties alone, which metadata a model can productively use, reframing RAG design as a question of model-context alignment rather than metadata accumulation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制实验发现，RAG系统中增加上下文元数据丰富度并不必然提升答案质量；多数元数据增强反而降低准确性；答案质量取决于模型能否针对任务有效利用元数据，而非元数据本身多少；据此提出‘可处理性层级’，强调模型与上下文的对齐而非单纯堆叠元数据。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG评估无法分离元数据丰富度、结构化程度和多跳检索策略三者影响，导致‘更丰富的上下文带来更好答案’这一假设未经验证。
AI.method: 在6个基准、4个来自3个家族的模型、5个上下文丰富度级别上开展受控实验，共评估超24,000条响应，并量化模型对置信度分数等元数据的实际利用能力与准确率之间的差距。
AI.result: 多数元数据增强降低准确性；模型虽能按提示使用置信度分数，但答案质量下降；当元数据与检索策略匹配模型能力时，小模型F1值反超前沿大模型19分。
AI.conclusion: RAG设计应转向模型-上下文对齐，而非盲目增加元数据；提出基于预训练特性的‘可处理性层级’，用于预测模型能有效利用哪些元数据。

title: Privacy-Preserving Decentralized Cooperative Localization with Range-Only Measurements: A Convex Optimization Based Approach
summary: Cooperative localization using range-based measurements is critical for multi-robot systems operating in GPS-denied and unstructured environments. However, traditional cooperative approaches require sharing explicit spatial coordinates across the network, presenting a severe security vulnerability in privacy-sensitive missions. While recent literature has explored privacy-preserving alternatives, these methods typically rely on accuracy-degrading noise injection or computationally prohibitive cryptographic protocols. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel, natively privacy-preserving Decentralized Cooperative Localization (DCL) framework based on convex optimization. Discarding probabilistic noise models, we assume strictly bounded measurement noise and formulate the localization problem via Semi-Definite Programming (SDP) to compute a Maximum-Volume Inscribed Ellipsoid (MVE). Our approach introduces novel intersection-plane constraints derived from landmark measurements to significantly tighten individual spatial bounds. To incorporate inter-robot range measurements securely, we uniquely decompose coupling constraints into localized Linear Matrix Inequalities (LMIs). Agents achieve fleet-wide spatial consensus by iteratively exchanging only abstract dual variables, completely avoiding the transmission of explicit primal position estimates. Extensive 3D Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that our DCL framework outperforms existing SDP-based localization method in accuracy, while guaranteeing operational privacy and maintaining highly scalable, parallelizable computation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种原生隐私保护的去中心化协同定位（DCL）框架，基于半定规划（SDP）和最大体积内切椭球（MVE）估计，通过引入交平面约束与局部线性矩阵不等式（LMI）分解，在不传输位置坐标前提下实现高精度、可扩展的多机器人协同定位。
AI.motivation: 传统协同定位需共享显式空间坐标，存在严重隐私安全风险；现有隐私保护方法或牺牲精度（加噪），或计算开销过大（密码学协议）。
AI.method: 采用有界噪声假设，构建基于半定规划（SDP）的定位模型，求解最大体积内切椭球（MVE）；引入由地标测量导出的交平面约束以收紧个体空间边界；将机器人间距离耦合约束分解为局部线性矩阵不等式（LMI）；仅交换抽象对偶变量实现全局空间一致性。
AI.result: 在3D蒙特卡洛仿真中，该DCL框架相比现有SDP类方法具有更高定位精度，同时严格保障操作隐私，并支持高度可扩展、并行化计算。
AI.conclusion: 所提DCL框架在保证隐私安全的前提下，实现了精度、效率与可扩展性的统一，适用于GPS拒止、隐私敏感的多机器人任务场景。

title: MIThinker: A Plug-and-Play Policy-Optimized Thinker For Motivational Interviewing Counseling
summary: Reasoning large language models (LLMs) have recently made much progress in complex problem-solving, leveraging internal reasoning (or thought) to guide their solution generation. However, existing LLM-based counseling agents, including those using Motivational Interviewing (MI), generate responses without explicitly aligning thoughts with counseling techniques, limiting their effectiveness. We propose MIThinker, a lightweight thinking model that generates therapeutic thoughts to guide MI counseling agents in strategy selection and response generation. To overcome the lack of annotated thought data, we introduce AugR1-MI, an automated pipeline that reverse-engineers counselor's thoughts from observed responses. Through two-stage training combining supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, MIThinker demonstrates improved theory-of-mind assessment and strategy alignment. Comprehensive evaluations show that MindfulMI, our agent leveraging MIThinker, achieves MI competency comparable to state-of-the-art systems with an order of magnitude less computation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIThinker，一种轻量级思维模型，用于生成治疗性思维以指导动机访谈（MI）咨询代理的策略选择与回应生成，并通过AugR1-MI数据构建方法和两阶段训练提升其理论心智评估与策略对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的咨询代理（包括采用动机访谈MI的）未显式对齐内部思维与咨询技术，限制了其有效性。
AI.method: 提出MIThinker轻量级思维模型；设计AugR1-MI自动化管道反向推导咨询师思维；采用监督微调+强化学习的两阶段训练。
AI.result: MIThinker提升了理论心智评估与策略对齐能力；MindfulMI代理在MI胜任力上媲美SOTA系统，但计算开销降低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模治疗性思维可显著提升MI咨询代理的有效性与效率，MIThinker为低资源、高可信度的AI心理咨询提供了新范式。

title: Mitigating Batch Effects in Histopathology via Language-Mediated Robust Embedding Generation
summary: Pathology foundation models (PFMs) have demonstrated strong potential across clinical and scientific applications, yet their performance is often hindered by batch effects, which are non-biological variations across tissue source institutions (TSIs) that distort learned feature representations and impair generalization. Conventional mitigation strategies, such as stain normalization, offer limited success in addressing these high-dimensional, complex artifacts. We present GLMP (General-purpose LLM-Mediated Pathology model), a novel framework that generates robust numerical embeddings from histology image patches through an intermediate textual representation. By leveraging pretrained general-purpose multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and text encoders, GLMP effectively prioritizes biologically meaningful signals over TSI-specific artifacts, thereby improving cross-institutional generalization. To our knowledge, GLMP is the first pathology model to use text descriptions of histological features as an intermediate representation for generating numerical embeddings from histology images. Our results highlight the untapped potential of broad-domain, non-specialized MLLMs in computational pathology and introduce a new paradigm for building versatile, generalizable, and robust pathology models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLMP框架，利用通用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）将组织病理图像补丁先转化为文本描述，再编码为数值嵌入，从而抑制机构间批次效应，提升跨机构泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有病理基础模型受不同机构来源的批次效应（非生物学变异）影响，导致特征表示失真、泛化能力下降；传统染色归一化等方法难以有效消除高维复杂批次效应。
AI.method: 提出GLMP框架：以预训练通用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）和文本编码器为骨干，将组织病理图像补丁先映射为描述性文本，再编码为鲁棒数值嵌入，使模型聚焦生物学信号而非机构特异性伪影。
AI.result: GLMP显著提升跨机构泛化性能；首次实现以文本描述作为中间表征生成病理图像嵌入；验证了通用非专用MLLM在计算病理学中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: GLMP开辟了构建通用、鲁棒、可泛化病理模型的新范式，凸显利用广域多模态大模型解决病理领域批次效应问题的有效性与可行性。

title: Diagnosing and Repairing Factual Errors in RAG under Budget Constraints
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) improves the factuality of large language models by grounding responses in external evidence, yet real-world deployments remain fragile. Failures often stem from missing or weakly relevant evidence, as well as from generation that does not faithfully reflect the retrieved context. Many existing approaches rely on fine-tuning, privileged access to internal model signals, or resource-insensitive escalation strategies, which limits their practicality in black-box and budget-constrained settings. We propose D2R-RAG (Diagnose-to-Repair RAG), a model-agnostic and resource-aware framework that combines lightweight failure diagnosis with adaptive repair. D2R-RAG derives interpretable failure signatures from observable signals in the query, retrieved evidence, and generated response, and then selects from a small set of corrective actions under explicit latency and VRAM constraints. Experiments on FEVER and HotpotQA show that D2R-RAG improves reliability over recent baselines and achieves better accuracy--efficiency trade-offs across multiple compute budgets. The code is available at https://github.com/CyberScienceLab/D2R-RAG/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出D2R-RAG框架，通过轻量级故障诊断与自适应修复提升RAG系统的可靠性与资源效率，无需微调或访问模型内部信号，在多个基准上实现更优的准确率-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在真实场景中脆弱，常因证据缺失/弱相关或生成不忠实于检索内容而失败；多数改进方法依赖微调、内部信号或高开销策略，难以适用于黑盒与资源受限环境。
AI.method: 提出模型无关、资源感知的D2R-RAG框架：基于查询、检索证据和生成响应的可观测信号提取可解释故障特征，并在显式延迟和显存约束下从少量修正动作中自适应选择。
AI.result: 在FEVER和HotpotQA上实验表明，D2R-RAG相较近期基线提升了可靠性，并在多种计算预算下取得更优的准确率–效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: D2R-RAG为资源受限、黑盒部署场景下的RAG系统提供了一种实用、高效且可解释的故障诊断与修复方案。

title: On Surrogate Modeling of Static Response of AM Short-Fiber Thermoplastics Using Graph Neural Networks
summary:
Short-fiber thermoplastic (SFT) composites are increasingly employed in lightweight aerospace and automotive structures owing to their favorable strength-to-weight ratio, high production rates, and recyclability. Unlike continuous-fiber systems, the mechanical response of SFTs is governed by mesoscale interactions among fiber orientation, spatial clustering, and manufacturing-induced porosity. These features exhibit significant spatial variability in manufactured components and influence stiffness, damage initiation, and nonlinear deformation. Although mesoscale finite element (FE) models can resolve such heterogeneity, their application to realistic three-dimensional microstructures remains computationally intractable.
  A data-driven surrogate framework is proposed to predict the mechanical behavior of additively manufactured, compression-molded (AM-CM) SFTs. Microstructures reconstructed from micro-computed tomography data were discretized into Voronoi-based cells representing distinct fiber-interaction neighborhoods. Each cell was homogenized via nonlinear FE simulations incorporating matrix damage, and the resulting stress-strain responses trained a hybrid Graph Neural Network-Long Short-Term Memory (GNN-LSTM) architecture encoding microstructural topology and history-dependent mechanical evolution.
  The surrogate accurately predicts stiffness and stress-strain behavior of unseen microstructures, achieving $R^2\approx 0.98$ relative to high-fidelity FE simulations with over two orders-of-magnitude reduction in computational cost. Coupling the framework with experimentally calibrated damage laws demonstrates that fiber orientation, clustering, and porosity collectively govern local effective stiffness. The approach provides a physics-informed, data-efficient pathway to identify mechanically weak microstructural cells and accelerate digital-twin development for SFT components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络与长短期记忆网络（GNN-LSTM）的混合数据驱动代理模型，用于高效预测增材制造-压缩成型短纤维热塑性复合材料（AM-CM SFTs）的力学行为，显著降低计算成本并保持高精度（R²≈0.98）。
AI.motivation: 短纤维热塑性复合材料（SFT）的力学性能受纤维取向、空间聚集和孔隙率等介观尺度异质性影响显著，但传统有限元模拟三维真实微结构计算成本过高，亟需高效替代建模方法。
AI.method: 基于微CT重建微结构，采用Voronoi单元划分表征局部纤维相互作用区域；对各单元进行含基体损伤的非线性有限元均质化模拟；利用所得应力-应变响应训练GNN-LSTM混合模型，融合微结构拓扑与历史依赖力学演化信息。
AI.result: 该代理模型在预测未见微结构的刚度和应力-应变行为方面表现优异（R²≈0.98），计算成本较高保真FE降低两个数量级以上；结合实验标定损伤律，揭示了纤维取向、聚集与孔隙共同主导局部有效刚度。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架是一种物理信息嵌入、数据高效的建模方法，可识别力学薄弱微结构单元，加速短纤维热塑性复合材料数字孪生体的构建与应用。

title: As We May Search
summary: The sensitive information in personal documents, legal files, and medical records is among the most valuable things to search, yet current retrieval-augmented generation systems still require sending content to remote servers. We propose local-first IR, a design philosophy where indexes, models, and inference reside on user devices, treating remote services as optional. This paper makes four contributions: (1) a framework organizing retrieval architectures along three dimensions: privacy and control, capability, and accessibility, (2) experiments on consumer hardware across five benchmarks, scaling from 1K to 1M documents with dense retrieval, BM25, and hybrid fusion. Dense retrieval keeps over 91% nDCG@10 up to 100K documents, with approximate HNSW indexes extending this to 1M with only 2% quality loss; a 7B local language model reaches within 4 points of a cloud baseline on answer quality, (3) competing perspectives for and against local-first IR, informed by experimental evidence, and (4) a research agenda identifying open problems. The real tradeoff is scope rather than quality: what matters is what you can search, not how well you can search it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种'本地优先信息检索（local-first IR）'的设计理念，将索引、模型和推理全部保留在用户设备上，以增强隐私与控制；实验表明，在消费级硬件上，稠密检索在10万文档规模下仍保持91%以上的nDCG@10，近似HNSW索引可扩展至100万文档且仅损失2%质量，7B本地大模型答案质量接近云端基线；论文还系统梳理了该范式的利弊，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 当前RAG系统需将敏感文档内容上传至远程服务器，存在隐私泄露风险；为保护个人文档、法律文件和医疗记录等高敏数据，亟需一种兼顾检索能力与本地化控制的新型IR架构。
AI.method: 提出'本地优先IR'设计哲学，构建三维度（隐私与控制、能力、可及性）检索架构分类框架；在五项基准上开展跨规模（1K–1M文档）实验，对比稠密检索、BM25及混合融合方法；采用近似HNSW索引优化大规模检索效率；评估7B参数本地语言模型的端到端问答质量。
AI.result: 稠密检索在≤100K文档时nDCG@10 > 91%，HNSW近似索引扩展至1M文档仅降质2%；7B本地LLM答案质量比云端基线低约4分；实验证明本地优先IR的核心权衡在于检索范围（scope）而非精度（quality）。
AI.conclusion: 本地优先IR在保障隐私与用户控制的前提下，可在消费级设备上实现接近云端的检索与生成质量；其真正瓶颈是可检索的数据规模，而非检索或生成质量本身；该范式为隐私敏感场景下的IR与RAG提供了可行路径，并指明了索引压缩、小模型适配、跨设备协同等关键研究方向。

title: Lateral String Stability for Vehicle Platoons
summary: Connected and automated vehicle (CAV) platooning promises gains in energy efficiency and traffic throughput and, most critically, in safety. These safety benefits hinge on string stability, which determines how disturbances propagate along a platoon. While longitudinal string stability is well studied, lateral string stability, which governs the propagation of path-tracking errors that can lead to unsafe deviations from the intended path, remains underexplored. Its importance is increasing as autonomous vehicles rely more heavily on onboard sensing and map-free navigation, where sensor occlusion and dense formations amplify safety risks. This paper presents a new framework for lateral string stability that directly addresses safety-critical path-relative tracking errors and enables consistent comparison across vehicles following the same road geometry. Central to this framework is an arc-length (Eulerian) viewpoint, a departure from traditional analyses, that clarifies how tracking errors at a given point on the path propagate from one vehicle to the next. A formal definition of lateral string stability is introduced along with two control strategies: an onboard-sensing-only controller and a novel learn-from-predecessor approach utilizing vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication. We show that onboard sensing alone cannot guarantee attenuation of path-tracking errors, imposing a fundamental safety limitation, whereas V2V communication enables true error attenuation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的横向串稳定性分析框架，聚焦于路径跟踪误差的传播，强调V2V通信对实现误差衰减和提升CAV编队安全性的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注纵向串稳定性，而横向串稳定性（影响路径跟踪安全性）在传感器遮挡与密集编队场景下日益重要，但缺乏系统性分析框架。
AI.method: 提出基于弧长（Eulerian）视角的横向串稳定性新框架；定义横向串稳定性；设计两种控制器：仅依赖车载感知的控制器与利用V2V通信的‘向先行者学习’控制器。
AI.result: 证明仅靠车载感知无法保证路径跟踪误差衰减，存在根本性安全局限；而V2V通信可实现真正的误差衰减。
AI.conclusion: 横向串稳定性需从路径相对误差角度建模，V2V通信是保障CAV编队横向安全的关键使能技术。

title: A Hybrid Framework for Song Lyric Annotation Based on Human-LLM Alignment
summary: Emotion recognition of song lyrics is a challenging task since lyrics may not necessarily align with the overall emotion of a song. As a result, lyrics annotation remains largely underexplored. Drawing inspiration from research in large language model (LLM) assisted annotation, we examine the alignment between humans and LLMs for annotation of lyrics by creating a new sentence-level dataset of lyrics. Our observations highlight the subjectivity of the task and the inherent challenges. Following this, we present a hybrid annotation framework that optimizes human and LLM annotation by predicting potential misalignment in annotation.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了歌词情感识别的挑战，提出了一种结合人类与大语言模型（LLM）的混合标注框架，以缓解主观性带来的标注不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 歌词情感识别任务中，歌词未必反映整首歌的情感，导致人工标注困难且研究不足；同时，LLM辅助标注的可靠性与人类一致性尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建了一个新的句子级歌词数据集，分析人类与LLM在情感标注上的一致性，并设计了一个预测标注偏差的混合标注框架。
AI.result: 发现该任务具有高度主观性，人类与LLM标注存在显著分歧；所提混合框架可有效识别并优化潜在标注错误。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖LLM或人工标注均存在局限，融合二者优势并引入偏差预测机制是提升歌词情感标注质量的有效路径。

title: CCRC: A Change-Aware Captioning and Reasoning Chain for Image Change Captioning and Segmentation
summary: Understanding and localizing subtle changes between paired images is critical for tasks such as surveillance and image editing. However, traditional Image Change Captioning (ICC) methods lack spatial grounding, limiting their precision. We introduce Image Change Captioning and Segmentation (ICCS), a new multimodal task that jointly requires structured change description and pixel-level localization. To address ICCS, we propose the Change-aware Captioning and Reasoning Chain (CCRC), a dual-chain framework that decouples semantic reasoning from spatial segmentation. The first chain, Chain-of-Change-Captioning (CCC), enhances fine-grained change perception via a visual fusion module based on Multi-Head Change-aware Attention inserted between the visual and language components of a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM). CCC also determines whether a change is segmentable. If not, it alone generates the caption. Otherwise, the second chain, Chain-of-Change-Segmenting (CCS), is activated, leveraging spatial priors from CCC and refining masks with a Change-aware Token Refiner for accurate boundary localization. We evaluate CCRC on both synthetic and real-world change detection benchmarks with pixel-level supervision. Experiments show CCRC achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新任务Image Change Captioning and Segmentation (ICCS)，并设计了双链框架CCRC，实现细粒度变化描述与像素级定位的联合建模，在合成与真实数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像变化描述（ICC）方法缺乏空间定位能力，难以精准描述和定位图像间的细微变化，限制了其在监控、图像编辑等场景的应用。
AI.method: 提出ICCS新任务，并构建Change-aware Captioning and Reasoning Chain（CCRC）双链框架：第一链CCC通过多头变化感知注意力融合视觉与语言特征，判断变化是否可分割并生成描述；若可分割，则激活第二链CCS，利用CCC提供的空间先验，结合变化感知Token Refiner进行精确掩码细化。
AI.result: 在带像素级监督的合成与真实世界变化检测基准上，CCRC均取得当前最优性能（state-of-the-art）。
AI.conclusion: CCRC有效解耦语义理解与空间分割，显著提升变化描述的准确性和定位精度，验证了ICCS任务的可行性与实用性。

title: LLM-Guided Planning for Multi-hop Reasoning over Multimodal Nuclear Regulatory Documents
comment: Accepted at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond @ ICML 2026. 8 pages (main), 3 figures, 1 algorithm
summary: Reviewing nuclear regulatory documents requires multi-hop reasoning across tens of thousands of pages, where judgments depend on evidence assembled across multiple chapters. We frame this task as planning: an LLM-based agent observes the evidence collected so far, picks the next document fragment to inspect, and stops when the evidence is sufficient. The agent operates over a vectorless document tree using browse, read, and search tools, and maintains a dynamic knowledge graph (KG) as state. On a 200-question benchmark over NuScale Final Safety Analysis Report (FSAR) documents, the system reaches 81.5% accuracy with a RAGAS Faithfulness of 0.93. The dominant performance factor is planning: against PageIndex, which uses the same document tree without state-conditioned action selection, the gap is +38.0pp (43.5% to 81.5%, p<0.001). The system also outperforms LightRAG (73.0%, p<0.05), HippoRAG (70.5%, p<0.01), and GraphRAG (49.5%, p<0.001), and matches RAPTOR (75.5%, p=0.11) without offline indexing. Edge inference adds 2.8x cost without raising accuracy; we retain it as a traceability module. Of 7,391 inferred edges, 3 Violates edges (0.04%) flag scope boundaries (Q058) and partial conformance (Q176) as typed annotations that a human reviewer can audit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的规划型代理系统，用于核监管文档的多跳推理审查，通过动态知识图谱和无向量文档树操作，在NuScale FSAR基准上达到81.5%准确率，显著优于现有RAG方法。
AI.motivation: 核监管文档审查需跨海量页面进行多跳推理，传统方法难以高效整合分散证据，亟需具备推理规划与状态跟踪能力的智能代理。
AI.method: 构建基于LLM的规划型代理，支持browse/read/search操作，维护动态知识图谱作为内部状态，在无向量文档树上进行迭代证据收集与决策终止。
AI.result: 在200题NuScale FSAR基准上达81.5%准确率（RAGAS Faithfulness 0.93），较PageIndex提升38.0个百分点；显著优于LightRAG、HippoRAG、GraphRAG，与RAPTOR持平；发现3条关键违规边（0.04%），支持人工审计。
AI.conclusion: 规划能力是提升长文档多跳推理性能的核心，动态知识图谱与无向量检索结合可兼顾准确性、可追溯性与无需离线索引的实用性。

title: How Far Can Sharpness and Complexity Jointly Explain Generalization?
summary: Sharpness and complexity are two central factors in the generalization analysis of deep neural networks. Existing quantitative evaluations of generalization measures have largely focused on individual scalar measures, leaving the joint explanatory power of sharpness and complexity largely unexplored. This work studies how far sharpness and complexity can jointly explain generalization. We use linear regression and introduce a Pareto-based analysis to quantitatively evaluate the joint explanatory power of these two factors. Beyond the existing parameter-level definitions, we further propose realizations of sharpness and complexity that are closer to function space and less dependent on raw parameter representations. We find that function-oriented definitions of these two quantities expand the explanatory scope of the two-factor view beyond what is achieved by existing parameter-level metrics. Overall, our results support the sharpness-complexity perspective as an informative lens for understanding generalization across diverse settings. At the same time, the remaining failures indicate that whether this two-factor view can serve as a complete theory of generalization remains open.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了sharpness（尖锐度）和complexity（复杂度）这两个因素在深度神经网络泛化能力分析中的联合解释力，提出更贴近函数空间的定义，并通过线性回归与Pareto分析进行定量评估，结果表明该双因素视角具有较强解释力但尚不构成完整理论。
AI.motivation: 现有对泛化能力的定量评估多聚焦于单一标量指标，sharpness与complexity的联合解释能力尚未被系统探索。
AI.method: 采用线性回归与基于Pareto的分析方法，评估sharpness与complexity的联合解释力；并提出更贴近函数空间、弱依赖参数表示的sharpness与complexity新定义。
AI.result: 函数空间导向的sharpness与complexity定义显著扩展了双因素视角的解释范围，超越传统参数级指标；但仍有部分泛化现象无法被该框架解释。
AI.conclusion: sharpness-complexity双因素视角是理解泛化能力的有力工具，但在当前形式下尚不足以构成泛化的完备理论。

title: ARMOR: Adaptive Retriever Optimization for Low-Resource Telecom Question Answering
summary: Telecom question answering (QA) is a challenging setting for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG): evidence is fragmented across standards, papers, encyclopedic resources, and web documents, and answers often hinge on technical tables, equations, and specialized protocol language. In low-resource subdomains, generator fine-tuning can over-specialize and degrade general capability, making query-side retriever adaptation an attractive alternative. To this end, we ask whether a fixed-generator, query-adapted RAG system can outperform generator-side adaptation, and which retriever objectives best support that setting. We motivate retrieval, rather than generator fine-tuning, as the adaptation target through a capacity comparison: under bounded-parameter and soft-retrieval assumptions, query-encoder tuning can have a smaller estimation term than supervised fine-tuning when its effective dimension is smaller. We identify two particularly relevant objectives -- the latent-document RAG likelihood, which optimizes generation utility, and the InfoNCE contrastive objective, which improves semantic retrieval geometry -- and leverage them jointly through a retriever optimization method targeting downstream QA performance in the telecom domain. Specifically, we introduce ARMOR, Adaptive Regularized Mixture Optimization for Retrievers, which learns separate temperatures for the RAG retrieval distribution and InfoNCE softmax and regularizes the adapted query encoder toward the frozen base query encoder. Across telecom-specific retrieval and generative QA benchmarks, we show that ARMOR improves evidence retrieval and answer generation in several in-domain settings. Code is available at https://github.com/heshandevaka/ARMOR.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARMOR方法，通过联合优化RAG似然和InfoNCE对比目标，并引入温度调节与正则化机制，在固定生成器前提下提升查询端检索器在电信问答任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 电信问答中证据碎片化、技术性强，且低资源子领域中生成器微调易过拟合；相比生成器微调，查询端检索器适配更具泛化优势，尤其在参数受限与软检索假设下其估计误差更小。
AI.method: 提出ARMOR（Adaptive Regularized Mixture Optimization for Retrievers）：联合优化潜在文档RAG似然与InfoNCE对比目标，为两种softmax分别学习独立温度，并对适配后的查询编码器施加向冻结基编码器的正则化约束。
AI.result: 在电信领域检索与生成式QA基准上，ARMOR显著提升了证据检索准确率与答案生成质量，优于生成器微调等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 在固定生成器的RAG框架下，面向下游QA任务联合优化检索目标并引入自适应温度与正则化，是比生成器微调更优的低资源电信问答适配策略。

title: Real-Time Compliance and Position Control of a Hyper-redundant Soft Robotic Arm
summary: Robots working in unstructured or partially unobservable environments must combine accurate motion with physical compliance that can passively correct contact misalignment. Soft robots provide this compliance but have struggled to precisely control their tip compliance and position. This paper presents a robot architecture designed around that control problem: a 7-link arm whose six articulated joints provide twelve independently driven revolute axes, each actuated by an antagonistic pair of pneumatic muscles, so that every axis can simultaneously change its angle and linearly adjust its stiffness. The rigid articulated backbone makes the tip compliance and position of the arm predictable enough to be commanded quantitatively in real time. The robot employs a unified iterative inverse-kinematics and inverse-compliance controller to achieve simultaneous, quantitative control of both compliance and position. The task-space compliance and kinematics models and the control law are derived and verified on both the physical arm and a matched simulation. Simulation is then used to study how the same framework extends to other arm morphologies. Finally, the arm demonstrates tasks that have been difficult for both rigid and soft arms: rejecting disturbances while writing on a moving whiteboard, and passively correcting hidden misalignment during a key-insertion and drawer-opening task. That these tasks succeed under so straightforward a controller is evidence for the advantage of this algorithm-informed structural design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型7连杆气动软体机械臂，通过12个由拮抗式气动肌肉驱动的旋转轴，实现关节角度与刚度的独立、实时调控；结合刚性骨架与统一的逆运动学/逆柔顺性控制器，实现了末端位置与柔顺性的定量协同控制，并在扰动抑制书写和隐式对准任务中验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 在非结构化或部分不可观测环境中，机器人需兼具精确运动与物理柔顺性以被动纠正接触错位；现有软体机器人难以同时精确控制末端柔顺性与位置。
AI.method: 设计了一种7连杆气动软体机械臂，含6个关节共12个独立驱动的旋转轴，每轴由拮抗气动肌肉驱动以同时调节角度与刚度；采用刚性骨架提升建模可预测性；提出统一的迭代逆运动学与逆柔顺性控制器；建立并验证任务空间柔顺性与运动学模型。
AI.result: 在真实平台与匹配仿真中验证了位置与柔顺性的实时协同控制能力；仿真拓展表明该框架适用于其他构型；成功完成移动白板书写抗扰、钥匙插入与抽屉开启中的隐式错位被动校正等挑战性任务。
AI.conclusion: 算法引导的结构设计（即硬件本征支持柔顺-位置协同控制）显著提升了软体机器人在复杂交互任务中的性能，为软体操纵提供了新范式。

title: TriageRA-CCF: Source-Side Clinical Confidence and Coverage Signals for Adaptive Rank Budgeting in Medical LLMs
summary: Medical large language models are commonly adapted with a fixed low-rank budget, even though medical questions differ substantially in confidence, clinical coverage, and cross-domain difficulty. We study adaptive rank budgeting for parameter-efficient medical question answering: for each question, the adapter decides whether to activate a small, medium, or large subset of LoRA rank channels. The central challenge is that a naive adaptive budget router can collapse to unstable choices or spend capacity without improving shifted benchmarks. We propose TriageRA-CCF, a source-side teacher for adaptive rank-budgeted LoRA. It combines three signals computed only from source training data: base-model answer confidence, metadata-cell clinical coverage, and a counterfactual close-miss proxy. These signals supervise a straight-through budget router over active ranks {2,4,8}, together with budget-cost, entropy, and rank-balance regularization. Under a matched CMB-source training protocol, TriageRA-CCF achieves the best average accuracy among LoRA, DoRA, and MoELoRA baselines on both Qwen3-8B and Llama3.1-8B. The gains are modest and non-uniform across benchmarks: +0.21 average points over the strongest external baseline on Qwen3-8B and +0.16 on Llama3.1-8B. Component ablations show that confidence, coverage, and counterfactual signals all provide useful budget supervision, but their combination is not monotonically best on every backbone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriageRA-CCF方法，通过基于源端教师模型的自适应秩预算机制（结合置信度、临床覆盖度与反事实近似信号），动态分配LoRA适配器的秩通道，在医疗问答任务中实现更高效的参数微调。
AI.motivation: 现有医学大语言模型通常采用固定低秩适配策略，但医学问题在置信度、临床覆盖范围和跨域难度上差异显著，需更灵活的参数效率优化方式。
AI.method: 提出TriageRA-CCF：一种源侧教师模型，利用基础模型答案置信度、元数据单元临床覆盖度及反事实近似信号联合监督直通式预算路由器（支持{2,4,8}秩选择），并引入预算成本、熵及秩平衡正则化。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B和Llama3.1-8B上，TriageRA-CCF在CMB源训练协议下平均准确率优于LoRA、DoRA和MoELoRA基线，分别提升+0.21和+0.16分；消融实验证明三类信号均有贡献，但组合效果因主干模型而异。
AI.conclusion: 自适应秩预算可行且有效，但需多维信号协同监督与合理正则化；其收益虽小幅但稳定，凸显医学场景下细粒度参数控制的重要性。

title: FreqOrtho-SR: Frequency-Guided Orthogonal Expert Learning for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Diffusion prior-based methods have shown impressive results in real-world image super-resolution (ISR), yet two key challenges persist: balancing pixel-level fidelity with semantic quality, and adapting to diverse degradations. Existing dual-branch approaches freeze the pixel module during semantic training, but the semantic branch can still expand capacity within the pixel subspace, precluding genuine perceptual improvement. Moreover, using a single static adapter cannot generalize across heterogeneous real-world corruptions. To address both issues, we propose FreqOrtho-SR, which comprises: $\textbf{Freq}$uency-guided Mixture of LoRA Experts (FreqMoE), it routes inputs to specialized experts via a non-parametric FFT-based degradation-feature extractor that encodes frequency-domain signatures, enabling stable and interpretable specialization across corruption types; and $\textbf{Ortho}$gonal Gradient Projection (OGP), which reframes the dual-objective optimization as a subspace-constrained problem: by extracting the pixel-fidelity subspace via SVD on combined expert weight deltas and projecting semantic gradients onto its null space, OGP guarantees orthogonality between the two objectives, enabling genuinely complementary learning without mutual interference. Experiments show that FreqOrtho-SR achieves competitive overall performance and a strong fidelity-perception trade-off across multiple benchmarks with efficient single-step inference. The source code of our method can be found at $\href{https://github.com/sonhm3029/FreqOrtho-SR}{\texttt{sonhm3029/FreqOrtho-SR}}$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FreqOrtho-SR方法，通过频率引导的LoRA专家混合（FreqMoE）和正交梯度投影（OGP）解决真实图像超分辨率中像素保真度与语义质量平衡及多退化泛化两大挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散先验方法在真实图像超分辨率中难以兼顾像素级保真度与语义质量，且单一适配器无法适应多样化的实际退化类型。
AI.method: 提出FreqOrtho-SR：1）FreqMoE利用FFT提取退化频域特征，非参数化路由至专用LoRA专家；2）OGP通过SVD提取像素保真子空间，并将语义梯度正交投影至其零空间，实现双目标无干扰优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准上取得竞争性整体性能和优异的保真-感知权衡，支持高效单步推理。
AI.conclusion: FreqOrtho-SR有效解耦并协同优化像素保真与语义感知目标，提升模型对真实退化场景的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: MOSAIC: Orchestrating Collaborative Knowledge Tracing with Hierarchical Semantic Alignment
summary: Knowledge Tracing (KT) is important for personalized education but traditionally suffers from two key limitations: a reliance on shallow ID-based representations that neglect semantic depth and a restriction to single-granularity mastery estimation that overlooks hierarchical knowledge dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose MOSAIC (Multi-granularity Online Semantic AI for Collaborative Knowledge), a novel framework that orchestrates LLM-driven semantic alignment with sequential modeling. Unlike methods that use LLMs solely as predictors, MOSAIC leverages a frozen LLM to generate dynamic, context-aware embeddings and hierarchical prediction prompts, explicitly capturing collaborative signals and peer interactions. Furthermore, we introduce a cross-granularity consistency objective that jointly regularizes mastery estimation across concept, topic-cluster, and global proficiency levels. Extensive experiments on ASSISTments, EdNet, and a newly collected large-scale MOOC dataset demonstrate that MOSAIC establishes new state-of-the-art results. Specifically, our method achieves AUC improvements of up to 3.4\% and Accuracy gains of up to 2.5 \% across all benchmarks. Notably, MOSAIC exhibits superior robustness in collaboration-rich environments and long-sequence scenarios (AUC 0.862 on MOOC), offering both high predictive precision and semantically grounded interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOSAIC框架，通过冻结大语言模型生成动态语义嵌入与分层提示，并引入跨粒度一致性目标，实现多粒度知识追踪，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统知识追踪方法依赖浅层ID表示、忽略语义深度，且仅支持单粒度掌握度估计，忽视知识间的层次依赖关系。
AI.method: MOSAIC框架结合冻结LLM驱动的语义对齐与序列建模：利用LLM生成上下文感知嵌入和分层预测提示，捕捉协作信号；并设计跨粒度（概念/主题簇/全局）一致性损失联合正则化掌握度估计。
AI.result: 在ASSISTments、EdNet及新构建的大规模MOOC数据集上，AUC最高提升3.4%，Accuracy最高提升2.5%；在协作丰富与长序列场景下鲁棒性强（MOOC上AUC达0.862），兼具高精度与语义可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MOSAIC有效克服了传统KT方法在语义表征与粒度建模上的局限，为个性化教育提供了更精准、可解释、鲁棒的知识追踪新范式。

title: Diagnosing and Mitigating Context Rot in Long-horizon Search
summary: Extensive context has become the norm as Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long-horizon tasks. The concern that increasing context length degrades model capabilities, known as context rot, has become a central issue for these applications. In this paper, we focus on deep search scenarios, aiming to investigate the rot phenomenon and its mitigation strategies. By evaluating four flagship open-source models across three benchmarks, we reveal a prevalent but unnoticed rot phenomenon: extensive context causes models to directly give up or prematurely provide uncertain answers, and this issue is exacerbated as the context grows. Through pruning experiments, we demonstrate the relationship between the accumulated context and the rot phenomenon. Furthermore, we investigate mitigating this issue through context management and post-hoc rejection sampling. For context management, we systematically evaluate seven different methods across three categories, based on performance, cost, and impact on context rot, providing clear guidance for strategy selection and usage. For rejection sampling, we develop a rot-aware filtering strategy and demonstrate its effectiveness across three aggregation methods. Finally, we show that these two approaches can be combined for further performance improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型在长上下文场景下的'上下文腐化'（context rot）现象，揭示了其在深度搜索任务中导致模型放弃回答或提前给出不确定答案的问题，并提出了基于上下文管理和后处理拒绝采样的综合缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在长程任务中广泛应用，上下文长度增加导致性能下降的'上下文腐化'问题日益突出，尤其在深度搜索等关键场景中尚未被充分认识和系统研究。
AI.method: 通过在三个基准上评估四个主流开源大模型，结合上下文剪枝实验、七种上下文管理方法的系统对比，以及提出的rot-aware拒绝采样策略，在三种聚合方法下验证有效性。
AI.result: 发现上下文增长会显著加剧模型放弃回答或输出不确定答案的现象；验证了上下文管理与拒绝采样各自有效，且二者结合可进一步提升性能；为策略选择提供了兼顾性能、成本与抗腐化能力的实用指南。
AI.conclusion: 上下文腐化是真实且严重的问题，可通过结构化的上下文管理与rot-aware后处理协同缓解，为长上下文应用提供可靠部署路径。

title: MyGO-Splat: Multi-Objective Closed-Loop Geometric Feedback for RGB-Only Gaussian SLAM
summary: Real-time monocular Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) fundamentally suffers from scale ambiguity and a lack of geometric self-correction. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity rendering, existing RGB-only systems remain open-loop because depth priors are injected into mapping but refined geometry cannot effectively regulate tracking drift. We present MyGO-Splat, a closed-loop Gaussian SLAM framework that analytically rasterizes Gaussian primitives into pixel-wise depth and surface normals, allowing the map to actively supervise camera pose optimization. To bridge monocular priors and scale consistency, our framework introduces scale-aware adaptive alignment that projects foundation-model depth estimates into the globally optimized Gaussian space, forming a self-correcting cycle for scale feedback. Extensive evaluations show that this closed-loop design improves scale stability and appearance-geometry consistency, achieving performance comparable to RGB-D methods while using only monocular input.

AI.tldr: MyGO-Splat 提出了一种闭环高斯SLAM框架，通过解析式光栅化高斯原语生成像素级深度和法向量，实现地图对相机位姿优化的主动监督，并引入尺度感知自适应对齐机制，将基础模型深度估计映射到全局优化的高斯空间，形成自校正的尺度反馈循环，在仅使用单目输入下达到接近RGB-D方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 单目实时SLAM存在尺度模糊性和缺乏几何自校正的问题；现有仅RGB的3D高斯溅射系统因深度先验仅注入建图而无法有效约束跟踪漂移，导致开环运行。
AI.method: 提出MyGO-Splat闭环高斯SLAM框架：1）解析式光栅化高斯原语，生成像素级深度与表面法向量，使地图可主动监督相机位姿优化；2）引入尺度感知自适应对齐，将基础模型深度估计投影至全局优化的高斯空间，构建尺度自校正反馈循环。
AI.result: 在多个基准上验证了该闭环设计显著提升了尺度稳定性与外观-几何一致性，性能媲美RGB-D方法，且仅需单目输入。
AI.conclusion: MyGO-Splat成功实现了单目SLAM的闭环优化，解决了尺度模糊与几何漂移问题，为纯视觉高斯SLAM提供了可自我校正的新范式。

title: Cross-Temporal Sinhala OCR: Page-Level Adaptation and Diachronic Analysis
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables, Accepted paper at the 12th Moratuwa Engineering Research Conference (MERCon) 2026
summary: Sinhala is a morphologically rich abugida spoken by roughly 16 million people in Sri Lanka, and to date, there are no publicly available real-world datasets for page-level Sinhala OCR. All previous studies for assessing Sinhala OCR models have used artificially generated data. To bridge the gap, we introduce sinhala-ocr-lk-acts-1010, an annotated dataset of 1,010 page-level images and their transcriptions collected from Sri Lankan Legislative Acts published between 1981-1989 and 2000-2019, split into 707 training examples, 101 validation examples, and 202 testing examples. Three models based on deep learning-based visual language processing, namely DeepSeek-OCR V1, DeepSeek-OCR V2, and LightOnOCR-2-1B, are fine-tuned using QLoRA in 8 experiments conducted on consumer and cloud GPUs. LightOnOCR-2-1B is the top performer, achieving a CER of 1.05% across all test examples, outperforming state-of-the-art open-source OCR models such as Surya-OCR (8.84%) and Tesseract v5 (10.69%), as well as commercially available OCR models such as Google Document AI (2.06%). Our results suggest that LightOnOCR-2-1B outperforms other baselines on real-world OCR tasks and maintains consistent performance across all print periods, even when documents are severely degraded.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了首个真实世界斯里兰卡立法法案的斯纳哈拉语OCR数据集sinhala-ocr-lk-acts-1010，并在该数据集上微调多个深度学习OCR模型，其中LightOnOCR-2-1B表现最优（CER=1.05%），显著优于现有开源及商业OCR系统。
AI.motivation: 缺乏真实世界的斯纳哈拉语页面级OCR公开数据集，以往研究依赖人工合成数据，限制了模型在实际场景中的评估与应用。
AI.method: 构建了包含1010页真实斯里兰卡立法法案图像及其转录文本的数据集，并采用QLoRA方法在消费级与云GPU上对DeepSeek-OCR V1、V2和LightOnOCR-2-1B共8组实验进行微调与评估。
AI.result: LightOnOCR-2-1B在测试集上取得1.05%的字符错误率（CER），显著优于Surya-OCR（8.84%）、Tesseract v5（10.69%）和Google Document AI（2.06%），且在不同年代及严重退化文档上表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: LightOnOCR-2-1B在真实斯纳哈拉语OCR任务中性能领先，所构建的数据集填补了该语言真实OCR基准的空白，为后续研究提供了重要资源。

title: A Physics-Grounded Benchmark for Multi-Agent Dynamics in World Models
summary: Generative world models hold immense promise as scalable simulators for autonomous systems, particularly for synthesizing rare but safety-critical multi-agent interactions, such as vehicle collisions. However, current evaluation paradigms index heavily on visual fidelity and semantic alignment, leaving a critical blind spot: they cannot reliably quantify whether generated dynamics actually obey the fundamental physical laws required for reliable simulation. Assessing this physical plausibility is inherently difficult due to a lack of physical metrics and the challenge of extracting metric-scale kinematics from uncalibrated video rollouts. To bridge this gap, we introduce CrashTwin, a physics-grounded evaluation framework designed to stress-test the physical trustworthiness of world models. CrashTwin couples a diverse dataset of multi-agent collision scenarios, comprising 25K controllable synthetic and 12K in-the-wild real-world collision sequences with a novel calibration-free reconstruction pipeline, enabling the recovery of 3D physical attributes directly from world model rollouts. We propose a diagnostic suite that systematically evaluates three dimensions: spatio-temporal consistency, momentum and kinetic energy conservation, and world-dynamics integrity. Extensive benchmarking of state-of-the-art models reveals a crucial insight: high perceptual quality frequently masks severe physical violations during complex interactions. By quantitatively exposing these failure modes, CrashTwin provides a vital diagnostic tool for developing physically grounded world models capable of reliable real-world simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrashTwin框架，用于评估生成式世界模型在多智能体碰撞场景中的物理可信度，弥补了现有评估方法忽视物理规律遵守的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型评估方法过度关注视觉保真度和语义对齐，无法可靠衡量生成动态是否符合基本物理定律，尤其在安全关键的多智能体交互（如车辆碰撞）中存在严重盲区。
AI.method: 提出CrashTwin框架，包含25K合成+12K真实碰撞序列数据集，结合无需相机标定的3D物理属性重建流程，并设计三维度诊断套件：时空一致性、动量与动能守恒、世界动力学完整性。
AI.result: 对SOTA模型的广泛评测表明，高感知质量常掩盖复杂交互中的严重物理违规；CrashTwin能定量揭示这些失效模式。
AI.conclusion: CrashTwin为构建物理可信、可支撑真实世界可靠仿真的世界模型提供了关键诊断工具。

title: FADE: Mitigating Hallucinations by Reducing Language-Prior Dominance in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Despite the impressive capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), they remain susceptible to hallucination, generating content inconsistent with the input image. Recent studies attribute this to the dominance of language priors over visual inputs and employ contrastive decoding methods to mitigate this dominance, but the mechanistic origin remains unexplored. We investigate the information flow through each transformer layer and find that attention modules consistently aggregate visual evidence, while FFN modules at critical layers act as the source of language priors. These priors can override visual evidence, causing correct predictions in intermediate layers to drift toward incorrect outputs. Based on this insight, we propose FADE (FFN Attenuation for DEcoding), a training-free method that attenuates FFN outputs to reduce language-prior dominance. Evaluations on POPE, CHAIR, and MME benchmarks across LLaVA-1.5, mPLUG-Owl2, and InstructBLIP show that FADE effectively mitigates hallucinations while preserving inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LVLMs中FFN模块是语言先验的来源，会覆盖视觉证据导致幻觉，提出无需训练的FADE方法通过衰减FFN输出缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs)易产生与输入图像不一致的幻觉，现有方法虽用对比解码缓解语言先验主导问题，但其机制根源尚不清楚。
AI.method: 通过分析各Transformer层的信息流，发现注意力模块持续聚合视觉证据，而关键层的FFN模块是语言先验的来源；据此提出无需训练的FADE方法，通过衰减FFN输出降低语言先验主导性。
AI.result: 在POPE、CHAIR和MME基准上对LLaVA-1.5、mPLUG-Owl2和InstructBLIP的评估表明，FADE能有效缓解幻觉，同时保持推理效率。
AI.conclusion: FFN模块是LVLMs中语言先验主导并引发幻觉的关键机制，FADE提供了一种简单有效的训练-free干预方案。

title: A Kernel Fisher Discriminant Analysis-Based Tree Ensemble Classifier: KFDA Forest
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables; author-created manuscript version of the published article
summary: In general, an ensemble classifier is more accurate than a single classifier. In this study, we propose an ensemble classifier called the kernel Fisher discriminant analysis forest (KFDA Forest), which is a tree-based ensemble method that applies KFDA. To promote diversity, bootstrap is used, and variable sets are randomly divided into K subsets. KFDA is performed on each subset to increase classification accuracy. KFDA maximizes the distance between classes while minimizing the distance within classes. KFDA can also be applied to classification problems in a nonlinear data structure using the kernel trick because it can transform the input space into a kernel feature space, commonly named a rotation, rather than performing a dimensionality reduction. Because new feature axes and KFDA projections are parallel, decision trees are used as a base classifier. To compare the proposed method with existing ensemble methods, we apply these to real datasets from the UCI and KEEL repositories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核Fisher判别分析（KFDA）的树型集成分类器——KFDA Forest，通过Bootstrap采样和随机变量子集划分来增强多样性，并利用KFDA在核特征空间中提升分类性能；实验在UCI和KEEL数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 提升集成分类器的准确性与多样性，尤其针对非线性数据结构的分类问题。
AI.method: 构建基于KFDA的树型集成方法（KFDA Forest），结合Bootstrap采样、随机变量子集划分，并在每个子集上应用KFDA；利用核技巧映射至高维特征空间，以决策树为基分类器。
AI.result: KFDA Forest在UCI和KEEL真实数据集上的分类性能优于现有集成方法。
AI.conclusion: KFDA Forest是一种有效提升分类精度的新型集成方法，尤其适用于非线性可分数据。

title: Do Recommendation Algorithms Work When Users Are LLM Agents? A Case Study on Moltbook
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly populating web platforms, raising a fundamental question for recommender systems: do algorithms designed for human users still work when users are LLM agents that may not have well-defined content consumption preferences? We study this question by formulating a forum recommendation problem on Moltbook, a large-scale social media platform exclusively for autonomous AI agents running on the OpenClaw framework. We evaluate eight recommendation methods spanning simple heuristic rules, matrix factorization, ItemKNN, graph-based, and sequential models on the task of predicting which forums an agent will engage with next. We find that simple popularity-based rules or item-side collaborative filtering leveraging the co-occurrence structure and a vote count feature outperform techniques that explicitly learn a user representation. The static agent persona descriptions, the closest analog to a preference profile, fail to add value in predicting engagement. This suggests that for AI agent users, recommendation may collapse from personalization to structural pattern matching. We show multiple lines of evidence that AI agents' content consumption behaviors differ from human users, providing a new angle for studying agent societies and designing robust recommendation algorithms as agents increasingly populate the web.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了面向AI代理用户的推荐系统，发现传统的个性化推荐方法效果不佳，而基于流行度和物品共现结构的简单规则表现更好，表明AI代理用户的推荐可能退化为结构性模式匹配。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）代理越来越多地出现在网络平台上，推荐算法是否仍适用于没有明确定义内容消费偏好的AI代理用户成为一个关键问题。
AI.method: 在专为自主AI代理设计的社交平台Moltbook上构建论坛推荐任务，评估了包括启发式规则、矩阵分解、ItemKNN、图模型和序列模型在内的八种推荐方法。
AI.result: 简单基于流行度的规则或利用共现结构与投票数特征的物品侧协同过滤优于需要学习用户表征的方法；静态代理画像描述无法提升预测效果。
AI.conclusion: AI代理用户的内容消费行为与人类显著不同，推荐系统可能从个性化转向结构性模式匹配，这对未来面向AI代理的推荐算法设计具有重要启示。

title: Multi-UAV Formation Cooperative Obstacle Avoidance and Adaptive Shape Deformation Control in Complex Environments Based on BI-APF-RRT and Affine Transformation
summary: Aiming at the problem that obstacle avoidance flexibility and formation integrity are difficult to coexist in multi-UAV formation motion in complex obstacle environments , and that the traditional artificial potential field (APF) method easily falls into local optima, a cooperative obstacle avoidance algorithm for multi-UAV formations integrating BI-APF-RRT and affine transformation is proposed. First, abandoning the traditional APF centroid path planning method , a goal-biased Bidirectional Artificial Potential Field method RRT (BI-APF-RRT) algorithm is adopted to conduct global collision-free path planning for the centroid of the leader formation. By introducing an improved artificial potential field and cubic B-spline interpolation, the smoothness and rapid convergence of the global path are ensured. Secondly, using the generated global path as the guiding trajectory for the formation's centroid , combined with an affine transformation matrix (including non-uniform scaling and rotation) , the formation can adaptively deform based on the distance to obstacles while moving along the optimal path. Finally, the followers track the leaders through a distributed control law , enabling the entire formation to safely cross complex obstacle areas without disassembling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合BI-APF-RRT与仿射变换的多无人机编队协同避障算法，解决了复杂障碍环境中避障灵活性与编队完整性难以兼顾、传统人工势场易陷入局部最优的问题。
AI.motivation: 多无人机编队在复杂障碍环境中难以同时兼顾避障灵活性与编队完整性，且传统人工势场（APF）方法易陷入局部最优。
AI.method: 提出BI-APF-RRT算法进行编队质心全局无碰撞路径规划，并引入改进人工势场与三次B样条插值提升路径平滑性与收敛速度；利用生成的全局路径作为质心引导轨迹，结合含非均匀缩放与旋转的仿射变换矩阵实现编队自适应变形； followers通过分布式控制律跟踪leader。
AI.result: 该算法使编队能在复杂障碍区域中沿最优路径安全穿越，同时保持完整性、避免解体。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效提升了多无人机编队在复杂环境下的协同避障能力与运动鲁棒性。

title: LC-ICL: Label-Guided Contrastive In-Context Learning for Robust Information Extraction
summary: There has been increasing interest in exploring the capabilities of advanced large language models (LLMs) in the field of information extraction (IE), specifically focusing on tasks related to named entity recognition (NER) and relation extraction (RE).Although researchers are exploring the use of few-shot information extraction through in-context learning with LLMs, they tend to focus only on using correct or positive examples for demonstration, neglecting the potential value of incorporating incorrect or negative examples into the learning process.In this paper, we present LC-ICL a novel few-shot technique that leverages both correct and incorrect sample constructions to create in-context learning demonstrations. This approach enhances the ability of LLMs to extract entities and relations by combining positive samples with negative samples annotated by error-cause labels. These labels expose more detailed error features in erroneous examples, enabling the model to understand why similar predictions fail and avoid repeating such errors during inference.Specifically, our proposed method taps into the inherent contextual information and valuable information in hard negative samples and the nearest positive neighbors to the test and then applies the in-context learning demonstrations based on LLMs. Our experiments on various datasets indicate that LC-ICL outperforms previous few-shot in-context learning methods, delivering substantial enhancements in performance across a broad spectrum of related tasks. These improvements are noteworthy, showcasing the versatility of our approach in diverse scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LC-ICL方法，通过在上下文学习中同时引入带错误原因标签的正负样本，提升大语言模型在命名实体识别与关系抽取等信息抽取任务中的少样本性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本信息抽取研究仅使用正确示例，忽视错误示例及其潜在价值；尤其缺乏对错误原因的显式建模，限制了模型对错误模式的理解与规避能力。
AI.method: 提出LC-ICL：构建含错误原因标签的负样本，并结合正样本及硬负样本、近邻正样本的上下文信息，设计增强型上下文学习提示，引导LLM在推理中识别并避免同类错误。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，LC-ICL显著优于现有少样本上下文学习方法，在NER和RE等任务上取得一致且显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 引入带语义标签的负样本可有效增强LLM对错误逻辑的理解，验证了错误驱动的上下文学习范式在信息抽取任务中的有效性与通用性。

title: X-Mind: Efficient Visual Chain-of-Thought via Predictive World Model for End-to-End Driving
summary: Predicting future states is essential for autonomous agents, yet current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models fundamentally lack this capability, relying instead on reactive perception-action mapping. While integrating Predictive World Models (PWMs) addresses this gap, existing approaches either incur prohibitive cascaded latency or act as shallow terminal tasks that fail to deeply embed forward-looking reasoning. To endow VLA models with this reasoning capability, we propose X-Mind. Rather than treating PWMs as an external auxiliary module, this framework internalizes them as the Visual Chain-of-Thought (Visual CoT). By enforcing a world rollout prior to action, the model is constrained to imagine future evolution first, yielding a driving policy that is robustly grounded in environmental dynamics and aware of the future consequences its actions will unfold. The challenge here is efficiency, and we tackle it on two fronts. First, we introduce a compact representation of visual thinking: an abstract sketch that fuses a Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) layout with abstract driving priors (e.g., navigation intents and traffic rules). Rather than rolling out dense future frames, the model reasons over this sketch as a mental canvas; aided by a Deep Compression Autoencoder (DC-AE), a 12-frame future rollout is reduced to merely 96 tokens, alleviating the long-context computational bottleneck. Second, to accelerate generation further, we propose a recurrent block diffusion scheme that unrolls the denoising steps across the layers of the large drive model, folding iterative refinement into the backbone's one forward pass. Trained and validated on large-scale real-world data, X-Mind achieves competitive end-to-end driving performance, which makes it a highly practical, low-latency solution that successfully deploys large-scale cognitive reasoning directly onto resource-constrained vehicle platforms.

AI.tldr: X-Mind 提出将预测性世界模型内化为视觉链式思维（Visual CoT），通过抽象草图表示和递归块扩散机制，在保证未来状态预测能力的同时显著降低计算延迟，实现低延迟、高鲁棒性的端到端自动驾驶。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型缺乏对未来状态的预测能力，仅依赖反应式感知-动作映射；引入预测性世界模型（PWM）虽可弥补该缺陷，但现有方法存在级联延迟过高或仅作为浅层终端任务、无法深度嵌入前向推理的问题。
AI.method: 提出X-Mind框架：1）将PWM内化为视觉链式思维（Visual CoT），强制模型先进行世界演化推演再决策；2）设计融合鸟瞰图布局与驾驶先验的抽象草图作为‘心理画布’，并用深度压缩自编码器（DC-AE）将12帧未来 rollout压缩至96个token；3）采用递归块扩散方案，在大模型主干的一次前向传播中完成去噪迭代。
AI.result: 在大规模真实世界数据上训练验证，X-Mind实现了具有竞争力的端到端驾驶性能，具备低延迟、高实用性，可部署于资源受限的车载平台。
AI.conclusion: X-Mind成功将大规模认知推理直接嵌入VLA模型，兼顾预测能力与实时性，为自主智能体提供了可落地的前向推理范式。

title: How Much Due Diligence Before You Bid? Learning in Intractable Takeover Auctions
comment: 21 pages, 13 figures, 2 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/zainnab-sparq/imperfect-information-deal-games
summary: When two companies bid to buy the same target, no one knows exactly what the target is worth. Each bidder pays for due diligence: costly, imperfect homework that sharpens its own private estimate before it bids. How much of that homework is worth buying? We build a simple computer model of the bidding contest and let it teach itself to bid well by playing against itself, the way a game engine learns chess. The economic question, how much diligence pays for itself, and the computational question, when the contest becomes too complex to solve exactly, are both controlled by a single thing: how many pieces of private information a bidder carries. Our main finding is that the right amount of diligence is modest and finite. It falls as diligence gets more expensive, and it falls further when both sides are doing their homework, because competition erodes the value of knowing more. We also test a recent claim from AI research: that simple, general self-play methods can rival the specialized, expensive algorithms usually built for games like these. Running on an ordinary laptop with no costly frontier AI, we find the simple methods are the best of the self-learning approaches, though purpose-built exact methods still win whenever the game is small enough to solve outright. The simple methods earn their keep only once the game grows too large to solve exactly, which is the regime real deals live in, and there we show they still find strong bidding strategies.
