The contribution is threefold: a cheap, reproducible way to study deal-making under uncertainty; a concrete, model-based answer to how much due diligence is worth buying; and evidence about when lightweight, general-purpose AI is good enough to replace specialized methods. We release all the games, code, and experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建一个简单的计算机模型来研究并购竞标中的尽职调查问题，发现适度且有限的尽职调查是最优策略，并验证了轻量级通用AI方法在复杂竞标场景中可替代专用算法。
AI.motivation: 当两家公司竞购同一目标时，目标真实价值未知，各方需投入成本进行尽职调查以提升私有估值精度；核心问题是：应投入多少尽职调查？同时探索通用自博弈AI能否替代传统专用算法。
AI.method: 构建基于私有信息数量调控的竞标博弈计算机模型，采用自博弈强化学习（类似AlphaZero）进行训练，并与精确求解算法对比；所有实验在普通笔记本上完成，无需前沿AI硬件。
AI.result: 1）最优尽职调查量是适度且有限的，随成本上升或双方同时调查而下降；2）轻量级自博弈方法在小规模可解情形下逊于专用精确算法，但在大规模现实场景中表现强劲；3）提供了可复现的分析框架及开源代码与实验数据。
AI.conclusion: 尽职调查存在边际收益递减，其最优投入由私有信息维度决定；通用AI方法虽非万能，但在现实复杂交易中已足够有效，为低成本、可复现的商业决策建模提供了新范式。

title: When Can Conformal Risk Control Certify LLM Outputs? Bounds, Impossibility, and Adaptation for Structured Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) deployed for structured generation (NER, JSON extraction, QA, and classification) lack formal reliability guarantees, and standard heuristic abstention policies miss user-specified risk targets by 7.5--12.5%. We characterize when conformal risk control (CRC) can certify structured LLM outputs and when it provably cannot. First, we prove an impossibility result: when the base risk (μ> α), any distribution-free method must abstain on at least ((μ-α)/(1-α)) examples, yielding a closed-form feasibility test: one can check whether CRC will work before running it. Second, we analyze a certification hierarchy across Hoeffding, empirical Bernstein, and a betting-based e-CRC bound, with strict gains in low-variance/large-sample regimes: the Hoeffding-to-Bernstein step delivers the largest gain (+37% certified configurations), while e-CRC adds value when calibration data is scarce (10% certification at 20% data versus 0% for Hoeffding). Third, we validate adaptive conformal inference (ACI) under cross-dataset shift, reducing risk-target violations from 71% to 21%, with residual failures concentrated exactly where the impossibility bound predicts. Across six open-weight models (3B--72B parameters), eight datasets, four tasks, and six nonconformity scores, hard NER/QA/CLS configurations are uncertifiable at (α= 0.10); relaxing to (α= 0.30--0.40) unlocks practical certification (47% NER, 40% QA, 60% CLS). The framework gives a three-step deployment recipe: check feasibility, select the bound and score, then mitigate shift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向结构化生成任务的大语言模型（LLM）可靠性保障框架——共形风险控制（CRC），通过理论分析与实验验证，明确了其适用边界、性能优势及实际部署路径。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在命名实体识别（NER）、JSON抽取、问答（QA）和分类等结构化生成任务中缺乏形式化的可靠性保证，且传统启发式拒绝策略难以精确满足用户指定的风险目标。
AI.method: 1）提出共形风险控制（CRC）框架；2）证明基础风险过高时的不可能性定理，并给出可行性检验公式；3）构建Hoeffding、经验Bernstein及e-CRC三类认证界限的性能层次；4）结合自适应共形推理（ACI）应对跨数据集分布偏移；5）在6个开源大模型、8个数据集、4类任务上系统评估。
AI.result: 1）理论层面：给出了CRC可行性的闭式判据；2）实证层面：经验Bernstein比Hoeffding提升37%可认证配置，e-CRC在小样本下显著优于Hoeffding；3）ACI将风险目标违反率从71%降至21%，失败点与理论不可行区域高度吻合；4）α=0.1时硬结构化任务不可认证，α放宽至0.3–0.4后实现可观认证率（NER 47%，QA 40%，CLS 60%）。
AI.conclusion: CRC为结构化LLM输出提供了首个兼具理论保证与实用性的风险可控认证框架，其三步部署流程（可行性检验→界限与分数选择→偏移缓解）可广泛应用于可信AI系统构建。

title: SABER-Math: Automated Benchmark for Information Retrieval Evaluation in Mathematics
comment: Accepted in the 3rd AI for Math Workshop at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), Seoul, South Korea, 2026
summary: As agentic AI systems tackle more complex mathematical tasks, they increasingly rely on information retrieval (IR) to search problem databases, theorem libraries, and educational resources. However, choosing the right retriever remains difficult, as it is infeasible to directly isolate its effect on downstream performance. On the other hand, existing retrieval-specific benchmarks often fail to capture fine-grained mathematical relevance, penalizing relevant documents. We address this gap by introducing SABER-Math, the first fully automated benchmark for evaluating mathematical IR without expert annotation. Starting from 283K high-school-level math problems with solutions, SABER-Math builds challenging reranking tasks in three steps: (i) first, LLMs extract concise solution summaries and mathematical topics for each problem; (ii) then, per-query relevant documents are discovered using ontology topic-based and lexical solutions-summary-based similarities, and (iii) finally, a Swiss-style LLM preference tournament produces fine-grained relevance ratings for the documents. We evaluate lexical retrievers, specialized mathematical retrieval systems, and recent embedding models. We find that while modern embedding models substantially outperform classical and math-specific baselines, even the strongest systems struggle in symbol-heavy domains like Algebra and Calculus. Importantly, we show that general-purpose IR benchmarks such as MTEB do not reliably predict mathematical performance, especially for recent embedding models, highlighting the need for math-specific retrieval benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SABER-Math，首个无需人工标注、全自动构建的数学信息检索基准，用于评估检索器在数学任务中的细粒度相关性识别能力，并揭示通用IR基准无法可靠预测数学检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数学信息检索评估方法存在两大问题：一是难以分离检索器对下游任务性能的影响；二是已有检索基准无法准确刻画数学文档间的细粒度相关性，常误判相关文档。
AI.method: 基于28.3万道高中数学题，通过三步构建SABER-Math基准：（i）用LLM提取每题的解法摘要与数学主题；（ii）结合本体主题相似性和摘要词法相似性识别每查询的相关文档；（iii）采用瑞士式LLM偏好竞赛生成细粒度相关性评分。
AI.result: 现代嵌入模型显著优于传统及数学专用检索器，但在代数、微积分等符号密集领域仍表现不佳；通用IR基准（如MTEB）无法可靠预测模型在数学检索上的实际表现。
AI.conclusion: SABER-Math填补了数学信息检索评估的空白，证明需专用于数学领域的检索基准，且当前嵌入模型在符号化推理任务中仍有明显局限。

title: Cross-Spectral Stereo Inertial Odometry
summary: Standard stereo VIO focuses exclusively on the benefit of metric scale via single-spectrum baselines, often overlooking the risks of spectral redundancy. This structural limitation leads to correlated failures, where both sensors simultaneously fail in degraded environments that affect their shared spectrum. Leveraging a cross-spectral system presents a complementary solution to this issue, yet the significant appearance gap between modalities renders standard matching ineffective. Existing deep learning-based matchers, while effective, introduce inference latencies that violate real-time constraints. To bridge this gap, we present an asynchronous real-time cross-spectral visual-thermal-inertial (VTI) system that temporally decouples high-latency deep matching from high-rate state estimation. Our architecture incorporates a spectral-aware weighting scheme that dynamically balances modality reliance based on photometric entropy and thermal noise, ensuring robustness against both abrupt lighting changes and thermal artifacts. Furthermore, we introduce a seamless handling mechanism for thermal Non-uniformity Correction (NUC) to maintain tracking continuity. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios confirm that our system overcomes spectral redundancy, yielding superior accuracy in nominal daylight while ensuring robustness in visually degraded environments. We will open source our code and data: https://github.com/seungsang07/cross-spectral-stereo-inertial-odometry

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种异步实时跨光谱视觉-热成像-惯性（VTI）系统，通过时序解耦高延迟深度匹配与高频状态估计，并引入光谱感知加权机制和热成像非均匀性校正（NUC）处理机制，解决了传统双目VIO因光谱冗余导致的共模失效问题，在光照正常和视觉退化环境下均表现出更高精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统立体视觉惯性里程计（VIO）依赖单一光谱（如可见光），在退化环境中易因光谱冗余导致双传感器同时失效；跨光谱系统虽具互补性，但模态间显著外观差异使标准匹配失效，而现有深度学习匹配器又难以满足实时性要求。
AI.method: 提出异步实时跨光谱VTI系统：1）时序解耦高延迟深度匹配与高频IMU/视觉状态估计；2）光谱感知加权方案，依据光度熵与热噪声动态平衡多模态置信度；3）无缝热成像NUC处理机制以保障跟踪连续性。
AI.result: 在多种场景下实验表明，该系统在常规日光下精度优于基准方法，在低光照、烟雾等视觉退化环境下仍保持鲁棒跟踪；有效克服光谱冗余问题。
AI.conclusion: 跨光谱异步架构与自适应加权机制可显著提升VIO在复杂环境下的可靠性与精度，为实时多模态感知提供了新范式。

title: EntroRouter: Learning Efficient Model Routing via Entropy Regulation
summary: Model routing balances solution accuracy and computational cost by selecting among models of varying capabilities. While recent multi-round frameworks interleave reasoning and planning, we identify a structural failure mode termed Trust Region Collapse. We demonstrate that the deep coupling of reasoning and routing, exacerbated by the dominance of strong pre-training priors under sparse supervision, leads to degenerate local optima where capable experts are systematically suppressed. To decouple these processes, we propose $\textbf{EntroRouter}$, a single-round routing framework that treats entropy regulation as a core objective. We first initialize the policy via Soft Supervision, fitting a distribution of suitable models to establish a high-entropy prior for exploration. Subsequently, we stabilize Reinforcement Learning using a Soft Anchor, which utilizes offline capability estimates to orchestrate controlled entropy contraction within a safe trust region. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EntroRouter retains 98.3% of the strongest expert's accuracy while reducing computational costs by 48.25%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EntroRouter，一种单轮模型路由框架，通过熵调节解耦推理与路由过程，避免信任区域崩溃问题，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有多轮框架中推理与路由深度耦合，导致信任区域崩溃，强专家模型被系统性抑制。
AI.method: 提出EntroRouter单轮路由框架：先通过软监督初始化高熵策略以促进探索，再利用基于离线能力估计的软锚点进行强化学习，实现信任区域内可控熵收缩。
AI.result: 实验表明EntroRouter在保留最强专家98.3%准确率的同时，计算成本降低48.25%。
AI.conclusion: 解耦推理与路由并显式调控熵，可有效避免局部退化，提升模型路由的鲁棒性与效率。

title: Stochastic Optimal Control Sampling for Diffusion Inverse Problems
summary: Benefiting from the strong ability to capture data distributions, diffusion models have become powerful tools for solving image inverse problems. The key is to controllably steer the sampling trajectory toward the measurements while respecting the diffusion prior. In this work, we introduce Stochastic Optimal Control Sampling (SOCS), which models the denoising process as a dynamical system and injects control signals via SOC. Previous SOC-based approach addresses inverse problems by optimizing over the entire trajectory, which is computationally expensive. In contrast, we derive a closed-form control update and apply it at each sampling step, pulling the measurement-consistent clean prediction back onto the denoising flow. In SOCS, we can readily modulate the control strength to align with the diffusion model's native capabilities and thereby enhance perceptual quality. Our method is compatible with a variety of linear stochastic differential equation backbones. Extensive experiments across a broad spectrum of image inverse tasks demonstrate that SOCS achieves accurate measurement-aligned reconstructions with improved visual fidelity and stronger quantitative performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为随机最优控制采样（SOCS）的新方法，用于改进扩散模型在图像逆问题中的重建质量。该方法将去噪过程建模为动力系统，并通过随机最优控制（SOC）在每一步采样中引入闭式控制更新，以高效地将预测拉回符合测量约束的去噪流，同时提升感知质量和定量性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于随机最优控制（SOC）的方法需在整个采样轨迹上优化，计算开销大；而扩散模型虽强大，但在逆问题中难以兼顾测量一致性与生成质量。
AI.method: 将扩散去噪过程建模为动力系统，推导出每步采样的闭式随机最优控制更新公式，在采样过程中实时注入测量引导信号，并支持控制强度调节以匹配扩散模型自身能力。
AI.result: SOCS在多种图像逆问题（如超分辨率、去模糊、压缩感知等）上实现了更准确的测量对齐重建，视觉保真度和PSNR/SSIM等指标均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SOCS是一种高效、通用且即插即用的扩散采样控制框架，显著提升了扩散模型在逆问题中的实用性与性能平衡。

title: Agent-Computer Observation Interfaces Enable Dynamic Computer Use
summary:
SWE-agent established the action interface as an underexplored design axis for software-engineering agents; we make the analogous case for the observation interface in computer-use (CU) agents. Current CU agents, closed and open-source alike, tie observation to action--one screenshot every 3-5 s, no audio--leaving them blind and deaf between screenshots to video, animations, transient UI events, meetings, and spoken instructions. We introduce the Agent-Computer Observation Interface (AOI), a model-agnostic perception layer that decouples continuous, adaptive observation from discrete actions through three gated components: inter-step keyframe capture, volume-gated audio transcription, and CU-model-generated visual narration that persists as text. Each produces almost nothing on static, silent content, reducing to the standard loop without degrading it.
  On DynaCU-Bench (100 dynamic browser tasks plus a 50-task static control), CU models from 7B to frontier scale gain +17 to +48 pp over their screenshot baselines with zero retraining, turning tasks that are near-impossible from periodic screenshots into largely solved ones. The gap is starkest on audio: on a spoken-content subset AOI agents solve every task, whereas streaming voice models hear accurately but cannot act on what they hear without the scaffold. The decomposition is as informative as the headline gain: keyframe selection turns out not to matter--the value comes from narrating captured frames into persistent text--and the interface is not a fixed bundle, since on a newer model (Gemini 3 Flash) the keyframe stream actively regresses through image-token dilution, so its components must be selected per model rather than shipped as one configuration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent-Computer Observation Interface (AOI)，解耦连续自适应观测与离散动作，通过关键帧捕获、音量门控语音转录和视觉叙述生成三项机制提升计算机使用（CU）代理的感知能力，在DynaCU-Bench上显著提升任务成功率，且无需模型重训练。
AI.motivation: 现有CU代理将观测与动作绑定（如每3-5秒截图一次、无音频），导致其在视频、动画、瞬态UI事件、会议及语音指令等动态场景中‘视而不见、听而不闻’，观测接口设计被严重忽视。
AI.method: 提出模型无关的AOI感知层，包含三个门控组件：1）步间关键帧捕获；2）音量门控音频转录；3）CU模型生成的持续性视觉文本叙述。三者均在静态无声内容下近乎零输出，兼容传统循环。
AI.result: 在DynaCU-Bench（100个动态+50个静态浏览器任务）上，7B至前沿规模CU模型使用AOI后任务准确率提升17–48个百分点，无需任何微调；在语音子集上AOI代理100%解决任务，而纯流式语音模型虽能听清却无法有效行动；分析表明视觉叙述文本化是核心增益来源，关键帧选择本身不重要；且AOI组件需按模型定制（如Gemini 3 Flash因图像token稀释反而退化）。
AI.conclusion: 观测接口是CU代理的关键设计维度；AOI通过解耦与自适应感知显著增强代理对动态多模态环境的理解与响应能力，其模块化、模型适配特性为未来CU代理架构提供新范式。

title: Statistically Indistinguishable, Operationally Distinct: A Formal Barrier for Tabular Foundation Models
comment: Accepted at the 2nd ICML Workshop on Foundation Models for Structured Data, 2026
summary: Tabular foundation models cannot reason about data produced by running systems without access to the rules that govern them. We make this statement falsifiable. The \emph{Operational Turing Test} (OTT) constructs pairs of legal and rule-violating database states whose $1$- and $2$-way column-value marginals match to a total variation of $<0.02$; Le~Cam's lemma then bounds any values-only classifier at $\geq0.49$ Bayes error. Three values-only baselines (XGBoost, TabICL, TabPFN) hit the bound exactly (accuracy $0.50$, pre-registered two one-sided tests (TOST) $p<0.002$), raw row-level access does not help, exposing relational value consistency closes most of the gap, and only a classifier fed by seven executable rule-derived audits reaches $1.00$ classification accuracy. In three matched $100$-state frontier large-language-model (LLM) runs, models given the schema, trigger source, rule tables, and state files classify at most $2/50$ legal states as LEGAL; GPT-5.5 accepts $0/50$ legal states even with higher reasoning effort and a Structured Query Language (SQL) executor. The access-ladder pattern also appears on a second schema with structurally distinct rule families (banking ledger: cross-row balance, cumulative aggregate). The barrier is identifiability, not capacity: scale, data, and richer features cannot cross it without operational grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出操作图灵测试（OTT），证明仅依赖数据值的模型无法识别数据库状态是否符合业务规则，必须结合可执行规则审计才能实现准确判断。
AI.motivation: 现有表格基础模型缺乏对系统运行规则的理解能力，难以判断数据状态是否合法。
AI.method: 设计操作图灵测试（OTT），构造统计特征高度相似但合法性相反的数据库状态对，并评估不同输入模态（仅值、行级、规则审计）下各类模型的分类性能。
AI.result: 仅基于值的模型（XGBoost/TabICL/TabPFN）准确率约0.5；加入可执行规则审计后达1.0；LLM即使获得schema、SQL执行器等仍几乎无法识别合法状态。
AI.conclusion: 识别规则一致性本质上是可识别性问题而非模型容量问题，必须引入操作性规则知识，单纯扩大规模或增加特征无效。

title: POEM: Partial-Order Enhanced Real-Time Sequential Modeling for Recommendation
summary: Real-time recommendation systems suffer from the dynamic drift of user interests and varying contextual conditions. Conventional sequential recommendation models only exploit static historical click sequences, which fail to capture instant preference changes and overlook structured signals hidden within the multi-stage ranking pipeline of industrial recommendation systems. To tackle these limitations, we propose POEM (Partial-Order Enhanced Modeling), a new real-time sequential modeling framework built upon intrinsic partial-order relations from the recommendation cascade. POEM takes real-time multi-task ranking scores (including predicted CTR and predicted watch duration) generated by upstream ranking modules as supervision to construct dynamic partial-order sequences, supporting fine-grained real-time interest modeling and consistent optimization between system ranking targets and user behavioral patterns. We summarize our core contributions as three aspects: (1) a partial-order guided sequence construction paradigm, which enriches vanilla chronological sequences via dynamic grouping and sampling conditioned on real-time ranking scores to reassess user interests per request; (2) a multi-objective score fusion module that unifies heterogeneous ranking signals into a compact quintuple representation with normalized rank-aware weighting; (3) a hierarchical sample learning strategy, which adopts system-favored high-ranked items and user positive feedback (e.g., long-duration watched videos) as positive instances, paired with graph-mined hard negatives and a margin-based pairwise loss for robust training. Fully deployed on Kuaishou online traffic, POEM achieves significant online gains: average per-user watch time lifts by 0.249% on the KS Single Page and 0.213% on the KS Lite Page.

AI.tldr: POEM是一种基于推荐级联中内在偏序关系的实时序列建模框架，利用上游多任务排序分数构建动态偏序序列，提升实时兴趣建模能力与系统目标一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统顺序推荐模型仅依赖静态点击序列，难以捕捉用户兴趣的瞬时变化，且忽略工业推荐系统多阶段排序中隐含的结构化信号。
AI.method: 提出POEM框架：(1) 偏序引导的序列构建范式；(2) 多目标分数融合模块，将异构排序信号统一为归一化五元组表示；(3) 分层样本学习策略，结合系统高排位项、用户正反馈及图挖掘难负样本进行鲁棒训练。
AI.result: 在快手线上全量部署后，KS单页和KS Lite页的平均单用户观看时长分别提升0.249%和0.213%。
AI.conclusion: POEM通过引入真实排序信号驱动的偏序建模，有效弥合了系统优化目标与用户行为建模之间的鸿沟，显著提升了实时推荐效果。

title: mamabench and mamaretrieval: Benchmarks for Evaluating Medical Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Maternal, Neonatal, and Reproductive Health
comment: 13 pages, 3 tables. Datasets and construction code linked in the paper
summary: Medical question-answering benchmarks rarely cover the maternal, neonatal, child, and reproductive-health questions a nurse-midwife asks, and, to our knowledge, no public chunk-level relevance benchmark exists for maternal-health guideline retrieval. We release two benchmarks that fill these gaps. mamabench is a scope-filtered QA set of 25,949 items assembled from seven existing expert-authored sources across multiple-choice, short-answer, and rubric-graded tracks; to help users calibrate the LLM judge that scores the rubric track, we re-scope HealthBench's physician-labelled meta-evaluation to the domain. mamaretrieval pairs 3,185 clinical queries with graded (0-6) relevance labels over a 63,650-chunk maternal-health guideline corpus, using a decomposed rubric that distinguishes a chunk that answers a query from one merely on its topic. Three decisions shape both: assemble and filter expert sources rather than author questions, grade relevance rather than binarise it, and measure and disclose the limits of the labels -- scope-classifier agreement, a frontier-judge check, and a pooling-completeness audit -- rather than treat them as an oracle. A companion paper uses the benchmarks to evaluate a deployed on-device assistant; both are released openly for research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两个新的母幼健康领域的基准测试数据集：mamabench（用于问答）和mamaretrieval（用于指南检索），强调基于专家来源构建、细粒度相关性标注与标签质量评估。
AI.motivation: 现有医学问答基准缺乏针对助产士等一线人员的母幼健康问题覆盖，且尚无公开的母幼健康指南细粒度相关性检索基准。
AI.method: 构建了两个新基准：mamabench（25,949题，含多选、简答与量规评分三类）和mamaretrieval（3,185查询配63,650个指南片段，采用0–6级细粒度相关性标注）；采用专家来源汇编、非二值化标注，并通过范围分类器一致性、前沿裁判检验与池完整性审计评估标签可靠性。
AI.result: 发布了两个高质量、可复现、开源的母幼健康领域基准，支持LLM评估与实际部署系统验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出并开源了首个面向母幼健康的细粒度问答与检索基准，强调标签透明性与质量验证，为临床AI系统评估提供了更贴近真实场景的工具。

title: BREIT: A Framework for Brain Stroke Reconstruction using Multi-Frequency 3D EIT
summary: Multi-Frequency Electrical Impedance Tomography (MF-EIT) is a non-invasive, low-cost modality that reconstructs electrical property distributions from boundary voltages. For stroke imaging, progress in 3D deep-learning reconstruction is limited by the lack of large-scale datasets with paired ground-truth (GT) volumes and by non-standardized pipelines for data generation, simulation, and evaluation. We introduce BREIT, a modular framework for 3D MF-EIT stroke reconstruction providing: (i) a neuroimaging-to-EIT pipeline that converts CT/MRI into frequency-dependent GT admittivity volumes; (ii) a self-contained Python 3D Complete Electrode Model (CEM) forward solver for simulating MF-EIT voltages; and (iii) a 3D D-bar implementation supporting non-uniform electrode layouts. Building on BREIT, we propose dFNO-bar, which integrates Fourier Neural Operators into D-bar by learning a mapping from scattering data $t(ξ)$ to conductivity $σ(x){=}\Re\{γ\}$. We evaluate dFNO-bar against D-bar, Deep D-bar, and Gauss--Newton reconstructions on UCLH-matched synthetic data, and observe higher brain SSIM with comparable CC across noise settings. Code and data are publicly available at: https://github.com/djahiddj13/BREIT

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BREIT框架和dFNO-bar方法，旨在解决多频电学阻抗断层成像（MF-EIT）在卒中三维重建中因缺乏大规模配对真实数据及标准化流程所导致的深度学习进展受限问题。BREIT提供从神经影像生成频率依赖电导率真值、3D电极模型正向仿真及适配非均匀电极布局的D-bar反演三方面支持；dFNO-bar将傅里叶神经算子嵌入D-bar框架，直接学习散射数据到电导率的映射。实验表明其在脑区结构相似性（SSIM）上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 3D深度学习在MF-EIT卒中成像中的应用受限于大规模配对真值体数据缺失以及数据生成、仿真与评估流程不统一。
AI.method: 提出模块化BREIT框架：(i) 神经影像（CT/MRI）→ 频率依赖电导率真值体；(ii) 自包含Python 3D完全电极模型（CEM）正向求解器；(iii) 支持非均匀电极布局的3D D-bar实现；并基于BREIT构建dFNO-bar——将傅里叶神经算子（FNO）嵌入D-bar，学习散射数据t(ξ)到电导率σ(x)的映射。
AI.result: 在UCLH匹配的合成数据上，dFNO-bar相较D-bar、Deep D-bar和Gauss-Newton方法，在不同噪声水平下均取得更高的脑区结构相似性（SSIM），同时保持相当的相关系数（CC）。
AI.conclusion: BREIT为MF-EIT提供了可复现、标准化的3D重建基准框架；dFNO-bar展示了数据驱动与物理模型融合的有效性，提升了卒中相关电导率重建质量。

title: Faults in Our Formal Benchmarking: Dataset Defects and Evaluation Failures in Lean Theorem Proving
summary: Benchmarks for LLM-assisted theorem proving in Lean are often treated as intrinsically reliable because every solved instance comes with a machine-checked proof. However, the kernel only checks that a proof establishes a \emph{formal} statement; it does not verify that the statement faithfully encodes the intended informal problem, nor that evaluation harnesses are robust to trivial or adversarial solutions. We audit five widely used Lean theorem-proving benchmarks and their forks, using corpus-scale static checkers to surface 4,833 findings, including 398 mechanically certified issues such as counterexamples, vacuous theorems, and unsound axioms. We also document semantic defects such as missing hypotheses, problem simplification, incomplete or incorrect translations, and Lean-specific specification hazards. Beyond dataset construction, we survey evaluation-time failure modes and show, on corrected subsets, that defects can both inflate and deflate reported prover scores. We propose a fault taxonomy, a suite of automated checkers and recall-oriented semantic audit prompts, and release standards to guide the creation of formal math datasets and to make evaluation more reproducible and trustworthy. Our checkers, audit prompts, and corrected dataset snapshots are available at https://github.com/Shashi456/atp-checkers.

AI.tldr: 本文对五个广泛使用的Lean定理证明基准测试进行了系统性审计，发现大量形式化与语义层面的缺陷，提出故障分类法、自动化检测工具及语义审计提示，并发布修正数据集以提升评估的可靠性与可复现性。
AI.motivation: 尽管Lean定理证明基准测试因具备机器可验证证明而被视为可靠，但其形式化陈述可能未能准确反映原始非形式化问题，且评测框架易受平凡或对抗性解法影响，亟需系统性审计。
AI.method: 采用语料级静态检查器对五个主流Lean基准及其衍生版本进行大规模扫描，结合人工验证与语义分析，识别形式与语义缺陷；并调研评测阶段常见失效模式，评估缺陷对模型得分的影响。
AI.result: 共发现4833处问题，含398个经机械验证的严重问题（如反例、空洞定理、非良构公理）；揭示多种语义缺陷；证实缺陷会显著扭曲模型性能评估结果（既可虚高也可压低分数）。
AI.conclusion: 当前Lean定理证明基准存在严重可信度隐患；需建立标准化的数据集构建与评测流程，引入自动化检查与语义审计机制，以保障形式数学评测的严谨性与可信赖性。

title: Priced Motion Through Optimal Faces: A Normal-Fan Geometry for Non-Stationary Adversarial MDPs
summary: In a changing decision problem, standard dynamic-regret analyses have often equated the cost of non-stationarity to how far loss moves. However, it is simultaneously possible for a loss sequence to travel far and retain the same optimal policy, or for a small movement in loss to force the optimal policy to change completely. Thus, the size of the movement through loss variation, transition variation, or comparator path length describe the adversary's motion, but not the cost of that motion to the control problem. For a more faithful analytic interpretation, this paper develops a normal-fan geometry for finite-horizon adversarial MDPs with fixed transitions. Occupancy measures form a polytope, and each loss vector exposes an optimal face of that polytope. Non-stationarity in rewards is therefore a path through the normal fan, where motion inside one cone leaves the optimal face unchanged, while crossing a wall may carry regret. We pose the notion of a face-crossing price, which is the minimum regret incurred by remaining on the previous optimal face under the new loss. For any learner that tracks the previous face, dynamic regret decomposes exactly into intrinsic priced face motion plus within-face selection error. The resulting theory separates consequential from harmless non-stationarity, where loss variation can be arbitrarily large at zero price, and identical one-coordinate variation can hide horizon-scale differences in regret.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于法锥（normal-fan）几何的新框架，用于分析有限时域对抗性马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中的动态遗憾，强调非平稳性的真正代价在于最优策略面（face）的切换，而非损失函数的变化幅度；引入‘面穿越代价’（face-crossing price）概念，使动态遗憾可精确分解为‘有价面运动’与‘面内选择误差’两部分。
AI.motivation: 标准动态遗憾分析将非平稳性代价等同于损失函数变化的大小，但实际中损失大幅变动可能不改变最优策略，而微小变动却可能导致策略剧变；因此需更本质地刻画非平稳性对控制问题的真实影响。
AI.method: 构建基于占用度量（occupancy measure）多面体的法锥几何结构，将非平稳奖励建模为法锥中的路径；定义‘面穿越代价’作为滞留旧最优面在新损失下的最小遗憾；据此对动态遗憾进行精确分解。
AI.result: 建立了动态遗憾的精确分解公式：总遗憾 = 面穿越代价之和 + 面内选择误差；证明了该框架能区分‘有代价’与‘无代价’的非平稳性，揭示传统度量（如路径长度）的误导性。
AI.conclusion: 非平稳性的真正分析粒度应是策略结构（即最优面）的变化，而非损失空间中的欧氏运动；法锥几何与面穿越代价提供了更忠实、更具解释性的动态遗憾理论基础。

title: Diagnosing and Mitigating Retrieval Bottlenecks in LLM-Based Cold-Start Recommendation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as rerankers in recommender systems, with the expectation that semantic understanding will help in cold-start and long-tail regimes. We test this assumption with a five-domain benchmark that explicitly separates reranking quality from retrieval coverage. In a positive-controlled regime where the gold item is guaranteed present, calibrated LLM rerankers fail to consistently outperform strong collaborative and content baselines under natural traffic, and within-family scaling from Qwen3-8B to Qwen3-32B narrows but does not close the gap on most domains. In a retrieval-realistic regime where the gold item is not injected, the bottleneck is more severe: standard single retrievers place the gold item in a 200-item pool only 4.6-22.9% of the time, largely because 32-91% of cold-start targets are brand-new items with no training interactions. We introduce LHF, a validation-trained learned hybrid fusion layer over a multi-retriever union pool, as a retrieval-side realizability baseline. LHF is the only combiner we test that beats every single retriever on all five domains and recovers 17-61% of oracle coverage headroom on content-rich domains, but only 5-7% on collaboratively strong domains. End-to-end experiments reveal the remaining mismatch: learned non-LLM ranking exploits the LHF pool, while prompt-level LLM reranking often degrades it. LLMs exhibit pockets of semantic cold-start advantage, especially in text-rich domains when the item is already present, but this advantage is largely unreachable in current retrieve-then-rerank pipelines. We release the benchmark protocol, splits, prompts, evaluation tooling, and archived reproducibility artifacts: data at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20991039 and code at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20993306.

AI.tldr: 本文通过五领域基准测试发现，大语言模型（LLM）作为重排序器在推荐系统中并未如预期般显著提升冷启动和长尾场景性能；其语义优势受限于检索阶段的覆盖瓶颈，尤其在无交互的新物品上；提出LHF多检索器融合方法可部分缓解该问题，但LLM重排序在端到端流程中常损害检索结果。
AI.motivation: 验证LLM作为重排序器是否真能在冷启动和长尾场景中提升推荐效果，尤其是其语义理解能力能否弥补传统方法的不足。
AI.method: 构建五领域基准，区分重排序质量与检索覆盖率；设计正向控制（gold item必在）与检索真实（gold item不保证存在）两种实验设置；提出LHF（Learned Hybrid Fusion）多检索器融合方法，并对比LLM重排序与非LLM学习型排序在端到端表现。
AI.result: 在正向控制下，校准后的LLM重排序未持续超越协同/内容基线；在真实检索下，单检索器对冷启动新物品召回率极低（4.6%-22.9%）；LHF在所有领域均优于单检索器，但在协同强域仅恢复5-7%的oracle覆盖余量；LLM重排序常降低LHF池效果。
AI.conclusion: LLM在重排序阶段虽有局部语义冷启动优势（尤其文本丰富域且item已存在时），但受限于检索覆盖瓶颈，在当前retrieve-then-rerank架构中难以发挥；提升推荐系统性能需更关注检索侧可实现性而非仅优化重排序。

title: Analytic Concept-Centric Memory for Agentic Embodied Manipulation
summary: Long-horizon embodied manipulation requires agents to remember persistent objects, track changing scene states, and reuse prior interaction knowledge. However, existing agent memories are often stored as unstructured histories or embedding-based records, making it difficult to retrieve manipulation-relevant object parts, physical states, action effects, and executable skills. We propose an analytic concept-centric memory framework for agentic embodied manipulation. Our memory organizes experience around structured analytic concepts, where objects are represented by semantic parts, parametric templates, grounded poses, affordances, and manipulation states. It further connects object and scene memories with transition memory for action-induced state changes and skill memory for template-grounded and policy-grounded execution. At runtime, the agent performs structured coarse-to-fine retrieval to identify relevant objects, states, transitions, and skills, supporting state-consistent reasoning and skill reuse. Experiments on memory-dependent manipulation, articulated-object generalization, real-world memory evaluation, and ablations show that our approach improves task completion, retrieval accuracy, object re-identification, and cross-object skill generalization over unstructured and embedding-based memory baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向具身操作的分析性概念中心记忆框架，通过结构化表示对象部件、状态、动作效果和技能，提升长时程操作中的记忆检索与技能复用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体的记忆多为非结构化历史或嵌入式记录，难以有效检索与操作相关的对象部件、物理状态、动作效应和可执行技能。
AI.method: 构建以分析性概念为中心的记忆框架，将对象表示为语义部件、参数化模板、定位姿态、功能性和操作状态，并通过转换记忆和技能记忆关联对象、场景及其状态变化与执行策略；运行时采用结构化的由粗到细检索机制。
AI.result: 在记忆依赖操作、关节物体泛化、真实世界记忆评估及消融实验中，该方法在任务完成率、检索精度、物体重识别和跨物体技能泛化上均优于非结构化和嵌入式记忆基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、概念驱动的记忆表示能显著增强具身操作智能体的状态一致性推理与先验知识复用能力。

title: To Reason or to Fabricate: Reasoning Without Shortcuts via Hint-Anchored Pairwise Aggregation
summary: While reinforcement learning (RL) significantly enhances LLM reasoning, its efficacy is severely undermined by Pre-RL data overlap, where RL datasets overlap with pretraining or SFT corpora, causing models to exploit shortcuts by memorizing correct answers and fabricating post-hoc reasoning. To address this, we introduce HIPPO, a novel RL framework that integrates hint-injected aggregation with a tailored pairwise reward model. By utilizing hint injection to deliberately trigger overlap-induced behaviors, the resulting traces naturally serve as explicit anchors for pairwise comparison. This provides highly discriminable preference signals, enabling a lightweight judge model to reliably distinguish genuine reasoning deduction from shortcut-driven rationalization, while the pairwise formulation ensures stable and robust optimization compared to standard PRMs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HIPPO yields substantial improvements over standard baselines and generalizes effectively to out-of-distribution general tasks, showing it extracts authentic, transferable reasoning skills rather than superficial shortcut patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HIPPO框架，通过提示注入和成对奖励模型解决强化学习中预训练数据重叠导致的捷径依赖问题，显著提升大语言模型的真实推理能力。
AI.motivation: 强化学习（RL）虽能增强大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，但当RL数据与预训练或监督微调（SFT）数据重叠时，模型倾向于记忆答案并伪造推理过程，削弱RL效果。
AI.method: 提出HIPPO框架：1）引入提示注入（hint-injected aggregation）主动触发重叠诱导行为；2）构建定制化成对奖励模型（pairwise reward model），利用生成轨迹作为锚点进行成对偏好比较，以区分真实推理与捷径式合理化。
AI.result: HIPPO在多个基准上显著优于标准RL基线，并在分布外任务上表现出强泛化性，验证其能提取可迁移的真实推理能力而非表面捷径模式。
AI.conclusion: HIPPO有效缓解了Pre-RL数据重叠带来的捷径学习问题，通过可解释的成对判别机制提升了RL训练的鲁棒性与真实性，为可信LLM推理提供了新范式。

title: Virtual Ring Try-On
summary: This paper presents an innovative approach that enables the users to capture their hand and try the jewel ring on their hand. The user captures the image of the hand using the React Native base GUI of the mobile application and selects the ring that the user wants to try, and the output image will have the user's hand with the ring image. This approach is implemented using a combination of MediaPipe hand point detection and YOLO-V8 custom object detection. The hand image uploaded by the user first undergoes mediapipe hand point detection. It will give the hand points and a Region of Interest mask where the ring is going to be placed. Then the ring is passed through YOLO object detection, in which ring points are detected, and background is removed. After that, using vector algebra, the angular discrepancy between the finger's reference axis and the ring's principal axis is computed. Also, ring size is rescaled according to finger thickness, preserving the aspect ratio to maintain perceptual realism. Then the ring is placed on the hand image and the output image is generated and shown on the user screen.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MediaPipe和YOLO-V8的虚拟试戴戒指方法，通过手部关键点检测、环状物姿态与尺寸自适应调整，实现逼真的AR试戴效果。
AI.motivation: 为用户提供便捷、真实感强的虚拟试戴体验，无需物理试戴即可预览戒指佩戴效果。
AI.method: 结合MediaPipe进行手部关键点检测与ROI提取，利用YOLO-V8定制模型检测戒指关键点并抠图；通过向量代数计算手指参考轴与戒指主轴夹角，并按手指粗细缩放戒指尺寸以保持比例和真实感。
AI.result: 成功实现用户上传手部图像后实时叠加适配姿态与尺寸的戒指图像，输出视觉自然、定位准确的试戴效果图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在移动端（React Native）上可行且有效，融合多模型协同处理，在精度与实时性间取得良好平衡，具备实际应用潜力。

title: Cognitive World Models for Process-Level Social Influence Evaluation
summary: Social influence dialogue changes user behavior by altering internal cognitive states. The central evaluation question is whether the user's beliefs, desires, intentions, and emotions measurably change over the course of conversation, a process-oriented criterion that neither surface-level text metrics (BLEU/ROUGE) nor single-score LLM judgments can capture. We propose the \textbf{Cog}nitive \textbf{W}orld \textbf{M}odel \textbf{(CogWM)}, an LLM-based user model that reframes multi-turn dialogue evaluation from ``what did the user say'' to ``how did the user's internal cognitive state evolves.'' CogWM jointly predicts BDI/E cognitive states and user utterances and serves as both a user simulator and an evaluation platform, using a three-tier evaluation framework that covers turn-level fidelity, trajectory-level state dynamics, and task-level composite scoring. Trained via our \textbf{S}ummarize-\textbf{a}nd-\textbf{A}llocate \textbf{(SaA)} annotation pipeline on 150,454 user-turn samples across four social influence scenarios, CogWM achieves 77.6\% emotion accuracy (2.1$\times$ over GPT-5.5). In 3600 multi-agent discrimination trials, it distinguishes six commercial agents by their cognitive influence, with Llama-4-Scout ranking first (CTS +0.233). CogWM moves social influence dialogue evaluation from terminal judgment to process tracking. We have released our code\footnote{\scriptsize Code: https://github.com/lucianma05-create/CogWM} and models\footnote{Model: https://www.modelscope.cn/models/LucianMa/CogWM-14B}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CogWM（认知世界模型），一种基于大语言模型的用户模型，用于评估社交影响对话中用户内在认知状态（信念、欲望、意图、情绪）的动态演化，而非仅关注表面文本或最终结果；它通过三层评估框架实现对多轮对话的过程化建模与量化评估，并在多个指标上显著超越基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有对话评估方法（如BLEU/ROUGE或单点LLM打分）无法捕捉用户在社交影响对话中随时间变化的内在认知状态（BDI/E），而该变化才是衡量影响效果的核心过程性指标。
AI.method: 提出CogWM模型，联合预测用户认知状态（BDI/E）与话语输出；构建三层次评估框架（回合级保真度、轨迹级状态动态、任务级综合得分）；采用Summarize-and-Allocate（SaA）标注流水线，在15万+样本上训练。
AI.result: 在情绪识别准确率达77.6%，是GPT-5.5的2.1倍；在3600次多智能体判别实验中成功区分六种商业代理的认知影响力，Llama-4-Scout排名第一（CTS +0.233）。
AI.conclusion: CogWM将社交影响对话评估从终端判断转向过程追踪，为可解释、可量化的认知影响建模提供了新范式，并已开源代码与模型。

title: DiLaServe: High SLO Attainment Serving for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to conventional autoregressive language models. By generating multiple tokens in parallel during each denoising step, they offer higher inference throughput while maintaining competitive quality. However, realizing these throughput gains while meeting latency SLOs in a serving system requires addressing challenges introduced by DLMs' unique characteristics. These include navigating the speed-quality tradeoff created by confidence-based denoising, choosing appropriate parallelization levels across model instances under fluctuating load, and coordinating approximate KV caching mechanisms that introduce non-uniform per-step costs. To address these challenges, we present DiLaServe, a cluster-level serving system for DLMs. DiLaServe enables deadline-aware scheduling and adaptive load control through confidence-threshold adjustment, and dynamically reconfigures the cluster by solving a quality-aware optimization problem, while explicitly modeling the step-level heterogeneity introduced by approximate KV caching. Across multiple benchmarks and real-world traces, DiLaServe improves SLO attainment by up to 56.6 percentage points and reduces end-to-end request latency by up to 46\% while incurring less than 1\% accuracy drop.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiLaServe，一种面向扩散语言模型（DLMs）的集群级推理服务系统，通过置信度阈值调整实现截止时间感知调度与自适应负载控制，并建模近似KV缓存引入的步级异质性，动态优化集群配置，在保障质量前提下显著提升SLO达成率与降低延迟。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLMs）虽具备并行生成与高吞吐潜力，但其置信度驱动的去噪、动态负载下的并行度选择、以及近似KV缓存导致的非均匀步开销等特性，给满足延迟SLO的服务部署带来挑战。
AI.method: 提出DiLaServe系统：1）基于置信度阈值的截止时间感知调度与自适应负载控制；2）建模步级异质性（尤其来自近似KV缓存）；3）求解质量感知的集群动态重配置优化问题。
AI.result: 在多个基准和真实请求轨迹上，DiLaServe将SLO达成率最高提升56.6个百分点，端到端请求延迟最多降低46%，且准确率下降不足1%。
AI.conclusion: DiLaServe有效解决了DLMs在实际服务中面临的吞吐-延迟-质量协同优化难题，为下一代生成式AI模型服务提供了可扩展、SLO可靠的系统方案。

title: Know Before You Fetch: Calibrated Retrieval-Budget Allocation for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) typically retrieves a fixed number of passages for every query. This is wasteful when the reader already knows the answer, and it can be harmful when irrelevant or partially relevant passages distract the reader. We formulate adaptive RAG as calibrated retrieval-budget allocation: given a query, decide whether to answer closed-book, retrieve a compact context (k=1), retrieve a full context (k=5), or abstain. The contribution is a probability interface rather than a new raw uncertainty signal. We calibrate sequence log-probability and prefix-logit uncertainty signals into probabilities of correctness, then use these probabilities for graded context selection, selective abstention, and explicit latency/token trade-offs. Across core QA experiments on TriviaQA, Natural Questions, and MS MARCO, with auxiliary PopQA motivation and Qwen/Llama family checks, diagnostic out-of-fold calibration improves probability quality dramatically: for sequence log-probability, ECE drops from 0.275 to 0.062 on TriviaQA, 0.643 to 0.009 on NQ, and 0.711 to 0.031 on MS MARCO. Graded retrieval improves full-context and passage-budget frontiers for both our signal and TARG-style prefix entropy/margin, while retrieval-call AUC remains essentially tied with binary gating because k=1 is still a retrieval call. Held-out train/validation/test threshold experiments report deployable operating points. At matched-accuracy frontier operating points, a measured cost model reveals that gating is not universally faster: it increases latency by about 27% on Qwen3-8B but saves about 8% on Qwen3-32B. These results support a nuanced view of adaptive RAG: calibrated confidence is best understood as a reusable interface for allocating retrieval budget under task and system constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应检索增强生成（RAG）方法，通过校准模型输出的不确定性信号（如序列对数概率、前缀logit）为正确性概率，实现动态、分级的检索预算分配（如不检索、k=1、k=5或放弃回答），在多个问答数据集上显著提升校准质量与检索效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 固定数量检索在RAG中既浪费资源（当模型已知答案时），又可能引入干扰（当检索到无关或部分相关段落时）；需一种更细粒度、可部署的自适应机制。
AI.method: 将序列log-prob和prefix-logit等原始不确定性信号校准为‘答案正确概率’，以此作为统一概率接口，驱动分级上下文选择（closed-book / k=1 / k=5 / abstain）、选择性放弃及显式的延迟/Token权衡；采用诊断性out-of-fold校准提升概率可靠性。
AI.result: 在校准质量上，ECE大幅下降（如TriviaQA从0.275→0.062）；分级检索改善了完整上下文与总段落预算前沿；不同模型下检索门控对延迟影响各异（Qwen3-8B增27%，Qwen3-32B降8%）。
AI.conclusion: 校准后的置信度不应仅视为不确定性度量，而应作为在任务与系统约束下灵活分配检索预算的通用接口；自适应RAG需兼顾准确性、效率与部署可行性。

title: FalconTrack: Photorealistic Auto-Labeled Perception and Physics-Aware Vision-Based Aerial Tracking
summary: Vision-based aerial tracking is critical in GPS-denied environments. Reliable perception for tracking depends on large-scale labeled data, yet most photorealistic datasets rely on heavy manual annotation and are time-consuming to produce. We present FalconTrack, a unified perception-and-tracking framework that (i) leverages a photorealistic editable simulator for automated label generation and (ii) combines multi-head perception with physics-aware tracking for zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. FalconTrack provides an automated labeling pipeline in a Gaussian Splatting simulator that isolates target Gaussians from short object videos and composites them with randomized backgrounds to generate RGB, mask, class, and 6-DoF pose labels, producing about 10k labeled images in under 20 minutes. Using this dataset, we train a multi-head perception module with staged learning and reprojection consistency, and fuse its outputs with class-conditioned dynamics priors in an EKF for tracking. Our perception model outperforms two baselines and reaches 96-100% class accuracy in zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on three geometrically diverse objects and two environments, while maintaining consistent performance in unseen simulated and real scenes. In real hardware closed-loop visual tracking, the onboard system runs at about 25 Hz and achieves 100% success in sim-to-real F1-tenth and gate tracking in five trajectories across two environments, while a mask-centered vision baseline drops to 60% success on F1-tenth during fast out-of-view scenarios.

AI.tldr: FalconTrack是一个面向GPS拒止环境的视觉空中跟踪框架，通过高保真可编辑仿真器自动生成多模态标注数据，并结合多头感知与物理感知跟踪实现零样本仿真到现实迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的空中跟踪方法严重依赖大规模人工标注数据，而人工标注耗时耗力；同时，仿真到现实迁移性能受限于数据质量和跟踪算法鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出FalconTrack框架：1）在Gaussian Splatting仿真器中构建自动化标注流水线，分离目标高斯点并合成随机背景，生成RGB、掩码、类别和6-DoF位姿标签；2）采用分阶段学习与重投影一致性训练多头感知模块；3）将感知输出与类别条件动力学先验融合于扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）中进行跟踪。
AI.result: 在三个几何差异大的物体和两个环境中，零样本sim-to-real迁移下类别准确率达96–100%；真实硬件闭环跟踪达25Hz，F1-tenth与门框跟踪成功率100%，而掩码中心基线在快速出视野场景下成功率降至60%。
AI.conclusion: FalconTrack通过自动化仿真标注与物理感知融合跟踪，显著提升零样本sim-to-real跟踪鲁棒性与实时性，为GPS拒止环境下的自主空中跟踪提供了高效可行方案。

title: Which Tokens Need Context? A Reference-Based Analysis of Translation Responsibility Using Fertility and Entropy
comment: This is a work in progress. An extended version with machine translation output analysis and attention correlation is in preparation
summary: When humans translate, not every word depends equally on the surrounding context. Some tokens, particularly function words like pronouns and auxiliaries, rely heavily on preceding or following sentences, while others, such as proper nouns, do not. Understanding this inherent context sensitivity is essential for evaluating whether machine translation systems use context in human-like ways. However, existing approaches to analysing context usage rely on discourse-specific test sets or model internals, making them narrow or model-dependent. We propose a post-hoc, model-agnostic framework to quantify context sensitivity at lexical and syntactic levels using two measures derived from word alignments: fertility (number of target tokens generated per source token) and entropy (stability of fertility patterns across contexts). Using reference translations for three language pairs (German $\leftrightarrow$ English, English $\rightarrow$ Hindi) under four context conditions, we show that context selectively redistributes generative responsibility from source to context tokens without altering overall fertility. Function words show the largest fertility reductions, while content words remain stable, suggesting that context resolves ambiguity rather than adding new information. Our framework provides a ground-truth characterisation of selective context usage in human translation, establishing a diagnostic baseline for evaluating machine translation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种后处理、模型无关的框架，通过词对齐衍生的生育率和熵两个指标，量化人类翻译中词汇和句法层面的上下文敏感性，揭示上下文主要通过减少功能词的生成负担来消解歧义，而非添加新信息，为评估机器翻译模型的上下文使用提供了诊断基准。
AI.motivation: 理解人类翻译中不同词汇对上下文依赖程度的差异，是评估机器翻译是否以类人方式使用上下文的关键；但现有分析方法受限于特定语篇测试集或模型内部结构，缺乏普适性和客观性。
AI.method: 提出一种后处理、模型无关的分析框架，基于词对齐定义两个指标：生育率（每个源词生成的目标词数量）和熵（生育率模式在不同上下文中的稳定性），在三种语言对、四种上下文条件下，利用人工参考译文进行量化分析。
AI.result: 上下文选择性地将生成责任从源词转移到上下文词，但不改变整体生育率；功能词（如代词、助动词）生育率显著下降，实词（如专有名词）保持稳定，表明上下文主要用于消解歧义而非引入新信息。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次为人类翻译中的选择性上下文使用提供了基于真实译文的基准刻画，可作为评估机器翻译模型上下文建模能力的通用诊断工具。

title: PSP: Harnessing Position and Shape Priors for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Accepted to MICCAI 2026. This is the pre-review submitted version, not the camera-ready version. The final authenticated version will be available in the MICCAI 2026 proceedings
summary: Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation (FSMIS) offers a powerful solution to data scarcity but struggles to generalize across different imaging modalities. This performance collapse stems primarily from the drastic texture discrepancies between domains, which mislead models trained on source-specific intensity distributions. While existing methods attempt to align frequency or local texture features, they often fail to decouple semantic structure from domain-specific appearance. To address this, we identify a critical invariance: despite distinct imaging physics, the position and geometric shape of organs remain robustly consistent across modalities. Therefore, we propose a novel framework that harnesses Position and Shape Priors (PSP) for cross-domain FSMIS. Specifically, PSP first introduces a Position Coordinate Embedding (PCE) module to inject relative spatial coordinates for rapid organ localization. Subsequently, a Shape Prototype Modulation (SPM) module constructs domain-invariant structural prototypes via explicit shape priors, effectively filtering out texture noise. Furthermore, the Hybrid-Prototype Prediction (HPP) module adaptively calibrates the support prototype to the query feature distribution, mitigating feature misalignment. Extensive experiments on two public medical imaging datasets demonstrate that PSP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Position and Shape Priors（PSP）框架，利用器官位置与几何形状在跨模态医学图像中的不变性，提升小样本医学图像分割的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有小样本医学图像分割方法难以跨模态泛化，主要因不同成像模态间纹理差异大，导致模型依赖源域强度分布而失效；现有特征对齐方法未能有效解耦语义结构与域特异性外观。
AI.method: 提出PSP框架：1）Position Coordinate Embedding（PCE）模块注入相对空间坐标以快速定位器官；2）Shape Prototype Modulation（SPM）模块基于显式形状先验构建域不变结构原型，滤除纹理噪声；3）Hybrid-Prototype Prediction（HPP）模块自适应校准支持集原型以匹配查询特征分布。
AI.result: 在两个公开医学影像数据集上，PSP显著优于当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用位置与形状先验可有效缓解跨模态小样本分割中的纹理干扰，提升模型鲁棒性与泛化性。

title: UCOB: Learning to Utilize and Evolve Agentic Skills via Credit-Aware On-Policy Bidirectional Self-Distillation
summary: Skill memories can improve agentic reinforcement learning by reusing past experience as textual guidance, but retrieved skills are not oracular: they may help in one state while misleading the same policy in another. This makes the common privileged-teacher assumption fragile, namely that a skill-conditioned prompt can be treated as a fixed teacher for the no-skill prompt. We introduce UCOB, a framework for learning to utilize and evolve agentic skills via credit-aware on-policy bidirectional self-distillation. UCOB treats skill-conditioned and no-skill prompts as two on-policy context views of the same model, compares their return-to-go within the same task and anchor state, and uses the higher-return view as the local teacher. This local credit signal internalizes useful skill-conditioned behavior, corrects misleading skill usage, and guides task/state skill memory updates, utility-aware retrieval, and reflection self-training. Experiments on agentic tasks, including ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-QA, show that UCOB outperforms skill-free RL, skill-memory baselines, and self-distillation methods across model scales, with up to 23.5 and 18.0 point gains over SOTA baselines on ALFWorld and WebShop. Ablations and analyses further validate its core mechanisms and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UCOB框架，通过信用感知的在线策略双向自蒸馏，动态选择技能提示与无技能提示中回报更高的作为局部教师，从而提升智能体强化学习中技能记忆的利用与演化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设技能提示可作为固定教师指导无技能提示，但实际中技能可能在某些状态下有益、另一些状态下误导，导致该假设脆弱。
AI.method: UCOB将技能提示与无技能提示视为同一模型的两种在线策略上下文视图，在相同任务和锚点状态下比较其回报-to-go，并以高回报视图为局部教师；该机制支持技能记忆更新、效用感知检索与反思式自训练。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-QA等智能体任务上，UCOB显著优于技能无关RL、技能记忆基线及各类自蒸馏方法，在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别比SOTA提升23.5和18.0分。
AI.conclusion: UCOB通过引入局部信用信号实现技能使用的动态校正与演化，提升了技能记忆在复杂代理任务中的鲁棒性与有效性。

title: Few-Step Boltzmann Generators via Scalable Likelihood Flow Maps
summary: Recent progress in flow-based generative modeling has led to models that output high-quality samples while using only a small number of function evaluations. However, at present, there is a lack of similar advances in estimating the model likelihood. In particular, most existing methods either rely on restrictive architectures that enable exact calculations, or use stochastic approximations such as Hutchinson's trace estimator that introduce substantial variance. In this work, we introduce SCAlable LikeLihood distillation of flOw maPs (SCALLOP). SCALLOP builds on the recently proposed F2D2, a likelihood flow map model that can generate samples and their densities in a small number of function evaluations. While F2D2 uses Hutchinson's estimator during training, we introduce an alternative and more scalable likelihood distillation objective that is Hutchinson-free and admits a vectorized formulation. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of SCALLOP as a Boltzmann generator in molecular science, and further validate its benefit on image datasets. SCALLOP significantly reduces both training variance and training time while consistently improving performance compared to F2D2, and is competitive with the state-of-the-art while achieving up to 10x inference speedup over the fastest baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCALLOP方法，通过无Hutchinson估计的可扩展似然蒸馏目标，显著提升流式生成模型的似然估计效率与精度，在分子科学和图像数据上验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的生成模型虽能高效生成高质量样本，但在似然估计方面仍受限于架构限制或高方差的随机近似方法（如Hutchinson迹估计），亟需更高效、低方差的似然估计方案。
AI.method: 提出SCALLOP框架，基于F2D2模型，设计一种无需Hutchinson估计、支持向量化计算的似然蒸馏目标函数，实现更稳定、高效的训练。
AI.result: 在分子科学（作为Boltzmann生成器）和图像数据集上验证有效；相比F2D2显著降低训练方差与耗时，性能持续提升，并实现最高达10倍的推理加速，达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: SCALLOP为流式生成模型提供了更可扩展、更鲁棒的似然估计新范式，兼顾训练稳定性与推理效率，推动其在科学计算与图像建模中的实际应用。

title: From Extraction to Navigation: Progressive Retrieval with Indirectly Infinite Depth
summary: Modern large-scale recommender retrieval is shifting from static similarity matching to dynamic item space navigation, framing retrieval as iterative goal-driven graph traversal. Conventional item-to-item (i2i) methods fall into the "interest tunnel" and fail to excavate deep user interests, while existing index-based retrieval suffers from persistent "search drift", caused by static entry nodes and fixed graph topologies unable to track shifting real-time user intent. To resolve the above defects, we present IID-Nav, a framework modeling retrieval as stateful autonomous graph exploration with three core contributions: (1) A goal-aware navigation policy substituting passive neighborhood expansion with active intent routing supervised by a target discriminator; (2) A recursive state evolution mechanism supporting Indirectly Infinite Depth (IID) via cross-request state reuse, which enables logical unlimited-depth graph traversal without linearly rising inference latency; (3) A trajectory-aligned training paradigm equipped with graph hard negative sampling to stabilize optimization over full navigation paths. Evaluations on billion-level industrial datasets show IID-Nav surpasses mainstream retrieval baselines under strict latency budgets. Empirical results verify that our method alleviates search drift remarkably and retains high precision for deep retrieval paths, offering an efficient, robust retrieval solution for industrial recommendation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IID-Nav框架，将推荐检索建模为有目标的状态化图探索，通过目标感知导航策略、递归状态演化机制和轨迹对齐训练范式，有效缓解搜索漂移问题，在保持低延迟的同时提升深层检索精度。
AI.motivation: 现有item-to-item方法易陷入“兴趣隧道”，而索引式检索因静态入口节点与固定图结构导致“搜索漂移”，难以适应实时变化的用户意图。
AI.method: 提出IID-Nav框架：(1) 目标感知导航策略，以目标判别器监督主动意图路由；(2) 递归状态演化机制，支持跨请求状态复用，实现逻辑无限深度遍历且不增加推理延迟；(3) 轨迹对齐训练范式，结合图硬负采样稳定全路径优化。
AI.result: 在十亿级工业数据集上验证，IID-Nav在严格延迟约束下显著优于主流检索基线，显著缓解搜索漂移，并在深层检索路径上保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: IID-Nav为工业推荐系统提供了一种高效、鲁棒的动态检索方案，突破了传统静态相似匹配与固定图拓扑的局限。

title: Data-Driven Modeling and Control for Tethered Space Systems with Koopman-Informed Graphs
summary: Modeling tethered space systems is critical for advanced orbital operations. Flexible components such as tethers and space nets are integral to these systems but present significant control challenges due to their high dimensional, strongly coupled, and nonlinear dynamics. While data driven methods offer alternative modeling approaches, they frequently struggle with long term predictive stability and spatial generalization. To address this, we propose the Koopman Graph Dynamics (KGD) framework to learn the structural dynamics by integrating the global linear evolution of the Koopman operator with the local topological priors of Graph Neural Networks. Building upon this representation, we develop a KGD based Model Predictive Control strategy for tethered space systems. Subsequently, the ground experiments on flexible tether and space net demonstrate the high precision modeling capabilities of the proposed method. Crucially, the framework exhibits exceptional capacity for spatial transfer without retraining. Models trained exclusively on small configurations successfully predict and control significantly larger, unseen physical scales. Furthermore, the orbit simulations within a physics engine verify the effectiveness of the proposed approach for tethered space systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Koopman图动力学（KGD）框架，结合Koopman算子的全局线性演化与图神经网络的局部拓扑先验，实现对系绳和空间网等柔性空间系统的高精度建模与控制，并具备优异的空间泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 柔性系绳和空间网等部件具有高维、强耦合、非线性动力学特性，传统数据驱动方法在长期预测稳定性和空间泛化性方面表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出Koopman图动力学（KGD）框架，融合Koopman算子与图神经网络；在此基础上设计KGD-MPC控制器；通过地面柔性系绳/空间网实验和轨道物理仿真验证。
AI.result: KGD实现了高精度建模；模型在未经重训练前提下可成功迁移到更大尺度的未见系统；轨道仿真验证了其在系绳系统中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KGD框架有效解决了柔性空间系统建模与控制中的稳定性与泛化性难题，为先进在轨操作提供了新范式。

title: The Verbose Context Problem in Medical Records
summary: The verbose context problem occurs when structured concepts have token-inefficient textual representations. This bottleneck is acute in population health: cohort-level analysis of longitudinal patient records requires reasoning over thousands of medically-coded events, often exceeding 400K tokens in total. We present PopMedQA, a benchmark isolating this problem through computational tasks on groups of longitudinal patient records. We construct the benchmark using neopatient, a new library for language-controlled generation of artificial patient records. Through extensive ablations -- including prompting strategies, prompt compression, and agentic decomposition -- we find that domain-independent methods fail to alleviate the verbose context problem. There remains significant opportunity to exploit domain-specific structure in language model inputs for population-scale reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PopMedQA基准测试，旨在解决人口健康领域中结构化概念文本表示冗长导致的上下文长度瓶颈问题，并通过新工具neopatient生成人工患者记录进行验证。
AI.motivation: 结构化概念在文本表示中存在token效率低的问题，在人口健康领域尤为突出，例如队列级纵向患者记录分析常需处理超400K token，造成模型推理瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建PopMedQA基准测试，利用新开发的neopatient库生成可控语言描述的人工患者记录；并通过提示策略、提示压缩和智能体分解等大量消融实验评估现有方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，通用领域的上下文压缩与推理方法无法有效缓解该领域中的冗长上下文问题。
AI.conclusion: 需深入挖掘医疗领域特有的结构信息以优化大语言模型输入，从而提升人群规模下的推理能力。

title: ViPSim: Collaborating Visual and Parameter Spaces for Consistent Long-Horizon Embodied World Models
comment: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2026
summary: Embodied World Models (EWMs) have emerged as a scalable and risk-free paradigm for advancing embodied intelligence, enabling the safety-critical evaluation of Vision-Language-Action systems. However, their reliability as evaluation benchmarks and foundational simulators is often hindered by the representation gap between low-dimensional actions and high-dimensional video synthesis. This gap results in a lack of geometric correspondence, manifesting as accumulated trajectory drift and inconsistent robot-object interactions during long-horizon rollouts. To bridge this gap, we propose ViPSim, a framework that achieves consistent long-horizon generation through the synergistic collaboration of Visual and Parameter Spaces. We define the Visual Space as a domain of explicit spatial priors, integrating pixel-aligned projections of end-effector pose, camera perspectives, depth-informed scene geometry, and robotic morphological masks to provide dense structural grounding. Concurrently, the Parameter Space serves as a domain of numerical drivers, injecting raw action sequences and camera matrices to provide precise motion guidance. By unifying these two spaces, ViPSim ensures that the generated states are simultaneously anchored by geometric boundaries and steered by numerical commands. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ViPSim is backbone-agnostic and significantly enhances trajectory consistency. Notably, our approach exhibits emergent capabilities in generating complex interactions with deformable objects (e.g., cloth folding) and maintains robust performance in out-of-distribution and cross-embodiment scenarios, providing a high-fidelity foundation for the automated evaluation and predictive control of embodied agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViPSim框架，通过协同视觉空间（含空间先验）和参数空间（含动作指令），弥合低维动作与高维视频合成间的表征鸿沟，显著提升长时程生成的轨迹一致性与几何准确性，支持复杂形变物体交互及跨形态泛化。
AI.motivation: Embodied World Models（EWMs）作为评估具身智能的安全平台，受限于低维动作与高维视频合成之间的表征鸿沟，导致几何失准、轨迹漂移和机器人-物体交互不一致。
AI.method: 提出ViPSim框架，构建两个协同空间：视觉空间（集成末端执行器姿态像素对齐投影、相机视角、深度感知场景几何、机器人形态掩码等显式空间先验）提供结构约束；参数空间（注入原始动作序列与相机矩阵）提供数值运动引导；二者统一实现几何锚定与数值驱动的联合生成。
AI.result: ViPSim具备骨干网络无关性，显著提升长时程轨迹一致性；展现出对可变形物体（如布料折叠）复杂交互的生成能力，并在分布外及跨具身形态场景中保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ViPSim为具身智能体的自动化评估与预测控制提供了高保真基础模拟器，有效解决了EWMs中动作-视觉表征不一致的核心挑战。

title: OSWorld2.0: Benchmarking Computer Use Agents on Long-Horizon Real-World Tasks
comment: 68 pages, 42 figures. Equal contribution: Mengqi Yuan, Zilong Zhou, and Xinzhuang Xiong
summary: Existing computer-use benchmarks fail to capture the realism, complexity, and long-horizon demands of real-world computer use, limiting their ability to reveal the limitations of frontier agents. We introduce OSWorld 2.0, a benchmark of 108 long-horizon computer-use workflows across everyday and professional tasks, designed to capture complex and challenging real-world phenomena. Each task represents a realistic end-to-end workflow that takes human users a median of about 1.6 hours to complete and requires an average of 318 tool calls with Claude Opus 4.7 using maximum thinking, compared with about 30 in OSWorld 1.0. OSWorld 2.0 targets challenge phenomena that are common in real workflows yet underrepresented in prior benchmarks, spanning interaction-design challenges such as streaming interaction and dynamic environments, as well as agent-pattern challenges such as cross-source reasoning, implicit-state inference, and visual-spatial precision. Tasks are grounded in authentic input artifacts and cross-referenced against realistic stateful user profile data, and include separate safety reports auditing safety-sensitive execution. Under our primary binary-completion metric at 500 steps, Claude Opus 4.8 with maximum thinking and batched tool calls scores best but still completes only 20.6% of tasks at a 54.8% partial score; GPT-5.5 is far more token-efficient yet plateaus near 13%. These results show that current agents are still far from professional-level computer use: rather than stumbling on basic GUI control or coding, they lose track of constraints, miss information that arrives mid-task, guess rather than ask the user, and skip verification, struggling most when a task hinges on hidden state they must recover.

AI.tldr: OSWorld 2.0 是一个面向真实世界计算机使用场景的新型长时序基准，包含108个高复杂度端到端工作流，揭示当前大模型智能体在隐状态推理、动态交互与跨源信息整合等方面仍存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机使用基准缺乏真实性、复杂性和长时序性，难以暴露前沿智能体的真实能力瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建 OSWorld 2.0 基准：涵盖108个真实任务，每个任务平均需318次工具调用，强调流式交互、动态环境、跨源推理、隐状态推断和视觉空间精度等挑战现象，并结合真实输入素材与用户档案数据，辅以安全审计报告。
AI.result: Claude Opus 4.8 在500步内仅完成20.6%的任务（部分完成率54.8%），GPT-5.5 效率更高但完成率约13%；失败主因是丢失约束、忽略中途信息、不主动澄清、跳过验证及无法恢复隐藏状态。
AI.conclusion: 当前智能体距离专业级计算机使用仍有巨大差距，核心瓶颈不在基础操作层面，而在高层认知与状态管理能力。

title: A Novel Latent-Class Attack and its Detection by Class Subspace Orthogonalization
summary: Deep learning, which in general relies on voluminous amounts of training data, is vulnerable to data poisoning attacks, including error-generic attacks and backdoors (Trojans). In this work, we propose a new data poisoning attack we dub a latent class attack. Here, all poisoned examples are from a class that is novel (unknown) for the given classification domain and are mislabeled to one of the known classes (the target class) of the domain, so that the model learns to recognize the novel class as a sub-class of the target class. Such attacks could be used e.g. to defeat AI-based access control systems, or could cause a "foe" to be classified as a "friend". We also propose a post-training defense to detect this attack, without any access to the training set. This detection approach builds on "class subspace orthogonalization" (CSO), a plug-and-play paradigm demonstrated to improve existing backdoor detectors. Here, CSO is used to seek an input (a putative unknown class instance) whose internal representation is not aligned with any of the known classes, and yet which is classified with confidence to one of these classes. Finally, specific to image classification domains, we propose a method for visualizing the estimated unknown class instance, providing explainability to our latent class detections.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型数据投毒攻击——潜在类攻击（latent class attack），即利用未知类别的样本并错误标注为已知类别，使模型将未知类误认为目标已知类的子类；同时提出一种无需训练数据的后训练检测方法，基于类子空间正交化（CSO）识别与已知类表征不一致但被高置信度分类的输入，并在图像领域提供可视化解释。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型易受数据投毒攻击（如后门攻击），而潜在类攻击可绕过传统防御，威胁AI访问控制系统等关键应用，亟需针对性检测机制。
AI.method: 提出潜在类攻击范式；设计基于类子空间正交化（CSO）的后训练检测框架，通过寻找内部表征与所有已知类均不对其齐但被高置信分类的输入来识别攻击；针对图像任务，提出可视化估计未知类实例的方法。
AI.result: 所提检测方法在多个图像分类基准上有效识别潜在类攻击，且无需访问训练数据；可视化方法增强了检测结果的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 潜在类攻击构成新型威胁，本文提出的CSO驱动检测方案及可视化技术为防御此类攻击提供了实用、可解释且无需训练集的解决方案。

title: Behind the Content: Wikipedia Mobile Views and Tourism Activity
summary: This study examines whether open digital traces can provide interpretable, high-frequency indicators of local tourism activity. We argue that the device composition of Wikipedia attention helps distinguish situated information use from remote planning: mobile pageviews are more likely to reflect on-site, contemporaneous information needs, whereas desktop pageviews capture temporally diffuse interest. Linking daily Accor hotel room-nights to Wikipedia city-page traffic for 704 French communes from 2018 to 2025, we find that mobile pageviews are positively associated with same-day hotel demand and dominate desktop traffic in joint specifications. The relationship is stronger in leisure-oriented destinations and in places with higher Wikipedia visibility. A micro-validation using daily attendance at six cultural attractions in Orl{é}ans shows the same pattern: mobile pageviews predict same-day gate counts, while surrounding leads and lags are close to zero. The findings position mobile Wikipedia traffic as a transparent, replicable nowcasting signal for tourism activity.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了维基百科的开放数字痕迹（特别是移动设备页面浏览量）能否作为解释性强、高频的本地旅游活动指标，发现移动页面浏览量与当日酒店入住率和文化景点入园人数显著正相关，优于桌面浏览量，可作为旅游活动的实时预测信号。
AI.motivation: 探索开放数字痕迹（如维基百科页面浏览量）是否能提供可解释、高频的本地旅游活动指标，尤其区分现场即时信息需求与远程规划行为。
AI.method: 将2018–2025年法国704个市镇的每日Accor酒店入住数据与对应城市维基百科页面流量（按设备类型细分）进行关联分析，并通过奥尔良六处文化景点的每日入园人数进行微观验证。
AI.result: 移动设备维基百科页面浏览量与同日酒店入住量及景点入园人数显著正相关；该效应在休闲型目的地和维基可见度高的地区更强；桌面浏览量贡献较弱或不显著。
AI.conclusion: 移动维基百科流量是一种透明、可复现的旅游活动实时预测（nowcasting）信号，具备实际监测与政策支持潜力。

title: STEAM: Self-Supervised Temporal Ensemble Advantage Modeling for Real-World Robot Learning
summary: Real-world robot learning increasingly relies on heterogeneous data, but demonstrations and rollouts often mix useful progress with stalls, corrections, and suboptimal behavior. Effective policy learning therefore requires frame-level advantages that distinguish reliable local progress from failures and regressions. We propose Self-supervised Temporal Ensemble Advantage Modeling (STEAM), a label-free method that learns such advantages from expert demonstrations. STEAM trains an ensemble of temporal-offset predictors on frame pairs within expert trajectories, using the normalized temporal offset between two frames as a self-supervised signal. Each predictor maps a frame pair to a distribution over temporal offsets, which is converted into a scalar advantage. STEAM then takes the minimum advantage across the ensemble to score mixed-quality rollout data conservatively. Across real-world bimanual towel folding, chip checkout, cola restocking, and single-arm pick-and-place tasks, STEAM identifies stalls, failures, and recoveries. When combined with CFGRL, STEAM further improves policy success rate by 59%, 54.3%, 23% and 16.2% over baselines, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标签的自监督方法STEAM，用于从专家演示中学习帧级优势信号，以区分机器人操作中的有效进展与失败/倒退，并在多个真实世界任务中显著提升策略成功率。
AI.motivation: 现实世界机器人学习依赖异构数据，但演示和 rollout 数据常混杂有用进展与停滞、修正及次优行为；需帧级优势信号来可靠区分局部进展与失败。
AI.method: 提出自监督时序集成优势建模（STEAM）：在专家轨迹内对帧对训练多个时序偏移预测器，以归一化时序偏移为自监督信号；每个预测器输出偏移分布并转化为标量优势；最终取集成最小优势实现保守评分。
AI.result: 在真实双臂毛巾折叠、芯片结账、可乐补货及单臂抓放任务中，STEAM成功识别停滞、失败与恢复；结合CFGRL后，策略成功率分别提升59%、54.3%、23%和16.2%。
AI.conclusion: STEAM是一种有效的无标签帧级优势建模方法，能稳健评估混合质量rollout数据，在多种真实机器人任务中显著增强策略学习性能。

title: Preference-ASR: A Preference-Aware Test Set for Benchmarking ASR in the Era of Speech LLMs
summary: Popular ASR test sets adopt inconsistent conventions for numbers, disfluencies, entities, and casing, while standard normalizers erase the format distinctions users care about. Current benchmarks therefore cannot measure whether a model follows user preferences for output style. We introduce PreferenceASR, a test set evaluating ASR systems on their ability to follow natural-language preference instructions across four categories: normalization, entities, disfluencies, and case. Built from seven open-source corpora via a two-stage LLM-assisted pipeline with human verification, it is evaluated with a preference-aware normalizer that selectively skips steps matching the active instruction. Benchmarking four models shows rankings shift across preference types, exposing quality differences traditional evaluation obscures. We publicly release the dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PreferenceASR数据集，用于评估ASR系统遵循自然语言偏好的能力，涵盖归一化、实体、不流利语和大小写四类指令；通过LLM辅助构建并人工验证，配合偏好感知归一器进行评测，揭示传统指标无法发现的模型差异。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR测试集在数字、不流利语、实体和大小写等方面采用不一致规范，标准归一化器抹除用户关心的格式差异，导致无法评估模型对用户输出风格偏好的遵循能力。
AI.method: 构建PreferenceASR测试集：基于七个开源语料，采用两阶段LLM辅助流水线生成，并经人工验证；设计偏好感知归一器，根据当前自然语言指令选择性跳过相应归一化步骤。
AI.result: 在四个ASR模型上的评测显示，不同偏好类型下模型排名显著变化，暴露出传统WER等指标所掩盖的质量差异。
AI.conclusion: PreferenceASR填补了ASR评估中用户偏好建模的空白，推动更贴近实际应用的语音识别系统开发，并已开源数据集。

title: CoGS: Compositional Dynamic Human-Object Scenes Gaussian Splatting from Monocular Video
summary: Reconstructing dynamic human--object interaction scenes from monocular video is difficult because the human, manipulated object, and background obey different motion models while sharing the same pixels. Existing dynamic radiance-field and Gaussian-splatting methods often entangle these components, causing object motion to leak into the human or static scene, and monocular human reconstruction remains underconstrained in regions that are rarely observed. We present CoGS, a compositional Gaussian-splatting framework for monocular human--object scene reconstruction. CoGS decomposes the video into three coordinated branches: an articulated human initialized from a complete canonical prior, a rigid object field driven by an estimated object trajectory, and a static scene field regularized by weak scene-only planar primitives when available. A six-stage optimization schedule first stabilizes the human and object independently, then fuses them with the scene under full-image supervision, visibility-aware human anchoring, object silhouette and motion constraints, and delayed scene regularization. This design keeps each component responsible for its own geometry and motion while allowing photometric evidence to correct the final composite. Experiments on HOSNeRF and NeuMan show that CoGS improves both human--object interaction reconstruction and in-the-wild human--scene rendering, achieving stronger fidelity and perceptual quality across full-frame and human-focused evaluations. Code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoGS框架，通过将单目视频分解为人体、物体和静态场景三个协调分支，并采用六阶段优化策略，实现了高质量的人-物交互场景重建。
AI.motivation: 单目视频中人、物体和背景遵循不同的运动模型但共享相同像素，现有方法容易混淆这些组件，导致运动泄漏和人体重建欠约束。
AI.method: CoGS是一种组合式高斯点绘框架，包含三个分支：基于完整规范先验的关节化人体、由估计轨迹驱动的刚性物体场、以及受弱平面先验正则化的静态场景场；并采用六阶段优化流程，逐步稳定各组件再融合。
AI.result: 在HOSNeRF和NeuMan数据集上，CoGS显著提升了人-物交互重建质量和野外人-场景渲染效果，在全帧和聚焦人体的评估中均表现出更高保真度与感知质量。
AI.conclusion: CoGS通过解耦建模与分阶段优化，有效分离了人、物、景的几何与运动，同时利用光度证据优化整体合成效果，为单目动态交互场景重建提供了新范式。

title: Learned Coordination Conventions in Cooperative MARL: Measuring the Translation Gap Between Theory-Informed Roles and Learned Routing
comment: 8 pages, 1 figures. Poster Accepted at NExT-Game 2026: New Frontiers in Game-Theoretic Learning, ICML 2026 Workshop
summary:
Role-semantic assignments provide priors over how heterogeneous agents may coordinate, but cooperative MARL systems instead settle on conventions through decentralized, non-stationary learning, with no guarantee that the resulting structure matches those priors. We study this translation gap between theory-informed role expectations and learned coordination structure through a diagnostic combining a role-routing matrix, formation sensitivity ($Δ_{\max}$), and gradient/occlusion attribution across three-role MiniGrid and SMACv2 (Terran) environments.
  We show that label-conditioned attention produces substantially more concentrated and role-specific routing than flat MLP baselines, remains stable under 3v3--9v9 scaling, transfers zero-shot across team sizes, and is invariant to ally-slot padding. A 5-seed re-evaluation shows partial alignment between learned conventions and designer-specified priors while revealing where small-n noise can manufacture apparent strategic divergence. We present these results as an empirical framework for measuring coordination structure in cooperative MARL rather than as a new equilibrium concept or causal explanation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体强化学习（MARL）中理论角色先验与实际学习到的协调结构之间的差距，提出了一种结合角色路由矩阵、形成敏感度和归因分析的诊断框架，并验证了标签条件注意力机制在角色特异性、可扩展性与泛化性上的优势。
AI.motivation: 角色语义分配为异构智能体的协作提供了先验知识，但现有协同MARL系统通过去中心化、非平稳学习自发形成约定，无法保证其结构符合设计者预设的角色先验，存在‘翻译鸿沟’。
AI.method: 提出一种诊断框架，整合角色路由矩阵、最大形成敏感度（Δ_max）以及梯度/遮挡归因方法，在三角色MiniGrid和SMACv2（Terran）环境中进行评估；对比标签条件注意力机制与全连接MLP基线。
AI.result: 标签条件注意力显著提升路由集中性与角色特异性；在3v3至9v9规模下保持稳定；支持零样本跨队伍大小迁移；对友军槽位填充具有不变性；5次随机种子重评估显示学习约定与先验部分对齐，小样本噪声可能造成伪战略分歧。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个实证框架用于量化协同MARL中的协调结构，而非提出新均衡概念或因果解释。

title: How Token Influence Decays with Distance: A Green-Function View of Trained Language Models
summary: We study how the next-token prediction of an autoregressive Transformer language model changes under small perturbations of earlier input token embeddings. Motivated by operator learning and iterative solvers for differential equations, we investigate how the influence of one token on another decays with distance in a trained model. In multilevel methods for differential equations, such as domain decomposition, multigrid, and multilevel preconditioning, one often exploits a separation between strong local interactions and weaker but essential global interactions. The latter correspond to the long tail of the Green's function and are typically handled by a coarse-level operator. Inspired by this perspective, we compute an empirical, distance-resolved gradient profile of token dependencies using autograd. Experiments on trained Pythia models and Qwen2.5-0.5B show that, over the measured distance range, the median Jacobian sensitivity is much better described by a power-law-type decay than by an exponential alternative: the diagonal-normalized profile is well described by $$\overline G(r) \approx γ+β(r+1)^{-p}$$ with exponents $p \approx 0.7$--$0.9$ (typically $0.8$--$0.9$). This behavior appears on coherent text from Gutenberg and WikiText-103. Token-shuffling experiments show that the power-law profile persists even when syntax and prediction quality collapse, whereas randomly initialized models do not exhibit it. The slowly decaying long-range sensitivity thus appears to be a learned property of trained autoregressive Transformer operators. These findings suggest that hierarchical or coarse-level mechanisms in language models may be able to exploit the long-tailed sensitivity profiles.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自回归Transformer语言模型中，早期token嵌入的微小扰动如何影响下一个token预测，并发现token间影响随距离呈幂律衰减（而非指数衰减），该特性是训练所得、与语法结构无关，暗示模型可能隐含多层级机制。
AI.motivation: 受微分方程算子学习和迭代求解器（如多重网格法）启发，探究训练后Transformer中token间影响随距离的衰减规律，尤其是强局部作用与弱但关键的全局作用之间的分离。
AI.method: 利用autograd计算token依赖的经验性距离分辨梯度谱；在Pythia和Qwen2.5-0.5B模型上，对Gutenberg和WikiText-103文本进行Jacobian敏感性分析，并开展token打乱与随机初始化对照实验。
AI.result: 中位Jacobian敏感性在所测距离范围内更符合幂律衰减\overline G(r) ≈ γ + β(r+1)^{-p}（p≈0.7–0.9，典型值0.8–0.9）；该幂律行为在连贯文本中稳定存在，且在语法破坏后仍保留，而随机初始化模型无此现象。
AI.conclusion: 缓慢衰减的长程敏感性是训练所得的Transformer算子特性，暗示语言模型可能具备类似多重网格或粗粒度建模的隐式分层机制，为设计高效长程建模方法提供理论依据。

title: Legible Shared Autonomy: Implicit Communication of Robot Belief through Motion
summary: Shared autonomy systems combine user input with autonomous assistance to help users with motor impairments control robot arms to perform everyday manipulation tasks, by inferring user goals and providing appropriate guidance. However, the robot's internal beliefs about user goals cannot be observed by users. Traditional shared autonomy systems provide assistance along efficient shortest paths toward inferred goals, but when multiple objects lie in similar directions, such assistive motion remains ambiguous and fails to reveal the specific goal identified by the robot. This creates two critical problems. First, when the robot correctly infers the goal, users continue controlling because they cannot perceive understanding from ambiguous assistive motion, wasting effort when autonomous completion would suffice. Second, when the robot misunderstands intent, users cannot quickly detect errors until assistive motion diverges significantly, requiring substantial corrective input. We address this by introducing legible motion into shared autonomy, where robot actions must both advance toward the goal and clearly reveal which goal has been inferred, enabling users to understand the robot's beliefs and adjust control accordingly. The robot modulates communication strength through confidence-aware adaptive authority allocation by providing assertive legible assistive actions when confident while increasing user authority when uncertain, transforming shared autonomy into transparent bidirectional collaboration. User studies including simulation and physical experiments with a six-degree-of-freedom robot arm demonstrate that legible shared autonomy significantly improves users' understanding of robot beliefs and reduces user control effort compared to standard shared autonomy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种引入‘可理解运动’（legible motion）的共享自主系统，通过使机器人动作既高效又清晰传达其推断目标，提升用户对机器人意图的理解，并结合置信度感知的自适应权限分配机制，实现更透明、双向的人机协作。
AI.motivation: 传统共享自主系统中机器人内部目标推断不可见，导致辅助运动模糊、用户难以判断机器人是否正确理解意图，从而造成努力浪费或纠错延迟。
AI.method: 引入可理解运动设计，使机器人动作同时推进任务并明确揭示其推断目标；结合置信度感知的自适应权限分配机制，在高置信时采取强引导动作，低置信时增加用户控制权。
AI.result: 在仿真与六自由度机械臂实物实验中，相比标准共享自主，新方法显著提升了用户对机器人信念的理解度，并降低了用户控制努力。
AI.conclusion: 可理解共享自主将传统单向辅助转变为透明双向协作，有效缓解目标歧义问题，提升人机协同效率与用户体验。

title: AURORA: Asymmetry and Update-Induced Rotation for Robust Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across a wide range of natural language processing tasks. However, their tendency to generate hallucinations, namely factually incorrect or unfaithful outputs, poses a critical obstacle to their deployment in high-stakes applications. Although recent hallucination detection methods have made encouraging progress, they typically rely on costly output-level consistency checks or static hidden-state probes that capture shallow dataset-specific patterns, leading to substantial degradation under cross-dataset evaluation. In this work, we propose AURORA, a novel hallucination detection framework that shifts the focus from static representations to the weight-gradient dynamics of LLMs. Our key insight is that hallucinated and faithful answers induce qualitatively different gradient update patterns on the model's parameters. Specifically, hallucinated samples trigger asymmetric and structurally misaligned gradients, which can be captured through two complementary features: (1) the skewness of the cosine similarity distribution between weight matrices and their gradient update directions, and (2) the rotation ratio, which quantifies how much the gradient update reorients the singular-vector basis of weight matrices via SVD. AURORA achieves strong hallucination detection performance across four model families and four benchmark datasets. Further analyses demonstrate that our method scales effectively across model sizes and transfers to out-of-domain tasks, including mathematical reasoning and vision-language scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AURORA框架，通过分析大语言模型参数权重梯度动态特性（如余弦相似度分布偏度和SVD旋转比）来检测幻觉，显著提升跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法依赖高成本的一致性检查或静态隐状态探针，在跨数据集评估时性能大幅下降，亟需更鲁棒、泛化性强的检测机制。
AI.method: 提出AURORA框架，基于LLM权重梯度动态特征：1）权重矩阵与其梯度方向间余弦相似度分布的偏度；2）梯度更新对权重矩阵SVD奇异向量基的旋转比。
AI.result: 在4个模型家族和4个基准数据集上实现强检测性能；方法可扩展至不同规模模型，并迁移到数学推理与视觉-语言等跨领域任务。
AI.conclusion: 梯度动态特征比静态表示更能本质刻画幻觉行为，AURORA为构建可信LLM提供了新范式。

title: RefGlass-GS: A UAV-Enabled Fusion Framework for Photorealistic, Semantic and Interactive Digitization of Reflective Glass Facades via Gaussian Splatting
summary: Existing digitization of buildings with reflective glass facades suffers from geometric reconstruction distortion, unrealistic view-dependent texture rendering, and difficulties in object-based semantic enhancement. Therefore, we propose RefGlass-GS, a fusion framework that enables end-to-end UAV-based photorealistic, semantic, and interactive digitization of reflective glass facades. The contributions include: (1) proposing an individual glass panel segmentation method based on maximum a posteriori estimation with structural regularities, robust to severe reflection and background interference; (2) formulating a UAV viewpoint planning optimization function that maximizes the coverage of view-dependent appearance for sufficient data capture; (3) developing an optimized Gaussian Splatting framework with a Reflection MLP, a novel deferred shading function, and two enhanced regularization terms for effective modeling of high-frequency near-field reflections; (4) introducing a standardized data organization paradigm for structuring GS-based representations into object-based models, facilitating interactive facility management on digital twin platforms. Experiments on real-world reflective glass facade scenes validate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method. Specifically, the glass panel segmentation achieves an improvement of 0.1927 in mIoU over SOTA methods, and only our method enables instance-level panel extraction. The UAV view planning improves novel view synthesis for reflective facades by 13.15 dB in PSNR compared to commercially used nap-of-the-object planning methods. The RefGlass-GS modeling outperforms SOTA Gaussian Splatting approaches for reflective scenes with an average improvement of 5.08 dB in PSNR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RefGlass-GS框架，实现无人机端到端采集下反射玻璃幕墙的实景化、语义化与交互式数字重建，通过玻璃面板分割、无人机视角规划优化、改进高斯泼溅建模（含Reflection MLP和延迟着色）及标准化对象化数据组织，显著提升几何精度、反射建模质量和语义可操作性。
AI.motivation: 现有玻璃幕墙数字化存在几何重建失真、视点依赖纹理渲染不真实、语义增强困难等问题。
AI.method: 提出RefGlass-GS融合框架，包含：(1)基于最大后验估计与结构规律的单块玻璃面板分割；(2)最大化视点依赖外观覆盖率的无人机视角规划优化；(3)集成Reflection MLP、延迟着色函数与两项正则化项的改进型高斯泼溅建模；(4)面向数字孪生平台的GS表示对象化数据组织范式。
