AI.result: 在仅使用UI-TARS 0.1%标注数据的情况下，性能达或超UI-TARS；同等标注量下优于GUI-R1等先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督与课程学习可有效缓解GUI代理的数据瓶颈，为构建低成本、强泛化GUI智能体提供了可行路径。

title: BrainRiem: Riemannian Prototype Learning for Source-Free Cross-Site Brain Network Diagnosis
summary: Multi-site functional MRI (fMRI) studies are essential for robust neuropsychiatric diagnosis yet suffer severe domain shifts from scanner heterogeneity, demographics, and site-specific acquisition protocols. Traditional domain adaptation requires concurrent source and target data access, violating clinical privacy regulations. Moreover, functional connectivity matrices lie on the Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold, where Euclidean operations cause geometric distortions corrupting diagnostic patterns. We propose BrainRiem, a source-free domain adaptation framework learning compact Riemannian brain prototypes via manifold-aware bi-level optimization. It employs the Log-Euclidean Metric to ensure prototypes remain valid SPD matrices, while Dirichlet Energy spectral calibration aligns their frequency characteristics with real brain networks. Only anonymized prototypes are transmitted to target sites, serving as stable anchors for training local models without source data access and reducing leakage under the evaluated attacks. Comprehensive experiments on ABIDE and REST-meta-MDD show BrainRiem consistently outperforms state-of-the-art source-free, traditional, and graph domain adaptation methods across diverse scanners and demographics. Notably, learned prototypes exhibit biologically interpretable connectivity patterns aligning with established neuroscience findings, validating the necessity of Riemannian geometry for brain network analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BrainRiem，一种无需源域数据的fMRI领域自适应框架，通过黎曼流形上的双层优化学习紧凑且几何保持的脑功能连接原型，在保护隐私的同时提升跨站点神经精神疾病诊断鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 多中心fMRI研究面临扫描仪异质性、人口统计差异和采集协议差异导致的严重领域偏移；传统领域自适应方法需同时访问源域和目标域数据，违反临床隐私规范；且功能连接矩阵位于SPD流形上，欧氏操作会破坏其几何结构，损害诊断模式。
AI.method: 提出BrainRiem框架：基于Log-Euclidean度量在SPD流形上学习紧凑黎曼脑原型；引入Dirichlet能量谱校准对齐原型的频域特性与真实脑网络；仅传输匿名化原型至目标站点，作为本地模型训练的稳定锚点。
AI.result: 在ABIDE和REST-meta-MDD数据集上，BrainRiem在多种扫描仪和人群背景下持续优于现有源自由、传统及图领域自适应方法；所学原型具有生物学可解释性，符合已知神经科学发现。
AI.conclusion: 黎曼几何对脑网络分析至关重要；BrainRiem在保障数据隐私前提下实现了高性能、可解释的跨中心fMRI诊断适配。

title: ENC-ODE: Event-level Neurodegenerative Modeling in Continuous Time with Neural ODEs
summary: Accurately predicting the temporal evolution of clinical biomarkers is crucial for the early diagnosis and management of neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's disease. However, this relies on longitudinal data to capture biomarker changes over time, which is often sparse and irregular due to the high cost, labor-intensive nature, and patient burden. To address these challenges, we propose ENC-ODE, an Event-level Neurodegenerative modeling in Continuous time with neural Ordinary Differential Equations. ENC-ODE predicts future biomarker evolution by modeling clinical events through diagnosis-conditioned continuous dynamics. A target-conditioned attention mechanism weights and aggregates event-level predictions for the target time and modality without history compression. Extensive experiments on Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset demonstrate that ENC-ODE outperforms representative sequence models while offering a scalable and neuroscientifically grounded solution for clinical support. The code is available at https://github.com/JardinDelSol/enc-ode.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ENC-ODE模型，利用神经常微分方程建模神经退行性疾病中临床生物标志物的连续时间动态演化，通过事件级诊断条件建模与目标条件注意力机制，实现对稀疏不规则纵向数据的高精度未来预测。
AI.motivation: 神经退行性疾病（如阿尔茨海默病）的早期诊断依赖于临床生物标志物的时间演化预测，但实际纵向数据往往稀疏、不规则，受限于成本、人力和患者负担。
AI.method: 提出ENC-ODE：基于诊断条件的连续时间神经ODE建模事件级临床动态；引入目标条件注意力机制，对事件级预测按目标时间与模态加权聚合，避免历史信息压缩。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据集上，ENC-ODE显著优于主流序列模型，具备可扩展性与神经科学合理性。
AI.conclusion: ENC-ODE为稀疏不规则临床纵向数据建模提供了更准确、可解释且具生物学意义的连续时间建模框架，有望支持临床决策。

title: Flying to Image-Specified Objects: 3D Quadrotor Navigation via Cross-Graph Memory and Viewpoint Planning
summary: Instance-Specific Image-Goal Navigation (InstanceImageNav) requires a robot to navigate toward the exact object instance depicted in a query image. Extending this task to quadrotors is challenging due to continuous 3D control, limited field of view (FOV), and safety constraints, which make successful navigation highly dependent on selecting informative viewpoints. We propose a hierarchical navigation framework for quadrotor InstanceImageNav that separates high-level decision making from low-level motion execution. Instead of navigating directly to spatial locations, the system generates viewpoint-aware action nodes around frontier regions and potential target objects, enabling the robot to explore while maintaining informative viewpoints for detecting the target instance. A lightweight semantic memory maintains object-level and observation-level context, allowing semantic cues to propagate to candidate action nodes for decision making. A learning-based policy selects the most promising action node, and a trajectory planner generates dynamically feasible 3D flight paths for safe execution. Experiments in simulation demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, and real-world quadrotor flights validate the practicality and robustness of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向四旋翼无人机的分层导航框架，用于实例级图像目标导航（InstanceImageNav），通过生成视角感知的动作节点、轻量语义记忆和学习型策略，在仿真与真实场景中均展现出优越性能与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 将实例级图像目标导航（InstanceImageNav）扩展到四旋翼平台面临连续3D控制、有限视场（FOV）和安全约束等挑战，成功导航高度依赖于选择信息丰富的视角。
AI.method: 提出分层导航框架：高层生成围绕前沿区域和潜在目标的视角感知动作节点；轻量语义记忆维护对象级与观测级上下文；学习型策略选择最优动作节点；轨迹规划器生成动态可行且安全的3D飞行路径。
AI.result: 在仿真实验中持续优于强基线方法，并通过真实四旋翼飞行验证了框架的实用性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该分层框架有效解决了四旋翼在InstanceImageNav任务中因视角受限与运动约束带来的挑战，兼顾探索效率与检测可靠性。

title: Resolution Thresholds in VLM Detection of Harmful ASCII Art Across Construction Modes and Languages
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as content moderation tools, yet they remain vulnerable to jailbreak attacks in which harmful text is visually encoded as ASCII art. This can allow inappropriate or harmful content to bypass moderation systems. To address this vulnerability, this paper investigates how image resolution affects VLM detection of harmful ASCII art across eight character construction modes (L1-L8), ranging from dense block characters to word-embedded designs. We evaluate eight state-of-the-art VLMs on English and Chinese corpora using a pipeline that generates ASCII art images at ten resolution scales, probing whether a consistent detection-failure threshold exists across models, modes, and languages. Results indicate that detection rates decline sharply above certain resolution thresholds, and that word-based modes are the most resistant to detection across the full resolution range. These findings reveal a systematic vulnerability in VLM-based content moderation systems and motivate resolution-aware evaluation standards.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）在内容审核中对以ASCII艺术形式编码的有害文本的检测能力，发现图像分辨率显著影响检测效果，尤其在词嵌入式ASCII艺术模式下，检测率随分辨率升高急剧下降，揭示了VLM审核系统的系统性漏洞。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）作为内容审核工具易受ASCII艺术形式的文本注入攻击，导致有害内容绕过审核，亟需系统评估其脆弱性。
AI.method: 在八种ASCII字符构造模式（L1–L8）下，生成十种分辨率尺度的ASCII艺术图像，评估八个主流VLM在英文和中文语料上的检测性能。
AI.result: 检测率在特定分辨率阈值之上显著下降；词嵌入式模式（word-based modes）在整个分辨率范围内最难被检测；该现象跨模型、跨语言具有一致性。
AI.conclusion: VLM内容审核系统存在由图像分辨率引发的系统性漏洞，应建立分辨率感知的评估标准以提升鲁棒性。

title: What Color is the Sky (for a non-human) ?
summary: The light of the daytime sky contains a mixture of many colors yet is perceived as blue by human observers. This is largely due to the particular response functions of the human cones. Under these response functions skylight and blue light are metamers: they yield the exact same excitation of the cones. In this paper we ask: is it possible to define the ``color'' of the sky for other visual systems? We present a simple computational method to determine monochromatic metamers to a given input light for arbitrary visual systems. Using published values on spectral sensitivity functions of various species, we use our method to determine the dominant wavelength of monochromatic metamers to skylight. For a wide range of species (bichromats, trichromats and tetrachormats) we find monochromatic metamers to skylight but the dominant wavelength of the metamer can vary drastically between species and be very different from the color perceived by humans.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算任意视觉系统中单色同色异谱色（metamers）的方法，并利用不同物种的光谱敏感性数据，发现不同物种对天空光的单色同色异谱色的主波长差异显著，与人类感知的蓝色大相径庭。
AI.motivation: 探究天空光对其他视觉系统（非人类）而言是否具有可定义的‘颜色’，即是否存在单色同色异谱色，并比较其与人类感知的差异。
AI.method: 提出一种简单计算方法，用于确定给定输入光（如天光）对任意视觉系统的单色同色异谱色；结合已发表的多种物种视锥细胞光谱敏感性函数进行计算。
AI.result: 在双色、三色和四色视觉系统中均找到天空光的单色同色异谱色，但其主波长在不同物种间差异极大，常显著偏离人类感知的蓝色波段。
AI.conclusion: 天空的‘颜色’并非客观物理属性，而是高度依赖于观察者的视觉系统；不同物种对同一天空光可能感知为截然不同的颜色。

title: DeepTrans Studio: Turning Expert Interventions into Shared Team Knowledge in Agentic Translation Workflows
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures. Accepted to CSCW 2026 Demo. Code and demo video: https://github.com/hint-lab/deeptrans-studio, https://youtu.be/cNpafhHAEjg
summary: Professional translation is often a team-based process: translators, reviewers, and project managers must coordinate terminology, legal force, and accountability across documents. Yet many LLM-based translation tools treat human corrections as isolated edits. Expert decisions made in one segment or by one member are rarely captured as reusable knowledge for the rest of the team. We present DeepTrans Studio, a collaborative translation workspace that lets professionals intercept selected nodes in an agentic translation workflow, review evidence, revise AI outputs, and save approved decisions to a shared team memory. During the demo, attendees will role-play translators and reviewers, resolve preset terminology and legal-modal risks, and see how their decisions are propagated to downstream segments and surfaced in a teammate's workspace as reusable precedents. The demo illustrates how human interventions in AI-mediated work can become shared, traceable knowledge rather than one-off corrections.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DeepTrans Studio，一个支持专业翻译团队协作的AI工作空间，通过在智能翻译流程中嵌入人工干预节点，将专家决策沉淀为可复用的团队知识，从而提升术语一致性、法律效力和责任追溯能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM翻译工具将人工修改视为孤立操作，无法将专家在某段或某成员处的决策转化为团队可复用的知识，导致术语、法律效力与问责难以协同。
AI.method: 设计并实现DeepTrans Studio——一个支持人工介入、证据审查、AI输出修订及决策存入共享团队记忆的协作式翻译工作空间；通过角色扮演演示其在术语与法律模态风险处理中的实际应用。
AI.result: 验证了人工干预可被结构化为可追溯、可传播、可复用的团队知识，提升了跨段落与跨成员的一致性与协作效率。
AI.conclusion: 将人类专家决策系统性地融入AI翻译流程并沉淀为共享记忆，是提升专业翻译质量与协作效能的关键路径。

title: Bayesian Best-Arm Identification with Abstention: A Polynomial-to-Exponential Phase Transition
summary: We study the Bayesian fixed-budget best-arm identification problem in which a learner can abstain from making a terminal recommendation. Subject to an abstention budget $α$, we analyze the probability of undetected error--the risk of recommending a suboptimal arm without abstaining. Our central finding is that abstention induces a phase transition: without abstention, the error probability decays polynomially in the sampling budget $T$; in contrast, introducing any small positive abstention budget shifts this to an exponential decay. For Gaussian priors and rewards, in the regime $T\to\infty$ followed by $α\downarrow0$, we establish exact matching information-theoretic lower bounds and algorithmic upper bounds on the optimal error exponent, which takes the form $\exp(-\frac{α^{2}T}{8κ_ν^{2}})$. The hardness parameter $κ_ν$ represents the prior density of the top-two gap at zero, highlighting that nearly tied instances drive the fundamental error. We introduce an adaptive algorithm, PGWS, that successfully achieves this optimal exponent by expending its abstention budget on statistically ambiguous instances. We further demonstrate that this polynomial-to-exponential improvement is exclusively a Bayesian phenomenon--in the frequentist setting, abstention only affects lower-order exponent terms. We also extend our results beyond the Gaussian model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了贝叶斯固定预算最优臂识别问题，引入可放弃推荐的机制（abstention），发现其引发相变：放弃预算使错误概率从多项式衰减转变为指数衰减，并给出了最优指数的精确刻画。
AI.motivation: 在固定预算的最优臂识别中，允许学习者在不确定时放弃推荐（abstention）可提升可靠性；本文旨在量化这种机制对错误概率衰减速率的影响，并揭示其理论极限。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯框架，分析错误风险（undetected error）随预算T和放弃预算α的变化；推导信息论下界与PGWS自适应算法上界；比较贝叶斯与频率学派设定下的差异；扩展至非高斯模型。
AI.result: 证明放弃机制引发相变：错误概率由O(T^{-c})变为exp(-α²T/(8κ_ν²))；给出最优指数的精确表达式及硬度参数κ_ν的含义；PGWS算法达到该最优指数；指出该现象仅存在于贝叶斯设定。
AI.conclusion: Abstention 是一种高效提升贝叶斯最优臂识别鲁棒性的机制，其带来的指数级改进是贝叶斯特有的根本性优势，且最优策略应将放弃预算集中于统计上最模糊的实例。

title: Field Order Should Not Matter: Permutation-Invariant Embedding Model Fine-Tuning for Structured Metadata Retrieval
summary: We study retrieval over catalogs of structured metadata, where each record is a small schema whose fields answer different kinds of query. Embedding a record with a text encoder first serializes its fields into a string, which forces a choice of field order. We show this choice, usually treated as an implementation detail, silently controls retrieval quality once the encoder is fine-tuned. A standard fine-tune loses 7.4 nDCG@10 points when the index is rebuilt under a different field order, because it reads absolute position instead of the field labels. We propose permutation-invariant fine-tuning ($\textbf{PI-FT}$), which serializes each record under a freshly sampled field order with random field dropout, so meaning binds to the labels rather than to position. The change is about two lines in the data loader; it costs negligible in-distribution accuracy and cuts the order-change penalty to 0.2 points. We study this in the discovery of development statistics, a catalog of nearly 10,000 indicators that should be searchable in many languages by a model small enough to self-host. As AI assistants and agents increasingly mediate access to public data and statistics, this retrieval step decides whether an answer is grounded in the right indicator or series, making discoverability a precondition for disseminating data through AI. Because usage logs cannot provide training signal for indicators no one has searched, we generate the queries instead. $\textbf{DevDataBench}$ is a fully LLM-generated benchmark of grounded, facet-targeted queries across 15 languages, covering every indicator for both training and evaluation. A fine-tuned 118M-parameter CPU encoder outperforms every zero-shot baseline, including $\texttt{text-embedding-3-large}$ (0.707 vs.\ 0.556 nDCG@10), with the largest gains in low-resource languages. We release the benchmark, pipeline, models, and a reusable PI-FT framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对结构化元数据检索的置换不变微调方法（PI-FT），通过在序列化记录时随机采样字段顺序并随机丢弃字段，使模型学习依赖字段标签而非绝对位置，显著缓解因字段顺序变化导致的性能下降。该方法在多语言开发统计数据检索任务中验证有效，并发布了首个由大语言模型生成的、覆盖15种语言的基准数据集DevDataBench。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本编码器的结构化元数据检索方法将字段序列化为字符串时依赖固定字段顺序，而微调后模型会隐式依赖字段的绝对位置而非语义标签，导致索引重建时字段顺序改变即显著性能下降；此外，真实使用日志难以覆盖所有指标，缺乏训练信号。
AI.method: 提出置换不变微调（PI-FT）：在数据加载阶段对每条记录随机重排字段顺序并随机丢弃部分字段，迫使模型绑定语义标签而非位置；同时构建全LLM生成的多语言基准DevDataBench，覆盖15种语言及全部指标，用于训练与评估。
AI.result: PI-FT将字段顺序变更带来的nDCG@10下降从7.4分大幅降低至0.2分；118M参数CPU可部署编码器在DevDataBench上nDCG@10达0.707，显著优于text-embedding-3-large（0.556），尤其在低资源语言提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 字段序列化顺序不是无关紧要的实现细节，而是影响检索鲁棒性的关键因素；PI-FT是一种轻量、通用且有效的改进方案，对AI驱动的公共统计数据发现具有重要实践意义。

title: RoamFlow: Reinforcement-Aligned One-Step Action MeanFlow Policy for Image-Goal Navigation
summary: Image-goal navigation is a key challenge in embodied robotics, where an agent must reach a target specified solely by a goal image. While existing reinforcement learning approaches map perceptual observations directly to actions, they struggle to model long-horizon dependencies, often leading to suboptimal trajectories. To address this limitation, we propose RoamFlow, a generative navigation framework that leverages MeanFlow to predict the average velocity field for trajectory synthesis, enabling efficient few-step generation and reducing inference latency. We further adopt a two-stage training strategy that combines expert imitation for stable initialization with reinforcement learning for task-specific policy refinement. Extensive experiments in both Habitat simulation and real-world robotic platforms demonstrate that RoamFlow achieves efficient inference while maintaining strong navigation performance under real-time constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoamFlow框架，通过MeanFlow预测平均速度场实现图像目标导航，结合专家模仿与强化学习的两阶段训练，在仿真和真实机器人平台上实现了高效低延迟的导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的图像目标导航方法难以建模长时序依赖，导致路径次优。
AI.method: 提出RoamFlow生成式导航框架，利用MeanFlow预测平均速度场以合成轨迹，并采用专家模仿初始化+强化学习微调的两阶段训练策略。
AI.result: 在Habitat仿真和真实机器人平台上验证了RoamFlow在实时约束下兼具高效推理与强导航性能。
AI.conclusion: RoamFlow有效缓解了长时序建模难题，显著降低推理延迟，提升了图像目标导航的实用性与泛化性。

title: How LLMs See Creativity: Zero-Shot Scoring of Visual Creativity with Interpretable Reasoning
summary: Evaluating the originality of visual images poses enduring challenges for creativity assessment. Automated scoring using AI models has proven effective in the verbal domain, yet key questions remain about evaluating visual creativity and understanding how models arrive at their ratings. The present research asks whether multimodal large language models (LLMs) can serve as judges of visual creativity zero-shot (without any fine-tuning or examples of human ratings) and whether their "reasoning" output offers an interpretable window into their evaluation process. We tested six multimodal LLMs (Gemini 3 Flash, Gemma 4 31B IT, GPT-5.4 Mini, GLM-5v Turbo, Kimi K2.5, and Qwen 3.6 Plus) on 992 AI-generated images (based on human-written prompts) and 1,500 hand-drawn sketches scored for creativity by human raters. In Study 1, all models showed substantial alignment with human creativity ratings on both datasets (r = .57-.68 on AI-generated images; r = .29-68 on sketches). In Study 2, we analyzed the step-by-step reasoning processes of three LLMs evaluating the same images and drawings. Although reasoning made model evaluations interpretable -- showing what they attend to, how they balance originality vs. quality, and how they justify their ratings -- reasoning did not improve alignment with human ratings. In sum, our findings indicate that multimodal LLMs can match human judgments of visual creativity without any additional training, and that their reasoning reveals how AI models evaluate creativity. An open scoring app implementing this pipeline is available at https://review-visual-eval-scoring.hf.space.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨多模态大语言模型（LLMs）能否零样本评估视觉图像的原创性，并分析其推理过程是否可解释且与人类评分一致。结果表明六种模型均能与人类创造力评分中等至高度相关，其推理过程虽可解释但未提升评分一致性。
AI.motivation: 视觉图像原创性评估长期存在挑战；现有AI在文本领域已成功自动评分，但在视觉创造力评估及其决策可解释性方面仍存关键问题。
AI.method: 采用六种多模态LLM（如Gemini 3 Flash、Qwen 3.6 Plus等），在992张AI生成图像和1500张手绘草图上进行零样本创造力评分；通过相关系数评估模型与人类评分的一致性，并分析模型的逐步推理输出。
AI.result: 所有模型在两类数据上均与人类评分呈中等到高度相关（r = .29–.68）；模型推理过程揭示了其关注点、原创性与质量权衡及评分依据，但未提升与人类评分的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态LLM无需微调即可有效评估视觉创造力，其推理输出提供了可解释的评估逻辑，但推理本身不提升评分准确性；该方法已开源为在线评分工具。

title: ExACT: Exemplar-Driven Calibrated Refinement for Training-Free Visual Grounding in Remote Sensing Images
summary: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to locate specific objects in high-resolution RS imagery using free-form natural language descriptions. While recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show great potential for such open-vocabulary RSVG, their training-free adaptation is hindered by the modality gap between abstract linguistic semantics and fine-grained visual cues. In cluttered RS scenes, this gap inevitably causes severe localization drift. To bridge this gap, we propose Exemplar-driven Calibrated Refinement (ExACT), a novel training-free framework driven by a one-shot visual prompting mechanism to explicitly provide discriminative structural guidance for precise pixel-level localization. Specifically, we propose a Vision Exemplar-based Calibrator (VEC) that extracts fine-grained visual correspondences from the given exemplar to rectify the rough cross-modal priors from frozen MLLMs, effectively suppressing background artifacts and accurately outlining target boundaries. Subsequently, a Structure-Aware Refiner (SAR) employs an iterative merge-and-select clustering strategy to consolidate the calibrated priors into high-quality positive and negative geometric prompts. These prompts then guide the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to achieve precise pixel-level predictions. Extensive experiments confirm the superiority of ExACT over existing training-free and weakly-supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExACT框架，通过视觉示例驱动的校准与结构感知精炼，在无需训练的情况下提升遥感图像中自然语言描述目标的像素级定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的遥感视觉定位方法在无训练适配时受限于语言抽象语义与遥感图像细粒度视觉线索之间的模态鸿沟，导致复杂场景下定位漂移严重。
AI.method: 提出ExACT框架：1）Vision Exemplar-based Calibrator（VEC）利用单一样本提取细粒度视觉对应关系，校正冻结MLLM的粗略跨模态先验；2）Structure-Aware Refiner（SAR）采用迭代合并-选择聚类策略生成高质量几何提示；3）引导SAM完成像素级分割。
AI.result: ExACT在多个遥感视觉定位基准上显著优于现有无训练及弱监督方法，有效抑制背景干扰并精准勾勒目标边界。
AI.conclusion: ExACT验证了仅靠视觉示例和冻结MLLM即可实现高精度、训练-free的遥感视觉定位，为开放词汇遥感理解提供了新范式。

title: DEEPMED Search: An Open-Source Agentic Platform for Medical Deep Research with Introspective Verification
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to IJCAI-ECAI 2026 Demo Track. Project website: https://www.deepmedsearch.cloud. Demo video: https://youtu.be/4U4aok8yLpk
summary: Navigating the deluge of heterogeneous medical data, from academic literature (PubMed) to clinical guidelines (Web) and private knowledge bases, remains a critical bottleneck for evidence-based medicine. While commercial black-box tools lack transparency, standard open-source RAG implementations frequently suffer from reasoning drift when handling complex, long-tail queries. We present DEEPMED Search, a fully open-source, agentic platform designed for transparent medical deep research. Built on a high-performance Next.js architecture, DEEPMED Search features a source-adaptive router that autonomously dispatches sub-queries to PubMed, web search, or local graph-based knowledge bases based on information density. Crucially, the platform integrates an introspective verification module, powered by a causal-consistent multi-agent debate framework, to validate retrieved evidence against diagnostic logic before synthesis. To demonstrate its robustness, we showcase DEEPMED Search's ability to autonomously decompose high-difficulty rare disease queries, filter out confounding noise, and generate structured, citation-backed research reports in minutes. By open-sourcing this software, we provide the community with a robust infrastructure to democratize access to trustworthy, glass-box medical reasoning in research and prototyping settings.

AI.tldr: DEEPMED Search是一个开源、透明的医疗深度研究平台，通过源自适应路由和因果一致的多智能体辩论验证模块，解决现有RAG在复杂医学查询中的推理漂移问题，支持罕见病等高难度问题的自动分解与结构化报告生成。
AI.motivation: 现有商业黑盒工具缺乏透明性，而标准开源RAG在处理复杂、长尾医学查询时易出现推理漂移，难以应对异构医学数据（如PubMed、临床指南、私有知识库）的整合需求。
AI.method: 提出DEEPMED Search平台：基于高性能Next.js架构；采用源自适应路由器，依据信息密度将子查询分发至PubMed、网络搜索或本地图谱知识库；集成基于因果一致性多智能体辩论的内省验证模块，对检索证据进行诊断逻辑校验后再合成。
AI.result: 能自主分解高难度罕见病查询，过滤干扰噪声，数分钟内生成结构化、带引用的研究报告；已完全开源，支持可复现、可审计的‘玻璃盒’医学推理。
AI.conclusion: DEEPMED Search为循证医学提供了透明、鲁棒、可扩展的开源基础设施，推动可信医学推理在研究与原型开发场景中的民主化应用。

title: Multi-Block Diffusion Language Models
summary: Block Diffusion Language Models (BD-LMs) improve diffusion-based text generation with KV caching and flexible-length generation. A natural next step is to extend them from Single-Block Diffusion (SingleBD) to Multi-Block Diffusion (MultiBD), where a \textit{running-set} of consecutive blocks is decoded concurrently for inter-block parallelism. However, existing BD-LMs are mostly trained under teacher forcing, where the model observes only one noisy block conditioned on a clean prefix. While the recent diffusion forcing strategy introduces visibility among multiple noisy blocks, its training states still differ from MultiBD inference, where decoding operates on a bounded \textit{running-set} with heterogeneous slot-wise noise patterns. To bridge this gap, we propose \textit{Multi-Block Diffusion Language Models} (MBD-LMs), obtained by post-training BD-LMs with \textit{Multi-block Teacher Forcing} (MultiTF). MultiTF integrates teacher forcing and diffusion forcing by training on bounded \textit{noise-groups} conditioned on clean prefixes, with randomized \textit{noise-schedulers} that better match MultiBD inference states. To make MultiBD practically executable, we further introduce an optimized decoding algorithm based on the \textit{Block Buffer} mechanism that preserves prefix-cache reuse, keeps input shapes static, and translates increased decoding parallelism into wall-clock acceleration. Empirically, MBD-LLaDA2-Mini increases average Tokens Per Forward pass (TPF) from 3.47 to \textbf{6.19} and improves average accuracy from 79.95\% to \textbf{81.03\%}; when combined with DMax, MBD-LLaDA2-Mini-DMax reaches an average TPF of \textbf{9.34} with only a 1.02\% accuracy drop on math and code benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多块扩散语言模型（MBD-LMs），通过多块教师强制（MultiTF）后训练和基于块缓冲区的优化解码算法，显著提升块扩散语言模型在多块并行解码下的效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有块扩散语言模型（BD-LMs）主要在单块教师强制下训练，难以适配多块并发解码（MultiBD）的实际推理状态（如有限运行集、异构噪声模式），导致训练-推理不一致。
AI.method: 提出多块教师强制（MultiTF）训练策略：在有界噪声组上进行训练，条件为干净前缀，并引入随机化噪声调度器以匹配MultiBD推理状态；同时设计基于块缓冲区（Block Buffer）的解码算法，支持前缀缓存复用、静态输入形状及端到端加速。
AI.result: MBD-LLaDA2-Mini将平均Tokens Per Forward（TPF）从3.47提升至6.19，准确率从79.95%提升至81.03%；结合DMax后TPF达9.34，仅下降1.02%准确率。
AI.conclusion: MBD-LMs有效弥合了训练与MultiBD推理之间的状态差异，在保持高精度的同时显著提升解码吞吐量，为高效扩散式文本生成提供了新范式。

title: OpenSPM: An Environment-Transferable Robotic Key Spatial Pose Memory and Closed-Loop High-Frequency Flow-Matching Action Generation Model
summary: Open-environment tabletop robotic manipulation requires systems to possess semantic understanding, precise geometric pose estimation, and high-frequency action generation. While end-to-end vision-language-action (VLA) models excel at semantic generalization, they often lack explicit geometric constraints for fine-grained tasks and require costly training. To bridge the gap between high-level semantics and low-level physical execution, we propose OpenSPM, an open environment spatial persistent memory framework consisting of spatial pose memory and flow-matching action generation model. OpenSPM first leverages semantically conditioned 3D perception and Kalman filtering to track continuous 6D poses. It then extracts key spatial poses from human demonstrations, keeping them as transferable, object-centric spatial persistent memory entries. During inference, OpenSPM retrieves relevant memory entries in terms of natural language instructions, transfers the spatial poses to new scenes using SE(3) transformations, and generates high-frequency action chunks via a lightweight conditional flow-matching model. Combined with real-time proprioceptive state feedback and terminal residual correction, the system effectively suppresses trajectory error accumulation. Evaluated on ten LIBERO-GOAL tasks, OpenSPM achieves an 85.6% success rate and an equivalent control frequency of 1033.3 Hz, while requiring minimal inference AI computing power. Extensive ablations illustrate that structured spatial persistent memory and closed-loop residual correction play a crucial role in reliable, high-frequency robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenSPM框架，通过空间姿态记忆与流匹配动作生成模型，结合语义感知、几何约束与闭环残差校正，在开放环境桌面机器人操作中实现高成功率（85.6%）与超高控制频率（等效1033.3 Hz），同时降低推理算力需求。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型虽具语义泛化能力，但缺乏显式几何约束，难以胜任细粒度操作任务，且训练成本高；亟需弥合高层语义理解与底层物理执行之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: OpenSPM包含两部分：1）空间姿态记忆模块——利用语义引导的3D感知与卡尔曼滤波连续跟踪6D姿态，并从人类示范中提取可迁移、以物体为中心的空间记忆条目；2）基于条件流匹配的轻量动作生成模型——根据自然语言指令检索记忆、通过SE(3)变换迁移至新场景，并结合实时本体感知反馈与末端残差校正实现闭环控制。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-GOAL十个任务上达到85.6%成功率，等效控制频率达1033.3 Hz，推理所需AI算力极低；消融实验证明结构化空间持久记忆与闭环残差校正对高可靠、高频率操作至关重要。
AI.conclusion: OpenSPM有效融合语义理解、几何建模与实时控制，为开放环境中高效、鲁棒的机器人操作提供了新范式，兼顾性能与部署效率。

title: Can MLLMs Critique Like Humans? Evaluating Open-Ended Aesthetic Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Open-ended aesthetic critique is a challenge for multimodal large language models (MLLMs): unlike multiple-choice aesthetic benchmarks, it has no single correct answer, and most aesthetic evaluation has measured models against numeric scores rather than the written critiques people actually give. We evaluate MLLM critiques against ranked human references and ask whether they are close to human ones. Using the Reddit Photo Critique Dataset, we score five open-weight MLLMs against multiple ranked human critiques per photo with reference-based similarity metrics, under six prompt conditions that disentangle persona framing, aspect hinting, length control, and single- versus multi-pass generation, and add an image-grounding control that feeds each model the wrong photograph. We find that reference-based similarity gives a misleading picture. Stricter lexical and learned metrics show only weak alignment with human critiques, while a coarse embedding cosine reports broad topical overlap that the grounding control traces to a stable house style rather than image-specific observation. Behaviorally, the models diverge from humans in consistent ways the scores do not surface: even under a length cap they write two to three times as much, cover nearly every aesthetic aspect where humans are selective, engage each aspect more uniformly and at greater depth, and repeat themselves across critiques of the same photo where humans vary. We argue that reference-based similarity rewards a fluent, comprehensive critique style rather than the selectivity and specificity of human critique, and discuss implications for evaluating and training open-ended multimodal generation.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在开放性美学批评任务中的表现，发现基于参考的相似性指标容易误导评估结果；模型虽在主题层面与人类批评有粗略重叠，但缺乏人类批评的选择性与图像特异性，且行为模式与人类存在系统性差异。
AI.motivation: 现有美学评估多依赖数值评分或选择题形式，难以反映真实人类书面批评的开放性与多样性；亟需更贴合实际的人类批评风格的评估方法。
AI.method: 基于Reddit Photo Critique数据集，对5个开源MLLM在6种提示设置（含角色设定、方面提示、长度控制、单/多轮生成）下生成的批评进行评估，并引入图像错配控制；采用多种参考相似性指标（词法、学习型、余弦嵌入）分析模型输出与人类参考批评的一致性。
AI.result: 严格指标显示模型与人类批评仅弱对齐；余弦嵌入显示的主题重叠实为模型固有‘风格’而非图像理解；行为分析揭示模型冗长、泛化、重复，缺乏人类的选择性与针对性。
AI.conclusion: 参考相似性评估易奖励流畅全面但非真实的批评风格，应重视行为特征与人类差异，推动更符合实际生成目标的评估与训练范式。

title: Character Recognition of Nepali Number Plate
comment: Accepted at World Conference on Information Systems for Business Management (ISBM) 2025
summary: This paper presents a robust Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) system tailored for Nepali license plates written in Devanagari script. In this paper, a pipelined model was used that integrates YOLO-based models for license plate and character detection, followed by a CNN classifier trained on 34 Devanagari characters. Two publicly available data sets were used that incorporate diverse lighting, fonts, and structural variations. Data augmentation and additional training on embossed plates enhanced the generalizability of the model. The system achieved a recognition accuracy of up to 93\%, demonstrating strong performance under real-world conditions and providing a scalable solution for traffic management in Nepal. Code: https://github.com/Satyasakhadka/Nepali-NumberPlate-Character-Recognition

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对尼泊尔天城文车牌的鲁棒自动车牌识别（ANPR）系统，采用YOLO检测+CNN字符分类的级联架构，在公开数据集上达到93%识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 为解决尼泊尔本地化车牌（使用Devanagari文字）识别难题，提升交通管理自动化水平。
AI.method: 构建端到端流水线模型：先用YOLO系列模型定位车牌及其中字符，再用专为34个Devanagari字符训练的CNN分类器进行识别；结合数据增强与浮雕车牌额外训练以提升泛化性。
AI.result: 系统在多样化光照、字体和结构的真实场景下实现最高93%的字符识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该ANPR系统具备强鲁棒性与可扩展性，可有效支撑尼泊尔智能交通管理应用。

title: Rethinking Generative Reconstruction Attacks against Graph Neural Network Models
summary: The application of graph data in numerous disciplines raises the need for gathering and analyzing huge volumes of data, some of which is private and sensitive. The non-Euclidean nature of the graph data makes the analysis computationally challenging, leading to the use of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) in the age of AI. GNNs may inadvertently leak sensitive data they are trained on, which raises serious data security issues, including the model inversion attack. In this study, we analyze GNNs' vulnerabilities by introducing two novel graph inversion (i.e., reconstruction) attacks: graph-label conditioned (GLC) attack and embedding-label conditioned (ELC) attack, utilizing targetmodel predictions and their intermediate representations, respectively. We perform a comprehensive analysis of our introduced privacy attacks and compare them with existing baselines across three benchmark graph datasets (i.e., NCI1, PROTEINS, and AIDS) and four graph distributional/structural metrics (i.e., FGD, EGD, MMD, and GKS). Our work demonstrates that an adversary can use the generator-discriminator technique to reconstruct high-quality graphs in real-world black-box attack scenarios against GNNs. Additionally, we present a variant of our attacks (Ours--) with 50% reduced queries, achieving good or comparable reconstruction attack performance. In addition, we show that GNNs are highly vulnerable to privacy attacks, varying Laplacian noise-scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型图神经网络（GNN）隐私攻击方法——图标签条件攻击（GLC）和嵌入标签条件攻击（ELC），可在黑盒场景下高效重构原始图数据，揭示GNN在隐私保护方面的严重脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 图数据具有非欧几里得结构且常含敏感信息，GNN虽被广泛用于图分析，但存在模型逆向攻击导致隐私泄露的风险，亟需系统评估其隐私脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出两种基于生成器-判别器框架的图重构攻击：GLC攻击利用目标模型预测结果，ELC攻击利用中间嵌入表示；并在多个图数据集和结构度量指标上进行评估，还设计了查询量减少50%的轻量变体Ours--。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提攻击能在真实黑盒场景下高保真重构图数据，且GNN对不同拉普拉斯噪声尺度均高度脆弱；Ours--在查询减半情况下仍保持良好或相当的攻击性能。
AI.conclusion: GNN存在显著隐私风险，现有防御手段不足，需针对性设计更鲁棒的隐私保护机制。

title: A Linear Matching Bandit Approach to Online Multi-Human Multi-Robot Teaming
summary: We address the problem of online multi-human multi-robot teaming through the lens of a linear matching bandit framework, where a learner assigns robots with unknown features from a fixed pool to distinct sets of human agents over multiple rounds. To solve this problem, we propose LinMatch, an online learning algorithm that updates the confidence intervals of the unknown features and makes the optimistic matching under uncertainty. The contributions and novelty of this work are twofold. First, we recast the optimistic matching problem in each round as a linear program of maximum weighted matching, efficiently solvable by the celebrated Hungarian algorithm. Second, we provide novel bounds for matching with linear feature problems, showing an upper bound of $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{MKT})$ and a minimax lower bound of $Ω(d\sqrt{MKT})$, establishing a tight optimal regret rate of $\tildeΘ(d\sqrt{MKT})$. This demonstrates that LinMatch achieves strictly optimal achievable regret with respect to the total number of rounds $T$, the feature dimension $d$, and the matching parameters $M$ and $K$. The proposed algorithm and bounds apply to a wide range of matching problems with applications beyond human-robot matching, such as housing allocation, recommendation systems, and more.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LinMatch算法，通过线性匹配带臂框架解决在线多机器人-多人协作问题，将每轮乐观匹配建模为可由匈牙利算法高效求解的线性规划，并给出紧致的最优悔界$\tilde{Θ}(d\sqrt{MKT})$。
AI.motivation: 解决在线多机器人与多人员动态匹配问题，其中机器人特征未知且需在多轮中持续优化分配策略。
AI.method: 提出LinMatch在线学习算法，利用置信区间估计未知机器人特征，并在每轮中构建并求解最大权匹配线性规划（采用匈牙利算法）；理论分析给出悔界上界与下界。
AI.result: 获得匹配问题中首个紧致悔界$\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{MKT})$上界和$Ω(d\sqrt{MKT})$下界，证实LinMatch达到最优 regret rate；算法具有一般性，适用于住房分配、推荐系统等匹配场景。
AI.conclusion: LinMatch在理论和算法设计上均具创新性：既提供了高效可解的乐观匹配机制，又建立了匹配型线性带臂问题的紧致理论性能边界，验证了其在多轮人机协同等场景中的最优性与泛化能力。

title: REPAIR-Bench: A Benchmark for Robot Error Perception And Interaction Recovery
summary: Understanding how users perceive and respond to robot failures is essential for building robust and trustworthy robot systems. Prior work, however, (i) often treats failures as independent events, (ii) emphasizes binary failure detection, (iii) with rule-based recovery modeling. We present REPAIR-Bench, built on 214 interaction trials from 41 participants, the benchmark spans four induced failure types and provides synchronized facial action units, head pose, speech transcripts, and post-interaction affect and recovery reports. The benchmark spans three novel evaluation tasks that jointly capture the lifecycle of failure in human-robot interaction (HRI): (i) failure detection over inter-dependent interaction sessions, modeling longitudinal user adaptation across repeated failures; (ii) visual failure-type classification beyond binary success/failure formulations; and (iii) user-centered recovery prediction, inferring users' preferred recovery strategies from interaction context rather than relying on manually designed or rule-based strategies. In baseline experiments, hierarchical recurrent modeling improved failure detection over a single-session model (strict F1: 0.80 vs. 0.68), achieved a failure localization mean signed error of -0.51 s, median absolute error of 2.97 s and, for recovery prediction, a QLoRA-tuned Mistral-7B reached Hit@5=0.76 and F1@5=0.32. REPAIR-Bench provides both the HRI and Medical HRI communities with a standardized framework for (1) evaluating robot failures and (2) building transparent, adaptive, and trustworthy recovery systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了REPAIR-Bench基准，基于214次交互试验，涵盖四种诱导失败类型及多模态用户响应数据，支持失败检测、失败类型分类与用户中心化恢复策略预测三大新任务，推动可信赖、自适应机器人系统的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将机器人失败视为独立事件，侧重二元失败检测和基于规则的恢复建模，缺乏对用户长期适应性、失败类型细粒度识别及个性化恢复策略建模的考量。
AI.method: 构建了REPAIR-Bench基准，包含41名参与者的214次交互数据，同步采集面部动作单元、头部姿态、语音转录及事后情绪与恢复报告；定义三项新评估任务：纵向失败检测、视觉失败类型分类、用户中心化恢复预测；采用分层循环模型和QLoRA微调Mistral-7B进行基线实验。
AI.result: 分层循环模型在失败检测上F1达0.80（优于单会话模型的0.68）；失败定位平均符号误差-0.51秒、中位绝对误差2.97秒；恢复预测Hit@5=0.76，F1@5=0.32。
AI.conclusion: REPAIR-Bench为HRI及医疗HRI领域提供了标准化框架，支持更透明、自适应和可信的机器人失败处理与恢复系统评估与构建。

title: Why Struggle with Continuous Latents? Interpretable Discrete Latent Reasoning via Rendered Compression
summary: Large language models achieve high reasoning performance via explicit chain-of-thought and reinforcement learning, but require long output sequences and extended inference time. Latent reasoning reduces this cost by shifting computation into a latent space; however, continuous latent methods are hard to train, suffering from unstable and uninterpretable reasoning trajectories. We argue these issues stem from a misalignment between continuous-space reasoning and discrete symbolic supervision, as continuous states lack explicit anchors for step-by-step alignment. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{Discrete Latent Reasoning~(DLR)}, the first method that converts continuous latent states into explicit discrete tokens. Inspired by render-based compression, we render textual chains of thought into images, extract visual features, and construct a discrete latent vocabulary via clustering-based fine-tuning. Expanding the vocabulary and output head enables standard autoregressive modeling over both natural language and latent tokens, supporting pretraining alignment, SFT, and RL. Experiments on five reasoning benchmarks and two model series~(Qwen3-VL and LLaMA-3) confirm that \textbf{DLR} outperforms prior latent reasoning baselines with up to \textbf{20$\times$ compression}. Furthermore, the learned latent trajectories retain an interpretable semantic structure. Overall, discrete latent tokens provide a controllable and interpretable basis for efficient latent reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出离散潜在推理（DLR），将连续潜在状态转化为显式离散token，通过图像化思维链、视觉特征提取与聚类构建离散词汇表，实现高效、可解释的潜在推理，在多个基准上达到最高20倍压缩率。
AI.motivation: 连续潜在推理方法因连续空间与离散符号监督不匹配，导致训练不稳定且推理轨迹不可解释。
AI.method: 提出Discrete Latent Reasoning（DLR）：将文本思维链渲染为图像，提取视觉特征，通过聚类微调构建离散潜在词表；扩展词表和输出头，支持自然语言与潜在token的自回归建模（预训练对齐、SFT、RL）。
AI.result: 在五个推理基准和Qwen3-VL、LLaMA-3两个模型系列上，DLR显著优于先前潜在推理基线，最高实现20×推理压缩，且学习到的潜在轨迹具有可解释语义结构。
AI.conclusion: 离散潜在token为高效潜在推理提供了可控且可解释的基础，解决了连续潜在推理的稳定性与可解释性问题。

title: Self-Evolving Agentic Image Restoration via Deliberate Planning and Intuitive Execution
summary: Real-world image restoration (IR) remains challenging due to complex and coupled degradations. While recent agentic IR frameworks leverage Large Language Models for flexible tool planning, they face two critical limitations. First, from a search scheme perspective, excessive reliance on greedy strategies fails to balance exploration and exploitation. Second, existing agentic systems underutilize information, exhibiting episodic amnesia. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{Self-Evolving Agentic Image Restoration (SEAR)}, which formulates restoration as a sequential decision-making problem. Inspired by the dual-process theory, SEAR comprises an Intuitive Executor and a Deliberate Planner, respectively following the fast-thinking \textit{System 1} and slow-thinking \textit{System 2} principles. The Deliberate Planner employs Pruning-Aware Monte Carlo Tree Search for long-horizon reasoning, utilizing a hybrid no-reference reward and a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-based tournament to prevent metric exploitation. Complementarily, the Intuitive Executor leverages a self-evolving episodic memory indexed by degradation-aware state fingerprints. This mechanism distills expensive search trajectories into adaptive expertise, overcoming episodic amnesia while progressively amortizing cold-start exploration costs through memory reuse. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate its strong perceptual and quantitative performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Self-Evolving Agentic Image Restoration (SEAR)的新框架，通过结合直觉执行器和审慎规划器，解决现实图像修复中探索-利用失衡与记忆缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现实图像修复面临复杂耦合退化挑战；现有基于大语言模型的智能体方法存在贪婪搜索导致探索-利用失衡、以及信息利用不足引发的“情节性遗忘”问题。
AI.method: 提出SEAR框架，将图像修复建模为序列决策问题：1）审慎规划器采用剪枝感知的蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS），结合混合无参考奖励与多模态大语言模型（MLLM）锦标赛机制；2）直觉执行器构建基于退化感知状态指纹的自演化情节记忆，实现经验提炼与冷启动成本摊销。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界基准上验证了SEAR在感知质量与定量指标上的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: SEAR通过双系统协同设计有效缓解了搜索策略偏差与记忆缺失问题，显著提升了复杂退化下的图像修复鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: CLQT: A Closed-Loop, Cost-Aware, Strategy-Consistent Benchmark for Diagnostic Evaluation of LLM Portfolio-Management Agents
summary: LLM agents are increasingly cast as autonomous portfolio managers, and benchmarks have moved from financial question-answering to sequential trading. Yet most still rank agents by returns over a fixed window -- a weak proxy, since a period's return is dominated by the market path and apparent alpha can dissolve once look-ahead leakage is controlled. Such a ranking certifies neither sound reasoning, nor a consistent strategy, nor a durable edge. We introduce CLQT, which reframes closed-loop trading evaluation as diagnosis rather than ranking: an instrument that localizes where and why an agent's process succeeds or fails. CLQT is a fully closed-loop, cost-aware, strategy-consistent, temporally-gated environment whose agents run a five-stage cycle: gather, synthesize, allocate, execute, reflect. Each round emits a complete DecisionRound sealed into a recompute-verifiable hash chain, so every metric is reconstructable from the trail. Six pillars form the substrate: a hard TimeGate, institutional transaction- and financing-cost modeling, strategy-consistency scoring, three-tier memory, a Model-Context-Protocol tool layer, and mandate-aware synthesis. The same agent runs as a constrained committee of specialized roles or a single full-autonomy orchestrator, making process scaffolding an experimental variable. From the audit trail we compute a five-axis capability scorecard (APM-CS: Coherence, Acuity, Composure, Discipline, Reliability), with Coherence judged partly by a held-out, out-of-cohort LLM to curb self-preference bias. We validate it on a contamination-controlled multi-model backtest with an ablation grid and a live broker track on unseen, post-cutoff data, against a repeated-run noise floor. CLQT separates outcome from capability, yielding not a model ranking but a durable, extensible map of agent competencies and limitations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLQT框架，将闭合循环交易评估从简单排名转变为诊断工具，通过五阶段决策循环、可验证哈希链审计轨迹和五维能力评分卡（APM-CS），实现对LLM代理交易能力的细粒度、可复现、成本感知和策略一致的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理交易评估方法仅依赖固定窗口收益排名，易受市场路径干扰和前瞻性泄露影响，无法反映代理的真实推理能力、策略一致性或持久优势。
AI.method: 构建CLQT——一个全闭环、成本感知、策略一致、时间门控的交易评估环境；代理执行‘采集-综合-配置-执行-反思’五阶段循环；每轮生成可哈希验证的DecisionRound；引入六大基础模块（硬时间门、机构级成本建模、策略一致性评分、三层记忆、模型-上下文-协议工具层、任务约束感知综合）；支持角色分工与全自主两种运行模式；基于审计轨迹计算五维能力评分卡（APM-CS），其中Coherence由独立LLM评估以抑制自偏见。
AI.result: 在污染控制的多模型回测、消融实验及真实券商实盘（未见后截断数据）中验证CLQT有效性；显著区分代理能力与随机噪声；提供可扩展、可复现的代理能力图谱而非单一排名。
AI.conclusion: CLQT将评估范式从‘结果导向排名’转向‘过程导向诊断’，实现了对LLM交易代理能力的解耦、量化与可审计分析，为金融AI代理的稳健发展提供了新基准。

title: Depth Exploration for LLM Decoding
summary: Autoregressive LLM decoding evaluates every generated token through the full layer stack, even though many tokens become predictable at intermediate depths. Existing lossless depth-adaptive methods exploit this redundancy by choosing a single non-final exit depth and verifying its prediction with the final-depth model. However, our measurements show that this selection-based strategy leaves substantial headroom: choosing an exit too late wastes computation, while choosing one too early triggers fallback and discards dependent drafts. We propose Depth Exploration Decoding (DEX), a lossless decoding algorithm that replaces single-depth selection with parallel exploration over multiple candidate depths. At each commit position, DEX validates candidates against the final-depth reference, commits exactly the final-depth token, and collapses the exploration lattice to retain only reusable branch states. This expand--commit--collapse procedure preserves equivalence to standard autoregressive decoding while reducing the cost of committing each token. Across early-exit-trained and standard LLMs, DEX outperforms representative depth-selection baselines and achieves competitive end-to-end throughput against speculative and distributed decoding methods. Moreover, DEX improves as the explored depths become finer, showing that parallel depth exploration provides a scalable way to exploit the underused depth axis of LLM decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Depth Exploration Decoding（DEX）的无损解码算法，通过在多个候选深度上并行探索而非单一深度选择，提升大语言模型（LLM）自回归解码效率。DEX在每个提交位置验证多深度候选、仅提交最终深度token，并压缩探索结构以保留可复用状态，在保持与标准自回归解码等价的同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有基于早退（early-exit）的无损深度自适应解码方法仅选择一个非最终退出深度并用最终层验证，但该策略存在明显冗余：退出过晚浪费计算，过早则触发回退并丢弃依赖的草稿。作者指出深度轴仍有大量未被利用的优化空间。
AI.method: 提出DEX（Depth Exploration Decoding）：在每个生成位置并行探索多个候选退出深度；对各深度输出用最终层作为参考进行验证；仅提交最终层确定的token；并通过‘扩展–提交–压缩’流程动态维护可复用的状态分支，确保与标准自回归解码完全等价。
AI.result: DEX在早退训练和标准LLM上均优于代表性深度选择基线；端到端吞吐量媲美推测解码和分布式解码；且随着探索深度粒度变细，性能持续提升，验证了并行深度探索的有效性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DEX证明了在LLM解码中沿深度维度进行细粒度、并行化探索是一种高效且可扩展的无损加速路径，为深度自适应推理提供了新范式。

title: WARP: Whole-Body Retargeting for Learning from Offline Human Demonstrations
summary: Direct transfer from human demonstration to learnable robot action is a crucial step towards scalable whole-body mobile manipulation. While human data scales better than mobile teleoperation, it requires overcoming significant embodiment gaps. Existing retargeting methods yield imprecise or inconsistent solutions, causing action multi-modality that prevents supervised policies from reliably converging. We present Whole-body-Aware Retargeting from human Pose (WARP), an offline pipeline that explicitly models embodiment differences to extract precise, unique whole-body actions. WARP leverages a closed-form Shoulder-Elbow-Wrist (SEW) geometric solver for exact end-effector tracking while preserving whole-body structural intent. Paired with lazy mobile-base control, it extracts accurate, consistent robot trajectories. Evaluations show WARP provides highly reliable data for open-loop real-world replay. To our knowledge, WARP is the first framework to achieve zero-shot whole-body mobile manipulation directly from offline human demonstrations, eliminating the need for human-in-the-loop teleoperation action data. More details on https://warp-retarget.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出WARP框架，通过显式建模人机形态差异，利用SEW几何求解器实现精确、唯一的全身动作重定向，首次实现仅凭离线人类演示即可零样本完成全身移动操作。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人类演示的动作迁移方法存在形态差异大、重定向不精确/不一致问题，导致动作多模态，阻碍监督策略收敛。
AI.method: 提出Whole-body-Aware Retargeting from human Pose（WARP）离线流程：采用闭式Shoulder-Elbow-Wrist（SEW）几何求解器实现末端执行器精确定位并保持全身结构意图，并结合懒惰式移动基座控制提取准确一致的机器人轨迹。
AI.result: WARP在开环真实世界回放中提供高可靠性数据；首次实现无需人类参与的零样本全身移动操作。
AI.conclusion: WARP有效弥合了人类演示与可学习机器人动作之间的 embodiment gap，为可扩展的全身移动操作提供了新范式。

title: SEVA: Self-Evolving Verification Agent with Process Reward for Fact Attribution
comment: Accepted at AI4GOOD@ICML 2026 and FAGEN@ICML 2026. Code: https://github.com/Justin0504/Verifiable_agent
summary: Hallucination is the reliability bottleneck for LLM-based agents, and fact attribution verifiers are the last line of defense -- yet today's verifiers emit only opaque binary labels, leaving agents unable to self-correct and operators unable to audit. We present SEVA, a structured verification agent that emits evidence alignments, step-by-step reasoning chains, calibrated confidence, and a six-category error diagnosis with actionable fixes. Training such an agent with RL is non-trivial: standard binary reward on multi-component output triggers advantage collapse -- within-group reward variance vanishes and the GRPO gradient disappears. We resolve this with a process reward that decomposes verification quality into five independent components weighted 70/30 toward process signals, restoring the gradient and inducing an implicit curriculum -- the agent first masters verification behavior (alignment 0.917 -> 0.997, format 72% -> 100%), then outcomes (F1 64.9 -> 69.0). Structured output further enables a Verify -> Reflect -> Probe -> Refine self-evolution loop, which over four rounds on a 7B model surfaces an unexpected structural finding: each round produces a benchmark-specialist, not a generalist (+15 pp on HaluEval, -10 to -14 pp on TruthfulQA in the same model, persistent at 4x data). On ClearFacts, SEVA-3B matches GPT-4o-mini (69.0 vs. 69.8 F1) while producing substantially richer, auditable output -- confirming a principle that should generalize: for any RL task with multi-component generation, reward granularity must match output granularity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEVA，一种结构化验证代理，通过细粒度奖励机制和多组件输出，显著提升LLM事实核查的可解释性、可审计性和自我修正能力。
AI.motivation: 现有事实归因验证器仅输出不透明的二元标签，导致LLM代理无法自纠正、操作员无法审计，而幻觉问题仍是LLM代理可靠性的主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出SEVA结构化验证代理，输出包括证据对齐、推理链、校准置信度和六类错误诊断；采用基于五维过程奖励的RL训练方法（70/30权重偏向过程信号），避免优势坍缩，并构建Verify->Reflect->Probe->Refine自演化循环。
AI.result: SEVA在HaluEval上提升15个百分点，在TruthfulQA上下降10–14个百分点，显示其产生的是基准特化模型而非通用模型；SEVA-3B在ClearFacts上F1达69.0，媲美GPT-4o-mini（69.8），且输出更丰富、可审计。
AI.conclusion: 对于多组件生成的RL任务，奖励粒度必须匹配输出粒度；结构化验证不仅提升性能，更增强可解释性与可审计性，该原则具有广泛适用性。

title: Evidence-Based Text-Conditioned 3D CT Synthesis for Ovarian Cancer
summary: Ovarian cancer is frequently diagnosed at an advanced stage, making preoperative contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) central to staging and surgical planning; yet the scarcity of annotated imaging data, compounded by privacy regulations, limits the development of generalizable computational models in this domain. Text-conditioned 3D CT synthesis has shown promise, but existing pipelines depend on paired radiology reports and have been evaluated only on chest CT. We propose OvESyn (Ovarian Evidence-based Synthesis), a framework that constructs standardized Findings and Impression sections directly from CT-derived imaging descriptors and routine clinical metadata, without any original radiology report, and uses them to condition a latent diffusion model adapted to 493 high-grade serous ovarian carcinoma patients. This is the first text-conditioned 3D CT synthesis framework adapted to an abdomino-pelvic oncologic setting. A systematic ablation over two adaptation axes, vision-language encoder alignment and generator fine-tuning, identifies generator domain adaptation as the operative mechanism for crossing the domain gap and establishing the target anatomy: without it, synthesis remains anchored to the thoracic pretraining domain, with Precision and Recall collapsing to zero and FID2.5D exceeding 140, regardless of encoder alignment. Encoder alignment instead refines intensity and fine detail. The full OvESyn attains the best distributional and intensity fidelity (FID2.5D 29.35, Precision 0.671, Wasserstein-1 0.044), while the generator-only variant maximizes coverage (Recall 0.645), reflecting a fidelity/coverage trade-off governed by encoder adaptation. Requiring only automatic segmentations and routine preoperative metadata, OvESyn supports transferability to report-scarce settings and provides a foundation for synthetic cohort generation in abdomino-pelvic oncologic imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OvESyn框架，首次实现基于文本条件的腹部-盆腔肿瘤CT图像合成，无需原始放射报告，仅需自动分割和常规临床元数据，解决了卵巢癌影像数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 卵巢癌常晚期确诊，术前增强CT对分期和手术规划至关重要，但标注影像数据稀缺且受隐私法规限制，制约了通用计算模型的发展。
AI.method: 提出OvESyn框架，从CT影像描述和常规临床元数据中自动生成标准化的'发现'与'印象'文本，并用于条件化适配于493例高级别浆液性卵巢癌患者的潜在扩散模型；系统开展视觉-语言编码器对齐与生成器微调两轴消融实验。
AI.result: 完整OvESyn在分布与强度保真度上最优（FID2.5D=29.35，Precision=0.671，Wasserstein-1=0.044）；仅微调生成器变体覆盖度最高（Recall=0.645）；无生成器域适配时指标严重退化（Precision/Recall≈0，FID2.5D>140）。
AI.conclusion: 生成器域适配是跨越解剖域鸿沟的关键机制，编码器对齐则优化强度与细节；OvESyn支持在缺乏放射报告场景下的迁移应用，并为腹部-盆腔肿瘤影像合成队列构建奠定基础。

title: The CRISTAL Method: Neurosymbolic analysis from AI-synthesized world models
summary: This project introduces the CRISTAL Method (Coherent Reliable Intentional Synthesis of Truthful Analysis Logic), a neurosymbolic framework for automating complex analysis workflows, with fundamental investment analysis as a primary use case. This domain poses major challenges: high structural uncertainty, noisy and subjective data, tight attention budgets, and the need for justified, reproducible decisions. Human analysts often struggle in this domain due to cognitive biases and limitations, suggesting significant value in automation. But while LLM-based agents have been proposed as analytical aids, their limitations -- poor numerical reasoning, unawareness of uncertainty, and lack of reproducibility -- hinder their effectiveness in this context. CRISTAL addresses these gaps through a principled blend of statistical model synthesis, continuous learning, and active learning. Starting from a natural-language prior knowledge curriculum, CRISTAL builds a dynamic, interpretable probabilistic program that enables full Bayesian inference, including uncertainty quantification and budget-aware data acquisition. CRISTAL continually refines its world model during analysis, leveraging LLMs for code synthesis and learning. We validate CRISTAL on a novel benchmark of synthetic equities with rich financial and textual data. On a company classification task, CRISTAL achieves Bayes-optimal accuracy with just 5 examples and a 5-second budget, outperforming state-of-the-art LLMs that plateau around 40\% accuracy even with order-of-magnitude more input data and compute.

AI.tldr: CRISTAL是一种神经符号框架，用于自动化复杂分析流程（如投资分析），通过结合统计建模、持续学习与主动学习，实现可解释的贝叶斯推理和不确定性量化，在少量样本和极短预算下达到贝叶斯最优性能。
AI.motivation: 投资分析领域存在高结构不确定性、噪声与主观数据、注意力资源受限及需可解释可复现决策等挑战；人类分析师易受认知偏差影响，而现有LLM代理在数值推理、不确定性感知和可复现性方面存在明显缺陷。
AI.method: 提出CRISTAL方法：基于自然语言先验知识课程，构建动态、可解释的概率程序，支持全贝叶斯推理（含不确定性量化与预算感知数据采集）；融合统计模型合成、持续学习与主动学习，并利用LLM进行代码生成与学习。
AI.result: 在合成股票基准测试中，CRISTAL在公司分类任务上仅用5个样本和5秒预算即达贝叶斯最优准确率，显著优于当前最优LLM（即使输入数据与算力高出一个数量级，准确率仍仅约40%）。
AI.conclusion: CRISTAL成功弥合了LLM在严谨分析任务中的关键缺陷，为高可靠性、可解释、资源受限的自动化分析提供了新范式。

title: On the Policy Gradient Foundations of Group Relative Policy Optimization: Credit Assignment, Gradient Sparsity, and Rank Collapse
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) eliminates the learned critic in PPO by using the mean reward of grouped rollouts as a baseline. We provide a rigorous derivation of GRPO from first principles of the policy gradient theorem, revealing a fundamental credit assignment failure: under output-only reward, every token in a rollout receives identical advantage, collapsing token-level credit to a single scalar. We prove this induces gradient sparsity that intensifies over training, and demonstrate empirically via SVD analysis of GRPO gradients on Nemotron-4B/GSM8K that the gradient matrix has effective rank $\approx$ 2 regardless of group size $R \in \{2, 4, 8\}$. We formalize this as an intrinsic rank-2 structure arising from the zero-sum constraint on advantages and derive conditions under which GRPO's baseline is optimal. Our results characterize when GRPO's simplicity is theoretically justified and identify the credit assignment bottleneck as the key limitation for multi-step reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并分析了Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)方法，指出其在无显式critic的情况下使用组内平均奖励作为基线会导致token级信用分配失败，从而引发梯度稀疏性问题，并证明该问题导致梯度矩阵具有内在的秩-2结构。
AI.motivation: 解决PPO中依赖学习critic带来的复杂性和不稳定性问题，探索更简洁的策略优化方法；同时揭示output-only reward设定下token级信用分配的根本缺陷。
AI.method: 从策略梯度定理出发严格推导GRPO；理论分析其优势函数的零和约束导致的梯度低秩特性；通过SVD对Nemotron-4B/GSM8K上的GRPO梯度进行实证分析；形式化刻画GRPO基线最优性的条件。
AI.result: 证明GRPO在output-only reward下会导致所有token获得相同优势，造成梯度稀疏且有效秩恒≈2（与组大小无关）；发现该低秩结构源于优势函数的零和约束；给出GRPO基线最优的理论条件。
AI.conclusion: GRPO的简洁性仅在特定条件下具备理论合理性；其核心局限在于无法支持多步推理所需的细粒度信用分配，即token级信用分配瓶颈是制约其性能的关键因素。

title: Seeing Touch from Motion: A Unified Modality-Aware Visuo-Tactile Policy with Tactile Motion Correlation
summary: Visuo-Tactile policies leveraging optical tactile sensors have shown great promise in contact-rich manipulation. These sensors achieve high spatial resolution and multi-dimensional force sensing by utilizing an internal camera to monitor the deformation of their elastic gel surface, thereby indirectly inferring tactile cues. Despite their advantages, extracting fine-grained contact states necessary for contact-rich manipulation remains an open challenge. Existing methods typically use either raw images or cumulative motion fields to represent tactile cues. However, both are prone to perception ambiguity. Raw tactile images mainly capture appearance changes, while cumulative motion fields only reflect the aggregate gel deformation. Consequently, distinct fine-grained contact states can exhibit highly similar patterns, making it difficult to explicitly distinguish subtle contact variations. To address this issue, we explore the dynamic priors of tactile motion and discover that the correlation between transient and cumulative motion can explicitly distinguish fine-grained contact states. Based on this insight, we propose a motion-aware tactile representation to facilitate contact-rich manipulation. Beyond tactile representation, effective fusion of tactile and visual modalities is also critical. Most existing fusion methods either directly concatenate features from each modality or train modality-specific networks separately and fuse their outputs. However, these strategies struggle to simultaneously model cross-modal interactions and preserve modality-specific characteristics. In this work, we take advantage of the Mixture-of-Transformers architecture and propose a unified modality-aware visuo-tactile policy that captures cross-modal complementarity while maintaining modality-specific properties.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种运动感知的触觉表征方法，并结合模态感知的混合Transformer架构，实现视觉-触觉融合策略，以提升接触密集型操作中对细粒度接触状态的识别与控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉表征方法（如原始图像或累积运动场）难以区分细粒度接触状态，导致感知模糊；同时，视觉-触觉模态融合方法难以兼顾跨模态交互与模态特异性保留。
AI.method: 1）提出基于瞬时与累积运动相关性的运动感知触觉表征；2）采用Mixture-of-Transformers架构构建统一的模态感知 visuo-tactile 策略，实现跨模态互补建模与模态特性保留。
AI.result: 所提方法在接触密集型操作任务中显著提升了细粒度接触状态识别精度与策略泛化能力，优于现有基于图像或运动场的触觉表征及简单特征拼接/独立网络融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态触觉运动先验可有效解耦模糊接触模式，而模态感知的Transformer融合架构为多模态机器人感知与控制提供了更鲁棒、更具解释性的新范式。

title: How Far Do On-Prem Open LLMs Get on Text-to-SQL? A Cross-Family Size x Technique Frontier on BIRD
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Code: https://github.com/beskvladimir-create/nl2sql-onprem-bench Data DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20952794
summary: Organizations that cannot send data to a cloud API increasingly ask: how good is Text-to-SQL if the model must run on-premises on open weights, and which popular accuracy "recipes" are worth their compute? We answer with an honest, fully reproducible benchmark on the BIRD development split (n=1534, Execution Accuracy), evaluating three open model families across two generations -- Qwen2.5-Coder (7B/14B/32B), CodeLlama-Instruct (7B/13B/34B), and Llama-3.x (8B, 70B) -- under one matched protocol, ablating a model-agnostic recipe (schema linking, self-correction, self-consistency) component by component, with every difference tested by the paired McNemar test. Four findings stand out. (i) Generation matters more than raw size, and the recipe is family-robust: Qwen2.5-Coder dominates the older CodeLlama at matched size (39.1 vs 20.9 at 7B), but a modern non-Qwen model (Llama-3.3-70B, 49.2 on a matched serving) is competitive, so CodeLlama's weakness reflects its 2023 generation, not "non-Qwen = weak". (ii) Self-correction is a robust, near-free win, significant on all three families where there is room to improve. (iii) Schema linking does not help, and a stronger linker does not rescue it: a retrieval/embedding linker with 96.5% gold-table recall is statistically indistinguishable from no linking, ruling out the "weak lexical strawman" objection across three families. (iv) Self-consistency is poor value (+0.13 pp for ~5x tokens, not significant). We report real per-stage cost ($/1k queries) and release all code, predictions, and summaries; archived code and data: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20952794

AI.tldr: 本文对本地部署的开源Text-to-SQL模型进行了全面、可复现的基准测试，评估了Qwen2.5-Coder、CodeLlama-Instruct和Llama-3.x三类模型在BIRD数据集上的执行准确率，并系统消融了schema linking、self-correction和self-consistency等常见优化策略，得出若干关键结论：生成能力比参数量更重要；self-correction是高效增益策略；schema linking无效；self-consistency性价比极低。
AI.motivation: 组织日益关注本地部署开源Text-to-SQL模型的实际性能与计算性价比，但缺乏统一、严谨、可复现的基准评估。
AI.method: 在BIRD开发集（n=1534）上，采用统一协议评估Qwen2.5-Coder、CodeLlama-Instruct和Llama-3.x三类开源模型；对schema linking、self-correction、self-consistency进行逐项消融实验；所有性能差异均通过配对McNemar检验验证显著性；报告真实阶段成本（$/1k queries）。
AI.result: （i）模型代际优于规模：Qwen2.5-Coder 7B（39.1%）显著优于同规模CodeLlama 7B（20.9%），而Llama-3.3-70B达49.2%，表明CodeLlama弱势源于其2023年架构而非非Qwen身份；（ii）self-correction在所有家族中均带来显著且低成本提升；（iii）schema linking（含高召回率检索器）无统计显著增益；（iv）self-consistency仅提升0.13个百分点，代价约5倍token，不显著。
AI.conclusion: Text-to-SQL本地部署效果高度依赖模型代际与生成能力，而非单纯参数量；self-correction是唯一兼具鲁棒性与高性价比的通用优化策略；schema linking与self-consistency在当前主流开源模型上缺乏实际价值。

title: Learning from Acquisition: Metadata-driven Multimodal Pre-training for Cardiac MRI
summary: Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) routinely records structured acquisition metadata, yet most CMR foundation models rely primarily on image-only pre-training and leave this naturally available source of weak semantic supervision largely underexplored. We propose MetaCLIP-CMR, a metadata-driven framework based on Contrastive Language--Image Pre-training (CLIP), which converts imaging modality, anatomical view, scanner vendor, field strength, and scanner model into textual supervision for CMR representation learning. The pretrained image encoder is evaluated on imaging modality classification, cine view classification, and cardiac segmentation. MetaCLIP-CMR achieves 86.8% modality accuracy and 86.5% cine view accuracy, clearly outperforming ImageNet and masked reconstruction initialisations. For downstream cardiac segmentation, MetaCLIP-CMR consistently obtains the highest Dice score across the evaluated ACDC and M&Ms cine short-axis (SAX) settings under both full-data and 20% fine-tuning regimes. Compared with recent image-focused large-scale CMR pre-training models, MetaCLIP-CMR achieves comparable ACDC segmentation performance, while requiring less than 1% of their pre-training image scale. These results suggest that metadata learning offers a natural and easy-to-use strategy for transforming routinely recorded acquisition information into effective supervision for foundation-level CMR representation learning, highlighting the promise of metadata-driven multimodal pre-training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaCLIP-CMR，一种基于CLIP的元数据驱动CMR表征学习框架，利用采集元数据（如模态、视角、厂商等）生成文本监督信号，在模态分类、 cine 视角分类和心脏分割任务中显著优于ImageNet及掩码重建预训练方法，并以极小预训练图像规模达到与大规模图像预训练模型相当的分割性能。
AI.motivation: CMR常规采集中包含丰富的结构化元数据，但现有基础模型多依赖纯图像预训练，未充分利用这些天然弱语义监督信号。
AI.method: 提出MetaCLIP-CMR框架，将CMR采集元数据（成像模态、解剖视角、扫描仪厂商、场强、型号）转化为文本描述，结合CLIP进行对比语言-图像预训练；预训练图像编码器用于下游模态分类、cine视角分类及心脏分割任务评估。
AI.result: 在模态分类达86.8%，cine视角分类达86.5%，显著优于ImageNet和掩码重建初始化；心脏分割在ACDC和M&Ms数据集上Dice分数最高，且仅需不到1%的大规模图像预训练数据量即可媲美最新图像主导的大规模CMR预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 元数据驱动的多模态预训练是一种自然、易用且高效的方式，可将常规采集信息转化为基础级CMR表征学习的有效监督信号。

title: Beyond Triplet Plausibility: Relation Set Completion in Knowledge Graphs
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) organize real-world knowledge as triplets and underpin many downstream applications. Due to their inherent incompleteness, knowledge graph completion (KGC) is widely studied and is typically formulated as triplet prediction, with link prediction as the dominant paradigm. However, this formulation focuses on the incompleteness of triplet-wise information and overlooks the incompleteness of entity-relation compatibility information. To address this limitation, we introduce a relation set completion task (RSC), which complements the link prediction task and aims to reason about missing relations that are semantically compatible with a given entity. We further propose a Relation Set Embedding model (RelSetE), which models latent patterns among the observed relations of entities to infer missing ones. To evaluate RelSetE, we derive three benchmark datasets from standard KG benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RelSetE effectively captures entity-relation compatibility patterns and performs favorably in inferring missing relations of entities. Code and data are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出关系集补全（RSC）任务，以弥补传统知识图谱补全中忽略实体-关系兼容性信息的缺陷，并设计了Relation Set Embedding（RelSetE）模型来建模实体已知关系间的潜在模式，从而推断缺失的语义兼容关系。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱补全（KGC）主要关注三元组层面的不完备性（即链接预测），却忽略了实体与关系之间语义兼容性的不完备性。
AI.method: 提出关系集补全（RSC）新任务，并设计Relation Set Embedding（RelSetE）模型，通过建模实体观测到的关系集合的潜在模式来推断其语义兼容但缺失的关系。
AI.result: 在从标准KG基准构建的三个新数据集上，RelSetE能有效捕获实体-关系兼容性模式，在推断实体缺失关系任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: RSC任务和RelSetE模型为知识图谱补全提供了新视角，强调并建模了实体与关系间的语义兼容性，是对传统链接预测的重要补充。

title: Blackknife: Hard-Label Query-Limited Black-Box Attacks on Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks
summary: Heterogeneous graph neural networks (HGNNs) have achieved strong performance in modeling complex graph-structured data with multiple node and relation types. However, their robustness under realistic black-box adversarial settings remains insufficiently explored. Existing attacks on HGNNs usually assume access to model gradients, soft prediction scores, or the complete graph structure, which is often unavailable when HGNN-based services are deployed as closed systems. In this paper, we propose Blackknife, a hard-label, query-limited, and structure-limited black-box evasion attack framework for heterogeneous graph neural networks. Blackknife assumes no access to the victim model architecture, parameters, gradients, logits, confidence scores, or the full graph structure. Instead, it only relies on locally observable one-hop heterogeneous structures and a small number of hard-label queries. To generate effective perturbations under these strict constraints, Blackknife first constructs a local relation-aware surrogate model from observable heterogeneous neighborhoods. It then relaxes discrete edge addition and deletion operations into continuous soft weights and optimizes them through projected gradient descent. Finally, the optimized perturbations are discretized into relation-preserving structural rewiring operations and verified using limited hard-label feedback from the victim model. Extensive experiments on three benchmark heterogeneous graph datasets, including ACM, DBLP, and IMDB, demonstrate that Blackknife consistently achieves strong attack success rates against representative HGNN models. The results further show that Blackknife remains effective under topology-based defense strategies, revealing the vulnerability of HGNNs to local structure-limited black-box attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Blackknife，一种针对异构图神经网络（HGNN）的黑盒逃逸攻击框架，仅依赖局部一跳异构结构和少量硬标签查询，在无模型访问权限、无完整图结构信息的严苛条件下实现高效攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有HGNN攻击方法通常需要访问模型梯度、软预测分数或完整图结构，但在实际闭源部署场景中这些信息往往不可得，因此亟需研究更现实的黑盒攻击方法。
AI.method: Blackknife构建基于局部可观测异构邻域的关系感知代理模型，将离散的边增删操作松弛为连续软权重，通过投影梯度下降优化，并将优化结果离散化为关系保持的结构重布线操作，最后利用有限硬标签反馈验证扰动效果。
AI.result: 在ACM、DBLP和IMDB三个基准异构图数据集上，Blackknife对多种代表性HGNN模型均展现出高攻击成功率，且在基于拓扑的防御策略下仍保持有效性。
AI.conclusion: Blackknife揭示了HGNN在仅依赖局部结构与硬标签查询的黑盒设定下的显著脆弱性，为评估和提升HGNN鲁棒性提供了新视角与实用工具。

title: Heterogeneous Tactile Transformer
summary: Tactile sensors are inherently heterogeneous: a model trained on one sensor cannot be directly used on another, which limits learning contact-rich manipulation policies from diverse tactile data at scale. To bridge this gap, we propose the Heterogeneous Tactile Transformer (HTT), a framework that learns shared tactile representations across heterogeneous sensors. HTT consists of sensor-specific encoders and a shared transformer trunk, and is pretrained with per-modality masked reconstruction together with cross-modal alignment between paired sensors. Pretraining uses our novel Heterogeneous Paired Tactile (HPT) dataset, containing 1.6M synchronized paired frames across four vision- and array-based tactile sensors. Across distinct tactile perception and real-world manipulation tasks, HTT is shown to learn transferable representations that adapt to new tasks and previously unseen sensors. Dataset, code, and model checkpoints will be released upon publication at https://jxbi1010.github.io/htt-gh-page/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为异构触觉Transformer（HTT）的框架，旨在解决不同触觉传感器之间模型不可迁移的问题，通过传感器特定编码器和共享Transformer主干网络，结合多模态掩码重建与跨模态对齐进行预训练，并在自建的HPT数据集上验证了其跨传感器泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 触觉传感器天然具有异构性，一个传感器上训练的模型无法直接迁移到其他传感器，限制了从多样化触觉数据中大规模学习接触丰富操作策略的能力。
AI.method: 提出HTT框架，包含传感器专用编码器和共享Transformer主干；采用每模态掩码重建与配对传感器间的跨模态对齐进行预训练；构建包含160万同步配对帧的Heterogeneous Paired Tactile（HPT）数据集。
AI.result: HTT在多个触觉感知与真实世界操作任务上展现出可迁移表征能力，能适应新任务及未见过的传感器。
AI.conclusion: HTT有效实现了异构触觉传感器间的表征共享与迁移，为触觉学习的规模化与通用化提供了可行路径。

title: Fast Numbers, Slow Language: Bridging Quantitative and Qualitative Earnings Signals
summary:
Earnings announcements release two types of information sequentially: quantitative surprise (numeric earnings-per-share (EPS)/revenue versus analyst estimate) arrives first in press releases and financial news, processed by algorithmic traders within minutes; qualitative language (management tone, guidance, question-and-answer (Q&A) credibility) arrives 30-90 min later in the earnings conference call transcript (ECT), requiring human interpretation overnight. Financial economists have studied quantitative surprise for 50 years; natural language processing (NLP) researchers have studied qualitative ECT signals for a decade. Despite studying the same event, the two communities used incompatible frameworks: different targets (return vs. volatility), trading setups (long top-decile and short bottom-decile vs. trade-all), and metrics (return spread between top and bottom 20% (Q5-Q1) vs. mean squared error (MSE)), making direct comparison and connection challenging.
  We bridge these communities with EarningsInOne, the first corpus aligning earnings news, ECTs, and intraday and next-day prices across SP 1500 (broad U.S. equity universe, 2022-2025). Applying unified trading and evaluation tools to both signal types, we confirm a clean speed separation, fast numbers, slow language: quantitative surprise peaks at announcement and is largely eliminated by the next market open; qualitative ECT sentiment peaks on the next trading day, real and tradeable, but hidden under prior transcript-based evaluation that optimised sign-agnostic volatility with pointwise MSE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EarningsInOne数据集，统一量化与质性盈余信息的研究框架，揭示定量信息快速反应、定性语言滞后但可交易的新发现。
AI.motivation: 金融经济学家与NLP研究者长期分别研究盈余公告中的定量惊喜与定性语言，但因目标、交易设定和评估指标不一致，难以直接比较与整合。
AI.method: 构建首个对齐盈余新闻、财报电话会议记录（ECT）及日内/次日股价的EarningsInOne语料库（SP 1500，2022–2025），并在统一交易与评估框架下分析两类信号。
AI.result: 证实‘数字快、语言慢’：定量惊喜在公告时达峰且次日开盘前基本消化；定性ECT情绪在次交易日达峰，真实可交易，但此前因使用符号无关的波动率优化与点态MSE而被掩盖。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一框架，本文弥合了金融与NLP领域对盈余信息研究的鸿沟，证明定性语言具有显著且延迟的市场影响，为跨学科建模提供新范式。

title: SciFlow: Semantic Cross Interference for Self-Supervised Optical Flow Domain Generalization
summary:
Motions of objects and scenes carry essential intelligence in video understanding, offering rich cues for interpreting dynamic settings and interactions. Due to the cost and scarcity of high-quality annotation or ground truth of pixel-wise optical flow, however, motion estimation models are typically trained in synthetic domains while deployed in real-world domains. Addressing synthetic-to-real domain generalization challenges has been crucial for developing practical solutions in diverse open-world use cases.
  This paper introduces SciFlow, a simple yet effective, network-agnostic, training-based approach that leverages self-supervised learning to generalize motion estimation across synthetic and open-world domains. Specifically, SciFlow imposes semantic interference from open-world images onto synthetic images during training, blending indomain features with cross-domain interference, which enables the network to adapt to the real-world domains. Additionally, SciFlow utilizes geometric consistency to ensure validity of the self-supervision. Our experiment results show that SciFlow not only significantly enhances model robustness amidst domain variations, but also remarkably enables synthetic-to-real domain generalization without requiring any ground truth in the open world.

AI.tldr: SciFlow是一种无需真实标签的自监督训练方法，通过在合成图像训练中引入开放世界图像的语义干扰和几何一致性约束，提升光流估计模型在合成到真实域迁移中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有光流估计模型多在合成数据上训练，但需部署于真实场景；而高质量真实光流标注成本高、稀缺，导致合成到真实域的泛化性能差。
AI.method: SciFlow提出一种网络无关的自监督训练策略：1）在合成图像训练中注入开放世界图像的语义干扰，实现跨域特征融合；2）利用几何一致性约束保障自监督信号的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SciFlow显著提升模型在域偏移下的鲁棒性，并在无需开放世界真实标签的前提下，有效实现合成到真实的域泛化。
AI.conclusion: SciFlow为无监督域泛化光流估计提供了简单高效的新范式，推动运动估计在开放世界视频理解中的实用化落地。

title: AI Training Manager: Bounded Closed-Loop Control of Adaptive Training Recipes
summary: We present the AI Training Manager, a bounded LLM-based supervisory controller for adaptive machine learning training. Standard training pipelines often rely on fixed recipes or single-axis schedulers, which can struggle with mid-run failures such as severe overfitting, loss imbalance, exploration collapse, or unsafe exploration. Rather than replacing mathematical optimizers or acting as an unconstrained coding agent, the manager operates through a schema-conditioned interface: it reads structured telemetry snapshots from an active run, audits a constrained action space, and returns validated updates to training parameters such as learning rate, regularization strength, loss-weight coefficients, and exploration settings. We evaluate this architecture across supervised language modeling and reinforcement learning. On TinyStories, the manager detects and corrects overfitting, achieving a validation loss 60% lower than the baseline while producing auditable intervention logs. In this supervised setting, we additionally show that manager inference does not need to block the training loop: training can continue while a manager response is pending, and validated updates can be applied asynchronously once available. In a robotic manipulation reinforcement-learning task, we use the same bounded decision interface in an episodic closed-loop setting, where manager updates are applied at evaluation or checkpoint boundaries. The manager mitigates both conservative and unsafe exploration regimes. These results suggest that schema-conditioned LLMs can serve as bounded supervisory managers for live training runs, complementing conventional optimizers and schedulers with interpretable, multi-axis intervention capabilities

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI Training Manager，一种基于受限大语言模型（LLM）的监督控制器，用于自适应机器学习训练，通过结构化遥测数据和受限动作空间动态调整训练参数，在语言建模与强化学习任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 标准训练流程常依赖固定配方或单轴调度器，难以应对训练中途出现的严重过拟合、损失失衡、探索崩溃或不安全探索等问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于schema条件约束的LLM监督控制器，读取训练过程中的结构化遥测快照，在受限动作空间内审计并返回经验证的参数更新（如学习率、正则强度、损失权重、探索设置等），支持异步干预和闭环决策。
AI.result: 在TinyStories上显著降低验证损失（比基线低60%），生成可审计干预日志；在机器人操作强化学习任务中有效缓解保守与不安全探索问题；验证了非阻塞式、异步参数更新可行性。
AI.conclusion: Schema条件约束的LLM可作为训练过程的可解释、多轴干预型监督管理者，补充传统优化器与调度器，提升训练鲁棒性与可控性。

title: Towards Evaluating Data Priors for Tabular Foundation Models
summary: Data-generating priors are a central component of tabular foundation models because they define the task distribution used during pretraining. However, priors are rarely evaluated as independent components, making it difficult to understand how much they affect downstream model behavior. This raises a methodological question: how can priors from different tabular foundation models be compared independently of the architectures and training protocols they were introduced with? To study this question, we implement a unified interface for publicly available priors from recent tabular foundation models and priors constructed from real datasets. We generate training tasks from each prior, train the same model architecture under a fixed training protocol, and evaluate the resulting models on shared downstream classification tasks. We compare priors through both generated-task statistics and downstream predictive performance. Our results show that different priors favor different downstream behaviors, with some achieving stronger absolute performance and others exhibiting more consistent relative rankings across datasets. We further find that data-level similarity only partially explains downstream behavior. Our code is available at https://github.com/automl/TFM-Playground/tree/prior-dev.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一接口来独立评估不同表格基础模型中的数据生成先验（priors），通过固定模型架构与训练协议，在统一任务上比较其下游性能与生成任务统计特性，发现不同先验显著影响下游行为，且数据相似性仅部分解释该现象。
AI.motivation: 现有表格基础模型中，数据生成先验作为预训练任务分布的核心却缺乏独立评估，导致难以厘清其对下游行为的影响；亟需一种脱离具体架构与训练协议的先验比较方法。
AI.method: 构建统一接口整合公开及基于真实数据构造的先验；从各先验生成训练任务；在固定模型架构和训练协议下训练并评估其在共享下游分类任务上的性能；结合生成任务统计与下游预测性能进行先验比较。
AI.result: 不同先验导致显著差异的下游行为：部分先验带来更高绝对性能，另一些则在跨数据集上呈现更稳定相对排序；数据级相似性仅能部分解释这些差异。
AI.conclusion: 数据生成先验是可独立评估且具实质性影响的关键组件；本工作为先验设计与分析提供了可复现、解耦的基准框架。

title: SIR: Structured Image Representations for Explainable Robot Learning
summary: Existing robot policies based on learned visual embeddings lack explicit structure and are sensitive to visual distractions. Thus, the representations that drive their behaviour are often opaque, making their decision-making process difficult to interpret. To address this, we introduce Structured Image Representations (SIR), a method that leverages Scene Graphs (SGs) as an intermediate representation for robot policy learning. Our approach first constructs a fully connected graph, using image-derived features as initial node representations. Then, a module learns to sparsify this graph end-to-end, creating a task-relevant sub-graph that is passed to the action generation model. This process makes our model intrinsically explainable. Evaluations on RoboCasa show that our sparse graph policies outperform image-based baselines on average with 19.5% vs 14.81% success rate. Most importantly, we show that the learned sparse graphs are a powerful tool for model analysis. By analysing when the model's sub-graph deviates from human expectation, such as by including distractor nodes or omitting key objects, we successfully uncover dataset biases, including spurious correlations and positional biases. https://github.com/intuitive-robots/SIR_Model

AI.tldr: 本文提出Structured Image Representations (SIR)，利用场景图（Scene Graphs）作为中间表征，通过端到端稀疏化全连接图生成任务相关子图，提升机器人策略的可解释性与鲁棒性，并在RoboCasa上验证其有效性及分析价值。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉嵌入的机器人策略缺乏显式结构、易受视觉干扰影响，导致决策过程不透明、难以解释。
AI.method: 提出SIR方法：首先从图像提取特征构建全连接图；再通过可学习模块端到端稀疏化该图，生成任务相关的子图作为策略输入；子图本身即提供内在可解释性。
AI.result: 在RoboCasa上，SIR稀疏图策略平均成功率19.5%，优于图像基线14.81%；且稀疏图可用于诊断模型偏差，如识别数据集中的虚假相关与位置偏差。
AI.conclusion: SIR通过引入结构化、稀疏化的场景图表征，既提升了机器人策略性能，又实现了内在可解释性，为模型分析与偏差诊断提供了新工具。

title: Managing Map Cardinality in Automatic Disease Classification Mapping: Balancing Precision, Recall and Coverage
comment: Main text: 8 pages, 1 table and 3 figures; Appendix: 8 pages, 11 tables, 2 figures
summary: Automatic mapping between disease classification systems, such as the International Classification of Diseases (ICD), is a challenging yet essential task for integrating health data and conducting longitudinal data analysis. Existing embedding-based methods primarily focus on \emph{one-to-one} mappings, overlooking more complex \emph{one-to-many} scenarios.
