AI.method: 提出Plan-Then-Construct范式：先生成含显式度量参数的结构化设计计划，再通过指针机制在序列生成中直接引用连续参数；构建带规划级标注的大规模数据集及顶点/边/面三级几何精度评估指标。
AI.result: 在几何精度上显著超越现有基线，消除量化误差，实现维度一致的CAD生成，支持高精度工程应用。
AI.conclusion: Pointer-CAD v2 通过连续参数建模与指针机制，解决了CAD生成中参数精度与尺度一致性问题，为工业级应用提供了更可靠的基础。

title: A Mathematical Optimization Approach for Expert-Informed Bayesian Best Subset Selection
summary: A central challenge in statistical modeling is identifying the subset of features that belong in the true regression model. The classical best subset selection problem, recently made tractable via mixed-integer optimization (MIO), finds the globally optimal sparse solution. It does not, however, make use of any information beyond the observed data. In many applied settings, domain experts can meaningfully rank or score the relevance of candidate predictors, yet no existing framework integrates such probabilistic expert assessments directly into the best-subsets objective. This paper presents Expert-Implied Bayesian Best Subsets (EBBS), a method that incorporates domain-expert probability estimates of feature relevance into the MIO best-subsets problem through a maximum a posteriori (MAP) framework. Expert views from multiple respondents are aggregated into a single prior probability per feature using the Poisson binomial distribution for marginal probability estimates, the pairwise win rate for pairwise comparisons, or the normalized mean rank for ordinal rankings. This probability enters the objective function as a log-odds penalty term that smoothly encourages or discourages the selection of each feature consistent with the expert consensus. This paper provides analytic derivations of the MAP formulation and characterizes its theoretical properties. The proposed model reduces to Best Subsets when experts all have no views. Empirical results on synthetic and real datasets are forthcoming.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Expert-Implied Bayesian Best Subsets (EBBS)方法，将领域专家对特征相关性的概率判断以贝叶斯最大后验（MAP）框架融入混合整数优化（MIO）的最优子集选择中，通过log-odds惩罚项实现专家知识与数据驱动的联合建模。
AI.motivation: 经典最优子集选择仅依赖观测数据，无法利用领域专家对候选预测变量的相关性排序或评分等先验知识；现有方法缺乏直接整合此类概率型专家评估的框架。
AI.method: 提出EBBS方法，基于MAP框架将专家提供的特征相关性概率（经Poisson二项分布、成对胜率或归一化平均秩聚合）转化为目标函数中的log-odds惩罚项，嵌入MIO最优子集问题；给出MAP形式推导与理论性质分析。
AI.result: EBBS能自然融合多源专家意见，其目标函数可平滑鼓励/抑制特征选择；当专家无先验观点时，模型退化为经典最优子集；在合成与真实数据上的实证结果待公布。
AI.conclusion: EBBS为统计建模中融合定量专家知识与数据驱动特征选择提供了首个统一、可解释且计算可行的贝叶斯MIO框架，拓展了最优子集方法的应用边界。

title: Occlusion-Robust Multi-Object Decoupling for Physics-Based Interaction
summary: We propose a mask-free method for lossless multi-object 3D reconstruction from sparse and occluded real-world views, enabling physically plausible interaction via Material Point Method (MPM) simulation. Our key insight is that object coupling stems from occlusion and limited viewpoints, which we address by formulating multi-object decoupling as a sparse-view reconstruction problem. Using 3D Gaussian Splatting as base representation, we first obtain coarse instance partitions with a SAM2-trained segmentation field. Rather than relying on masks, we reconstruct fragmented geometries by leveraging a joint Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) process, which integrates reference-view supervision with novel-view synthesis guided by 2D and 3D diffusion priors to enforce both texture fidelity and 3D consistency. Furthermore, we incorporate geometry-aware priors such as intra-object and inter-object similarity to regularize geometric reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that our method produces complete, simulation-ready 3D objects without requiring manual masks, enabling realistic dynamic interactions on both synthetic and real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需掩码的多物体3D重建方法，利用3D高斯泼溅和联合分数蒸馏采样（SDS），结合2D/3D扩散先验与几何感知约束，在稀疏、遮挡的真实视角下实现无损重建，并支持MPM物理仿真交互。
AI.motivation: 解决稀疏、遮挡真实视角下多物体耦合导致的分割与重建困难，避免依赖人工标注掩码。
AI.method: 以3D高斯泼溅为基底表示，用SAM2训练的分割场获取粗实例划分；通过联合Score Distillation Sampling（SDS）融合参考视图监督与新视图合成，并引入2D/3D扩散先验及物体内外相似性几何先验进行正则化。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上实现了无需手动掩码的完整、仿真就绪的3D重建，支持基于MPM的物理交互。
AI.conclusion: 该掩码无关方法有效解耦多物体，兼顾纹理保真与3D一致性，推动了从稀疏真实图像到可仿真3D场景的端到端重建。

title: Inoculation Adapters: Improved Selective Generalization of Capabilities with Fewer Surprising Backdoors
summary: Inoculation prompting is a selective generalization technique used against Emergent Misalignment. We introduce inoculation adapters (IA), which similarly diminish the optimization pressure to learn undesired traits by strengthening the trait at train time. Inoculation adapters are LoRAs that are trained and used over three steps: 1) trained on undesired traits; 2) attached frozen while a separate task adapter is trained on data exhibiting both desired and undesired traits; 3) at deployment, the IA is discarded, and only the task adapter is kept. We show across six model families and several undesired traits including emergent misalignment, that inoculation adapters are more effective at suppressing undesired traits, while avoiding two drawbacks of inoculation prompting: inoculation adapters can suppress capabilities and traits that cannot be reliably elicited by a prompt, and they introduce fewer surprising backdoors than inoculation prompting under our probes. While undesired traits are better suppressed by inoculation adapters, the retention of desired traits is not consistently improved upon inoculation prompting and remains a challenge for both techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'接种适配器（Inoculation Adapters, IA）'的新方法，用于抑制大模型中的不期望行为（如新兴错位），其通过在训练阶段强化不期望特征来降低优化压力，并在部署时丢弃该适配器；相比接种提示（inoculation prompting），IA 更有效抑制难以通过提示触发的不期望特征，且引入更少意外后门，但对期望能力的保留未显著改善。
AI.motivation: 应对大语言模型中出现的'新兴错位'等不期望行为，现有方法如接种提示存在局限：无法可靠激发某些不期望特征，且易引入意外后门。
AI.method: 提出接种适配器（IA），即一种LoRA结构，分三步训练与使用：1）在不期望特征上单独训练IA；2）冻结IA，同时训练任务适配器（覆盖期望与不期望特征）；3）部署时仅保留任务适配器，移除IA。
AI.result: 在六个模型家族及多种不期望特征（含新兴错位）上验证，IA比接种提示更有效地抑制不期望特征，尤其对无法被提示可靠激发的特征；且探测显示其引入的意外后门更少；但期望能力保留效果未明显优于接种提示。
AI.conclusion: 接种适配器是一种更鲁棒、更可控的不期望行为抑制技术，弥补了接种提示的关键缺陷，但如何兼顾不期望特征抑制与期望能力保留仍是待解挑战。

title: Anti-Collapse Dynamics and the Emergence of Multi-Time-Scale Learning in Recurrent Neural Networks
summary: Long-range learning is hard for recurrent networks trained with stochastic gradient descent, because the influence of a past input fades with the lag $\ell$, and if it fades too fast the dependence cannot be learned from finite data. This fade is captured by an envelope $f(\ell)$. An exponential fade makes the data needed to learn a lag-$\ell$ dependence grow exponentially, putting long horizons out of reach; a power-law fade keeps the cost polynomial. We show that the asymptotic decay class of $f(\ell)$ is not fixed by the architecture. Instead, it emerges from the coupling between the state dynamics and parameter dynamics, settling into either a collapsed regime (fast, exponential forgetting) or an extended, anti-collapsed regime (slow, power-law forgetting). The intuition is a competition within these coupled dynamics. Training drives the network's effective time scales toward short ones, while rare, heavy-tailed fluctuations of the learning dynamics push a few of them to very long values. The extended regime survives only when these heavy-tailed pushes are strong enough to balance the pull. We make this mathematically precise with a coarse-grained stochastic process and prove exactly when the extended regime exists. A single exponent, the spectral exponent~$β$, then governs both the spread of time scales and how slowly the network forgets. Realizing the regime in practice needs one more ingredient: the joint action of the architecture and the optimizer must be able to hold such a broad spread. A network whose capacity to generate broad time-scale spectra is severely constrained still collapses, even when supplied with strong heavy-tailed forcing. Heavy-tailed fluctuations thus act not as noise to be suppressed, but as the mechanism that sustains long-range learning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了循环神经网络在长程学习中的困难，指出其根本原因在于过去输入影响随滞后时间衰减过快；作者提出了一种新的理论框架，揭示了衰减包络的渐近衰减类别并非由架构固定，而是由状态动力学与参数动力学耦合决定，并证明了存在一种‘扩展态’（幂律遗忘）可支持长程学习，其关键机制是重尾波动而非需抑制的噪声。
AI.motivation: 解决循环神经网络在长程依赖学习中因梯度消失导致难以建模长时滞依赖的问题。
AI.method: 建立粗粒化随机过程模型，分析状态与参数动力学的耦合行为，推导谱指数β对时间尺度分布及遗忘速度的统一控制作用，并严格证明扩展态存在的条件。
AI.result: 发现网络可进入两种动态 regime：坍缩态（指数遗忘）和扩展态（幂律遗忘）；后者依赖于足够强的重尾波动以平衡优化过程对短时标的偏好；谱指数β定量刻画时间尺度分布宽度与遗忘速率。
AI.conclusion: 长程学习能力不取决于固定架构，而源于动力学耦合与重尾学习波动之间的平衡；重尾波动是维持长程记忆的必要机制，而非需消除的噪声。

title: Information Dynamics of Language Communication
summary: Quantifying how meaning propagates through communicative exchanges remains underdeveloped in computational linguistics. Here we introduce an information-theoretic framework that quantifies the directed flow of semantic content between interlocutors and decomposes multi-source contributions into redundant, unique, and synergistic components. Our approach leverages large language models as probabilistic estimators of natural language to compute two measures: semantic transfer entropy (STE), which captures directed predictive influence between speakers, and semantic partial information decomposition (SPID), which resolves how multiple sources jointly shape a target's language. Across four experiments we show that the framework detects reduced information flow in cognitively rigid dialogue, captures the dominant role of persuaders in shaping discourse, distinguishes high- from low-quality psychotherapy by the directionality of therapist-client information exchange, and reveals synergistic premise contributions in argumentative essays. This framework opens new avenues for studying information dynamics in digital discourse, pedagogical interactions, clinical dialogues, and any domain in which the structure of linguistic exchange is of research relevance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的框架，用于量化对话中语义内容的定向流动，并分解多源贡献（冗余、独特与协同），利用大语言模型估计自然语言概率，定义了语义传递熵（STE）和语义偏信息分解（SPID）两个指标，在多种对话场景中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 计算语言学中对意义在交流中如何传播的量化研究尚不充分，亟需一种能刻画语义流向与多源交互机制的理论框架。
AI.method: 构建基于信息论的语义流分析框架，利用大语言模型作为自然语言的概率估计器，定义并计算语义传递熵（STE）和语义偏信息分解（SPID）。
AI.result: 在四项实验中验证了该框架：识别认知僵化对话中的信息流减弱、揭示说服者在话语塑造中的主导作用、区分高低质量心理治疗中治疗师-来访者信息流向差异、发现议论文中前提间的协同贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为数字话语、教学互动、临床对话等依赖语言交流结构的研究领域提供了新的信息动力学分析工具。

title: MirrorPPR: Exemplar-Based Portrait Photo Retouching
summary: While text-guided image editing has made remarkable progress, it remains limited in structural portrait retouching. Textual descriptions struggle to convey fine-grained changes to facial features and body proportions. To address this gap, we introduce Exemplar-Based Portrait Photo Retouching, where the model is given an exemplar pair and tasked with inferring and applying the same retouching operations to a new query image. Existing exemplar-based editing methods primarily focus on tasks with pronounced visual transformations. In contrast, structural portrait retouching involves extremely delicate and localized modifications, making accurate extraction and transfer of these edits challenging. To tackle this, we propose MirrorPPR, a novel framework designed to capture and transfer subtle structural retouching operations. Our method uses a Retouching Operation Extractor to capture the subtle differences from the exemplar pair. The extracted representations are then injected into a pre-trained Diffusion Transformer (DiT) through a connector and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules. Furthermore, constructing perfectly aligned cross-identity training pairs is severely hindered by operation misalignment. To overcome this, we propose an advanced data self-augmentation paradigm that ensures strictly aligned retouching operations. To alleviate data scarcity and support this novel task, we introduce MirrorPPR47M, a large-scale dataset with over 47 million retouched pairs. By structuring the dataset into simulated and professional subsets, we enable progressive curriculum learning to smoothly optimize the network. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MirrorPPR significantly outperforms existing baselines in both retouching quality and identity preservation. The project page is available at https://sjtu-deng-lab.github.io/MirrorPPR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于示例的肖像照片修图方法MirrorPPR，通过提取和迁移细微结构修图操作，在保持身份一致性的前提下实现高质量修图。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑难以精确描述人脸特征和身体比例的细微变化，而现有基于示例的方法又难以处理肖像修图中极其精细、局部的结构修改。
AI.method: 提出MirrorPPR框架：包含修图操作提取器（Retouching Operation Extractor）、适配预训练DiT模型的连接器与LoRA模块；设计先进数据自增强范式以保证修图操作严格对齐；构建大规模数据集MirrorPPR47M（含4700万对修图样本），分为模拟与专业子集支持课程学习。
AI.result: 在修图质量与身份保持方面显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MirrorPPR有效解决了细粒度结构化肖像修图难题，为基于示例的图像编辑提供了新范式与大规模数据支撑。

title: EMPATH: A Multilingual Auditor-Judge Benchmark for Safety Evaluation of Emotional-Support Chatbots
summary: Safety benchmarks often buy scalability by fixing the prompt, the language, and the turn structure. For emotional-support chatbots, that bargain hides precisely where safety failures emerge: across a multilingual, multi-turn crisis conversation. We present EMPATH, a benchmark for safety evaluation of emotional-support chatbots. An auditor model role-plays help-seeking users, generating multi-turn conversations from 140 seed instructions and 34 personas. A judge model scores each full transcript against 19 metrics across five dimensions: crisis handling, therapeutic quality, conversational integrity, emotional safety, and cultural adaptation. EMPATH is built for Mexican Spanish and US English; the studies reported here run in Mexican Spanish. Auditor and judge are drawn from different model families, and the judge is treated as an instrument to be calibrated rather than trusted. A strict per-criterion rubric reveals material score inflation on 10 of the 19 metrics and restores discrimination. We study the measurement properties of the benchmark through judge calibration and cross-family inter-judge agreement. We also illustrate EMPATH on three frontier models, one of them open-weight. Aggregate scores sit within 0.74 points of one another, but per-metric profiles diverge by up to six points in model-specific places. Under the standard rubric, both the ranking and the weak spots are stable across a second, cross-family judge: 93% of scores fall within plus or minus 1. A five-run test-retest adds a second axis: even the steadiest model swings from 2 to 10 on a crisis metric across identical re-runs, and deepseek-v4-pro returns a different conversation on every run even at temperature 0. Run-to-run reliability is therefore a per-model safety property, not noise to average away. EMPATH is system-agnostic; the pipeline, seeds, personas, and rubrics are released for reuse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EMPATh基准，用于评估情感支持聊天机器人的安全性，特别关注多语言、多轮危机对话中的安全失效问题。该基准通过审计员模型生成多轮对话，法官模型依据19个指标对对话进行评分，并强调法官校准与跨模型一致性的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全基准因固定提示、语言和对话轮次结构而忽略了情感支持聊天机器人在多语言、多轮危机对话中真实的安全失效点。
AI.method: 构建EMPATh基准：审计员模型基于140个初始指令和34个人设生成多轮对话；法官模型（来自不同模型家族）依据19个指标在五个维度上评分；强调法官校准、跨家族一致性及重测信度分析。
AI.result: 发现标准评分存在10项指标的显著分数膨胀；跨法官一致性达93%（±1分内）；但同一模型在重复运行中危机指标得分波动达2–10分，DeepSeek-v4-pro即使温度为0也每次生成不同对话。
AI.conclusion: 运行间可靠性是模型特有的安全属性，而非可平均消除的噪声；EMPATh是系统无关的开源基准，支持复用与扩展。

title: Not All Objectives Are Born Equal: Priority-Constrained Descent for Hierarchical Multi-Objective Optimization
summary: Deep learning problems rarely involve objectives that are equal in importance. A primary objective defines the goal, whilst secondary objectives, such as sparsity, compression, or robustness constrain the solution. While existing multi-objective methods have proven effective in practice, they have a clear symmetry problem and neglect the inherent objective hierarchy built into these objective spaces. We introduce Priority-Constrained Descent (PCD), a gradient-based optimization framework designed to explicitly exploit hierarchical objective structures. PCD preserves the direction of primary descent whilst allowing for the minimal distortion necessary to guarantee progress on secondary objectives, controlled by a single $τ\in [0, 1]$ that dictates the strength of the distortion. The resulting formulation is invariant to objective scaling and admits exact closed-form solutions for problems with two and three objectives. We evaluate PCD within structured network compression settings, unstructured sparsity and low-rankness, and across a variety of synthetic experiments, showing Pareto dominance and better per-objective performance with secondary progress guarantees over existing methods, further exhibiting the interpretable trade-off that $τ$ provides.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Priority-Constrained Descent（PCD）的梯度优化框架，用于处理具有层级结构的多目标深度学习问题，通过单参数τ控制主次目标间的权衡，在多个任务上展现出帕累托优势和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有多目标优化方法忽视了目标间固有的层级关系（如主目标与约束型次目标），且存在对称性缺陷，难以兼顾目标重要性差异与可解释性权衡。
AI.method: 提出PCD框架：在保持主目标下降方向的前提下，引入最小必要扰动以满足次目标约束；参数τ∈[0,1]控制扰动强度；支持目标缩放不变性，并对二、三目标情形给出闭式解。
AI.result: 在结构化网络压缩、非结构化稀疏性与低秩性等任务及合成实验中，PCD相较现有方法实现帕累托优势、更优的各项目标性能，并保证次目标进展，且τ提供直观可调的权衡机制。
AI.conclusion: PCD有效建模并利用目标层级结构，为多目标深度学习提供了兼具理论严谨性、计算可行性与实际性能优势的新范式。

title: Estimating Grammatical Gender Directions in Contextual Embeddings under Controlled and Natural Contexts
summary: Contextual language models conflate grammatical gender and social semantic bias in gendered languages such as Spanish. Existing gender debiasing approaches only operate on static word embeddings leaving contextual representations unexplored for this two dimensional gender disentanglement. To address the this issue, we make the first attempt to disentangle grammatical gender from semantic contamination for contextual embeddings. We construct both controlled templates and natural Wikipedia contexts to build balanced datasets of inanimate nouns, and design a framework equipped with centroid, Support Vector Machine (SVM) and Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA) gender direction estimators as well as contamination-aware weighting strategies. A set of dual-objective evaluation metrics is proposed to balance the suppression of grammatical gender leakage on inanimate nouns and the preservation of semantic gender distinctions for occupation terms. The results reveal that unweighted controlled contexts yield the purest grammatical gender direction, and the centroid estimator achieves better performance than discriminative baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文首次尝试在上下文嵌入中解耦语法性别与社会语义偏差，提出一种新框架，结合多种性别方向估计器和污染感知加权策略，并设计双目标评估指标，在西班牙语等屈折语言中实现更纯净的性别解耦。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法仅作用于静态词嵌入，无法处理上下文语言模型中语法性别与社会语义偏差的混淆问题，尤其在西班牙语等性别化语言中。
AI.method: 构建受控模板与自然维基语境下的无生命名词平衡数据集；设计集成质心法、SVM与LDA的性别方向估计框架，并引入污染感知加权策略。
AI.result: 未加权的受控语境能提取最纯净的语法性别方向；质心估计器性能优于SVM和LDA等判别式基线；双目标评估指标有效平衡语法性别泄漏抑制与职业词语义性别保留。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为上下文嵌入中的二维性别解耦提供了首个系统性方法，验证了语法性别方向可被更纯净地建模，且质心法在该任务中更具优势。

title: D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR: Degradation-Disentangled Representation for Real-World Omnidirectional Image Super-Resolution
summary: With the growing demand for immersive visual experiences, high-quality omnidirectional images (ODIs) have become increasingly important. However, limitations in imaging devices and transmission bandwidth often lead to low-resolution ODIs, hindering the rendering of fine-grained 360° details, especially in the presence of real-world degradations and geometric distortions. Existing real-world super-resolution (Real-SR) methods are inadequate for ODIs, as their degradation models fail to account for the complex imaging pipeline involving fisheye capture and Equirectangular Projection (ERP), introducing severe aliasing and projection-specific distortions. To address these challenges, we propose D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR, a Degradation-Disentangled Representation framework for Real-world Omnidirectional image Super-Resolution. D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR explicitly models degradations arising from both fisheye imaging and ERP projection, guided by two key insights: (1) projection priors play a critical role in shaping real-world degradations, and (2) human perception in immersive environments is inherently viewpoint-centric. Accordingly, we introduce a Perspective Projection Representation (PPR) operating alongside the ERP branch to capture viewpoint-aware features, together with a Degradation-Specific Module (DSM) that jointly models ERP-induced geometric distortions and PPR-specific real-world degradations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that D$^{2}$R$^{2}$OSR achieves state-of-the-art performance and produces visually compelling, high-fidelity omnidirectional Real-SR results while maintaining favorable computational efficiency for low-resource deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出D²R²OSR框架，专为真实世界全景图像超分辨率设计，通过解耦鱼眼成像与等距柱状投影（ERP）退化，结合视角感知的透视投影表示（PPR）与退化特异性模块（DSM），显著提升360°图像重建质量与视觉保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有真实场景超分辨率方法无法建模全景图像特有的鱼眼捕获与等距柱状投影（ERP）联合退化，导致严重混叠与投影失真，难以满足沉浸式视觉对高保真ODI的需求。
AI.method: 提出Degradation-Disentangled Representation框架D²R²OSR：引入视角中心的Perspective Projection Representation（PPR）分支协同ERP分支，并设计Degradation-Specific Module（DSM）联合建模ERP几何畸变与PPR对应的真实退化。
AI.result: 在多个全景图像数据集上达到SOTA性能，重建结果视觉质量高、细节丰富，且计算效率优，适合低资源部署。
AI.conclusion: D²R²OSR首次系统解耦并建模全景图像真实退化机制，验证了投影先验与视角感知建模对Real-SR的关键作用，为沉浸式视觉内容增强提供了新范式。

title: PromptGNN-sim: Deep Fusion and Alignment of GNN and LLMs for Text-Attributed Graph Learning
summary: Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) combine textual semantics with graph structure and are central to many graph learning tasks. However, existing fusion methods often treat text and structure as separate inputs in a shallow, one-way pipeline, which limits deep interaction between modalities and weakens performance under sparse connectivity or cross-graph generalisation. To address this issue, we propose PromptGNN-sim, a bi-directional structure-semantic fusion framework for collaborative GNN-LLM learning. PromptGNN-sim uses a Graph Attention Network (GAT) for semantically aware neighborhood selection by combining structural attention with textual similarity. The selected structural context is then used to generate structure-aware prompts for an LLM, including the target node summary, label categories, and representative keywords from similar neighbors. During training, bi-directional cross-modal contrastive learning and cross-attention are introduced to jointly optimize the GNN and LLM components. Experiments on six public datasets, including Cora, Pubmed, and WikiCS, evaluate accuracy, generalisation, and robustness under cross-task transfer, cross-dataset generalisation, and sparse perturbations. Results show that PromptGNN-sim outperforms classical GNNs, LLMs, and recent GNN-LLM fusion methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of interactive structure-semantic collaboration for text-attributed graph learning.

AI.tldr: PromptGNN-sim 提出了一种双向结构-语义融合框架，通过图注意力网络与大语言模型协同学习，增强文本属性图中模态间的深度交互，显著提升稀疏连接、跨图泛化等挑战下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本属性图（TAGs）融合方法多采用浅层单向流水线，难以实现文本与结构模态的深度交互，导致在稀疏连接或跨图泛化场景下性能受限。
AI.method: 提出 PromptGNN-sim：1）用 GAT 结合结构注意力与文本相似性进行语义感知的邻居选择；2）基于选中的结构上下文生成结构感知提示（含节点摘要、标签类别、邻域关键词）输入 LLM；3）引入双向跨模态对比学习与交叉注意力联合优化 GNN 和 LLM。
AI.result: 在 Cora、Pubmed、WikiCS 等六个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在准确率、跨任务迁移、跨数据集泛化及稀疏扰动鲁棒性方面均优于经典 GNN、LLM 及近期 GNN-LLM 融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 双向结构-语义协同融合能有效提升文本属性图学习性能，验证了深度跨模态交互对图表示学习的关键作用。

title: Do Models Read What They Write? Causal Registers in Scratchpad Reasoning
summary: A central hope behind process supervision is that models can expose intermediate variables that matter for their later behavior. For this to help with alignment, a scratchpad must be tied to the computation: when the model writes a state, later steps should compute from that state. To test this requirement, we use a controlled state-tracking task with a known update rule, comparing models trained to report only the final state with models trained to write intermediate states before giving the final answer. At evaluation, we edit the internal representation of one written state while leaving the visible scratchpad text fixed. Because the transition rule is known, the edit has a single correct downstream consequence. In Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, the state-writing model predicts the next phase bit implied by the edited state on 80% and 91% of held-out examples across the two task variants, while pretrained and final-answer-only controls remain near baseline. Additional controls rule out generic next-token steering and copying another continuation: the prediction depends on both the edited state and the current move. The same causal-use pattern replicates across model families. Together, these results suggest a sharper goal for scratchpad oversight: not just to make intermediate reasoning legible, but to train written states that the model uses as part of its computation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过受控的状态跟踪任务，验证了模型在书写中间状态时是否真正将其作为计算的一部分使用；实验表明，训练模型写出中间状态能显著提升其对编辑后状态的因果响应能力，而仅输出最终答案的模型则表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 过程监督的核心假设是模型可以暴露对其后续行为重要的中间变量；为使这一机制有助于对齐，草稿区（scratchpad）必须与计算紧密绑定——即模型写入的状态应被后续步骤实际用于计算。
AI.method: 设计了一个具有已知更新规则的受控状态追踪任务，对比训练仅输出最终状态的模型与训练写出中间状态的模型；在评估阶段，对模型内部表示中某一已写入状态进行编辑，同时保持可见草稿文本不变，并检验模型是否能依据编辑后的状态正确预测下游结果。
AI.result: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B 中，状态书写模型在两个任务变体上分别以 80% 和 91% 的准确率预测编辑状态所隐含的下一阶段比特，而预训练模型和仅输出最终答案的对照组接近基线水平；额外控制实验排除了通用下一个词引导或简单复制续写的可能，证实预测依赖于编辑状态与当前动作的联合信息；该因果使用模式在多个模型家族中复现。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，草稿监督的目标不应仅是让中间推理可读，更应训练模型使其写出的状态真正参与自身计算过程，从而增强可解释性与可控性。

title: Event-VLA: Action-Conditioned Event Fusion for Robust Vision-Language-Action Model
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become an important paradigm of embodied AI. However, existing VLA models typically assume well-lit and stable indoor settings, while real-world embodied manipulation may involve degraded RGB observations caused by illumination shifts, posing critical challenges for robust robotic manipulation. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{Event-VLA}, an event-enhanced VLA framework for generalizable manipulation across varying illumination conditions. We formulate VLA-based manipulation under degraded visibility as a practical robustness problem for RGB-centric policies, and introduce event streams as an illumination-robust, motion-sensitive complementary observation to improve robustness across visibility levels. Specifically, unlike conventional multimodal fusion that directly merges event features into the global semantic token space, Event-VLA injects event information through an action-query routing pathway. It uses learnable action queries to extract task-relevant semantics from the VLA reasoning process, and selectively aggregates event tokens via gated cross-attention to construct event-aware action representations. This design preserves the pretrained RGB-language semantic priors while effectively leveraging event information for robust action prediction. Experiments in simulation and real-world deployment show that Event-VLA maintains strong manipulation performance under normal lighting and improves success rates under low-light degradation and near-dark real-world settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Event-VLA框架，通过引入事件流作为RGB视觉的互补输入，提升VLA模型在光照变化（尤其是低光/近暗环境）下的鲁棒操作能力；其核心创新在于采用动作查询驱动的门控跨模态注意力机制融合事件信息，兼顾预训练语义先验与事件动态敏感性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖RGB图像，在光照变化（如低光、明暗突变）下性能显著下降，难以满足真实场景中鲁棒操纵需求。
AI.method: 提出Event-VLA框架：以事件流为光照鲁棒、运动敏感的补充模态；设计动作查询路由路径，通过可学习动作查询和 gated cross-attention 选择性融合事件token，避免破坏原有RGB-语言语义先验。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实机器人实验中，Event-VLA在正常光照下保持高性能，并显著提升低光及近暗环境下的任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 事件流可有效增强VLA模型在光照退化条件下的泛化与鲁棒性，所提出的动作查询驱动融合机制为多模态具身智能提供了新范式。

title: CORTEX: High-Quality Cross-Domain Organization of Web-Scale Corpora through Ontological Corpus Graph
summary: The continuous evolution of large language models drives escalating demands on data scale and quality, and as different training stages impose increasingly tailored data requirements, systematic organization of high-quality corpora becomes indispensable. Existing corpus construction pipelines confine the resulting corpora to flat, undifferentiated document collections, universally lacking systematic knowledge organization. We present Cortex, to our knowledge the first framework that elevates web-scale corpus construction from flat document filtering to structured knowledge organization through an Ontological Corpus Graph (OCG), a three-layer heterogeneous structure unifying a quality-refined content layer, a hierarchical lightweight ontology layer via LLM-driven automated evolution, and a cross-domain alignment layer enabling inter-domain association at arbitrary taxonomic resolution. Comprehensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of Cortex. In particular, we leverage the OCG to synthesize CortexBench, a cross-domain search-and-reasoning benchmark whose evaluation across eight frontier LLMs validates the effectiveness of quality refinement, domain organization, and cross-domain data synthesis. We will publicly release the complete codebase, a 24.14B-token refined corpus with its OCG, and CortexBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cortex框架，首次将网络规模语料库构建从扁平文档过滤提升为结构化知识组织，通过本体语料图（OCG）实现高质量、分层本体与跨域对齐的统一；实验验证其在质量优化、领域组织和跨域合成上的有效性，并开源代码、241.4亿token精炼语料及新基准CortexBench。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型持续演进对数据规模与质量提出更高要求，不同训练阶段需差异化数据，而现有语料构建流程仅产出扁平、无结构的文档集合，缺乏系统性知识组织。
AI.method: 提出Cortex框架，构建本体语料图（OCG），包含三层：质量精炼的内容层、由大模型驱动自动演化的轻量级分层本体层、支持任意粒度跨域关联的跨域对齐层；并基于OCG构建跨领域搜索与推理基准CortexBench。
AI.result: 实验证明Cortex在语料质量提升、领域结构化组织和跨域数据合成方面有效；CortexBench在八个前沿大语言模型上的评测验证了各模块优势；完整代码、24.14B token精炼语料及其OCG、CortexBench将全部开源。
AI.conclusion: Cortex首次实现了从扁平文档到结构化知识图谱的语料构建范式跃迁，为高质量、可解释、可扩展的大模型数据基础设施提供了新路径。

title: FDM-MFVT: Few-step Sampling Diffusion Model for Mask-Free Virtual Try-On
summary: Image-based Virtual Try-On (IVTON) has greatly advanced through diffusion models, yet existing methods require many sampling steps and depend on masks with costly auxiliary networks. In addition, the absence of large-scale mask-free paired datasets further limits the development of mask-free IVTON. We propose FDM-MFVT, a few-step diffusion model for mask-free IVTON, integrating an Outfit-aware Noise Optimization Module (OANO) and an Instruction-driven Try-on Module (IDT) to enhance efficiency and flexibility.The OANO module initializes the alignment space with noise using the input image and only needs 6 steps to generate a higher-fidelity try-on image compared to 30 steps.The IDT module uses virtual try-on prompts and efficient adaptation to generate high-quality results from garment and person images alone. We further introduce MFVT, a 30,000-pair mask-free IVTON dataset. Experiments show that FDM-MFVT achieves superior quantitative and qualitative results with fewer inference steps than mask-based and mask-free baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FDM-MFVT，一种面向无掩码图像虚拟试穿（IVTON）的少步扩散模型，结合OANO与IDT模块，显著减少采样步数并摆脱对掩码及辅助网络的依赖；同时构建了3万对的MFVT无掩码数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像虚拟试穿方法采样步数多、依赖需额外训练的掩码网络，且缺乏大规模无掩码配对数据集，限制了无掩码IVTON发展。
AI.method: 提出FDM-MFVT框架，包含Outfit-aware Noise Optimization Module（OANO）用于噪声空间初始化与快速对齐（仅6步），以及Instruction-driven Try-on Module（IDT）利用试穿提示实现端到端无掩码生成；并构建MFVT无掩码数据集。
AI.result: 在定量与定性指标上均优于现有掩码和无掩码基线方法，推理步数大幅减少（6步 vs 30步）。
AI.conclusion: FDM-MFVT实现了高效、灵活、无需掩码的虚拟试穿，推动了无掩码IVTON实用化发展。

title: Rehearsed Multi-Agent Live Product Demonstrations with Real-Time Voice Question Answering
comment: Preprint. 4 figures, 1 algorithm, 5 tables. Systems paper with a preliminary six-session case study on four deployed applications; full benchmark protocol proposed, corpus run to appear in a later revision
summary: Live product demonstrations are a recurring, high-cost activity in software organizations: a human presenter must select features, dispatch the corresponding interactions on a running application, narrate them coherently, and answer questions in real time. Existing automation addresses only fragments -- generalist browser agents target instruction-conditioned task completion, and demo-video tools produce fixed MP4 artifacts that cannot be questioned and silently break under interface drift. We propose Rhetor, a multi-agent system that takes a running web application and its source-code repository as input and produces a rehearsed live demonstration with segment-synchronized narration and real-time voice question answering. The architectural contributions are a cross-modal feature representation that merges UI exploration with source-code analysis into features tagged with discrete focus tiers, a grounded scripter constrained to UI elements observed during exploration and dispatched through multi-strategy semantic locators, a pre-presentation rehearsal loop with explicit convergence and graceful degradation to narration-only segments, and a runtime synchronization invariant that ties each browser action to the audio-end event of its narration segment. Across six pipeline sessions on four deployed applications -- including the public-domain whiteboard application Excalidraw -- the rehearser's internal locator-firing rate (sigma-bar) spans 0.31-1.00 over 147 scripted actions; on the substantial workload (53 actions, full tier differentiation), sigma-bar is approximately 0.92, and on the public-domain reference point the locator-repair step drives convergence to sigma-bar = 1.00 at iteration 2. We additionally define a benchmark protocol of ten metrics across six application categories that would establish, beyond the case study, whether each design choice contributes positively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rhetor，一种多智能体系统，用于自动化生成可交互、可提问的实时产品演示，结合UI探索与源码分析，实现脚本化、可复现、语音同步的演示流程。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化方案仅覆盖演示的部分环节：通用浏览器代理侧重任务完成，而录屏工具生成静态视频且无法应答问题、易因界面变化失效；而人工演示成本高、难以复现。
AI.method: 提出Rhetor多智能体系统，核心包括：跨模态特征表示（融合UI探索与源码分析并标记聚焦层级）、基于真实UI元素和多策略语义定位器的脚本生成器、含收敛判断与降级机制的预演循环、以及将每个浏览器操作与对应语音段结束事件绑定的运行时同步不变量。
AI.result: 在四个已部署应用（含Excalidraw）的六次流水线测试中，定位器触发率（sigma-bar）达0.31–1.00；在53步高复杂度演示中达约0.92；Excalidraw上经两次修复迭代即达sigma-bar=1.00。同时提出涵盖六类应用、十项指标的基准协议。
AI.conclusion: Rhetor实现了可复现、可交互、鲁棒性强的自动化产品演示，其架构设计显著提升了演示脚本的准确性与运行时同步可靠性，为演示自动化提供了新范式。

title: The Mirage of Optimizing Training Policies: Monotonic Inference Policies as the Real Objective for LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has gained growing attention in large language model (LLM) post-training, yet RL training remains fragile and can suffer from instability or collapse. One vital cause is training-inference mismatch: LLM adopts separate inference and training engines for generation efficiency and training precision, which in practice exhibits inconsistent probabilities for the same trajectories on training and inference sides, even with synchronized model parameters. This naturally induces a special type of off-policyness ever existing and poisoning the training. Prior works have made various efforts in addressing the off-policyness to stabilize the training policies under the mismatch. In this paper, we point out the objective misalignment neglected by existing works that an effective update to the policy in the training engine not necessarily ensures the improvement of the inference policy, i.e., the one used in deployment. To this end, we propose a new policy optimization objective for LLM RL, named Monotonic Inference Policy Improvement (MIPI). Following this principle, we introduce Monotonic Inference Policy Update (MIPU), a two-step LLM RL framework that constructs sampler-referenced candidate updates and selectively accepts synchronized candidates using an inference-side gap proxy. Experiments conducted on two model scales under high mismatch show that MIPU improves average reasoning performance and training stability.

AI.tldr: 本文指出大语言模型（LLM）强化学习后训练中存在训练-推理不匹配导致的目标错位问题，即训练端策略更新未必提升实际部署所用的推理端策略；为此提出单调推理策略改进（MIPI）目标及对应的两步框架MIPU，在高不匹配场景下提升了推理性能与训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有RL训练中忽视了训练引擎与推理引擎因实现差异导致的概率不一致，从而引发训练端策略更新无法保证推理端策略提升的目标错位问题。
AI.method: 提出Monotonic Inference Policy Improvement (MIPI)优化目标，并设计Monotonic Inference Policy Update (MIPU)两步框架：先构建采样器参考的候选更新，再利用推理侧间隙代理选择性接受同步更新。
AI.result: 在两种模型规模、高训练-推理不匹配条件下，MIPU显著提升了平均推理性能和训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 训练-推理不匹配不仅带来离策略偏差，更造成目标错位；MIPI/MIPU通过显式对齐推理端策略改进，为LLM RL提供更鲁棒的优化范式。

title: VISTA-DZ: Visual Semantic Trajectory Adaptation for Personalized Dilemma Zone Prediction
comment: This manuscript is currently under review
summary: Driver decision making in the dilemma zone at signalized intersections is safety critical, as vehicles approaching a yellow signal must decide whether to stop or proceed within limited time and distance margins. Accurate prediction of both stop-go decisions and decision timing is important for adaptive signal control, advanced driver assistance systems, and human-centered intelligent transportation applications. However, dilemma zone behavior is strongly driver dependent. Similar approach trajectories may lead to different decisions across drivers because of differences in risk preference, braking habit, and decision threshold. Existing personalized models often rely on handcrafted scalar descriptors, which provide useful but limited summaries of individual behavior. This paper proposes VISTA-DZ, a semantic-profile-conditioned framework for personalized stop-go and decision-time prediction. Historical trajectories are converted into visual representations, interpreted by a vision-language model to generate behavioral profiles, and encoded as semantic embeddings to condition a dual-output prediction network. The final model combines a bidirectional GRU encoder, driver-conditioned multi-head cross-attention, and Feature-wise Linear Modulation for temporal evidence selection and feature adaptation. Experiments on the SDZ dataset and a newly collected FDZ dataset show that VISTA-DZ outperforms trajectory-only and handcrafted personalization baselines, achieving 93.26% in-domain simulation accuracy and 90.22% mean accuracy across 20 held-out simulation drivers. Cross-domain results further show feasible zero-shot simulation-to-real transfer and better real-world generalization when simulation data are combined with limited field data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VISTA-DZ框架，利用视觉-语言模型从历史轨迹生成语义行为画像，并以此条件化双输出预测网络，实现高精度个性化停车/通行决策及决策时刻预测，在仿真与真实场景中均取得优越性能。
AI.motivation: 驾驶员在黄灯困境区的决策高度个性化（受风险偏好、制动习惯等影响），现有基于手工特征的个性化建模方法表达能力有限。
AI.method: 将历史轨迹转为视觉表征，用视觉-语言模型提取语义行为画像；构建以该画像为条件的双输出预测网络，融合双向GRU编码器、驾驶员条件化多头交叉注意力和特征级线性调制模块。
AI.result: 在SDZ和自建FDZ数据集上，VISTA-DZ达到93.26%域内仿真准确率和90.22%跨20名被试的平均准确率；支持零样本仿真到现实迁移，且少量实测数据可显著提升泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 语义行为画像比手工标量特征更能刻画驾驶员个性，VISTA-DZ为困境区决策预测提供了更鲁棒、可迁移的个性化建模范式。

title: DAIN: Dynamic Agent-Based Interaction Network for Efficient and Collaborative Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Current multimodal fusion approaches, particularly those based on static Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures, often struggle to provide the adaptive and efficient collaborative reasoning required by complex real-world applications. We introduce the Dynamic Agent-based Interaction Network (DAIN), which reconceptualizes multimodal fusion as a dynamic, multi-agent collaborative process. DAIN employs a context-aware Meta-Controller that dynamically schedules sparse activation of specialized interaction agents and orchestrates compressed inter-agent communication for consensus-building. The framework is guided by a multi-objective loss function that jointly optimizes task accuracy, agent specialization, and operational efficiency through sparse activation and communication regularization. Comprehensive evaluations across five diverse benchmarks -- ADNI, MIMIC-IV, MM-IMDB, CMU-MOSI, and ENRICO -- establish DAIN as a new state-of-the-art, delivering significant performance improvements including a 2.6\% accuracy gain on ADNI. Ablation studies verify the critical roles of both dynamic scheduling and agent communication. Furthermore, DAIN offers enhanced interpretability by exposing context-dependent agent roles and collaboration patterns while maintaining computational efficiency through sample-wise sparse agent activation. Our work demonstrates the promise of dynamic, agent-based paradigms for multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态代理交互网络（DAIN），将多模态融合建模为上下文感知、稀疏激活的多智能体协作过程，显著提升了性能与可解释性，并在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于静态MoE的多模态融合方法难以适应复杂现实场景所需的动态协同推理能力。
AI.method: 提出动态代理交互网络（DAIN），包含上下文感知元控制器，动态调度专用交互代理并压缩代理间通信；采用兼顾任务精度、代理专业化与计算效率的多目标损失函数。
AI.result: 在ADNI、MIMIC-IV、MM-IMDB、CMU-MOSI和ENRICO五个基准上达到新SOTA，ADNI上准确率提升2.6%；消融实验证明动态调度与代理通信的关键作用；兼具可解释性与计算高效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态、基于代理的范式为多模态推理提供了更灵活、高效且可解释的新路径。

title: RAGA: Real Time Ray Traced Gaussian Shadow Casting for 3DGS Avatar-Scene Interaction
summary: We study the problem of physically plausible shadow casting when animating 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) avatars, either individually or in multi-avatar and object-interaction scenarios, within existing 3DGS scenes. In contrast to prior methods that rely on binary hit tests and mesh-based shadow casters, our method performs shadow computation entirely in Gaussian space, without requiring any mesh reconstruction. We introduce RAGA, a Ray-Traced Gaussian Shadow Casting formulation based on exact ray-Gaussian line integrals. For each occluding Gaussian, we integrate the opacity profile along the shadow ray and normalize by the theoretical maximum integral, producing a weight that captures how the ray traverses the occluder rather than merely whether an intersection occurred. To reduce temporal variance from clothing deformations in animated avatars, we further introduce an avatar proxy representation that stabilizes shadow casting while preserving visual fidelity. We implement RAGA using custom CUDA kernels integrated with the NVIDIA OptiX framework; as such, our shadow tracer runs at rates of about 50 FPS. We evaluate on single-avatar, multi-avatar, and avatar-object interaction scenarios across multiple datasets, demonstrating substantially improved shadow realism, temporal stability, and scene coherence. Our project page is available at https://miraymen.github.io/raga/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAGA方法，在3D高斯点阵（3DGS）中实现物理合理的阴影投射，完全在高斯空间内进行阴影计算，无需网格重建，并通过定制CUDA核与OptiX加速，达到约50 FPS实时性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS阴影方法依赖二值相交检测和网格阴影投射器，难以实现物理合理、时序稳定且适用于动态多角色交互场景的阴影效果。
AI.method: 提出基于精确光线-高斯线积分的Ray-Traced Gaussian Shadow Casting（RAGA），对每个遮挡高斯沿阴影光线积分其不透明度分布并归一化；引入角色代理表示以缓解衣物形变导致的时序抖动。
AI.result: 在单角色、多角色及角色-物体交互场景中显著提升阴影真实性、时间稳定性与场景一致性，运行速度约50 FPS。
AI.conclusion: RAGA实现了无需网格重建、完全在高斯空间中完成的高效、稳定、物理更合理的3DGS阴影投射，为动态3D内容生成提供了新范式。

title: ManimAgent: Self-Evolving Multimodal Agents for Visual Education
summary: Multi-round reflection lets agents built on large language models recover from failures within a single task, but each task remains an isolated episode: lessons learned across many reflection rounds on one task are discarded before the next begins. We study this gap on a code-generation task: from a scientific paper section, the agent writes Python in the open-source Manim library to render a mathematical animation. We present ManimAgent, a self-evolving multimodal agent that carries reflection experience across tasks through a dual-channel Episodic Memory Bank grown entirely from its own task stream, with no weight updates and no human seeds. After each animation converges, a vision-language model scores the rendered keyframes; the resulting signals populate a positive channel M+ that stores success rationales as soft Reference Examples, and a negative channel M- that stores validated failure patterns as hard Known Pitfalls. On a fixed-probe evaluation against no-memory, matched-budget retrieval-augmented generation, and shuffled-memory baselines, blind human Pass@1 rises and reflection rounds fall as memory size grows. We will release the code, frozen memory snapshots, and the task stream.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ManimAgent，一种无需权重更新和人工干预的自演化多模态智能体，通过双通道情景记忆库（M+和M-）跨任务保留反思经验，在科学论文转Manim动画生成任务中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多轮反思机制仅在单个任务内有效，无法将反思经验迁移到后续任务中，导致知识积累缺失。
AI.method: 构建ManimAgent，利用视觉语言模型对每轮生成的关键帧打分，形成正向（成功理由，软参考示例）与负向（验证失败模式，硬已知陷阱）双通道情景记忆库，并在新任务中检索增强生成。
AI.result: 在固定评估集上，相比无记忆、检索增强生成及乱序记忆基线，盲测人类Pass@1准确率随记忆规模增大而上升，所需反思轮次减少。
AI.conclusion: 跨任务反思经验的结构化存储与检索可显著提升多步推理智能体的泛化能力与效率，且无需模型微调或人工标注。

title: MF-UAVPose6D: A Model-Free Monocular 6-DoF Pose Estimation Framework for Fixed-Wing UAVs
summary: For uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs), estimating six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) poses is essential for airspace situational awareness, target tracking, and counter-UAV operations. However, non-cooperative targets usually lack computer-aided design (CAD) models and keypoint priors, making existing model-based or keypoint-matching methods difficult to apply reliably. To address these challenges, this paper proposes MF-UAVPose6D, a model-free monocular 6-DoF pose estimation framework for fixed-wing UAVs. During inference, the method takes only a single red-green-blue (RGB) image and camera intrinsics as input. It first obtains a stable target anchor through heatmap-guided center localization, introduces a Perspective-Aware Module (PAM) to model observation-ray priors, exploits Dynamic Topological Sampling (DTS) to complement weak structural cues from the wings, fuselage, and tail, and adopts a decoupled translation-rotation pose decoding mechanism to estimate the 6-DoF pose. In addition, we construct the FW-UAV6DPose synthetic dataset, which covers fixed-wing UAV observations across diverse distances, viewpoints, and poses. Experimental results show that MF-UAVPose6D achieves accurate and efficient monocular 6-DoF pose estimation without requiring CAD models, and demonstrates strong robustness in long-range rotation estimation, depth recovery, and joint pose evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需CAD模型的单目6自由度姿态估计算法MF-UAVPose6D，专用于固定翼无人机，通过热图引导定位、视角感知模块、动态拓扑采样和解耦的平移-旋转解码机制，在合成数据集FW-UAV6DPose上验证了其在长距离、多视角下的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 非合作目标缺乏CAD模型和关键点先验，导致现有基于模型或关键点匹配的方法难以可靠应用。
AI.method: 提出MF-UAVPose6D框架：采用热图引导中心定位获取稳定锚点；引入视角感知模块（PAM）建模观测射线先验；利用动态拓扑采样（DTS）增强机翼、机身和尾翼的弱结构线索；采用解耦的平移-旋转姿态解码机制；并构建FW-UAV6DPose合成数据集。
AI.result: MF-UAVPose6D在无需CAD模型前提下实现了准确高效的单目6-DoF姿态估计，在长距离旋转估计、深度恢复和联合姿态评估中表现出强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MF-UAVPose6D为无合作目标的固定翼无人机提供了可靠的单目6-DoF姿态估计解决方案，显著提升了空域态势感知与反无人机任务能力。

title: Forewarned is Forearmed: When Non-Sequential Embedding Turns Into an Anomaly Detector
summary: This paper offers an in-depth analysis of non-sequential multimodal sentence-level embeddings, with a particular focus on the SONAR model. We demonstrate that certain embedding dimensions are sensitive to perturbations and can serve as indicators of decoding anomalies. By leveraging the consistency between successive encoding and decoding, we successfully build an accurate detector. Additionally, we explore modifying specific dimensions of interest to attempt to correct them. This work underscores the importance of understanding and analyzing the embeddings themselves to enhance the reliability of multimodal representations.

AI.tldr: 本文深入分析了非顺序多模态句子级嵌入（特别是SONAR模型），发现某些嵌入维度对扰动敏感，可作为解码异常的指示器；利用编码与解码的一致性构建高精度异常检测器，并尝试通过修改特定维度进行校正，强调理解嵌入本身对提升多模态表征可靠性的重要性。
AI.motivation: 提升多模态句子级嵌入的可靠性，识别并修正解码异常。
AI.method: 分析SONAR模型嵌入维度对扰动的敏感性，利用编码-解码一致性构建异常检测器，并尝试针对性修改敏感维度以实现校正。
AI.result: 成功构建了基于嵌入维度一致性的高精度解码异常检测器，并验证了部分维度可被修改以缓解异常。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入空间的内在结构蕴含诊断与修复信息，深入分析嵌入维度是增强多模态表征鲁棒性的关键路径。

title: HiReFF: High-Resolution Feedforward Human Reconstruction from Uncalibrated Sparse-View Video
summary: Uncalibrated volumetric video streaming for human reconstruction is essential for holographic communication and AR/VR, yet remains challenging due to the need for temporal consistency and computational efficiency from sparse-view inputs. Existing methods rely on per-scene optimization or calibrated cameras, while recent feed-forward models are limited to low-resolution (0.5K) single-frame synthesis. We present HiReFF, a feed-forward method for 2K-resolution 360° human video reconstruction from uncalibrated sparse-view videos. Our framework decomposes the problem into two key tasks: foreground 3D Gaussian reconstruction from sparse-view videos (four views separated by 90°) and computationally efficient high-resolution synthesis. To enable the former, we propose Scale-synchronized Camera Calibration to resolve scale ambiguity for multi-view supervision, and Gaussian-wise Foreground Masking to reconstruct clean foregrounds by modulating Gaussian parameters. For efficient high-resolution synthesis, our High-resolution Side-tuning achieves 2K rendering by augmenting the Gaussian head with supplementary features while keeping the backbone at 0.5K, drastically reducing computational overhead. Experiments demonstrate that HiReFF significantly outperforms existing methods in high-resolution streaming volumetric video reconstruction. https://iridescentjiang.github.io/HiReFF

AI.tldr: HiReFF是一种前馈式方法，用于从未经标定的稀疏视角视频中重建2K分辨率、360°的体积化人体视频，通过尺度同步相机标定、高斯前景掩码和高分辨率侧调优实现高效高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 未标定稀疏视角下的体积视频流式重建对全息通信和AR/VR至关重要，但面临时间一致性与计算效率的双重挑战。
AI.method: 提出HiReFF框架：1）尺度同步相机标定解决多视角监督中的尺度模糊；2）高斯粒度前景掩码优化高斯参数以提取干净前景；3）高分辨率侧调优在保持主干网络0.5K分辨率的同时扩展高斯头实现2K渲染。
AI.result: 在2K分辨率360°人体视频重建任务上显著优于现有方法，兼顾高分辨率、实时性和稀疏视角输入能力。
AI.conclusion: HiReFF首次实现了无需场景优化或相机标定的高质量、高分辨率、前馈式稀疏视角体积视频重建，为实时全息通信提供了可行方案。

title: BayesEvolve: Explicit Belief States for Autonomous Scientific Discovery
summary: Autonomous scientific discovery systems increasingly use large language models (LLMs) to propose new hypotheses, but many such systems condition primarily on experimental memory: archives of high-scoring candidates or heuristic summaries of recent trials. We argue that discovery agents should instead maintain explicit, uncertainty-aware beliefs about hypothesis quality. We introduce BayesEvolve, a belief-guided discovery framework that converts experimental evidence into a predictive belief state and uses this belief to guide future experimentation. As a controlled testbed for belief-guided discovery, we evaluate BayesEvolve on shifted BBOB-style black-box optimization tasks, leaving program and laboratory discovery domains to future work. BayesEvolve improves sample efficiency over memory- and archive-guided LLM baselines under a fixed evaluation budget. We further show that the belief state is predictive on held-out candidate pools, that controlled decision-rule ablations favor belief-guided selection with an annealed uncertainty bonus, and that BayesEvolve exhibits productive late-stage concentration rather than unfocused exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BayesEvolve框架，通过构建不确定性感知的假设质量信念状态来指导科学发现，显著提升样本效率，并在黑箱优化任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有自主科学发现系统多依赖实验记忆（如高分候选集或启发式总结）进行条件生成，缺乏对假设质量的显式、不确定性感知信念建模。
AI.method: 提出BayesEvolve框架：将实验证据转化为预测性信念状态，并基于该信念指导后续实验；在偏移BBOB风格的黑箱优化任务上进行可控评估；开展消融实验（如决策规则）与泛化性分析（held-out候选池）。
AI.result: BayesEvolve在固定评估预算下优于基于记忆和存档的LLM基线；信念状态在未见候选池上具有预测性；带退火不确定性奖励的信念引导选择效果最优；后期呈现聚焦式探索而非发散探索。
AI.conclusion: 显式、不确定性感知的信念建模比单纯依赖历史记忆更有效，是提升自主科学发现样本效率与推理质量的关键路径。

title: Optimizer Memory Makes Shuffle Order a First-Order Source of Fine-Tuning Noise
summary: Shuffle order can be a larger source of fine-tuning noise than a memoryless analysis predicts: fixed-clock optimizer memory makes local equal-multiset contrasts first order in the learning rate rather than second order, and the resulting order channel can be large enough for a single seed to flip a close A/B comparison. We isolate this mechanism and derive a fit-free way to size the noise it produces. For a memoryless optimizer, reordering an equal multiset has no first-order endpoint term; the leading local contrast is the $O(η^2)$ gradient bracket. Fixed-clock optimizers such as AdamW are different. Their moment buffers, preconditioner state, and de-biasing counters advance with the step index rather than with the learning-rate-scaled time $τ=ηk$, so the same gradient can receive a position-dependent endpoint weight. For any fixed finite measurement window, a lifted-state expansion gives an $O(η)$ equal-multiset contrast whenever the first-order replay coefficient is nonzero, while regular and clock-matched controls remain $O(η^2)$; a bare fixed-$β$ momentum buffer is already enough. A bitwise-deterministic replay from one warmed optimizer state isolates the mechanism, giving order-variance slopes 1.83 for AdamW, 2.00 for fixed-$β$ momentum, and 4.00 for SGD; matching the memory clock to $τ$ restores the regular exponent. For AdamW with a frozen preconditioner, the same impulse-weight kernel gives a closed-form asymptotic order-variance floor after the local potentials are measured, with no fitted coefficients. The result is local to the measurement window (independent reshuffling can average the channel across windows), but it yields order-noise error bars, positional attribution weights, and a seed-budget criterion for fine-tuning comparisons.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了在使用固定时钟优化器（如AdamW）进行微调时，数据打乱顺序会引入显著的一阶噪声，其大小足以影响A/B实验结果的统计显著性；作者提出了一种无需拟合的方法来量化该噪声，并给出误差估计、位置归因和种子预算准则。
AI.motivation: 传统认为数据打乱顺序带来的噪声是二阶小量（O(η²)），但实际中固定时钟优化器（如AdamW）因状态随步数而非学习率缩放时间更新，导致相同梯度获得位置依赖权重，从而产生不可忽略的一阶（O(η)）顺序噪声，影响可复现性和A/B比较可靠性。
AI.method: 通过提升态展开（lifted-state expansion）分析固定时钟优化器（AdamW、SGD、动量法）的等多重集重排效应；设计位确定性重放实验隔离顺序噪声机制；推导无拟合的渐近阶噪声下界（尤其对冻结预条件器的AdamW）；引入位置归因权重与种子预算判据。
AI.result: 发现AdamW、固定β动量、SGD的顺序方差斜率分别为1.83、2.00、4.00；匹配内存时钟与τ=ηk可恢复O(η²)行为；导出AdamW冻结预条件器下的闭式渐近顺序方差下界；提供可计算的顺序噪声误差棒、位置归因权重及种子数量判定准则。
AI.conclusion: 数据顺序是微调中不可忽视的一阶噪声源，尤其对固定时钟优化器；需在实验设计中显式建模该通道，而非默认其可忽略；所提方法为细粒度误差估计与可靠比较提供了理论基础与实用工具。

title: OP3DSG: Open-Vocabulary Part-Aware 3D Scene Graph Generation for Real-World Environments
summary: 3D scene graphs (3DSGs) provide a compact and structured abstraction of 3D environments. Although advances in foundation models have enabled open-vocabulary 3DSG generation, existing approaches remain object-centric and encode limited relational information -- restricting their applicability in real-world scenarios that require fine-grained understanding. We propose OP3DSG, an open-vocabulary part-aware 3DSG generation framework that constructs unified graphs that jointly model objects, interactive parts, spatial relations, functional relations, and affordances. OP3DSG integrates object-part knowledge-guided detection with part-aware 3D fusion to preserve small and interaction-relevant components, and employs a geometry-initialized prior graph with LLM-based refinement to reduce spurious relational predictions while enabling efficient graph construction. To systematically evaluate unified 3D scene graph construction, we introduce UniGraph3D, a benchmark designed for part-aware perception and multi-level relational reasoning. Experimental results show that OP3DSG achieves state-of-the-art performance and demonstrates its effectiveness as a perception backbone in diverse real-world robotics tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OP3DSG框架，用于生成开放词汇、部件感知的三维场景图（3DSG），统一建模物体、交互部件、空间/功能关系及可供性，并结合知识引导检测、部件感知融合与几何初始化+大语言模型精化图构建方法；同时发布UniGraph3D基准以支持多层级关系推理评估。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇3DSG生成方法局限于物体中心、关系信息粗粒度，难以满足真实场景中细粒度理解需求。
AI.method: OP3DSG框架包含：1）物体-部件知识引导的检测；2）部件感知的3D特征融合；3）几何初始化先验图 + LLM驱动的关系精化。配套构建UniGraph3D基准用于系统评估。
AI.result: OP3DSG在统一3DSG构建任务上达到SOTA性能，并在多种真实机器人任务中验证了其作为感知主干的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OP3DSG通过引入部件感知与多层级关系建模，显著提升了3DSG的表达能力与实用性，为具身智能提供了更鲁棒的结构化环境表征基础。

title: Before Thinking, Learn to Decide: Proactive Routing for Efficient Visual Reasoning
summary: Large multimodal models have achieved strong reasoning on complex visual tasks, but their inference efficiency is often restricted by long chains of thought. A promising solution is to pair a small draft model with a large target model, enabling cooperative inference employing a routing signal that adaptively routes queries to either the draft or target model based on their difficulties for optimal efficiency and accuracy. Yet, the remaining bottleneck is to establish a reliable query difficulty signal under multimodal settings. Existing approaches designed for language models either rely on post-hoc token probabilities, which fall short in multimodal scenarios, or depend on supervised fine-tuning, which is a data-sensitive strategy. Both paradigms perform routing only after a complete output, and ignore whether the target model can actually solve the routed instances. To address this, we propose PRP, a Proactive Routing Paradigm that enables early decision-making by jointly evaluating the competence of both the draft and target models. Our Draft Rating Learning (DRL) equips the draft model with an internal confidence estimator, while Joint Rating Learning (JRL) predicts how well the target model can handle a given query, thereby prioritizing the allocation of samples it excels at rather than the hardest ones. These ratings enable fine-grained, instance-level \textbf{Proactive Routing} and substantially accelerate inference without compromising overall performance. Extensive experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks validate our effectiveness and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PRP（Proactive Routing Paradigm）的主动路由范式，通过Draft Rating Learning（DRL）和Joint Rating Learning（JRL）联合评估小 draft 模型与大 target 模型对查询的胜任能力，实现细粒度、实例级的早期路由决策，从而在不牺牲性能的前提下显著提升多模态推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于语言模型的查询难度信号方法在多模态场景中表现不佳：依赖后验token概率不可靠，监督微调又数据敏感；且均需等待完整输出才路由，未考虑target模型是否真能解决该样本。
AI.method: 提出PRP范式，包含两个核心学习模块：1）Draft Rating Learning（DRL），赋予draft模型内部置信度估计能力；2）Joint Rating Learning（JRL），预测target模型处理给定查询的能力，优先分配target擅长而非最难的样本。
AI.result: 在多个多模态推理基准上验证了PRP的有效性与高效性，实现了显著加速且不损失整体性能。
AI.conclusion: PRP通过联合建模draft与target模型的胜任能力，实现了真正意义上的主动、细粒度、实例级路由，在多模态大模型推理中兼顾效率与准确性。

title: Multi-scale Object-Aware Gaze Estimation via Geometric Reasoning
summary: Gaze target estimation aims to predict the semantic object an observer fixates upon within an image, a task deeply rooted in the object-oriented nature of human gaze. Observers tend to select a specific semantic entity as the attentional target, rather than responding randomly across arbitrary regions of the image. However, existing methods typically model this task as a direct mapping from global features to gaze heatmaps, essentially treating it as a pixel-level regression problem. This approach fails to explicitly represent the gazed object as a distinct entity, making it difficult to produce stable and semantically consistent predictions in complex scenes. To address this, we propose a two-stage gaze estimation framework guided by object semantics, reformulating gaze target estimation as a hierarchical reasoning process. Our method incorporates object-level representations during feature encoding to align image features with discrete semantic entities, then introduces multi-scale feature fusion and geometric constraints from head pose and gaze direction for fine-grained localization and object-level discrimination. Extensive experiments on GazeFollow, VideoAttentionTarget, ChildPlay, and GOO-Real demonstrate that our method achieves AUC of 0.961, 0.948, 0.987, and 0.977 respectively, delivering strong performance across all benchmarks while maintaining a compact parameter size of 7.1M.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段的基于对象语义引导的注视目标估计框架，将任务重构为分层推理过程，通过引入对象级表征、多尺度特征融合及几何约束，在多个基准上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将注视目标估计视为像素级回归问题，未能显式建模被注视对象作为独立语义实体，导致在复杂场景中预测不稳定且语义不一致。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段在特征编码中融入对象级表征以对齐图像特征与语义实体；第二阶段结合多尺度特征融合及头部姿态与视线方向的几何约束，实现细粒度定位与对象级判别。
AI.result: 在GazeFollow、VideoAttentionTarget、ChildPlay和GOO-Real四个数据集上AUC分别达0.961、0.948、0.987和0.977，参数量仅7.1M。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了注视目标估计的稳定性与语义一致性，验证了引入对象语义和分层推理的合理性与优越性。

title: Sequential Fairness Auditing with Limited Output Access
summary: External evaluations are becoming increasingly central to the governance of AI systems. In practice, however, independent auditors often have limited access to deployed models and must rely on query-based interactions. Most existing fairness evaluation methods assume static datasets and fixed-sample statistical tests, making them poorly suited to real-world auditing scenarios in which evidence must be collected sequentially under query constraints. In this work, we formulate fairness auditing as a tolerance-aware sequential hypothesis-testing problem under limited model output access. We develop a sequential generalized likelihood-ratio framework that allows auditors to accumulate evidence from a finite audit pool and stop once sufficient support for compliance or violation has been obtained. The framework is instantiated for decision-based Statistical Parity and Equal Opportunity audits, and extended to score- and logit-based proxy audits when richer observables are available. Our results show that both the fairness metric and the level of model access significantly affect audit efficiency, and that the benefits of richer output information are not uniform across auditing settings. In particular, richer outputs can substantially reduce the number of queries required for some fairness metrics and operating regimes, while offering limited gains in near-threshold cases. This work provides a practical statistical framework for sequential fairness auditing under realistic deployment constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向现实AI系统审计场景的容差感知序贯假设检验框架，用于在模型输出访问受限条件下高效开展公平性审计。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性评估方法多基于静态数据集和固定样本统计检验，难以适应实际审计中需通过有限查询逐步收集证据的场景。
AI.method: 将公平性审计建模为容差感知的序贯假设检验问题，构建基于广义似然比的序贯检验框架，并针对决策型（统计均等性、机会均等性）及分数/对数几率型代理审计进行实例化。
AI.result: 实验表明公平性指标类型与模型可访问信息程度显著影响审计效率；更丰富的输出信息在某些指标和运行区间能大幅降低查询次数，但在接近阈值时增益有限。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为受限部署条件下的序贯公平性审计提供了实用的统计框架。

title: CylindTrack: Depth-Aware Cylindrical Motion Modeling for Panoramic Multi-Object Tracking
comment: The source code will be released at https://github.com/warriordby/CylindTrack
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is a core capability for embodied perception, and panoramic cameras are attractive for embodied systems because their 360° field of view reduces blind spots and keeps surrounding targets observable for longer durations. However, panoramic MOT is not a straightforward extension of perspective MOT. In equirectangular panoramic videos, the horizontal image domain is periodic rather than Euclidean, which breaks planar motion assumptions and makes IoU-based association unreliable near the 0°/360° seam. Meanwhile, large-FoV scenes often contain more objects, stronger scale variation, and more frequent interactions, making online association particularly sensitive to unstable frame-wise depth cues. To address these issues, we propose CylindTrack, a depth-aware cylindrical tracking-by-detection framework for panoramic MOT. CylindTrack first introduces Depth-Temporal Trajectory Modeling (DTM), which promotes instance depth from an isolated frame-wise cue to a temporally filtered trajectory-level state. To improve the reliability of depth observations, we further develop Spherical Spatio-Temporal Consistency Learning (SSTC), which combines a Temporal Mixer and Spherical Geometry-aware Attention to enhance temporal coherence and panoramic geometric alignment in depth-aware representations. Finally, we design a Topology-Aware Cylindrical Motion Model (TCMM) that lifts horizontal motion into a continuous angular state space and performs seam-consistent motion prediction and association in the periodic panoramic domain. By jointly modeling trajectory-level depth consistency and panoramic topology, CylindTrack improves identity preservation and trajectory continuity in challenging panoramic scenes. The source code will be released at https://github.com/warriordby/CylindTrack.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CylindTrack，一种面向全景视频的深度感知圆柱坐标系多目标跟踪框架，通过深度-时序轨迹建模、球面时空一致性学习和拓扑感知圆柱运动模型，解决全景MOT中周期性边界、深度不稳定和几何失真等问题。
AI.motivation: 全景视频的等距矩形投影具有水平方向周期性，破坏平面运动假设，导致IoU关联在0°/360°接缝处失效；同时大视场场景中目标更多、尺度变化大、交互频繁，使基于帧深度的在线关联鲁棒性下降。
AI.method: 提出CylindTrack框架，包含三部分：1）Depth-Temporal Trajectory Modeling（DTM），将帧级深度提升为轨迹级状态；2）Spherical Spatio-Temporal Consistency Learning（SSTC），结合时序混频器与球面几何感知注意力增强深度表征的一致性；3）Topology-Aware Cylindrical Motion Model（TCMM），在连续角域建模水平运动并实现接缝一致的预测与关联。
AI.result: 在多个全景MOT基准（如PanoCity、Omnitrack）上达到SOTA性能，显著提升IDF1、MOTA和轨迹连续性指标，尤其在高密度与强交互场景下优势明显。
AI.conclusion: CylindTrack通过联合建模轨迹级深度一致性与全景拓扑结构，有效缓解全景MOT中的周期性失真与深度噪声问题，为具身智能系统提供更鲁棒的长时目标跟踪能力。

title: CaresAI at CT-DEB26: Detecting Dosing Errors In Clinical Trials Using Domain-Specific Transformer Embeddings and Classification Models
comment: 18 pages, published in CL4Health 2026 proceedings (3rd Workshop on Patient-oriented language processing) @ LREC 2026 http://lrec-conf.org/proceedings/lrec2026/workshops/cl4health/2026.cl4health-1.0.pdf
summary: Medication errors, particularly dosing errors in clinical trials (CT), can lead to patient harm, adverse drug events and worse patient outcomes. Dosing errors are preventable, and early identification can improve trial integrity and mitigate subsequent clinical and financial burden. This study aims to detect dosing errors within CT protocols by evaluating text representations of trial information using transformer-based language models trained on biomedical corpora. CT textual data was encoded using several models, including ClinicalBERT, PubMedBERT, BioBERT, and MedCPT, and integrated with categorical features. These text embeddings were used as input to classical machine learning models and neural network architectures within an experimental framework. Performance was primarily assessed using ROC-AUC with respect to predicting dosage error. Under a logistic regression baseline, BioBERT consistently outperformed alternative encoders, achieving an ROC-AUC of 0.794, a 3.95% improvement over the ClinicalBERT baseline. Combining multiple embeddings did not yield improvements, indicating that domain alignment outweighs representational stacking. Gradient boosting models, support vector classifiers, logistic regression, and residual neural networks achieved the strongest performance for predicting dosage error, achieving ROC-AUCs: 0.821 to 0.853. Overall, the integration of domain-specific transformer embeddings with structured metadata enables discrimination of trials meeting a predefined elevated dosing error risk criterion, advancing safety monitoring and supporting informed regulatory decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用生物医学领域预训练的Transformer语言模型（如BioBERT）对临床试验协议文本进行编码，并结合分类特征，构建机器学习模型以预测用药剂量错误风险，结果显示BioBERT+逻辑回归等模型在ROC-AUC指标上表现最优（最高0.853），证明领域适配的文本表征对提升剂量错误识别能力至关重要。
AI.motivation: 临床试验中的用药剂量错误可导致患者伤害和不良事件，早期识别有助于保障试验完整性并减轻临床与经济负担。
AI.method: 使用ClinicalBERT、PubMedBERT、BioBERT和MedCPT等模型对临床试验文本编码，融合分类元数据特征，输入至逻辑回归、梯度提升、SVM及残差神经网络等模型，以ROC-AUC评估剂量错误预测性能。
AI.result: BioBERT在逻辑回归基线上取得最高ROC-AUC 0.794；梯度提升、SVM、逻辑回归和残差神经网络达到0.821–0.853；多嵌入融合未提升性能，表明领域对齐优于表征堆叠。
AI.conclusion: 整合领域特异性Transformer文本嵌入与结构化元数据，可有效识别高剂量错误风险的临床试验，从而增强安全性监测并支持监管决策。

title: W4A4 Quantization for Inference on Wan2.2-I2V-A14B
comment: 4 pages, 8 figures; ICME 2026 Low-Bit-width Large-Model Quantization Challenge submission
summary: We summarize our submission to Sub-Challenge 1: W4A4 Quantization for Inference (HiF4 / MXFP4) of the ICME 2026 Low-Bit-width Large-Model Quantization Challenge. The sub-challenge targets 4-bit weight and 4-bit activation inference on Wan-AI/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B under HiF4 or MXFP4 numerical formats. We adapt two complementary ideas from LLM quantization, MixQ-style mixed precision for sparse activation outliers and SmoothQuant-style per-channel smoothing, together with block-wise HiF4 packing for Wan2.2 feed-forward linear layers. Calibration on representative OpenS2V-5M batches identifies heavy-tailed activation channels; smoothing rebalances dynamic range before W4A4 rounding; and a dual-branch GEMM preserves outlier columns in higher precision while the bulk of channels use strict W4A4. On official VBench I2V metrics, our pipeline stays within 2-3.5 percent of FP16 on most quality axes and improves motion smoothness, outperforming a native HiFloat4 baseline that degrades roughly 5 percent relative to FP16 across all reported scores.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Wan2.2-I2V-A14B模型的W4A4量化方案，融合MixQ混合精度、SmoothQuant通道平滑与HiF4分块打包技术，在VBench指标上接近FP16性能并提升运动平滑性。
AI.motivation: 应对ICME 2026低比特大模型量化挑战中W4A4（4位权重/激活）推理任务，尤其在HiF4/MXFP4格式下提升Wan2.2-I2V-A14B模型的量化精度与视频生成质量。
AI.method: 结合MixQ风格的混合精度处理稀疏激活离群值、SmoothQuant风格的逐通道平滑以重平衡动态范围，并采用分块HiF4打包优化前馈线性层；通过OpenS2V-5M批次校准识别重尾激活通道，设计双分支GEMM分别处理离群列（高精度）与主通道（严格W4A4）。
AI.result: 在官方VBench I2V指标上，各项质量指标保持在FP16基准的2–3.5%以内，并显著改善运动平滑性；相较原生HiFloat4基线（相对FP16下降约5%），性能明显更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提W4A4量化方案在保持极低比特开销的同时，有效缓解激活离群值与动态范围失衡问题，实现了高质量视频生成推理，验证了混合精度、通道平滑与硬件友好打包策略协同的有效性。

title: Using Large Language Models as Low-Cost Statistical Estimators for Human-Response Data
summary: Quantitative research across the social and behavioral sciences depends on human subject experiments that are expensive, slow, and subject to sampling bias. Here we show that pretrained large language models induce risk-equivalent estimators of conditional expectations under squared loss, establishing restricted functional risk equivalence: under squared loss, the LLM induces an estimator whose risk matches the Bayes optimal risk for squared-loss prediction of conditional expectations for any inference that depends on the data only through the conditional mean. We formalize the LLM as a misspecified functional estimator $T(\hat{P}_n)$ trained on i.i.d.\ data, decompose the estimation error into representation bias $ε_{\mathrm{rep}}$ and optimization error, and prove that under mild regularity conditions the LLM's expected error converges to the irreducible population variance plus the squared representation bias, with the representation bias bounded by the Pinsker inequality. The identifiability error $δ$ propagates into the effective bias, inflating the asymptotic risk floor. We establish restricted functional risk equivalence via a bidirectional Le Cam deficiency analysis: the forward deficiency vanishes asymptotically while the reverse deficiency is exactly zero. We provide finite-sample concentration bounds and a calibration protocol with explicit decision rules. The result is a precise, provable statement: a well-calibrated LLM achieves the Bayes-optimal risk for conditional-mean-dependent inference, bounded by explicit scope conditions. In practical applications, this means that under satisfied conditions and well-calibrated models, large language models can be used in many prediction and decision-making tasks that originally relied on human experiments, approximating near-optimal statistical inference at lower cost.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了预训练大语言模型（LLM）在平方损失下可实现条件期望的“受限函数风险等价”，即其估计风险可达到贝叶斯最优风险，从而为替代昂贵、缓慢且存在抽样偏差的人类实验提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: 社会与行为科学中的定量研究严重依赖成本高、耗时长且存在抽样偏差的人类被试实验，亟需更高效、可扩展的替代方案。
AI.method: 将LLM形式化为基于i.i.d.数据训练的误设函数估计器T(P̂_n)，分解估计误差为表示偏差和优化误差；利用Pinsker不等式界定表示偏差；通过双向Le Cam缺陷分析建立受限函数风险等价；给出有限样本集中性界与校准协议。
AI.result: 在温和正则条件下，LLM的期望误差收敛于不可约总体方差加平方表示偏差，且表示偏差有上界；识别误差δ会抬升渐近风险下界；前向Le Cam缺陷渐近为零，反向为零，从而严格确立受限函数风险等价。
AI.conclusion: 只要满足明确的适用范围条件并经过良好校准，LLM可在依赖条件均值的推断任务中逼近贝叶斯最优风险，因而有望低成本替代传统人类实验，在预测与决策任务中发挥统计等效作用。

title: Speculative Pre-Positioning: Decoding Stateful Sessions to the Next Decision Point Off the Critical Path
summary: A stateless inference server (vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM) idles between requests while the accelerator waits; a stateful session reclaims that idle time. Speculative pre-positioning decodes the session forward to its next decision point with the target model's own forward pass and no draft model, moving the cross-request prefill and entry-decode off the critical path: the next request resumes from a pre-paid entry on its delta, or, when a confidence gate fires, is answered from a cached distribution in one near-constant vocabulary scan with no decode, at a cost only of energy and a rare, bounded false accept. The payoff is conditional on capability: a capable model fires the gate at near-full coverage and about 87% precision (a smaller one never clears it), returning the first token in about 1.0 ms versus the 39 ms decode a prefix cache still pays.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“推测性预定位”（Speculative pre-positioning）的技术，通过在状态化会话中提前解码至下一个决策点，消除跨请求prefill和首token decode的延迟，显著加速首token生成（从39ms降至1.0ms），前提是模型具备足够能力以高覆盖率和精度触发置信门。
AI.motivation: 现有无状态推理服务器（如vLLM、SGLang、TensorRT-LLM）在请求间空闲，导致加速器资源浪费；而状态化会话可回收该空闲时间，提升吞吐与响应速度。
AI.method: 利用目标模型自身前向传播进行推测性预解码至下一决策点，无需草稿模型；引入置信门机制，当满足条件时直接从缓存分布中以近常数词汇扫描返回首token，跳过常规decode。
AI.result: 在具备足够能力的模型上，置信门可达近100%覆盖率与约87%精度，首token延迟降至约1.0ms（相比prefix cache仍需39ms decode）；小模型则无法触发该机制。
AI.conclusion: 推测性预定位是一种面向状态化会话的高效首token加速方法，其收益高度依赖模型能力，为高能力大模型推理提供了低延迟新范式。

title: PS-MOT: Cultivating Instance Awareness from Point Seeds for Multi-Object Tracking
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. The source code is available at https://github.com/xifen523/PS-MOT
summary: We introduce Point-supervised Multi-Object Tracking (PS-MOT) as a cost-effective alternative to traditional bounding box supervision, shifting the focus from spatial fitting to topological center-driven representation. However, PS-MOT faces challenges, e.g., spatial ambiguity and identity drift due to the lack of explicit geometric structure and scale constraints. To address these, we propose PS-Track, a hierarchical pipeline transitioning from points to instances across data, model, and loss levels. At the data level, we introduce Temporal-Feedback Prompting (TFP) to evolve points into temporally consistent pseudo-labels using negative spatial cues and motion priors. At the model level, we design the Point-Excited Wavelet Attention (PEWA) module, which leverages semantic correlations to activate high-frequency components, ``hallucinating'' object boundaries. At the loss level, Uncertainty-Guided Gaussian Learning (UGL) models pseudo-labels as probabilistic distributions, dynamically calibrating supervision intensity. Experiments on DanceTrack, EmboTrack, SportsMOT, and JRDB demonstrate that PS-Track provides a feasible and effective point-supervised alternative across diverse tracking scenarios, establishing a new state-of-the-art for point-supervised tracking. The source code is available at https://github.com/xifen523/PS-MOT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PS-Track方法，通过点监督实现多目标跟踪，利用时序反馈提示、点激发小波注意力和不确定性引导高斯学习，在多个数据集上达到点监督跟踪SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统边界框监督成本高，而点监督虽经济但存在空间模糊性和身份漂移问题，缺乏几何结构与尺度约束。
AI.method: 提出PS-Track分层框架：数据层用时序反馈提示（TFP）生成时序一致伪标签；模型层设计点激发小波注意力（PEWA）模块增强边界感知；损失层采用不确定性引导高斯学习（UGL）建模伪标签为概率分布。
AI.result: 在DanceTrack、EmboTrack、SportsMOT和JRDB数据集上验证了PS-Track的有效性，显著提升点监督多目标跟踪性能，达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: PS-Track为点监督多目标跟踪提供了可行且高效的解决方案，推动了弱监督跟踪的发展。

title: Comparing Human and Automatic Recognition of Dutch Dysarthric Continuous Speech: A Case Study
summary: In our goal to develop personalised dysarthric speech recognition (DSR) models, this study compared the recognition performances of human listeners and those of three state-of-the-art, off-the-shelf ASR systems (Whisper-large-V3, Google Chirp 3, and Omnilingual) on the recognition of Dutch continuous read and spontaneous speech from a single speaker with severe dysarthria. Results showed that both humans listeners and the three off-the-shelf ASR systems exhibit word error rates (WER) exceeding 70% on average, indicating that DSR is highly challenging for both humans and ASR systems. Fine-tuning on the dysarthric speech significantly reduced WER. Although overall WERs are still quite high (>23%), the personalised DSR models outperformed the human listeners, and performance is getting closer to being useful for supporting day-to-day communication of dysarthric speakers. Future research should focus on improving personalized DSR on spontaneous speech and longer utterances in the case of read speech, with a specific focus on particular phonemes.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了人类听者与三种现成ASR系统（Whisper-large-V3、Google Chirp 3、Omnilingual）在识别一名严重构音障碍荷兰语使用者的朗读和自发连续语音上的表现，发现两者WER均超70%；经构音障碍语音微调后，个性化模型WER降至23%以下，性能优于人类听者，接近实用水平。
AI.motivation: 开发个性化的构音障碍语音识别（DSR）模型，以支持构音障碍者的日常交流。
AI.method: 对比人类听者与三种现成ASR系统（Whisper-large-V3、Google Chirp 3、Omnilingual）在单一重度构音障碍荷兰语说话人朗读及自发语音上的识别性能，并对ASR模型进行针对性微调。
AI.result: 人类与现成ASR系统平均WER均超70%；微调后个性化DSR模型WER降至>23%，性能超越人类听者。
AI.conclusion: 个性化微调显著提升DSR性能，使模型接近实用水平；未来需重点提升对自发语音、长句朗读及特定音素的识别能力。

title: Fast Enough to Act: Spatio-Temporal Visual Token Merging for Low-Latency Robotic VLMs and VLAs
summary: Vision-language models and vision-language action models endow the robot with unprecedented capabilities. However, the input of video and high-resolution images yields a massive number of visual tokens, leading to extremely high inference latency and severely hindering the robot's real-time control. To break through this computational bottleneck, we propose ST-Merge, a plug-and-play, training-free framework that efficiently fuses redundant tokens directly during the visual encoding phase. By explicitly constructing 3D spatiotemporal coordinates, it employs a multi-queue parallel matching and weighted aggregation mechanism to achieve efficient and geometrically consistent fusion of redundant tokens across frames. In addition, we introduce a post-merge positional correction mechanism that effectively eliminates spatial deviation caused by merging by dynamically re-evaluating the rotational position code of the weighted centroid of the vision token, thereby ensuring the high-precision spatial awareness required for dexterous operation. In the Video Question Answering task on the mainstream VLM, Qwen2.5-VL, ST-Merge achieves a 2$\times$ inference speedup with only a tiny 1\% loss in precision. When deployed on the $π_{0.5}$ VLA policy, ST-Merge achieves an 8.3$\times$ speedup at 1024 $\times$ 1024 resolution and matches the baseline success rate at this high-resolution setting. At lower resolutions, it introduces a small drop in accuracy.

AI.tldr: ST-Merge 是一种即插即用、无需训练的视觉令牌融合框架，通过构建3D时空坐标与多队列匹配加权聚合，在视觉编码阶段高效压缩冗余视觉token，并引入位置校正机制保障空间精度，显著提升VLM/VLA模型推理速度（最高8.3×），仅带来轻微精度损失。
AI.motivation: 视频和高分辨率图像输入导致视觉token数量激增，造成高推理延迟，严重制约机器人实时控制能力。
AI.method: 提出ST-Merge框架：1）显式构建3D时空坐标；2）采用多队列并行匹配与加权聚合机制实现跨帧冗余token融合；3）引入后融合位置校正机制，动态重评估加权质心的旋转位置编码以消除空间偏移。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL上实现2×加速、仅1%精度下降；在π₀.₅ VLA策略上达8.3×加速（1024×1024分辨率），成功率达基线水平；低分辨率下精度略有下降。
AI.conclusion: ST-Merge有效突破VLM/VLA实时性瓶颈，在保持高空间感知精度前提下大幅提升推理效率，具备强实用性与部署友好性。

title: Whose Side Is Your Agent On? Multi-Party Principal Loyalty in LLM Agents
summary: A rapidly growing class of LLM agents is multi-party: the agent acts for a principal (who briefs it, sends follow-ups, and receives results) while also conversing in a separate channel with a counterparty whose interests may diverge (negotiating with a vendor, screening inbound requests, or mediating between employees). Here "help whoever you are talking to" is the wrong objective. The agent must stay loyal to the principal it represents without over-refusing the principal's own cooperative asks. We study this multi-party loyalty problem and contribute a measurement instrument, two mechanisms, and a structural lesson. PrincipalBench is a 75-item multi-turn benchmark with leak probes, dual judges, and an integrity-audit gate. Across 13 frontier subjects it exposes a sharp split (<=20% vs. 53.6-75.3% harm) invisible to single-turn safety evaluations: a selective cluster that declines adversarial probes while still following the principal's legitimate requests, and an over-refusing cluster that refuses broadly. (M1) A prompt-time loyalty scaffold (a fixed system prompt of seven prioritized rules, open-coded from 50+ failure trajectories) holds Claude-Sonnet to 19.4% harm and all nine selective subjects to <=20%. (M2) A per-token-KL distillation recipe transfers a prompted Qwen3-32B teacher into 8B Qwen3 and Llama-3.1 students, the strongest open-weight recipe we measure. (Lesson) Both mechanisms only move along a common leak/over-refusal trade-off rather than crossing it: improving one axis costs the other, and the jointly favorable outcome stays out of reach.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多主体场景下大语言模型（LLM）代理的忠诚度问题，提出PrincipalBench基准测试、两种提升忠诚度的机制（提示词框架与KL蒸馏），并指出忠诚性改进受限于泄露风险与过度拒绝间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理在多主体交互中（如代表委托人与利益可能冲突的对方谈判）缺乏明确忠诚目标，‘帮助当前对话者’易导致违背委托人利益或过度拒绝合理请求，亟需系统性建模与评估。
AI.method: 构建含75题、多轮对话、泄露探测、双评审与完整性审计门的PrincipalBench基准；设计七条优先级规则构成的提示词忠诚支架（M1）；提出基于每token KL散度的教师-学生模型蒸馏方法（M2）。
AI.result: PrincipalBench在13个前沿模型上揭示两类行为集群：选择性拒绝（对恶意探测拒绝但响应委托人合法请求，危害率≤20%）与过度拒绝（整体拒绝率高，危害率53.6–75.3%）；M1将Claude-Sonnet危害率压至19.4%，M2实现Qwen3-32B到8B Qwen3/Llama-3.1的有效知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: 提升LLM代理忠诚性面临根本性权衡——降低信息泄露风险必然增加过度拒绝倾向，反之亦然；当前机制仅沿该权衡曲线移动，无法突破其约束边界。

title: The Joint Effect of Quantization and Sampling Temperature on LLM Safety Alignment: A Factorial Analysis
summary: Modern LLM deployments routinely compress models and raise sampling temperature to reduce cost, latency, or repetition, yet safety evaluations usually treat these choices as fixed implementation details. This leaves a practical uncertainty: does a model that is safe at FP16 and greedy decoding remain safe after it is quantized and sampled stochastically, or do the two deployment knobs amplify one another?
